block_map.label: تَبَارَكَ ①②: sent الْفُرْقَان → عَبْدِهِ → warner to worlds; created + determined; objections: 'ifk', 'legends', 'why no angel?'; قُلْ revealed by He who knows secrets → غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا
Hour denied → سَعِير; thrown in narrow place; Day: 'did you mislead My servants?' → سُبْحَانَكَ; all messengers ate food, walked markets → trial → patience → بَصِيرًا

'Why not angels?' → arrogant; Day: sky splits → الرَّحْمَان's sovereignty; wrongdoer bites hands → 'abandoned Quran' (v.30, unique complaint); every prophet had enemy; 'why not all at once?' → رَتَّلْنَاهُ تَرْتِيلًا; prophet examples given → destroyed

PIVOT — Moses/Noah/ʿĀd/Thamūd/Rass → destroyed; evil-rained town → didn't expect resurrection; 'is this the one God sent?' ridiculed; أَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا ×3; اتَّخَذَ إِلَهَهُ هَوَاهُ (v.43, desire as god); like livestock → MORE astray

Shadow/sun; night as clothing/sleep as rest/day as resurrection; rain → pure water → dead land; فَلَا تُطِعِ + جَاهِدْهُمْ بِهِ جِهَادًا كَبِيرًا; two seas + بَرْزَخ; الْحَيِّ الَّذِي لَا يَمُوتُ (v.58, unique); تَبَارَكَ ③: بُرُوج/lamp/moon; night/day → gratitude

عِبَادُ الرَّحْمَنِ (vv.63–76): walk humbly; night prostrating; moderate spending; don't invoke/kill/commit زِنَا; EXCEPT repents → غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا; don't testify falsehood; pass ill speech with dignity
When reminded → don't fall deaf/blind; قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ + إِمَامًا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ duʿāʾ (v.74); الْغُرْفَة for patience; what would Lord care without your دُعَاء → فَسَوْفَ يَكُونُ لِزَامًا

inclusios.note: Three structural markers: v.1 (sent the Criterion) → v.10 (could have given better) → v.61 (placed stars). Densest concentration and earliest deployment in corpus. Thread: Q.25(×3)→Q.40→Q.43→Q.55→Q.67.
A (defense of revelation) ↔ B′ (repentance exception for عِبَادُ الرَّحْمَن).
C (Paradise better) → B′ (Hell evil) → A′ (Paradise good). Same words for opposite destinations throughout the ring.
vv.26/59/60/63: sovereignty on Day → Throne identity → servants. The divine name threads C→C′→B′.
vv.34/42/44 concentrated at and around the pivot. Desire-worship diagnosis closes on the most extreme form of this phrase.

special_features: اتَّخَذَ إِلَهَهُ هَوَاهُ (v.43) — most radical shirk redefinition in the Quran: idolatry as desire-worship; at exact geometric center
عِبَادُ الرَّحْمَنِ (vv.63–76) — the Quran's most sustained ethical portrait: 12 attributes across 14 verses
Three تَبَارَكَ (vv.1/10/61) — densest concentration in the Quran; earliest deployment in the corpus; structural markers
الْحَيِّ الَّذِي لَا يَمُوتُ (v.58) — unique divine title; only Quranic pairing of الْحَيّ with لَا يَمُوتُ
'Lord, my people abandoned this Quran' (v.30) — unique prophetic complaint; the only verse where the Prophet voices grief about Quranic abandonment
قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ + إِمَامًا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ duʿāʾ (v.74) — only duʿāʾ combining family bliss with spiritual leadership
رَتَّلْنَاهُ تَرْتِيلًا (v.32) — Quran's self-description of its gradual revelation methodology
مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا ×3: same phrase applied to Paradise (better) / Hell (evil) / Paradise (good) across the ring
Opens with تَبَارَكَ without any Muqaṭṭaʿāt — one of only two surahs with this opening (with Q.67)
B↔B′: deniers' fate (Hell, chained, narrow) ↔ عِبَادُ الرَّحْمَنِ ethical portrait (humble, patient, moderate)
cross_surah_flags: Q.45:23: اتَّخَذَ إِلَهَهُ هَوَاهُ NEAR-EXACT. Q.25:43 is earliest. Desire-as-god thread: Q.25→Q.45.
Q.40:64 / Q.43:85 / Q.55:78 / Q.67:1: تَبَارَكَ thread. Q.25 ×3 is earliest and densest. Thread: Q.25→Q.40→Q.43→Q.55→Q.67.
Q.28:9,13 / Q.32:17: قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ. Q.25:74 (family duʿāʾ context). Three surahs.
Q.30:48 / Q.27:63: winds before mercy. Q.25:48 (winds as good tidings before mercy) extends thread.
Q.26:3: بَاخِعٌ نَفْسَكَ. Q.25 does NOT use this phrase — Q.26 does. Q.25's grief theme handled through the objection sequence instead.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final [-ūn/-iːn/-iːm] dominant (225/227, 99.1%). طسم isolated. [-iːn] at ~65%.

pivot.verse_ar: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ الْمُرْسَلِينَ … إِنِّي لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ … وَمَا أَنَا بِطَارِدِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ … إِنَّ فِي ذَلِكَ لَآيَةً وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ

signals.thematic: Noah's narrative at exact geometric center (offset −0.002): denied → 'brother Noah: will you not fear God?' → trustworthy messenger → fear God, obey me → no payment → 'should we believe when lowest follow you?' → 'their account is on my Lord, I won't drive believers, I'm a clear warner' → 'if you don't desist → stoned' → 'Lord, my people denied' → saved in laden ship → drowned the rest. The center establishes the prophetic template AND the principle of non-discrimination: social class doesn't determine faith.
signals.lexical: كَذَّبَتْ الْمُرْسَلِينَ (v.105) — first standardized denial-opening. رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ (v.107) echoes الرُّوحُ الْأَمِينُ (v.193: Gabriel). رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ (v.109) — template's central claim. نَذِيرٌ مُبِينٌ (v.115) echoes الْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ (v.2). الْفُلْكِ الْمَشْحُونِ (v.119) → Q.37:140 (Jonah).
signals.mirror: N3 (18v) at geometric center. Flanked by N2 (Abraham, 36v) and N4 (Hūd, 18v). Template begins here; expansion is before it. Surah moves from particular (Moses/Abraham: unique) to universal (Noah→Shuʿayb: template) at midpoint.
signals.discourse: First complete five-part template deployment. Noah's distinctive challenge: 'lowest follow you' (v.111) — only narrative where social class is the objection. His response: 'I won't drive believers' — prophetic principle of non-discrimination, stated at exact center.
signals.rhyme: Pure [-iːn/-ūn] nasal throughout. The center sounds identical to the rest — the template is aurally indistinguishable from surrounding narratives. Standardization made audible.

block_map.label: طسم + آيَاتُ الْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ; لَعَلَّكَ بَاخِعٌ نَفْسَكَ; every ذِكْر from الرَّحْمَان → turn away; earth → every noble kind; proto-refrain (v.9): وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
MOSES/PHARAOH (59v): called → signs → Pharaoh; 'what is رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ?'; staff → serpent; magicians: prostrate → believe → martyrdom; كَلَّا إِنَّ مَعِيَ رَبِّي; sea parted; drowned. REFRAIN ×1
ABRAHAM (36v): 'what do you worship?'; seven attributes (vv.78–82); قَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ (v.89) as sole eschatological criterion; quarrel in Hell. REFRAIN ×2
PIVOT — NOAH (18v, offset −0.002): FIRST five-part template; 'lowest follow you' → 'I won't drive believers'; saved in laden ship; drowned the rest. REFRAIN ×3
HŪD/ʿĀD (18v): same template; 'build on every elevation'; livestock/children/gardens/springs; denied → destroyed. REFRAIN ×4
ṢĀLIḤ/THAMŪD (19v): same template; she-camel; hamstrung → punishment. REFRAIN ×5
LOT (16v): same template; 'approach males' → 'expel the pure'; saved except old woman. REFRAIN ×6
SHUʿAYB/AṢḤĀB AL-AYKAH (16v): same template; weigh justly; punishment of الظُّلَّة. REFRAIN ×7

تَنْزِيلُ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ; الرُّوحُ الْأَمِينُ (Gabriel, only Quranic title); بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِيٍّ مُبِينٍ; devils didn't bring it; وَالشُّعَرَاءُ (v.224, title word): deviators follow poets → EXCEPT believers/righteous

refrains.text: إِنَّ فِي ذَلِكَ لَآيَةً وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُمْ مُؤْمِنِينَ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
refrains.note: Most sustained identical refrain in the Quran. Eight deployments including proto-refrain at A.

parts: وَمَا أَسْأَلُكُمْ مِنْ أَجْرٍ — payment from رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
five_part_template.note: Template originates at geometric center (Noah). Moses/Abraham precede with unique narratives. Surah moves from particular to universal at its midpoint.

inclusios.note: The surah's governing refrain deployed after A and after every narrative. Most sustained identical refrain in the Quran.
A: clear Book → A′: in clear Arabic tongue. The Book's clarity stated then its linguistic form identified.
Most saturated divine title. Moses introduces it to Pharaoh; template repeats it five times; A′ opens with it (تَنْزِيلُ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ).
The trustworthy messenger of the template (N3–N7: رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ) ↔ Gabriel the Trustworthy Spirit (A′: الرُّوحُ الْأَمِينُ). The template's core claim is the Quran's own transmission credential.

special_features: Eight-fold identical refrain (إِنَّ فِي ذَلِكَ لَآيَةً … الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ) — most sustained in the Quran; includes proto-refrain at A
Five-part prophetic template ×5 (N3–N7), originating at the geometric center (Noah)
رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ ×11+ — most saturated single divine title in any Meccan surah
قَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ (v.89) — sound heart as the sole criterion on a day when wealth and children avail nothing
الرُّوحُ الْأَمِينُ (v.193) — the only Quranic title for Gabriel by name of function
كَلَّا إِنَّ مَعِيَ رَبِّي (v.62) — Moses' defiance at the sea; most confident prophetic declaration in the corpus
Magicians: six verses from belief to declared martyrdom — the fastest faith arc in the Quran
الشُّعَرَاء (v.224) — title word appears at the very end of the surah, not as its dominant subject
طسم family: Q.26/27/28 three consecutive surahs share the Muqaṭṭaʿāt; Q.26 and Q.28 share the exact opening (تِلْكَ آيَاتُ الْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ)
Surah moves from particular (Moses/Abraham: unique narratives) to universal (Noah→Shuʿayb: standardized template) at geometric center
Noah's challenge: 'should we believe when the lowest follow you?' — only narrative where social class is the stated objection to faith
cross_surah_flags: Q.37:84: قَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ EXACT. Q.26:89 (eschatological criterion) ↔ Q.37:84 (narrative description of Abraham). Same prophet, same phrase, two registers.
Q.18:6: بَاخِعٌ نَفْسَكَ EXACT. Q.26:3 ↔ Q.18:6. Two surahs: Prophet's grief at disbelief.
Q.27:1 / Q.28:1–2: طسم/طس + الْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ. Three consecutive surahs. Q.26 and Q.28 share exact opening; Q.27 varies.
Q.37:75–82: Noah parallel. Q.26 (dialogue + template) ↔ Q.37 (liturgical commemoration: سَلَامٌ + drowned others). Q.26 gives the speech; Q.37 gives the memorial.
Q.28:1–42 / Q.29:39: Pharaoh thread. Q.26 (fullest Moses/Pharaoh narrative) → Q.28 (Moses biography) → Q.29 (compressed to one verse). Progressive compression across three surahs.
Q.36:69 / Q.37:36: Poetry/madness charge. Q.26:224–227 (exempts believing poets) ↔ Q.36:69 (not taught poetry) ↔ Q.37:36 (مَجْنُون). Three different responses to the same charge.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final [-ūn/-iːn] dominant (91/93, 97.8%). طس isolated.

pivot.verse_ar: وَمَكَرُوا مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ … فَانْظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَاقِبَةُ مَكْرِهِمْ … وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ مَطَرًا فَسَاءَ مَطَرُ الْمُنْذَرِينَ

signals.thematic: Two destruction narratives as moral hinge: Ṣāliḥ/Thamūd (vv.45–53) — worship God → two factions → nine corrupters plotted to kill prophet → God counter-planned (مَكَرُوا مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا, v.50) → destroyed all. Lot (vv.54–58) — immorality → 'expel the pure' → saved except wife → evil rain. The pivot shows what happens when the call to submit — which the Queen accepted — is refused.
signals.lexical: عَاقِبَةُ مَكْرِهِمْ (v.51) echoes v.14 (عَاقِبَةُ الْمُفْسِدِينَ, B: Moses). ظَلَمُوا (v.52) echoes Queen's confession (v.44: ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي). يَتَّقُونَ (v.53) → saved. الْمُنْذَرِينَ (v.58) echoes warner theme.
signals.mirror: D (14v) between C (30v) and B′ (17v). Offset +0.048. C (wisdom accepted → submission) → D (wisdom rejected → destruction) → B′ (five أَءِلَهٌ questions proving God's exclusivity).
signals.discourse: Shifts from C's elaborate dialogue (Solomon/Queen/hoopoe/advisors/jinn) to D's staccato compression: Ṣāliḥ (2v) → plotters (3v) → outcome (2v) → Lot (2v) → outcome (3v). Destruction is swift where diplomacy was slow.
signals.rhyme: Alternating [-ūn/-iːn] standard nasal pattern. No prosodic disruption at pivot — the destruction sounds like everything else, which is the point.

block_map.label: طس + آيَاتُ الْقُرْآنِ وَكِتَابٍ مُبِينٍ; guidance for believers; prayer/zakāh/Hereafter; those who don't believe → deeds beautified → worst punishment; وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى الْقُرْآنَ مِنْ لَدُنْ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ

Moses: fire → يَا مُوسَى إِنَّهُ أَنَا اللَّهُ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ; staff/snake; white hand; nine signs → Pharaoh = فَاسِقِينَ; signs → 'obvious magic'; rejected while convinced → ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا → see end of مُفْسِدِينَ

David/Solomon: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ; language of birds; ANT VOCATIVE (يَا أَيُّهَا النَّمْلُ, only animal-to-animal); Hoopoe: Sheba/woman rules/throne; بسملة within text (v.30 — only internal); Solomon's letter; 'one with knowledge of the Book': instant throne; Queen disguise → glass palace → أَسْلَمْتُ مَعَ سُلَيْمَانَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
PIVOT — Ṣāliḥ/Thamūd: worship God → two factions → plotted to kill prophet → مَكَرُوا مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا (v.50) → destroyed all; Lot: 'expel the pure' → saved except wife → evil rain
قُلِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَامٌ عَلَى عِبَادِهِ; FIVE أَءِلَهٌ مَعَ اللَّهِ questions (vv.60–64); none knows unseen except God; don't grieve; كِتَابٍ مُبِينٍ (Register)

Quran relates to Bani Israel; dead/deaf/blind (vv.80–81); دَابَّة from earth (v.82, eschatological Beast); Horn → terrified; mountains like clouds; good deed → better / evil → Fire; commanded to worship Lord of this city + مُسْلِمِينَ; وَقُلِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (v.93 closing)

inclusios.note: vv.15/59/93: David/Solomon's gratitude (C) → transition to theological half (B′ opening) → surah's final word (A′). The surah begins, pivots, and ends on praise.
Solomon demands (v.31) → declares (v.38,42) → Queen submits (v.44) → only believers hear (v.81) → Muhammad commanded (v.91). Submission thread across entire surah.
A: آيَاتُ الْقُرْآنِ وَكِتَابٍ مُبِينٍ → A′: هَذَا الْقُرْآنَ + كِتَابٍ مُبِينٍ. Opens and closes on Quran + clear Book.
B: end of مُفْسِدِينَ → D: outcome of their مَكْر → B′: end of مُجْرِمِينَ. 'See how was the end' threads every section.
B: Moses hears God identify as Lord of the worlds → C: Queen declares she submits to Lord of the worlds. The divine title passes from revelation to conversion.

special_features: Solomon/Sheba epic (C, 30v = 32% of surah) — the Quran's most elaborate diplomatic narrative; three non-human speakers
يَا أَيُّهَا النَّمْلُ (v.18) — only animal-to-animal vocative in the Quran; ant warns her community
بسملة within text (v.30) — only internal بسملة in the Quran; Solomon's letter to the Queen of Sheba
Five أَءِلَهٌ مَعَ اللَّهِ (vv.60–64) — most concentrated rhetorical-question refrain in the corpus
Queen's three-stage conversion: consultation → diplomacy → glass palace → أَسْلَمْتُ مَعَ سُلَيْمَانَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
دَابَّة (v.82) — the eschatological Beast speaking from the earth; unique End Times figure
Divine counter-plot: مَكَرُوا مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ (v.50) near geometric center
Hoopoe delivers 5-verse sustained speech — most by any non-human speaker in the Quran
عَرْش thread: Sheba's عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ (v.23) ↔ God's رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ (v.26) — human throne dwarfed by divine
Mountains like clouds (v.88) — most vivid eschatological motion image in the corpus
Q.27/Q.34 tell Sheba's story twice: Q.27 = wisdom/submission (success); Q.34 = ingratitude/destruction (failure)
6-block structure (A/B/C/D/B′/A′) — C too massive for symmetric split; narrative half (A-B-C) ↔ theological half (B′-A′)
cross_surah_flags: Q.28:29–35: Moses theophany parallel. Q.27:7–12 (العَزِيز الحَكِيم) ↔ Q.28:29–35 (رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ). Consecutive surahs, different divine self-identifications at the bush.
Q.34:15–19: Sabaʾ/Sheba. Q.27 (Queen submits) ↔ Q.34 (ingratitude → flood → scattered). Same civilization, opposite outcomes. Quran tells Sheba's story twice.
Q.38:30–40: Solomon thread. Q.27 (wisdom/diplomacy/Sheba) ↔ Q.38 (horses/trial/wind/devils). Different facets of Solomon's story.
Q.35:39: خُلَفَاء. Q.27:62 (makes you خُلَفَاءَ الْأَرْضِ) ↔ Q.35:39 (خَلَائِفَ فِي الْأَرْضِ). Near-identical phrasing.
Q.30:52–53 / Q.35:22: Dead/deaf/blind. Q.27:80–81 NEAR-EXACT with Q.30:52–53. Three surahs sharing the passage.
Q.36:51 / Q.39:68: Horn blown. Q.27:87 (يُنْفَخُ فِي الصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ) extends the Horn thread.
Q.28:84: Good/evil deed binary. Q.27:89–90 NEAR-EXACT with Q.28:84. Consecutive surahs.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final [-ūn/-iːn] dominant (86/88, 97.7%). طسم isolated.

pivot.verse_ar: وَمَا كُنْتَ بِجَانِبِ الْغَرْبِيِّ إِذْ قَضَيْنَا إِلَى مُوسَى الْأَمْرَ وَمَا كُنْتَ مِنَ الشَّاهِدِينَ … وَمَا كُنْتَ ثَاوِيًا فِي أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ … وَلَكِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
pivot.narrative_pivot: vv.29–35 (theophany: إِنِّي أَنَا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ, offset −0.142)

signals.thematic: Three consecutive وَمَا كُنْتَ declarations: you weren't on the western side when We commanded Moses (v.44) / not among the witnesses / not dwelling in Madyan reciting (v.45) — but We were sending. The pivot is the transmission point: Moses' narrative (B) → Muhammad's mission (B′). Narrator reveals the narration's source: not human witness but divine communication.
signals.lexical: وَمَا كُنْتَ ×3 — most concentrated negative formula in surah. لِتُنْذِرَ قَوْمًا مَا أَتَاهُمْ مِنْ نَذِيرٍ (v.46) echoes v.3 mission statement. رَحْمَةً مِنْ رَبِّكَ (v.46) echoes v.43 (Moses' Book = هُدًى وَرَحْمَة).
signals.mirror: Geometric center at offset +0.006. Sits at B/B′ boundary — exact transition from Moses' narrative to Muhammad's context.
signals.discourse: Shift from third-person narration (Moses' story) to second-person address (Muhammad directly told he wasn't present). The narrator steps forward.
signals.rhyme: الشَّاهِدِينَ [-iːn] / مُرْسَلِينَ [-iːn] / يَتَذَكَّرُونَ [-ūn]. Witness/messenger [-iːn] → hoped-for audience response [-ūn].

block_map.label: طسم + آيَاتُ الْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ; recite Moses/Pharaoh بِالْحَقِّ; Pharaoh = مُفْسِدِينَ; We wanted to favor the oppressed → أَئِمَّة + الْوَارِثِينَ

Inspired Moses' mother; cast in river; Pharaoh's family → قُرَّةُ عَيْنٍ; sister followed; returned to mother → وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ; maturity → حُكْمًا وَعِلْمًا; killed man → ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي → forgiven; man from farthest city running → warns Moses; fled to Madyan
Directed toward Madyan; watered two women; رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ; القَوِيُّ الْأَمِينُ; married daughter; 8-year contract → God is وَكِيل

NARRATIVE PIVOT — perceived fire at Ṭūr; يَا مُوسَى إِنِّي أَنَا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ (v.30); staff → snake; white hand; two proofs to Pharaoh; Aaron as support; 'you and followers will prevail'

Moses came with signs → 'invented magic'; Pharaoh: مَا عَلِمْتُ لَكُمْ مِنْ إِلَهٍ غَيْرِي + tower command; seized + soldiers → threw in sea; أَئِمَّة inviting to Fire; followed by curse; gave Moses the Book after destroying generations

GEOMETRIC PIVOT vv.44–46: وَمَا كُنْتَ ×3 — you weren't there; We were sending; truth came; following أَهْوَاء; those given scripture before → believe → double reward; إِنَّكَ لَا تَهْدِي مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ (v.56)
حَرَمًا آمِنًا; أَيْنَ شُرَكَائِيَ ×2; Qārūn: treasures → arrogance → earth swallowed him; وَالْعَاقِبَةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ (v.83); Hereafter for humble; كُلُّ شَيْءٍ هَالِكٌ إِلَّا وَجْهَهُ (v.88)

inclusios.note: A (oppressed made positive leaders) ↔ C′ (Pharaoh's people made أَئِمَّة inviting to Fire). Same word, opposite moral valence.
Pharaoh IS a corrupter (A) → Qārūn told don't corrupt (A′) → Hereafter for those who don't desire corruption (A′).
C′: Moses asks who gets the عَاقِبَة → A′: الْعَاقِبَةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ. Question then answer across the ring.
B: Moses' mother reassured → Q.30:60/Q.40:55,77. Thread extends.
Pharaoh's wife (v.9) + Moses' mother (v.13) both use the phrase. Three surahs: Q.28/Q.32/Q.25.

special_features: Dual center: narrative pivot at theophany (vv.29–35, إِنِّي أَنَا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ, offset −0.142) + geometric pivot at prophetic handoff (vv.44–46, وَمَا كُنْتَ ×3, offset +0.006)
كُلُّ شَيْءٍ هَالِكٌ إِلَّا وَجْهَهُ (v.88) — everything perishes except His Face; unique cosmic closing statement in Quran
Moses' seven-station fear arc (longest emotion-arc in the corpus): birth/hiding → cast in river → nursing → return → killing → flight → Madyan
إِنَّكَ لَا تَهْدِي مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ (v.56) — most personal prophetic limitation statement; you cannot guide whom you love
Pharaoh: مَا عَلِمْتُ لَكُمْ مِنْ إِلَهٍ غَيْرِي (v.38) — most explicit self-deification in the Quran
رَجُلٌ مِنْ أَقْصَا الْمَدِينَةِ يَسْعَى (v.20) ↔ Q.36:20 EXACT — the two running men across two surahs
رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ (v.24) — most vulnerable prophetic prayer in the corpus
A′ unusually long (33 verses, 37.5% of surah) — containing full Qārūn narrative + three eschatological confrontations + closing commands
A↔A′ oppressor arc: Pharaoh (external: drowned) ↔ Qārūn (internal: swallowed) → v.83: Hereafter for those who don't desire عُلُوًّا or فَسَادًا
أَيْنَ شُرَكَائِيَ ×2 (vv.62/74) — two Day-of-Judgment partner-confrontations in A′
cross_surah_flags: Q.36:20: رَجُلٌ مِنْ أَقْصَا الْمَدِينَةِ يَسْعَى EXACT construction. Q.28:20 (warns Moses) ↔ Q.36:20 (warns his people). The Quran's parallel running-man pair.
Q.40:36–37: Pharaoh's tower. Q.28:38 (explicit self-deification + build tower) ↔ Q.40:36–37 (يَا هَامَانُ tower to reach heavens). Two surahs, complementary.
Q.29:39: Qārūn/Pharaoh/Hāmān. Q.28:76–82 (full Qārūn narrative) ↔ Q.29:39 (compressed to one verse). Consecutive surahs: story → summary.
Q.29:67: حَرَمًا آمِنًا EXACT. Q.28:57 ↔ Q.29:67. Consecutive surahs.
Q.30:37 / Q.34:36,39 / Q.42:27: يَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ. Q.28:82 (Qārūn aftermath). Thread extends.
Q.32:17 / Q.25:74: قُرَّةُ عَيْنٍ. Q.28:9/13 (×2: Pharaoh's wife + Moses' mother). Three surahs.
Q.30:60 / Q.40:55,77: وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ. Q.28:13 extends thread.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final [-ūn/-iːn] dominant (67/69, 97.1%). الم isolated. العَنْكَبُوت [-ūt] sole prosodic exception at title verse.

pivot.verse_ar: وَمَا أَنتُمْ بِمُعْجِزِينَ فِي الْأَرْضِ … وَكُلًّا أَخَذْنَا بِذَنبِهِ … وَمَا ظَلَمَهُمُ اللَّهُ وَلَكِن كَانُوا أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ … مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ اتَّخَذُوا مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ أَوْلِيَاءَ كَمَثَلِ الْعَنْكَبُوتِ اتَّخَذَتْ بَيْتًا وَإِنَّ أَوْهَنَ الْبُيُوتِ لَبَيْتُ الْعَنْكَبُوتِ

signals.thematic: Destruction catalogue: Shuʿayb/earthquake (vv.36–37), ʿĀd-Thamūd/Satan beautified (v.38), Qārūn-Pharaoh-Hāmān/Moses (v.39) → four punishments (v.40) → God didn't wrong them, they wronged themselves → spider parable: allies besides God = weakest home (v.41, العَنْكَبُوت hapax) → God knows (v.42) → parables only understood by knowledgeable (v.43) → created heavens/earth بِالْحَقِّ (v.44). Evidence → metaphor → principle.
signals.lexical: الْعَنْكَبُوت (v.41) — title word, hapax. أَنْفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ (v.40) echoes v.9 (A). الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ (v.42) echoes v.26 (B: Abraham). بِالْحَقِّ (v.44) → Q.30:8/Q.44:39/Q.45:22/Q.46:3 thread. الْعَالِمُونَ (v.43) echoes Q.35:28 العُلَمَاء.
signals.mirror: D (9v) between C (8v: Lot) and C′ (7v: Quran defense) — near-balanced. Offset +0.072; spider parable (v.41) near geometric center.
signals.discourse: Nine verses, nine distinct statements: Shuʿayb (2v) → ʿĀd-Thamūd (1v) → Qārūn-Pharaoh-Hāmān (1v) → four punishments (1v) → moral principle (1v) → spider parable (1v) → knowledge (1v) → creation truth (1v). Densest narrative-to-principle compression in corpus.
signals.rhyme: جَاثِمِينَ/مُسْتَبْصِرِينَ/سَابِقِينَ/يَظْلِمُونَ/يَعْلَمُونَ/الْعَنْكَبُوتِ/الْحَكِيمُ/الْعَالِمُونَ/الْمُؤْمِنِينَ. الْعَنْكَبُوتِ [-ūt] is the pivot's prosodic rupture — sounds like nothing else in the surah.

block_map.label: الم + do people think 'we believe' without trial?; tried those before; strives → for himself; parents: good treatment but not for shirk; believers + righteous → among righteous; carry own burdens + others'
Noah: 950 years → flood; Abraham: worship God, you worship idols → Day: deny/curse each other; Lot believed; emigrating to Lord; Isaac/Jacob + prophethood/scripture
Lot: immorality unprecedented; 'bring God's punishment!'; angels to Abraham: destroying that city; save Lot + family except wife; left clear sign for those who reason

PIVOT — Shuʿayb/ʿĀd-Thamūd/Qārūn-Pharaoh-Hāmān; four punishments (v.40); أَنْفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ (v.40); SPIDER PARABLE: allies beside God = weakest home (v.41, العَنْكَبُوت hapax); only knowledgeable understand (v.43); created بِالْحَقِّ (v.44)

Recite Book + prayer prohibits فَحْشَاء; ذِكْرُ اللَّهِ أَكْبَرُ; argue with People of Book بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ; 'our God and your God is one'; Prophet's illiteracy as proof; isn't the Book sufficient?
God sufficient as witness; يَا عِبَادِيَ My earth is spacious; every soul tastes death; Paradise chambers for believers; patient + rely on Lord; وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ ×2 (vv.61/63); most don't reason
Worldly life = amusement; Hereafter = الْحَيَوَان (hapax); board ship → call God → associate; safe sanctuary (حَرَمًا آمِنًا); وَالَّذِينَ جَاهَدُوا فِينَا لَنَهْدِيَنَّهُمْ سُبُلَنَا (v.69)

inclusios.note: Most powerful inclusio: v.6 (strives → for himself) ↔ v.69 (those who strive for US → We guide them to Our ways). Jihād transforms from self-benefit to earning divine guidance.
Opens and closes the surah: God makes evident doers of good (A) → God is with the doers of good (A′).
A and B′: hearing and knowing brackets the surah's moral range.
B (Abraham's emigration) ↔ D (spider parable conclusion).
A ↔ D: opening principle confirmed at pivot. God didn't wrong them; they wronged themselves.
B′: creation-confession ×2. Who created → who sends rain → 'God.' Thread: Q.29→Q.31→Q.39→Q.43.

special_features: الْعَنْكَبُوت (v.41) — title word, hapax; sole prosodic exception in surah [-ūt]; spider's home = weakest home = allies besides God
Jihād inclusio (vv.6/69): strives for himself (A) → strives for Us earns divine guidance (A′) — surah's most powerful bracket; jihād transforms from self-benefit to God-directed
الْحَيَوَان (v.64) — hapax; Hereafter named as 'the [true] life' — only such designation in Quran
Four punishments in one verse (v.40): stone-storm (Shuʿayb) / blast (ʿĀd-Thamūd) / earth-swallowed (Qārūn) / drowned (Pharaoh)
Densest narrative-to-principle compression: nine verses, nine distinct statements from Shuʿayb to creation-truth
Prophet's illiteracy as proof (v.48): you didn't recite any book before, didn't write — falsifiers would have doubted
Interfaith dialogue principle (v.46): argue with People of Book بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ + 'our God and your God is one'
مَوَدَّة thread extended to Q.29 (earliest): Abraham's rebuke — idols as false worldly bond (Q.29:25) → spouses (Q.30:21) → kinship (Q.42:23) → Q.60:7
ذِكْرُ اللَّهِ أَكْبَرُ (v.45) — unique superlative; remembrance of God is greater than prayer's prohibitions
الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ ×3 (vv.7/9/58) — threads A to B′
cross_surah_flags: Q.41:34: بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ. Q.29:46 (dialogue with People of Book) ↔ Q.41:34 (repel evil). Same formula, different contexts.
Q.30:21 / Q.42:23 / Q.60:7: مَوَدَّة thread. Q.29:25 is earliest — NEGATIVE (false bond via idols). Thread: Q.29→Q.30→Q.42→Q.60.
Q.30:8 / Q.44:39 / Q.45:22 / Q.46:3: creation بِالْحَقِّ. Q.29:44 extends thread.
Q.31:14–15: Parent passage. Q.29:8 (if strive for shirk, don't obey) ↔ Q.31:14–15 (NEAR-EXACT + divine parenthetical). Q.29 is briefer and earlier.
Q.28:57: حَرَمًا آمِنًا EXACT. Q.29:67 ↔ Q.28:57. Consecutive surahs.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final [-ūn/-iːn/-iːm] dominant (58/60, 96.7%). الم isolated.

pivot.verse_ar: فَأَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ لِلدِّينِ حَنِيفًا فِطْرَتَ اللَّهِ الَّتِي فَطَرَ النَّاسَ عَلَيْهَا لَا تَبْدِيلَ لِخَلْقِ اللَّهِ ذَلِكَ الدِّينُ الْقَيِّمُ وَلَكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ النَّاسَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

signals.thematic: The فِطْرَة block: v.28 — slave-parable proving partners are absurd; v.29 — wrongdoers followed أَهْوَاء without knowledge; v.30 — فِطْرَتَ اللَّهِ: the religion IS innate human nature, no change in God's creation = الدِّينُ الْقَيِّمُ; v.31 — turn, fear, pray, don't associate; v.32 — those who divided religion into sects, each faction rejoicing. Monotheism is not externally imposed but internally inherent.
signals.lexical: فِطْرَة (v.30) — hapax, only Quranic deployment. أَهْوَاءَهُمْ (v.29) — thread Q.30→Q.38→Q.42→Q.45→Q.47→Q.53 (Q.30 is earliest). الدِّينُ الْقَيِّمُ (v.30) echoes v.43. لَا يَعْلَمُونَ (v.30) threads ignorance diagnostic ×5.
signals.mirror: Offset −0.008. D (5v) flanked by C (7v) and C′ (8v). Bridges: C (creation signs) → D (religion = nature) → C′ (human response to God's economy).
signals.discourse: v.28: parable presented. v.29: adversative 'rather, they followed desires.' v.30: 2sg imperative to Prophet. v.31: plural participial. v.32: 3pl warning. Parable → diagnosis → command → communal → sectarianism warning.
signals.rhyme: يَعْقِلُونَ/نَاصِرِينَ/يَعْلَمُونَ/الْمُشْرِكِينَ/فَرِحُونَ — alternating [-ūn/-iːn]. فِطْرَة verse lands on يَعْلَمُونَ, the surah's most common sound.

block_map.label: الم + Byzantine defeat → will overcome in 3–9 years; لِلَّهِ الْأَمْرُ; believers rejoice in God's victory; وَعْدَ اللَّهِ doesn't fail; most know only apparent life; past nations destroyed

God begins/repeats creation; Hour → criminals despair; believers → garden; فَسُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ evening/morning/afternoon; living from dead/dead from living; وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ ①: created from dust → humans dispersing
وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ ②–⑥: mates+مَوَدَّة وَرَحْمَة; languages/colors; sleep; lightning fear/hope; heaven/earth stand by His command; begins/repeats creation → easier → الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
PIVOT — slave-parable (v.28); followed أَهْوَاء (v.29); فِطْرَتَ اللَّهِ = الدِّينُ الْقَيِّمُ (v.30, hapax); turn/fear/pray (v.31); divided religion → sects, each faction rejoicing (v.32)

Adversity → call God → mercy → some associate; يَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ / يَقْدِرُ; give for God's face → مُفْلِحُونَ; ribā ≠ grow with God / zakāh → multipliers (v.39); God creates/provides/kills/gives life → do partners do any? سُبْحَانَهُ

Corruption in land/sea; فَأَقِمْ وَجْهَكَ لِلدِّينِ الْقَيِّمُ (v.43, echo); حَقًّا عَلَيْنَا نَصْرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ (v.47); winds → clouds → rain → rejoice; revives earth → قَدِيرٌ; can't make dead/deaf hear; created from weakness → strength → weakness/gray hair
Hour → criminals: 'only an hour'; those given knowledge: 'this IS the Day'; God seals hearts of those who don't know; فَاصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ (v.60, echo of v.6)

inclusios.note: Opens A (God's promise doesn't fail) ↔ closes A′ (فَاصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ). Byzantine prophecy and patience command share the same foundation.
vv.6/7/30/56/59 — the surah's ignorance diagnostic threading A/D/A′.
Six consecutive in B–C, one in B′. Most sustained refrain in surah.
B and C: creation begins then repeats. Stated twice, with escalating claim (easier/highest attribute in C).
Pivot (D, with فِطْرَة) → B′. Command repeated after its theological grounding.
vv.19/24/50 — most sustained 'revives earth' deployment in corpus.
God's victory (v.5, Byzantine) → supporting believers is incumbent on God (v.47, حَقًّا عَلَيْنَا).

special_features: فِطْرَتَ اللَّهِ (v.30) — only Quranic deployment of فِطْرَة; the religion as innate human nature at exact geometric center
Byzantine prophecy (vv.2–4) — Quran's most explicit geopolitical prediction; surah named for the defeated/victorious empire
حَقًّا عَلَيْنَا نَصْرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ (v.47) — God self-obligates to support believers; unique formulation
Seven وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ — most sustained 'signs' sequence in the corpus; six consecutive in B–C
Ribā vs. zakāh (v.39) — only direct economic-spiritual contrast in the analyzed corpus
مَوَدَّة وَرَحْمَة (v.21) — placed between spouses; most intimate divine-gift description
فَاصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ (v.60) — Q.30 is now earliest in فَاصْبِرْ thread: Q.30→Q.38→Q.40→Q.46→Q.50→Q.52→Q.68
أَهْوَاء (v.29) — Q.30 is now earliest in desire-following thread: Q.30→Q.38→Q.42→Q.45→Q.47→Q.53
يُحْيِي الْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا ×3 (vv.19/24/50) — most sustained deployment in corpus
No vocative address of any kind — surah speaks in third-person and 2sg command throughout
cross_surah_flags: Q.40:55/77: فَاصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ EXACT. Q.30:60 is earliest. Thread: Q.30→Q.38→Q.40(×2)→Q.46→Q.50→Q.52→Q.68.
Q.34:36,39 / Q.42:27: يَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ. Q.30:37 extends the provision-extending thread.
Q.42:23 / Q.60:7: مَوَدَّة. Q.30:21 (spouses), Q.42:23 (kinship love), Q.60:7 (future affection). Three structurally significant deployments.
Q.41:39 / Q.35:9: يُحْيِي الْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا. Q.30 deploys ×3 — most sustained; Q.35/Q.41 each once.
Q.36:36 / Q.42:11: Creation of pairs/mates. Q.30:21 (mates from yourselves) NEAR-EXACT with Q.42:11.

surahs.rhyme_type: Mixed [-iːm/-iːn/-ūn/-iːr] (33/34, 97.1%). الم isolated. [-iːr/-ūr] at pivot.

pivot.verse_ar: يَا بُنَيَّ إِنَّهَا إِنْ تَكُ مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِنْ خَرْدَلٍ … يَا بُنَيَّ أَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ وَأْمُرْ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَانْهَ عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ وَاصْبِرْ … وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ … وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ

signals.thematic: Luqmān's core ethical advice at exact geometric center: God's omniscience reaching a mustard seed (v.16, لَطِيفٌ خَبِيرٌ) → prayer/good/evil/patience (v.17, عَزْمِ الْأُمُورِ) → no contempt or arrogance (v.18) → moderate pace and lower your voice (v.19). Theology → ethics → personal conduct.
signals.lexical: مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ (v.16) → Q.21:47 EXACT. لَطِيفٌ خَبِيرٌ (v.16) → خَبِيرٌ echoes v.29/v.34 (closing). عَزْمِ الْأُمُورِ (v.17) → Q.42:43 EXACT. مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ (v.18) unique pairing. God's acquaintance (خَبِير) and donkeys' voice (الْحَمِير) rhyme.
signals.mirror: Exact zero offset. D (4v) flanked by B (4v) and B′ (5v) — near-balanced. Mediates: B (tawhid + parents) → D (ethical core) → B′ (disputes + submission).
signals.discourse: Continuous Luqmān's quoted speech: يَا بُنَيَّ ×2 explicit (vv.16/17) + continued address (vv.18–19). Only sustained four-verse human speech in the surah. No divine interruption — unlike B's parenthetical.
signals.rhyme: خَبِيرٌ [-iːr] / الْأُمُورِ [-ūr] / فَخُورٍ [-ūr] / الْحَمِيرِ [-iːr]. Four [-iːr/-ūr] at the pivot — most concentrated sub-family. Divine knowledge (خَبِير) and animal folly (الْحَمِير) share a sound.

block_map.label: الم + الْكِتَابِ الْحَكِيمِ; guidance/mercy for الْمُحْسِنِينَ; prayer/zakāh/Hereafter = مُفْلِحُونَ; لَهْوَ الْحَدِيثِ → punishment; believers → Gardens, الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ; creation without pillars; 'show what others created'

Luqmān given الْحِكْمَة → be grateful; يَا بُنَيَّ ①: لَا تُشْرِكْ; divine parenthetical (vv.14–15): mother/weaning → grateful to Me and parents → if they strive for shirk, don't obey but accompany well

PIVOT — يَا بُنَيَّ ②: mustard seed → لَطِيفٌ خَبِيرٌ (v.16); يَا بُنَيَّ ③: prayer/good/evil/patience → عَزْمِ الْأُمُورِ (v.17); don't be contemptuous/arrogant (v.18); moderate pace, lower voice → worst sound = donkeys' (v.19)

God subjected heavens/earth, lavished favors; some dispute بِغَيْرِ عِلْمٍ; 'follow what God revealed' → 'we follow our fathers'; whoever submits → الْعُرْوَةِ الْوُثْقَى; disbelief → don't grieve → عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُورِ

Who created? 'God' → الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ; trees as pens + seas as ink → God's words not exhausted, الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ; creation like one soul; night/day/sun/moon; God = الْحَقّ; ships → صَبَّارٍ شَكُورٍ; يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ fear Day; five keys of the unseen (v.34)

inclusios.note: A (God's promise true) ↔ A′ (God's words inexhaustible). Same name-pair, both cosmic-scale claims.
B (whoever denies → God is الْغَنِيُّ الْحَمِيدُ) ↔ A′ (to God belongs everything, الْغَنِيُّ الْحَمِيدُ).
A: the Book IS wise → B: Luqmān RECEIVES wisdom. Book's quality becomes a person's gift.
لَطِيفٌ خَبِيرٌ (pivot) → خَبِيرٌ (v.29) → عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ (v.34 final). Acquaintance opens pivot, closes surah.

special_features: Luqmān's parental advice at exact geometric center (offset +0.000) — only non-prophetic parent's counsel as structural axis in the corpus
Divine parenthetical (vv.14–15): God's voice interrupts Luqmān to add parental-gratitude command — only instance in the corpus where God interrupts a human speaker on the same topic
لَهْوَ الْحَدِيثِ (v.6) ↔ كَلِمَاتُ اللَّهِ (v.27): idle speech vs. infinite divine speech — surah names its own antithesis
كَلِمَاتُ اللَّهِ مَا نَفِدَتْ (v.27): trees as pens, seas as ink — most vivid cosmic-infinity metaphor; parallels Q.18:109
Five keys of the unseen (v.34): Hour/rain/wombs/tomorrow's earnings/death's location — most concentrated divine-exclusive knowledge list in the corpus
الْعُرْوَة الْوُثْقَى (v.22) — only two deployments in Quran: Q.2:256 and Q.31:22
يَا بُنَيَّ ×3 — most tender repeated vocative; distinct from all prophetic/divine address forms
Divine knowledge (خَبِير) and donkeys' voice (الْحَمِير) share the same rhyme sound at the pivot
B↔B′ mirror: parental authority limited (don't obey parents if they push shirk) ↔ ancestral authority rejected ('we follow our fathers') — both arguments serve tawhid
عَزْمِ الْأُمُورِ (v.17) EXACT → Q.42:43: patience as resolve appears at Luqmān's pivot and Q.42's ethical closing
cross_surah_flags: Q.46:15: Parent passage parallel. Q.31:14 (mother/weakness/weaning 2 years) ↔ Q.46:15 (carried/weaning 30 months, strength at 40). Both as divine parentheticals.
Q.18:109: God's words inexhaustible. Q.31:27 (trees as pens, seas as ink) ↔ Q.18:109 (sea as ink, supplement). Two oceanic-metaphor deployments.
Q.37:102: يَا بُنَيَّ parallel. Q.31 (Luqmān to son: counsel) ↔ Q.37:102 (Abraham to son: sacrifice). Same vocative, opposite registers.
Q.2:256: الْعُرْوَةِ الْوُثْقَى EXACT. Only two Quranic deployments.
Q.42:43: عَزْمِ الْأُمُورِ EXACT. Luqmān's patience (Q.31:17) ↔ Q.42's patience+forgiveness teaching.
Q.39:38 / Q.43:9,87: وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَ. Q.31:25 extends creation-confession thread: Q.31→Q.39→Q.43.
Q.34:19 / Q.42:33: صَبَّارٍ شَكُورٍ. Three surahs now.
Q.35:3,5: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ parallel. Q.31:33 (fear Day, no father avails son) ↔ Q.35 (same address, similar themes).

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final [-ūn/-iːn/-iːm] dominant (29/30, 96.7%). الم isolated. [-ūn] at 62%.

pivot.verse_ar: إِنَّمَا يُؤْمِنُ بِآيَاتِنَا الَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا بِهَا خَرُّوا سُجَّدًا وَسَبَّحُوا بِحَمْدِ رَبِّهِمْ وَهُمْ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ تَتَجَافَى جُنُوبُهُمْ عَنِ الْمَضَاجِعِ يَدْعُونَ رَبَّهُمْ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا فَلَا تَعْلَمُ نَفْسٌ مَا أُخْفِيَ لَهُمْ مِنْ قُرَّةِ أَعْيُنٍ

signals.thematic: Portrait of the ideal believer at the center: prostrate when reminded, not arrogant (v.15); sides forsake beds, call Lord in fear and hope, spend from provision (v.16); no soul knows what hidden delight awaits as reward (v.17). Center defines what faith LOOKS LIKE — the human response to all before and after.
signals.lexical: سُجَّدًا (v.15) — title word at the center. بِآيَاتِنَا (v.15) echoes v.22. بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ (v.17) threads to vv.14/19 — 'for what they did' bridges punishment (B), reward (D), and Paradise (B′).
signals.mirror: Offset +0.017. B (5v) = B′ (5v) — perfectly balanced flanks. D (3v) is the only block describing believers' actions; all others describe God's creation, deniers' fate, or historical precedent.
signals.discourse: Shifts from إِنَّمَا (exclusive: 'ONLY those believe') → descriptive portraiture (sides forsake beds) → divine hidden promise (no soul knows). No قُلْ, no confrontation, no vocative. Pure painting.
signals.rhyme: يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ / يُنْفِقُونَ / يَعْمَلُونَ — three consecutive [-ūn] human-action terminals. The sound of the pivot IS the sound of human action.

block_map.label: الم + تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ; warn unwarned; created heavens/earth in 6 days; arranges matter; عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ; man from clay → liquid → proportioned → breathed روح → hearing/vision/hearts; little grateful
'Lost in earth → new creation?' — disbelievers; angel of death takes you; criminals hanging heads; 'We forgot you → taste eternal punishment'
PIVOT — سُجَّدًا when reminded, not arrogant (v.15, title word); sides forsake beds, call in fear+hope (v.16); no soul knows hidden قُرَّةِ أَعْيُنٍ (v.17)
Believer ≠ disobedient, not equal; Gardens of Refuge for deeds; Fire: taste what you denied; nearer punishment → perhaps repent; who more unjust than one who turns away from God's signs

Moses given the Book; leaders guiding by command when patient; Lord judges on Day; destroyed generations → walk in their dwellings; water → crops → livestock+themselves; 'when is الْفَتْح?' → belief won't benefit; فَأَعْرِضْ عَنْهُمْ وَانْتَظِرْ

inclusios.note: A: this Book revealed ↔ A′: Moses' Book given. Two Books frame the surah.
Meeting: deny (v.10) → forgot (v.14) → don't doubt (v.23). Root migrates from denial to certainty.
Bridges B (punishment), D (reward), B′ (Paradise) — same formula, three moral registers.
Remember (v.4) / hear (v.26) / see (v.27) — three cognitive faculties, echoing three created faculties: hearing/vision/hearts (v.9).

special_features: Title word سُجَّدًا at the geometric center (v.15) — surah named for the act described at its own structural core
تَتَجَافَى جُنُوبُهُمْ عَنِ الْمَضَاجِعِ (v.16) — 'their sides forsake their beds'; most physical night-worship image in the analyzed corpus
قُرَّةِ أَعْيُنٍ (v.17) — hidden delight: reward described not by what it IS but by the impossibility of knowing it; most intimate Paradise description
5-block compact ring (A/B/D/B′/A′) — 7-block structure compressed to 5; every verse serves double duty
B (5v) = B′ (5v) — perfectly balanced flanks
Three أَفَلَا rhetorical questions (v.4/v.26/v.27) using three cognitive faculties: memory/hearing/sight — mirroring the three faculties God created (hearing/vision/hearts, v.9)
الْفَتْح (vv.28–29) — eschatological 'opening': unique; same root carries judgment (Q.32)/conquest (Q.48)/divine attribute (Q.42)
Last الم surah in the Quran (Q.2/3/29/30/31/32 — Q.32 closes the family)
فَأَعْرِضْ عَنْهُمْ وَانْتَظِرْ إِنَّهُمْ مُنْتَظِرُونَ — closing on mutual waiting; both sides expecting the same moment
cross_surah_flags: Q.39:9: Night-prayer parallel. Q.32:16 (تَتَجَافَى جُنُوبُهُمْ — physical) ↔ Q.39:9 (قَانِتٌ آنَاءَ اللَّيْلِ — abstract). Both near their respective pivots.
Q.25:74: قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ. Q.32:17 (hidden divine reward) ↔ Q.25:74 (duʿāʾ for righteous families).
Q.48:1 / Q.42:26: الْفَتْح thread. Q.32:28–29 (eschatological), Q.48:1 (conquest), Q.42:26 (الْفَتَّاحُ). Three meanings, three surahs.
Q.35:19 / Q.39:9 / Q.40:58: لَا يَسْتَوُونَ. Q.32:18 (believer ≠ disobedient). Extends inequality-declaration thread.
Q.38:71–72: Creation + روح sequence. Q.32:7–9 (clay → proportioned → روح → hearing/vision/hearts → gratitude) ↔ Q.38:71–72 (clay → proportioned → روح → prostrate). Same sequence, opposite responses.
Q.33:62 / Q.35:43: سُنَّةَ اللَّهِ absence. Q.32 does not deploy it; thread begins at Q.33.

surahs.rhyme_type: Mixed tanwīn [-iːmā/-iːrā/-iːlā/-ūlā] without single-zone dominance. غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا ×5 at transitions. Pivot prosodically varied (six different consonants).

pivot.verse_ar: إِنَّ الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمَاتِ وَالْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ … مَا كَانَ مُحَمَّدٌ أَبَا أَحَدٍ مِنْ رِجَالِكُمْ وَلَكِنْ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ وَخَاتَمَ النَّبِيِّينَ

signals.thematic: Three distinctive declarations at the center: v.35 — ten gender-paired virtues, most comprehensive spiritual-parity statement; v.37 — Zayd/Zaynab intimate disclosure abolishing adoption norms; v.40 — مُحَمَّدٌ خَاتَمَ النَّبِيِّينَ, only خَاتَم deployment in the Quran. Bridges C (household defined) to C′ (mission defined).
signals.lexical: v.35 gender-paired formula echoed at v.73. سُنَّةَ اللَّهِ (v.38) echoed at v.62. كَفَى بِاللَّهِ حَسِيبًا (v.39) echoes كَفَى بِاللَّهِ وَكِيلًا (vv.3/48). مُحَمَّدٌ (v.40) — third of four Quranic namings.
signals.mirror: Center of 7-block ring at offset +0.007. D (6v) flanked by C (7v) and C′ (8v) — near-balanced. Pivot mediates household (C) → equality+legislation+cosmic status (D) → mission (C′).
signals.discourse: The ONLY block WITHOUT a vocative address in a surah with fifteen vocatives. Six consecutive non-vocative declarative statements: إِنَّ / وَمَا كَانَ / وَإِذْ / مَا كَانَ / الَّذِينَ / مَا كَانَ.
signals.rhyme: عَظِيمًا/مُبِينًا/مَفْعُولًا/مَقْدُورًا/حَسِيبًا/عَلِيمًا — six different terminal consonants. Prosodic variety unique in the surah; content shifts (equality→intimacy→cosmic status) encoded in the sound.

block_map.label: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ ①: don't obey disbelievers/hypocrites; كَفَى بِاللَّهِ وَكِيلًا; adoption ≠ real fatherhood; Prophet أَوْلَى; covenant with five prophets
Battle of Trench: armies/wind; hearts at throats; hypocrites exposed; أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ; true men of covenant; God repelled; Banu Qurayza
Wives' choice (worldly vs. God); يَا نِسَاءَ النَّبِيِّ ×2: double punishment/reward; stay in houses; أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ purification; لَطِيفًا خَبِيرًا

PIVOT — v.35: ten gender-paired virtues; v.36: no choice when God/Messenger decide; v.37: Zayd/Zaynab → adoption abolished; v.38: سُنَّةَ اللَّهِ + قَدَرًا مَقْدُورًا; v.39: fear God alone; v.40: مُحَمَّدٌ خَاتَمَ النَّبِيِّينَ
Remember God كَثِيرًا; He blesses + angels; سَلَامٌ on Day; يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ ③: شَاهِد/مُبَشِّر/نَذِير/سِرَاج; لَا تُطِعِ (=v.1); كَفَى بِاللَّهِ وَكِيلًا (=v.3)
Divorce before consummation; يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ ④: lawful wives; حِجَاب; صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ; harm → cursed; jilbāb; hypocrites → سُنَّةَ اللَّهِ no change
Hour with God; faces in Fire; Moses; speak سَدِيدًا; الْأَمَانَة offered to heavens/earth → man bore it → ظَلُومًا جَهُولًا; gender-paired judgment; غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا

inclusios.note: Opens A, closes C′ — surah's strongest echo bracket.
Reliance bracket: A and C′ close identically. Secondary bracket around the pivot.
Five deployments at transition points — highest for any divine-name pair in any surah in the corpus.
Way of God: for prophets (D, v.38) → against hypocrites (B′, v.62).
D → A′: gender-parity in virtue (v.35, ten pairs) → gender-parity in judgment (v.73, three pairs).
Most saturated paired phrase in the surah; threads every block.

special_features: Fifteen vocative addresses — highest in the corpus (يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ ×5, يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا ×7, يَا نِسَاءَ النَّبِيِّ ×2, يَا أَهْلَ يَثْرِبَ ×1)
Pivot D is the ONLY block without a vocative address — structural silence at the center
خَاتَمَ النَّبِيِّينَ (v.40) — only deployment of خَاتَم in the Quran
Ten gender-paired virtues (v.35) — most comprehensive spiritual-parity statement in the Quran
الْأَمَانَة (v.72) — cosmic Trust: offered to heavens/earth/mountains → all declined → man bore it → ظَلُومًا جَهُولًا; unique in Quran
Zayd named (v.37) — only non-prophet Companion named in the Quran; structurally necessary for adoption-law abolition
أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ (v.21) — only Quranic noun-phrase for Prophetic exemplarity
صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ (v.56) — three-agent blessing (divine/angelic/human) in one sentence; grounds the ṣalawāt practice
أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ (v.33) — household purification; most theologically charged deployment
غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا ×5 — highest count for any divine-name pair in a single surah
B↔B′: external test (battlefield) ↔ internal legislation (household); both end on سُنَّةَ اللَّهِ
C↔C′: household defined ↔ mission defined; private sphere → public mandate
cross_surah_flags: Q.47:2 / Q.48:29: مُحَمَّد named. Q.33:40 third of four namings (Q.3:144/Q.33:40/Q.47:2/Q.48:29). Q.33:40 uniquely adds خَاتَمَ النَّبِيِّينَ.
Q.48:5–6: Gender-paired formula. Q.33:35/73 ↔ Q.48:5–6 (الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ / الْمُنَافِقِينَ وَالْمُنَافِقَاتِ / الْمُشْرِكِينَ وَالْمُشْرِكَاتِ). Consecutive-range surahs.
Q.35:43 / Q.40:85 / Q.48:23: سُنَّةَ اللَّهِ thread. Q.33:38/62 (×2) — earliest confirmed deployment. Thread: Q.33→Q.35→Q.40→Q.48.
Q.48:8–10: شَاهِدًا وَمُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا. Q.33:45 NEAR-EXACT with Q.48:8. Two surahs sharing triple prophetic-mission formula.
Q.49:1–5: Prophetic-etiquette pair. Q.33 legislates Prophet's household; Q.49 legislates community conduct toward Prophet. Complementary pair.
Q.42:13: Five-prophet covenant. Q.33:7 (covenant with you/Noah/Abraham/Moses/Jesus) ↔ Q.42:13 (same five prophets). Both list all five; Q.33 takes covenant, Q.42 ordains religion.
Q.34:1/Q.35:1: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ absence. Q.33 opens يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ; Q.34/35 both open on الْحَمْدُ. Transition: Medinan legislation → Meccan theology.
Q.38:26: خَلِيفَة/خَاتَم parallel. Q.33:40 (خَاتَمَ — Seal) ↔ Q.38:26 (خَلِيفَةً — Successor). Both hapax deployments: one seals, one succeeds.

surahs.rhyme_type: Mixed [-iːr/-ūr/-iːn/-ūn/-iːm] without single-zone dominance.

signals.thematic: Universal prophetic mission: sent كَافَّةً لِلنَّاسِ (v.28) — comprehensively to all mankind. Most don't know. 'When is this promise?' (v.29) — the perpetual objection. 'You have an appointed Day' (v.30) — the definitive answer. Scope (universal) + objection (when?) + response (appointed Day) compressed into three verses.
signals.lexical: بَشِيرًا وَنَذِيرًا (v.28) — prophetic-mission formula. لَا يَعْلَمُونَ (v.28) threads knowledge root: عَالِمِ الْغَيْبِ (A) → لَا يَعْلَمُونَ (D) → عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ (B′). صَادِقِينَ (v.29) echoes truth thread (vv.6/23/26/48/49).
signals.mirror: Offset +0.028. D (3v) flanked by C (6v) and C′ (12v). Bridges theological challenges (C: five قُلْ) to eschatological demonstrations (C′: blame/Day/Fire).
signals.discourse: v.28: divine We declaration. v.29: 3rd-person human objection. v.30: قُلْ prophetic response. Complete argumentative cycle — divine initiative → human objection → prophetic answer — compressed into three verses.
signals.rhyme: يَعْلَمُونَ [-ūn] / صَادِقِينَ [-iːn] / تَسْتَقْدِمُونَ [-ūn]. Straddles [-ūn] and [-iːn] — the surah's prosodic alternation.

pivot.verse_ar: وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ إِلَّا كَافَّةً لِلنَّاسِ بَشِيرًا وَنَذِيرًا وَلَكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ النَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

block_map.label: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ + الْحَكِيمُ الْخَبِيرُ; Hour will come; عَالِمِ الْغَيْبِ; not an atom escapes; believers → provision; heaven/earth sign for عَبْدٍ مُنِيبٍ

David: mountains/birds echo; iron softened → armor; Solomon: wind/copper/jinn; 'few servants are grateful'; Sabaʾ: two gardens → flood → scattered; signs for صَبَّارٍ شَكُورٍ; Iblīs confirmed his assumption

قُلْ ×5 challenges: invoke partners → don't own atom; intercession only by permission; who provides?; we/you: one on guidance one in error; Lord will gather us بِالْحَقِّ; show me your partners → اللَّهُ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
PIVOT — Sent كَافَّةً لِلنَّاسِ بَشِيرًا وَنَذِيرًا, most don't know (v.28); 'when is this promise?' (v.29); قُلْ you have an appointed Day (v.30)
Won't believe in Quran; weak/arrogant mutual blame ×3; wealth/children no nearness; extends/restricts provision ×2; Day: angels didn't worship you → they worshipped jinn; taste Fire
Signs recited → 'fabrication'; those before denied; 'one thing: stand + think'; no payment → from God; Lord projects truth; عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ; truth has come; if I err → against self
If you could see: terrified, no escape; 'we believe' → too late; disbelieved + assaulted unseen; barrier → as done with their kind; شَكٍّ مُرِيبٍ

inclusios.note: Knows the unseen (A) → Knower of all unseen, intensified form (B′). Knowledge arc frames the surah.
A → C: God tracks every atom → idols don't control an atom. Same measure, opposite agents.
B → A′: doubt about the Hereafter (Iblīs test result) → doubt as their permanent state at the end.
Q.34:1 and Q.35:1 both open on الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ — only consecutive الْحَمْدُ pair in the corpus. Q.34: ownership; Q.35: origination.
Provision extended/restricted — stated twice in C′. Q.42's pivot theology as C′ refrain.

special_features: Thirteen قُلْ commands — new corpus record (surpassing Q.39's eleven)
كَافَّةً لِلنَّاسِ (v.28) — most explicit universal-mission declaration; كَافَّةً modifying prophetic scope to all humanity is unique in the Quran
Sabaʾ narrative (vv.15–19): gratitude test — two gardens, told to be grateful, turned away, flood, scattered; surah named for the civilization that failed the test
Iblīs confirmed his assumption (v.20): unique verse — Iblīs' ظَنّ validated by Sabaʾ's ingratitude; only such 'confirmation' in the corpus
'One thing' advice (v.46): stand for God and think — surah reduces its argument to a single rational act
Weak/arrogant mutual blame exchange (vv.31–33) — three verses of Hell-dialogue, most sustained in the Ḥawāmīm-adjacent range
عَالِمِ الْغَيْبِ (A, v.3) → لَا يَعْلَمُونَ (D, v.28) → عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ (B′, v.48): knowledge arc from divine knowing through human ignorance to ultimate divine knowing, intensified
القَفَل Q.34:1 + Q.35:1 الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ pair — only consecutive praise-opening pair in analyzed corpus
cross_surah_flags: Q.35:1: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ consecutive pair. Q.34:1 (ownership) + Q.35:1 (origination) — only such pair in corpus.
Q.35:26: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ EXACT. Q.34:45 ↔ Q.35:26. Consecutive surahs.
Q.42:27: يَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ لِمَنْ يَشَاءُ وَيَقْدِرُ. Q.34:36/39 (×2) share provision-extending formula with Q.42's pivot. Q.34's C′ refrain = Q.42's structural center.
Q.38:82–85 / Q.53:23,28: Iblīs assumption/ظَنّ thread. Q.34:20 (Iblīs confirmed his ظَنّ) connects to Q.38 Iblīs narrative and الظَّنّ thread.
Q.38:17–40: David/Solomon thread. Q.34:10–14 (craftsmanship: iron/copper/jinn) ↔ Q.38:17–40 (trial and repentance). Two surahs, complementary emphases.
Q.21:107: Universal-mission parallel. Q.34:28 (كَافَّةً لِلنَّاسِ) ↔ Q.21:107 (رَحْمَةً لِلْعَالَمِينَ). Two universal-mission verses with different terms.
Q.39:44: Intercession only by permission. Q.34:23 ↔ Q.39:44. Consecutive-range surahs.

surahs.rhyme_type: [-iːr/-ūr] dominant (42/45, 93.3%). [-ūr] cluster at pivot (vv.20–22).

signals.thematic: Four cosmic inequalities cascading from sensory to existential: blind≠seeing (v.19), darkness≠light (v.20), shade≠heat (v.21), living≠dead (v.22). Conclusion: God makes hear whom He wills; Prophet cannot make those in graves hear. Declares limits of human agency within divine sovereignty.
signals.lexical: الْأَعْمَى/الْبَصِيرُ (v.19) echoes Q.40:58 EXACT. الْأَحْيَاءُ/الْأَمْوَاتُ (v.22) echoes resurrection theme (v.9). الْقُبُورِ — Prophet addressing graves that can't hear. نَذِيرٌ (v.23) closes pivot → threads to C′ warning chain.
signals.mirror: Offset −0.056. D (4v) flanked by C (4v) and C′ (4v) — perfectly balanced flanks. C (human need + individual responsibility) → D (ontological inequality) → C′ (prophetic warning + historical pattern).
signals.discourse: Four consecutive لَا يَسْتَوِي declarations — no address, no narrative, no command. Pure declarative theology. Then v.22 shifts to 2sg Prophet: 'you cannot make those in graves hear.' v.23: 'you are only a warner.' Cosmic declaration → prophetic limitation.
signals.rhyme: الْبَصِيرُ [-iːr] / النُّورُ [-ūr] / الْحَرُورُ [-ūr] / الْقُبُورِ [-ūr]. Three consecutive [-ūr] — surah's most concentrated sub-family run. Pivot sounds distinct from surrounding blocks.

pivot.verse_ar: وَلَا يَسْتَوِي الْأَعْمَى وَالْبَصِيرُ وَلَا الظُّلُمَاتُ وَلَا النُّورُ وَلَا الظِّلُّ وَلَا الْحَرُورُ وَمَا يَسْتَوِي الْأَحْيَاءُ وَلَا الْأَمْوَاتُ

block_map.label: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ فَاطِرِ (title); angels with wings; يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ ×2; tawhid; Satan = enemy; binary punishment/reward; evil deeds beautified; عَلِيمٌ بِمَا يَصْنَعُونَ
Winds/clouds/dead land = resurrection; عِزَّة belongs to God; good speech ascends; two seas; day/night; ذَلِكُمُ اللَّهُ رَبُّكُمْ; idols don't own قِطْمِير; none informs like خَبِير
يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ: you are الْفُقَرَاءُ; الْغَنِيُّ الْحَمِيدُ; no bearer bears another's; only warn those who fear unseen; purification for own soul; to God the مَصِير
PIVOT — blind≠seeing (v.19); darkness≠light (v.20); shade≠heat (v.21); living≠dead + 'you can't make graves hear' + 'you are only a warner' (v.22–23)
Sent بِالْحَقِّ بَشِيرًا وَنَذِيرًا; every nation had a warner; denied before: clear proofs/scriptures/enlightening Book; I seized the disbelievers

Rain → varied fruits; varied mountains/creatures; إِنَّمَا يَخْشَى اللَّهَ الْعُلَمَاءُ (v.28); three-tier inheritance (v.32); Gardens of ʿAdn; الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ removed sorrow; Hell: no lightening; عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُورِ
خَلَائِفَ on earth; show what your partners created; God holds heavens/earth → حَلِيمًا غَفُورًا; warner came → only نُفُور; سُنَّتَ اللَّهِ ×2; stronger nations seized; عَلِيمًا قَدِيرًا; بَصِيرًا

inclusios.note: Praise: cosmic creation (A, v.1) → Paradise entry (B′, v.34: 'removed our sorrow'). Surah opens on praise; righteous echo it.
Only surah in corpus deploying this divine-name pair twice. God appreciates servants' efforts.
No change + no alteration. Strongest statement of divine historical consistency. → Q.40:85 / Q.48:23 thread.

inclusios.pair: عَلِيمٌ: what they do / what is within breasts
inclusios.note: Knowing what they do (A) → Knowing what is within breasts (B′). Divine knowledge frames A and B′.
Four consecutive inequality declarations at the pivot — the surah's structural and theological center.

special_features: إِنَّمَا يَخْشَى اللَّهَ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ الْعُلَمَاءُ (v.28) — only verse in the Quran naming العُلَمَاء as the specific group that fears God; placed after color-diversity passage, making empirical attention to creation a spiritual act
Three-tier Book inheritance (v.32): ظَالِمٌ لِنَفْسِهِ / مُقْتَصِدٌ / سَابِقٌ بِالْخَيْرَاتِ — only explicit three-tier classification of the believing community in the corpus
غَفُورٌ شَكُورٌ ×2 (vv.30/34) — only surah deploying this divine-name pair twice; شَكُورٌ is among rarest divine names
C (4v) = C′ (4v) — perfectly balanced flanks; unique geometry in the corpus
يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ ×3 — surah addresses all humanity, not believers specifically
الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ opens (v.1) and is echoed by Paradise inhabitants (v.34) — praise frames the surah
سُنَّتَ اللَّهِ ×2 in one verse (v.43): no change + no alteration — strongest historical-consistency statement
خَلَائِفَ فِي الْأَرْضِ (v.39, plural) — plural of Q.38:26 خَلِيفَةً (David, singular)
B↔B′ mirror: cosmological signs (B: winds/seas/day-night) → epistemological response (B′: only العُلَمَاء truly read those signs)
cross_surah_flags: Q.39:46 / Q.42:11: فَاطِرِ السَّمَاوَاتِ. Q.35:1 (title) shares Originator title with Q.39:46 and Q.42:11. Three surahs.
Q.40:58: وَمَا يَسْتَوِي الْأَعْمَى وَالْبَصِيرُ EXACT. Q.35:19 and Q.40:58 share the blind/seeing inequality formula.
Q.40:85 / Q.48:23: سُنَّتَ اللَّهِ thread. Q.35:43 (×2 in one verse) is earliest and most emphatic. Thread: Q.35→Q.40→Q.48.
Q.38:26: خَلَائِف/خَلِيفَة. Q.35:39 (plural: successors) ↔ Q.38:26 (singular: David). Singular-to-plural transition.
Q.39:7: لَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَى EXACT. Q.35:18 ↔ Q.39:7. Individual-accountability formula.
Q.42:23: غَفُورٌ شَكُورٌ. Q.35:30/34 (×2) and Q.42:23. Two surahs, three total deployments.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final [-iːn/-ūn] dominant (81/83, 97.6%). يس Muqaṭṭaʿ + الْحَكِيمِ isolated.

signals.thematic: Three-verse diagnostic of spiritual refusal: v.45 — told to beware of what's before and behind, silence/indifference. v.46 — no sign comes except they turn away. v.47 — told to spend from God's provision, disbelievers mock: 'should we feed whom God could have fed?' Center names the disease: indifference, rejection of signs, refusal to act. Bridges creation-signs (C) to eschatological consequences (C′).
signals.lexical: آيَة (v.46) echoes the three آيَةٌ لَهُمُ of C (vv.33/37/41). مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ اللَّهُ (v.47) echoes provision theme through C. مُعْرِضِينَ (v.46: turning away). ضَلَالٍ مُبِينٍ (v.47) echoes 'clear error' formula.
signals.mirror: Offset +0.048 from exact center. D (3v) flanked by C (12v) and C′ (7v). Pivot mediates creation-signs (C) and eschatological realization (C′).
signals.discourse: Three passive/conditional constructions: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ (v.45) → وَمَا تَأْتِيهِمْ (v.46) → وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ (v.47). Things are said TO them, signs come TO them — they do nothing. Discourse mirrors content.
signals.rhyme: تُرْحَمُونَ [-ūn] / مُعْرِضِينَ [-iːn] / مُبِينٍ [-iːn]. Sound shifts from hoped-for mercy (v.45) to confirmed rejection (vv.46–47).

pivot.verse_ar: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِمْ مِنْ آيَةٍ مِنْ آيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ

block_map.label: يس + oath by الْقُرْآنِ الْحَكِيمِ; إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ الْمُرْسَلِينَ; تَنْزِيلَ الْعَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ; warn unwarned; word upon most; shackles/barriers/covered; only warn who follows ذِكْر; إِمَامٍ مُبِينٍ

Parable of the town: two + third messenger; 'just humans'; **running man from farthest city**: يَا قَوْمِ follow messengers; why not worship Creator?; إِنِّي آمَنْتُ; 'enter Paradise'; يَا حَسْرَةً; one shout → extinguished; generations destroyed
Three آيَة signs: (1) dead earth → grain (vv.33–36, سُبْحَانَ pairs); (2) night/day, sun/moon in orbits (vv.37–40); (3) ark, offspring, could drown → mercy (vv.41–44)
PIVOT — 'Fear before/behind you, perhaps mercy' (v.45); no sign except they turn away (v.46); 'spend from provision' → 'should we feed whom God could have fed? You're in clear error' (v.47)

'When is this promise?'; one blast seizes while disputing; can't instruct/return to families; Horn → from graves; 'who raised us?' → 'this is what الرَّحْمَان promised'; one blast → all present; no soul wronged
Paradise: companions/spouses/fruit; سَلَامٌ قَوْلًا مِنْ رَبٍّ رَحِيمٍ (v.58); يَا بَنِي آدَمَ don't worship Satan; صِرَاطٌ مُسْتَقِيمٌ; seal mouths/hands speak/feet testify; aging reverses creation

Not taught poetry → ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْآنٌ مُبِينٌ; warn whoever is alive; livestock created; 'who gives life to bones?' → قُلْ He who produced them first; كُنْ فَيَكُونُ; فَسُبْحَانَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ

inclusios.note: Running man's declaration (v.22) = surah's closing word (v.83). The unnamed marginal figure's theology frames the entire surah.
A: Prophet's path ↔ B′: 'worship Me, this is a straight path' — God's command to all humanity.
One blast: past destruction (B, v.29) → seizure while disputing (C′, v.49) → resurrection (C′, v.53). Three identical catalysts, three different outcomes.
Opens three creation-signs in C: earth (v.33), sky/orbits (v.37), sea/ark (v.41). All three present evidence that the pivot rejects.
Creation glorified (C, v.36) → sovereignty glorified (A′, v.83: بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ).
A: oath by الْقُرْآنِ الْحَكِيمِ / only warn who follows الذِّكْر ↔ A′: it is ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْآنٌ مُبِينٌ.

special_features: Running man (vv.20–27): unnamed marginal believer from farthest city — enters Paradise; his إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ (v.22) becomes the surah's final word (v.83)
سَلَامٌ قَوْلًا مِنْ رَبٍّ رَحِيمٍ (v.58) — only verse in corpus where God Himself speaks 'Peace' to the righteous
صَيْحَة وَاحِدَة ×3: one blast as destruction (B) / seizure (C′) / resurrection (C′) — same instrument, three eschatological outcomes
Sealed mouths / hands speak / feet testify (v.65) — body-parts counter-testimony; → Q.41:20–21 parallel (different limbs)
يَا حَسْرَةً عَلَى الْعِبَادِ (v.30) — divine regret-exclamation; rare vocative with God as the lamenting subject
v.69 preempts the poetry charge: 'We did not teach him poetry' — Q.36 refutes before Q.37 quotes
Running man (Q.36) ↔ Believing Man (Q.40): two unnamed believers flanking the Ḥawāmīm boundary, same structural function
كُنْ فَيَكُونُ (v.82) — shared with Q.40:68; both near surah closings
فَسُبْحَانَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ — sovereignty closing echoes Q.67's opening structure
cross_surah_flags: Q.40:28–44: Running man ↔ Believing Man parallel. Both unnamed, both marginal, both speak truth to hostile structures. Q.36's man dies → Paradise; Q.40's man is protected. Two unnamed believers flanking the Ḥawāmīm boundary.
Q.41:20–21: Body-parts testimony. Q.36:65 (mouths/hands/feet) ↔ Q.41:20–21 (hearing/eyes/skins). Different limbs, same principle: body betrays what mouth denied.
Q.40:68: كُنْ فَيَكُونُ EXACT. Q.36:82 and Q.40:68 — both near surah closings.
Q.37:1: Consecutive oath structure. Q.36 opens: يس + oath by الْقُرْآنِ الْحَكِيمِ. Q.37 opens: وَالصَّافَّاتِ (angelic oath). Book oath → angel oath.
Q.39:68 / Q.50:20: Horn blown. Q.36:51 among earliest Horn-resurrection deployments. Thread: Q.36→Q.39→Q.50.
Q.37:36: Poetry charge. Q.36:69 preempts ('We did not teach him poetry'); Q.37:36 quotes and answers ('mad poet'). Q.36 refutes before Q.37 names.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final dominant (178/182, 97.8%). Oath zone vv.1–3 [-an] tanwīn isolated. [-iːn/-ūn] throughout.

signals.thematic: Abraham's tawhid demonstration: 'don't you eat?' / 'why don't you speak?' / strikes them / 'do you worship what you carve?' / 'God created you and what you do.' Opening tawhid (v.4: your God is One) empirically proven at center: idols can't eat, speak, or act.
signals.lexical: خَلَقَكُمْ (v.96) — creation root threads from v.11 (stronger creation?) through center to vv.125/150. يَعْبُدُونَ (v.95) — worship root's most concentrated deployment. Both key roots converge at the pivot.
signals.mirror: Center of 7-block ring at offset +0.011. D (39v) flanked by C (34v) and C′ (35v) — most balanced flanks in the corpus. Geometric center falls within the Abraham sub-block of D.
signals.discourse: Abraham addresses objects (idols, vv.91–92) then people (vv.95–96). Unique discourse: prophet speaks to non-entities, proving their non-entity-ness by their silence.
signals.rhyme: Five [-ūn] (تَأْكُلُونَ/تَنْطِقُونَ/يَزِفُّونَ/تَنْحِتُونَ/تَعْمَلُونَ) and one [-iːn]. Human-action terminal dominates — Abraham exposes the absence of action in the idols.

pivot.verse_ar: أَتَعْبُدُونَ مَا تَنْحِتُونَ وَاللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمْ وَمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

block_map.label: Oath ×3: angels in rows/driving/reciting ذِكْرًا; إِنَّ إِلَهَكُمْ لَوَاحِدٌ; Lord of heavens/earth/sunrises; adorned sky; الْمَلَإِ الْأَعْلَى; piercing flame
Stronger creation? Clay; they mock; 'mad poet'; resurrected?; one shout; يَوْمَ الْفَصْلِ; wrongdoers path of Hell; mutual blame; EXCEPT عِبَادَ اللَّهِ الْمُخْلَصِينَ (v.40)
Paradise: provision/fruits/wine/women; companion story (inter-realm dialogue, vv.51–59); الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ; Zaqqūm; fathers astray; EXCEPT عِبَادَ اللَّهِ الْمُخْلَصِينَ (v.74)

PIVOT — Noah (vv.75–82); Abraham (vv.83–113): sound heart → idol-confrontation (vv.91–96 at geometric center) → fire → SACRIFICE (vv.102–107) → سَلَامٌ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ → Isaac; نَجْزِي الْمُحْسِنِينَ ×2
Moses/Aaron (vv.114–122); Elias (vv.123–132); Lot (vv.133–138); Jonah (vv.139–148); سَلَامٌ ×2; نَجْزِي ×3; saved from great affliction ×2
Daughters for God / sons for you? Angels female?; إِفْك; سُبْحَانَ; EXCEPT عِبَادَ اللَّهِ الْمُخْلَصِينَ (v.160); angels: 'we are الصَّافُّونَ' (title echo)
Our word preceded → messengers victorious; فَتَوَلَّ ×2; سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ; وَسَلَامٌ عَلَى الْمُرْسَلِينَ; وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

inclusios.note: Title word: oath BY angels (A, v.1) → angels' OWN declaration 'we are those who line up' (B′, v.165). Frames the surah.
Individual salutations: Noah (v.79), Abraham (v.109), Moses/Aaron (v.120), Elias (v.130) → collective: all messengers (v.181).
Exception clause as structural marker: after each punishment zone and in the polemic.
Reward refrain closing every prophetic narrative except Lot and Jonah.
Fātiḥah echo at final verse. Four surahs: Q.37/39/40 + Q.1.
B′ and A′: exalt God above what they describe. v.180 adds رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ.
D and C′ mirror: Noah saved from great affliction (v.76), Moses/Aaron saved from great affliction (v.115).
Doubled at A′ — 'leave them for a time' register, distinct from patience commands.

special_features: Longest surah in the analyzed corpus (182 verses)
Five-part سَلَامٌ عَلَى refrain — most distributed salutation system in the corpus; four individual → one collective
عِبَادَ اللَّهِ الْمُخْلَصِينَ ×5 — exception clause as ring-structural marker throughout every punishment zone
Companion story (vv.51–59) — only scene where a Paradise-dweller looks into Hell and addresses its inhabitant
Triple closing (vv.180–182): سُبْحَانَ / سَلَامٌ / الْحَمْدُ — only triple-formula closing in the corpus; maps three concerns: theology/prophetology/doxology
Abraham's sacrifice (vv.102–107) — moral climax of D; both public proof (idols broken) and private test (son offered) of tawhid in one center block
الصَّافَّاتِ (v.1, oath BY angels) → الصَّافُّونَ (v.165, angels' OWN declaration) — title word as inclusio
شَاعِرٍ مَجْنُونٍ (v.36) — earliest confirmed mad-poet charge in the corpus
الزَّقُّوم (vv.62–66) — earliest Zaqqūm description in the corpus
C (34v) ≈ C′ (35v) — most perfectly balanced flanks in the corpus
Six prophetic narratives in D+C′: Noah, Abraham, Moses/Aaron, Elias, Lot, Jonah
وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِي الْآخِرِينَ ×4 — 'left favorable mention among later generations' immediately precedes each سَلَامٌ
cross_surah_flags: Q.1:2 / Q.39:75 / Q.40:65: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ. Q.37:182 — now four surahs share the Fātiḥah echo.
Q.38:69: الْمَلَإِ الْأَعْلَى EXACT. Q.37:8 ↔ Q.38:69. Consecutive surahs.
Q.44:43–46 / Q.56:52: الزَّقُّوم thread. Q.37:62–66 is the earliest. Thread: Q.37→Q.44→Q.56.
Q.41:25 / Q.43:36/38 / Q.50:23/27: قَرِين thread. Q.37:51 (Paradise companion). Thread now: Q.37→Q.41→Q.43→Q.50.
Q.44:14 / Q.52:29–30: شَاعِرٍ مَجْنُونٍ. Q.37:36 is the earliest mad-poet charge. Thread: Q.37→Q.44→Q.51→Q.52→Q.68→Q.81.
Q.43:16–19 / Q.52:39 / Q.53:21: daughters/angels polemic. Q.37:149–157 is most sustained (9 verses). Thread: Q.37→Q.43→Q.52→Q.53.

surahs.rhyme_type: Long-ā + consonant [-āb/-ād/-ār] dominant (85/88, 96.6%). [-āb] most common (~23 verses). ص Muqaṭṭaʿ isolated. Distinctive non-Ḥawāmīm prosodic profile.

signals.thematic: Job's trial at the center: Satan's affliction → divine healing → family restored doubled → verdict: نِعْمَ الْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُ أَوَّابٌ. Briefest prophetic narrative at the ring's core — no kingdom, no subjected nature, just affliction and patience. Servanthood measured by turning back to God, not worldly condition.
signals.lexical: عَبْدَنَا (v.41) — third of four 'Our servant' deployments. أَوَّابٌ (v.44) — fourth of four, closing the أَوَّاب cycle. نِعْمَ الْعَبْدُ (v.44) — second of two identical verdicts (← v.30 Solomon). ذِكْرَى لِأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ (v.43) — second of two (← v.29). رَحْمَةً مِنَّا (v.43) echoes mercy framework.
signals.mirror: Center of 7-block ring at offset −0.023. D (4v) flanked by C (Solomon, 11v) and C′ (patriarchs, 4v). Job between servants with everything (Solomon) and servants chosen for everything (patriarchs) — the servant with nothing.
signals.discourse: Third وَاذْكُرْ command opens the block. Job's sole quoted speech (v.41), God's imperative response (v.42: strike the ground), divine verdict (v.44). Three-act micro-drama: cry → command → commendation.
signals.rhyme: وَعَذَابٍ/وَشَرَابٌ/الْأَلْبَابِ/أَوَّابٌ — four consecutive [-āb] terminals. أَوَّابٌ (turning back) shares sound of الْأَلْبَابِ (understanding): patience and insight rhyme.

pivot.verse_ar: وَاذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَى رَبَّهُ أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنْتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ

block_map.label: ص + oath by Quran ذِي الذِّكْرِ; pride/dissension; 'one God? Curious!'; haven't tasted My punishment; الأَحْزَاب catalogue; 'hasten our share'
اصْبِرْ + remember David أَوَّاب; mountains/birds glorify; kingdom + فَصْلَ الْخِطَابِ; adversaries parable; judged بِالْحَقِّ; repented; يَا دَاوُودُ خَلِيفَة; blessed Book → أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ
Solomon نِعْمَ الْعَبْدُ أَوَّابٌ; horses → preferred love of good; tried → body on throne; kingdom unlike any → الْوَهَّابُ; wind/devils/divers subjected; nearness + حُسْنَ مَآبٍ

PIVOT — وَاذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا أَيُّوبَ: Satan touched me with hardship; strike ground → healing spring; family restored doubled, ذِكْرَى لِأُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ; bunch of grass → don't break oath; نِعْمَ الْعَبْدُ إِنَّهُ أَوَّابٌ
وَاذْكُرْ Abraham/Isaac/Jacob → أُولِي الْأَيْدِي وَالْأَبْصَارِ; chosen for ذِكْرَى الدَّارِ; الْمُصْطَفَيْنَ الْأَخْيَارِ; Ishmael/Elisha/Dhul-Kifl → الْأَخْيَارِ
هَذَا ذِكْرٌ; righteous → Gardens, open doors, reclining, fruit, drink; women of limiting glances; حُسْنَ مَآبٍ; No depletion; transgressors → شَرَّ مَآبٍ; Hell-quarrel (longest in corpus)
قُلْ warner; الْوَاحِدُ الْقَهَّارُ proclaimed; Iblīs narrative (15v): clay/fire, expelled, reprieved, 'I'll mislead all'; fill Hell; ذِكْرٌ لِلْعَالَمِينَ; you'll know after a time

inclusios.note: Frames surah: Quran = ذِكْر (oath, v.1) → this = ذِكْر (transition, v.49) → ذِكْر for the worlds (closing, v.87).
A: pagans mock the one God ↔ A′: Prophet proclaims it. Same title, opposite speakers.
Good return: David (v.25), Solomon (v.40), righteous (v.49). Evil return: transgressors (v.55). Ratio 3:1 maps moral optimism.
Identical verdict for Solomon (had everything) and Job (lost everything). Frames C and D.
David (v.17) → birds (v.19) → Solomon (v.30) → Job (v.44). Cycle completes at the pivot.
B's close (v.29) and D's center (v.43). Understanding bookmarks the pivot approach.

special_features: أَوَّابٌ ×4 leitmotif (David/birds/Solomon/Job) — servanthood defined as turning back; cycle completes at the pivot
نِعْمَ الْعَبْدُ ×2 identical verdict for Solomon (had everything) and Job (lost everything) — the standard is the same regardless of condition
خَلِيفَة singular (v.26, David) — only other is Q.2:30 (Adam); Q.38 contains both appointment and the Iblīs rebellion that backstories it
Iblīs narrative (vv.71–85, 15 verses): origin of pride (أَنَا خَيْرٌ مِنْهُ) answering the surah's opening pride (v.2: فِي عِزَّةٍ وَشِقَاقٍ)
بِيَدَيَّ (v.75) — 'created with My two hands'; unique dual-hand divine creation form in the Quran
Hell-quarrel (vv.59–64) — most sustained inter-damned dialogue in the corpus
[-āb] rhyme encodes أَوَّاب/الْحِسَاب/مَآب/الْأَلْبَاب — the sound IS the theology; four consecutive [-āb] at the pivot
Three وَاذْكُرْ commands (vv.17/41/45) open David/Job/patriarchs — structural rhythm of the prophetic cycle
الْوَاحِدُ الْقَهَّارُ mocked in A (v.5) → proclaimed in A′ (v.65) — same title, opposite speakers
Q.38 does NOT use تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ; opens with Quran-oath instead — different register from Ḥawāmīm
cross_surah_flags: Q.39:1 / Q.40:2: Book-revelation formula transition. Q.38 opens with oath (وَالْقُرْآنِ ذِي الذِّكْرِ); Q.39:1 introduces تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ; Q.40:2 adopts it for Ḥawāmīm.
Q.40:24: سَاحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ EXACT. Q.38:4 (about Muhammad) ↔ Q.40:24 (about Moses). Same charge, two prophets.
Q.2:30: خَلِيفَة singular. Q.38:26 (David) ↔ Q.2:30 (Adam). Only two singular deployments in Quran. Q.38 contains both David's appointment and the Iblīs rebellion backstory.
Q.37:8: الْمَلَإِ الْأَعْلَى EXACT. Q.38:69 ↔ Q.37:8. Consecutive surahs.
Q.39:4: الْوَاحِدُ الْقَهَّارُ. Q.38:65 closes with it; Q.39:4 opens with it. Consecutive surahs, same divine-name pair.
Q.39:5/66 / Q.40:3: الْعَزِيزُ الْغَفَّارُ. Q.38:66 ↔ Q.39:5. Consecutive surahs.
Q.40:55 / Q.46:35: فَاصْبِرْ/اصْبِرْ thread. Q.38:17 (اصْبِرْ linked to David narrative). Q.38 is earliest: patience → remember a prophet. Thread: Q.38→Q.40(×2)→Q.46.
Q.45:18 / Q.47:14 / Q.53:23: الْهَوَى thread. Q.38:26 (لَا تَتَّبِعِ الْهَوَى — God's command to David). Thread now: Q.38→Q.42→Q.43→Q.45→Q.47→Q.53.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal + [-iːC] dominant (74/75). No Muqaṭṭaʿāt. [-iːna] threads the twin-procession and final verse.

signals.thematic: Creation-confession → sufficiency declaration at exact center. They admit God created; the pivot asks: can your idols remove His harm or withhold His mercy? حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ — God is sufficient. Preceded by أَلَيْسَ اللَّهُ بِكَافٍ عَبْدَهُ (v.36). Everything before establishes the grounds; everything after demonstrates the consequences.
signals.lexical: وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَ — creation-question formula echoing Q.43:9/87. مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ — fifth of five 'besides God' deployments. حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ echoes بِكَافٍ عَبْدَهُ (v.36). قُلْ ×2 within one verse.
signals.mirror: Center of 7-block ring at exact zero offset (v.38 of 75). D (5v) flanked by C (17v) and C′ (12v).
signals.discourse: قُلْ ×2 within one verse — 'Say: have you considered?' then 'Say: God is sufficient for me.' Two consecutive prophetic declarations in one pivot verse.
signals.rhyme: الْمُتَوَكِّلُونَ [-ūna] — the pivot's terminal names 'those who rely.' Prosodically within the nasal-dominant zone.

pivot.verse_ar: وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ اللَّهُ قُلْ حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ يَتَوَكَّلُ الْمُتَوَكِّلُونَ

block_map.label: تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ; sincerity; son denied; creation بِالْحَقِّ; الْعَزِيزُ الْغَفَّارُ; three darknesses; tawhid; adversity → forgets → أَصْحَابِ النَّارِ
Night-worshipper vs. ignorant; يَا عِبَادِ ×3; قُلْ ×4 sincerity chain; losers; canopies of fire; ṭāghūt avoided → بُشْرَى; follow best speech; أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ

Decree → save from Fire?; chambers above chambers; rain cycle; expanded breast; أَحْسَنَ الْحَدِيثِ — skins shiver; parables; Arabic Quran; slave-parable → الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ; إِنَّكَ مَيِّتٌ; dispute on Day; who more unjust; brought truth; God removes worst/rewards best
PIVOT — أَلَيْسَ اللَّهُ بِكَافٍ عَبْدَهُ (v.36); guides/misguides (v.37); creation-confession → حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ (v.38); work your position (vv.39–40)

Book in truth → guided for self; souls at death/sleep; intercessors? → intercession to God alone; when God mentioned → hearts shrink; اللَّهُمَّ You judge; ransom all earth; evil consequences; provision extended/restricted

يَا عِبَادِيَ الَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا لَا تَقْنَطُوا — God forgives ALL sins; return/submit; three regrets; signs came; blackened/saved faces; Creator + وَكِيل; keys; losers; أَيُّهَا الْجَاهِلُونَ; if associate → worthless

Not appraised God truly; earth/heavens in His hand; Horn ×2; earth shines; judged بِالْحَقِّ; زُمَرًا to Hell → 'enter, wretched'; زُمَرًا to Paradise → 'enter eternally'; الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ

inclusios.note: Praise: parable resolved (C, v.29) → righteous in Paradise (A′, v.74) → final word of surah (A′, v.75: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ).
Threads entire surah: revelation (v.2), creation (v.5), revelation again (v.41), Day judgment ×2 (v.69), final (v.75).
B↔B′: fear (B, vv.10/16/17) → mercy (B′, v.53). Same address, opposite emotional registers — most dramatic mirror in the corpus.
Title word as paired finale: groups driven to Hell (v.71) / groups driven to Paradise (v.73). Only such twin-procession passage in the corpus.
Hell-residence verdict intensifies: C (v.32) → B′ (v.60) → A′ (v.72).
You are NOT their disposer (C′ boundary, v.41) → God IS Disposer over all things (B′, v.62).

special_features: Ḥawāmīm external precursor: Q.39:1 (تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ) EXACT with Q.45:2/Q.46:2 — same formula, no حم
يَا عِبَادِ → يَا عِبَادِيَ mirror (B↔B′): fear → mercy — most emotionally dramatic mirror in the analyzed corpus
v.53: يَا عِبَادِيَ الَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا لَا تَقْنَطُوا مِنْ رَحْمَةِ اللَّهِ — God forgives ALL sins (إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا)
زُمَرًا twin-procession (vv.71/73) — title word as paired finale; only such passage in the corpus
أَحْسَنَ الْحَدِيثِ (v.23): Quran self-named as best discourse + somatic effect described (skins shiver, then hearts relax)
Eleven قُلْ — highest count in the corpus
Three أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ (vv.9/18/21) concentrated in B and C
Three الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (vv.29/74/75); final verse = الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ — Fātiḥah echo shared with Q.40:65
Horn ×2 (v.68) — most detailed blast-sequence in the corpus: two blasts, falling dead, standing and looking
حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ at exact geometric center with قُلْ ×2 in one verse
