cross_surah_flags: Q.40:2 / Q.45:2 / Q.46:2: تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ formula. Q.39:1 (الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ) EXACT with Q.45/46. Q.39 is the Ḥawāmīm's external precursor — same formula, no حم.
Q.1:2 / Q.40:65: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ. Q.39:75 closes with Fātiḥah echo. Q.40:65 also deploys it. Two consecutive surahs (Q.39/Q.40) sharing the Fātiḥah echo.
Q.43:9/87: وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَ. Q.39:38 at pivot; Q.43 at A/A′ inclusio. Thread: Q.39→Q.43.
Q.40:7–9: Intercession thread. Q.39:43–44 denies unauthorized intercession; Q.40:7–9 shows authorized Throne-angel intercession. Consecutive surahs: denial → demonstration.
Q.40:83 / Q.45:33: 'Enveloped by what they ridiculed' formula. Q.39:48 (حَاقَ بِهِمْ مَا كَانُوا بِهِ يَسْتَهْزِئُونَ) threads to Q.40/Q.45.
Q.50:20: Horn blown. Q.39:68 most detailed Horn-sequence (two blasts, falling dead, standing). Thread extends to Q.50:20.
Q.42:12: لَهُ مَقَالِيدُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ EXACT. Q.39:63 shares 'keys of heavens and earth' with Q.42:12.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-dominant (83/85, 97.6%). حم isolated. Ḥawāmīm pattern.

signals.thematic: Believing Man's climactic declaration: what you invite me to has no claim in this world or the Hereafter; our return is to God; transgressors are companions of the Fire. Theological resolution of his 17-verse speech — definitive rejection of Pharaoh's religion from within his own court.
signals.lexical: مَرَدَّنَا إِلَى اللَّهِ echoes إِلَيْهِ الْمَصِيرُ (v.3). الْمُسْرِفِينَ echoes مُسْرِفٌ كَذَّابٌ (v.28) and مُسْرِفٌ مُرْتَابٌ (v.34). أَصْحَابُ النَّارِ echoes v.6.
signals.mirror: Center of 7-block ring at exact zero offset (v.43 of 85). D (vv.28–44) flanked by C (Moses confronts Pharaoh) and C′ (God protects Believing Man; Pharaoh's people punished).
signals.discourse: Continuous Believing Man's quoted speech since v.28 — 16 consecutive verses. v.43 is his penultimate declaration before final entrusting (v.44).
signals.rhyme: النَّارِ [-āri] — nasal-dominant zone. Shares [-ār] consonantal profile with surah title غَافِرِ [-āfir]. Forgiver and Fire share consonantal echo at the center.

pivot.verse_ar: لَا جَرَمَ أَنَّمَا تَدْعُونَنِي إِلَيْهِ لَيْسَ لَهُ دَعْوَةٌ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَلَا فِي الْآخِرَةِ وَأَنَّ مَرَدَّنَا إِلَى اللَّهِ وَأَنَّ الْمُسْرِفِينَ هُمْ أَصْحَابُ النَّارِ

block_map.label: حم + تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ; غَافِرِ الذَّنْبِ (title); tawhid; only disbelievers dispute; Noah/factions seized; Throne-bearers' prayer (vv.7–9) — longest angelic prayer; الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ
Disbelievers in Hell: God's hatred > self-hatred; lifeless twice/alive twice; lِمَنِ الْمُلْكُ الْيَوْمَ; warn of الْآزِفَة; السَّمِيعُ الْبَصِيرُ; stronger nations seized
Moses sent with signs to Pharaoh/Hāmān/Qārūn; سَاحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ charge; kill believers' sons; Pharaoh: let me kill Moses; Moses: refuge from every arrogant

PIVOT — Believing Man's speech (×5 يَا قَوْمِ): defend Moses; warn of Day; Noah/ʿĀd/Thamūd; Joseph came before; sealed hearts; Pharaoh's tower; follow me; worldly = enjoyment; invite to الْعَزِيزِ الْغَفَّارِ; no authority; our return to God; بَصِيرٌ بِالْعِبَادِ
God protected him; Pharaoh's people → Fire morning/evening; arguing in Fire: arrogant/weak; keepers of Hell; disbelievers' prayer = error

Support messengers + believers; Moses/Israel; فَاصْبِرْ (v.55); disputants seek refuge; heavens/earth > mankind; ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ; ذَلِكُمُ اللَّهُ رَبُّكُمْ ×2; فَتَبَارَكَ + الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ; كُنْ فَيَكُونُ
Disputants averted; denied Book; shackles/chains; partners gone; فَاصْبِرْ (v.77); animals = signs; stronger nations not availed; faith at punishment = useless; سُنَّتَ اللَّهِ

inclusios.note: Dispute-about-signs diagnostic: v.4 (A) → v.35 (D, Believing Man) → v.56 (B′) → v.69 (A′). Threads every ring layer — most distributed formula in the surah.
Double فَاصْبِرْ in B′ and A′ — unique in the analyzed corpus.
Title attribute (Forgiver, v.3) migrates to center via Believing Man's mouth (v.42). Forgiveness proclaimed at risk of death.
Fātiḥah's opening formula deployed at B′. Ḥawāmīm opener echoes Quran opener.
Brackets B and A′: how was My penalty (A) / the end of those before (A′).

special_features: Opens the Ḥawāmīm series (Q.40–46); Q.40:2 الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ ↔ Q.46:2 الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ — series bookend pair
Believing Man's speech (vv.28–44, 17 verses) = longest non-prophetic quoted speech in the Quran, occupying the entire structural center
يَا قَوْمِ ×5 — all five within D; no other surah concentrates five يَا قَوْمِ in a single speaker's voice at the center
غَافِرِ الذَّنْبِ (v.3, title) → الْغَفَّارِ (v.42, at center): title attribute proclaimed by a secret believer at risk of death
Throne-bearers' prayer (vv.7–9) — longest angelic prayer in the Quran
يُجَادِلُ فِي آيَاتِ اللَّهِ ×4 (vv.4/35/56/69) — diagnostic formula threads every ring layer
Double فَاصْبِرْ إِنَّ وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقٌّ (vv.55/77) — unique in the corpus; Q.40 is earliest and most emphatic
فَتَبَارَكَ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ (v.64) + الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ (v.65) — doxological pair; second echoes Q.1:2
النَّارِ [-āri] at exact center shares consonantal echo with title غَافِرِ [-āfir]
كُنْ فَيَكُونُ (v.68) — creative command
سُنَّتَ اللَّهِ (v.85) — closing echoes Q.48:23
cross_surah_flags: Q.46:1–2: Ḥawāmīm bookend. Q.40:2 (الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ) ↔ Q.46:2 (الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ) — near-EXACT, الْعَلِيمِ→الْحَكِيمِ variant. Seven surahs bracketed by same formula.
Q.43:85 / Q.55:78 / Q.67:1: تَبَارَكَ thread. Q.40:64 (فَتَبَارَكَ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ) is now earliest. Thread: Q.40→Q.43→Q.55→Q.67.
Q.1:2: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ EXACT (v.65). Ḥawāmīm opener echoes Quran opener.
Q.46:35 / Q.50:39 / Q.52:48 / Q.68:48: فَاصْبِرْ thread. Q.40 (vv.55/77, doubled) is earliest and most emphatic. Thread: Q.40(×2)→Q.46→Q.50→Q.52→Q.68.
Q.48:23: سُنَّتَ اللَّهِ. Q.40:85 NEAR-EXACT with Q.48:23. Both at surah closings.
Q.53:57: الْآزِفَة. Q.40:18 (يَوْمَ الْآزِفَةِ) ↔ Q.53:57 (أَزِفَتِ الْآزِفَةُ). Two surahs naming the Day as 'the Approaching One.'

Q.41:30 / Q.46:13: رَبُّنَا اللَّهُ parallel. Q.40:28 (do you kill a man for saying 'my Lord is God'?) ↔ Q.41:30 / Q.46:13 (those who say 'our Lord is God' then stand firm). Three consecutive Ḥawāmīm surahs with this confession.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal + [-iːC] dominant (51/54, 94.4%). [-ūna]→[-iːC] progressive shift: first half = human action, second half = divine permanence. Two exceptions: v.13 وَثَمُودَ (proper noun), v.49 قَنُوطٌ (despair breaks divine register).

signals.thematic: Four-verse confrontation at exact center. v.26: disbelievers say 'don't listen to this Quran, speak noisily to overcome.' vv.27–28: divine counter — severe punishment; Fire for those who reject signs. v.29: disbelievers' helpless Day-plea to see their misleaders. The Detailed Book faces the noise tactic; pivot is the surah's dramatic crisis.
signals.lexical: الْقُرْآنِ (v.26) — the Quran named at the exact center. يَجْحَدُونَ (v.28) echoes v.15 (ʿĀd: بِآيَاتِنَا يَجْحَدُونَ) — B→D bridge. الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِ (v.29) echoes v.25. أَعْدَاءِ اللَّهِ (v.28) echoes v.19.
signals.mirror: Center of 7-block ring at exact zero offset (midpoint 27.5 of 54). D (4v) flanked by C (body-parts testify, 7v) and C′ (angels descend, 7v) — most antithetical C/C′ in the Ḥawāmīm.
signals.discourse: Two quoted-speech acts frame the center: v.26 (disbelievers instruct each other to make noise, this life) and v.29 (disbelievers plead on the Day, next life). Between them, divine We (vv.27–28). Only place where disbelievers speak in both worlds.
signals.rhyme: تَغْلِبُونَ/يَعْمَلُونَ/يَجْحَدُونَ [-ūna] → الْأَسْفَلِينَ [-iːna]. Three human-action terminals then one state terminal. Pivot straddles the [-ūna]/[-iːC] prosodic shift characterizing the whole surah.

pivot.verse_ar: وَقَالَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لَا تَسْمَعُوا لِهَذَا الْقُرْآنِ وَالْغَوْا فِيهِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَغْلِبُونَ

block_map.label: حم + تَنْزِيلٌ مِنَ الرَّحْمَانِ الرَّحِيمِ (unique in Ḥawāmīm); فُصِّلَتْ (title); بَشِير/نَذِير; hearts covered/ears deaf/veil; tawhid + وَيْلٌ لِلْمُشْرِكِينَ; uninterrupted reward
Creation: earth 2 days, mountains/sustenance 4 days, seven heavens; الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ; ʿĀd/Thamūd: thunderbolt/screaming wind; saved believers
Enemies gathered to Fire; hearing/eyes/skins testify; 'why testify?'; assumption ruined you; قُرَنَاء appointed; word came into effect among jinn and men = losers
PIVOT — 'Don't listen to Quran, speak noisily'; severe punishment; enemies' Fire = home of eternity; 'show us who misled us of jinn and men — put them underfoot'
رَبُّنَا اللَّهُ + اسْتَقَامُوا → angels descend; no fear/grief; أَوْلِيَاء; ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ; enmity → friendship; seek refuge السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
Signs: night/day/sun/moon; dead earth revived → قَدِيرٌ; فُصِّلَتْ echo (v.44); تَنْزِيلٌ مِنْ حَكِيمٍ حَمِيدٍ; Moses' Book disputed; Lord = forgiveness + painful penalty
Hour's knowledge God alone; no witness for partners; سَنُرِيهِمْ آيَاتِنَا فِي الْآفَاقِ وَفِي أَنْفُسِهِمْ; شَهِيدٌ; double أَلَا closure: doubt ↔ مُحِيطٌ

inclusios.note: Frames the argument: the Quran IS detailed (A, v.3) → had it been non-Arabic, they'd demand 'why not detailed?' (B′, v.44). Affirmation → hypothetical objection.
C → D: losers among jinn and men → want to trample misleaders from jinn and men.
A → B′: deniers claim deafness/partition (v.5) → confirmed as deafness and blindness (v.44). Their excuse becomes their diagnosis.
B′ and A′: قَدِيرٌ (v.39) → شَهِيدٌ (v.53) → مُحِيطٌ (v.54). Three total-sovereignty declarations closing the surah.
Righteous-confession formula shared with Q.46:13 — both Ḥawāmīm, both followed by angelic consolation.

special_features: Most antithetical C/C′ in the Ḥawāmīm: body-parts testify against sinners (C) ↔ angels descend upon righteous (C′) — identical structure, inverted theology
Opening تَنْزِيلٌ مِنَ الرَّحْمَانِ الرَّحِيمِ — unique in the Ḥawāmīm series
فُصِّلَتْ آيَاتُهُ inclusio (vv.3/44): title-word as affirmation (A) → hypothetical objection (B′)
سَنُرِيهِمْ آيَاتِنَا فِي الْآفَاقِ وَفِي أَنْفُسِهِمْ (v.53) — most programmatic epistemological statement in the corpus
ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ (v.34) — repel evil with better → enmity becomes friendship; Quran's clearest statement of transformative ethics
Double أَلَا closure (v.54): 'they doubt' / 'He encompasses' — only double أَلَا closing in the analyzed corpus
Three قُلْ (vv.6/9/52): tawhid → creation challenge → Quran-from-God challenge; three-position arc
Hearing thread (س-م-ع) peaks at center: deafness claimed (v.5) → testimony by hearing (v.20) → 'don't listen' (v.26, pivot) → He is the Hearing (v.36)
قُرَنَاء (v.25, C) → v.29 (D): companions who misled → disbelievers want to trample them; threads to Q.43/Q.50
[-ūna]→[-iːC] progressive prosodic shift: first half = human action, second half = divine permanence
cross_surah_flags: Q.46:13: رَبُّنَا اللَّهُ ثُمَّ اسْتَقَامُوا EXACT. Q.41:30 and Q.46:13 share identical righteous-confession formula. Both followed by: no fear, no grief, companions of Paradise.
Q.42:13: شَرَعَ لَكُمْ (Noah/Abraham/Moses/Jesus). Q.41 shows consequences of rejecting messengers (ʿĀd/Thamūd); Q.42 names the religion they brought. Consecutive Ḥawāmīm consequence → content.
Q.43:36/38 / Q.50:23: قَرِين/قُرَنَاء thread. Q.41:25 (قَيَّضْنَا لَهُمْ قُرَنَاءَ) ↔ Q.43:36 (نُقَيِّضْ لَهُ شَيْطَانًا قَرِينٌ) — same root, same construction. Thread: Q.41→Q.43→Q.50.
Q.42:14/45: كَلِمَة سَبَقَتْ + مُرِيب. Q.41:45 NEAR-EXACT with Q.42:14 — 'if not for a prior word, it would have been settled' + 'disquieting doubt' closing. Consecutive Ḥawāmīm.
Q.50:16: ظَنّ thread. Q.41:22–23 (assumed God didn't know) ↔ Q.50:16 (closer than the jugular). Both: sinner assumed hiddenness; God was intimately present.
Q.40:28 / Q.46:13: رَبِّيَ/رَبُّنَا اللَّهُ confession thread. Three consecutive Ḥawāmīm (Q.40/41/46) using the 'my/our Lord is God' formula as the defining confession.

surahs.rhyme_type: [-iːC] dominant (39/53, 73.6%) with [-ūC/-ūna] minority (12/53). Double Muqaṭṭaʿāt isolated. One hapax terminal: v.32 كَالْأَعْلَامِ. Ethical catalogue (B′ vv.36–39) prosodically distinct in [-ūna].

signals.thematic: Three-verse theology at exact center. v.27: if God extended provision, humans would tyrannize; He sends measured (بِقَدَرٍ). v.28: rain after despair, mercy within constraint. v.29: creation + creatures = signs; gathering competence affirms the Day. Bridges theology (first half) to ethics (second half).
signals.lexical: عِبَادِهِ (v.27) — fourth of five 'His servants' deployments. بَغَوْا (v.27) — second of three بَغْي deployments (v.14→v.27→v.39). قَدَرٍ/قَدِيرٌ (vv.27/29) — root ق-د-ر at pivot: measured and competent. Three divine-attribute closings unique to pivot.
signals.mirror: Center of 7-block ring at exact zero offset (v.27 of 53). D (3v) flanked by C (8v) and C′ (6v). Mediates theological verdicts → provision theology → disaster-and-pardon ethics.
signals.discourse: Three consecutive third-person declarative verses with no address shift — most theologically dense passage without imperative, address, or quotation. Pure divine characterization. Still center surrounded by dialogic blocks.
signals.rhyme: بَصِيرٌ [-iːr] / الْحَمِيدُ [-iːd] / قَدِيرٌ [-iːr] — all in dominant [-iːC] zone. Prosodically seamless; signal is convergence of non-prosodic signals.

pivot.verse_ar: وَلَوْ بَسَطَ اللَّهُ الرِّزْقَ لِعِبَادِهِ لَبَغَوْا فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَكِنْ يُنَزِّلُ بِقَدَرٍ مَا يَشَاءُ إِنَّهُ بِعِبَادِهِ خَبِيرٌ بَصِيرٌ

block_map.label: حم عسق (unique double Muqaṭṭaʿāt); revelation to you and before you; الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ; cosmos; angels glorify + intercede; Arabic Quran; الْوَلِيُّ قَدِيرٌ
God judges disagreements; لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْءٌ السَّمِيعُ الْبَصِيرُ; شَرَعَ religion: Noah/Abraham/Moses/Jesus; don't follow أَهْوَاء; Book + الْمِيزَان; الْقَوِيُّ الْعَزِيزُ

Harvest Hereafter/worldly; partners' unauthorized religion; wrongdoers fearful; الْفَضْلُ الْكَبِيرُ; المَوَدَّة فِي الْقُرْبَى; الْغَفُورُ شَكُورٌ; accepts repentance; disbelievers → severe punishment
PIVOT — measured provision: excess → tyranny; بِقَدَرٍ; خَبِيرٌ بَصِيرٌ; rain after despair; الْوَلِيُّ الْحَمِيدُ; creation + creatures = signs; قَدِيرٌ
Disaster = what hands earned; يَعْفُو عَنْ كَثِيرٌ ×2; no وَلِيّ/نَصِير; ships like mountains; disputes → no escape
Worldly = enjoyment; avoid major sins; forgive when angry; شُورَى (title v.38); spend; defend against tyranny; pardon; no way for wrongdoers; respond before Day irreversible
God's dominion; children as He wills; عَقِيمًا; three modes of divine speech; وَحْي; عَلِيٌّ حَكِيمٌ; revealed رُوحًا; صِرَاطِ اللَّهِ; to God all matters return

inclusios.note: Frames surah: revelation to you and before you (A) → revealed inspiration from Our command (A′). Same formula, expanded.
v.3 الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ + v.4 الْعَلِيُّ → v.51 عَلِيٌّ حَكِيمٌ combines both attributes.

inclusios.pair: لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ
inclusios.note: Opens and closes on cosmic ownership.
Unique in the Quran — most radical transcendence statement.
No protector/helper: A (wrongdoers) → C′ (v.31) → B′ (v.46).
Consecutive-block repetition within C′: disaster = earned, pardons much / could destroy but pardons much.

special_features: حم عسق — only surah in the Quran with double Muqaṭṭaʿāt; sets Q.42 apart as most distinctive opening in the series
لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْءٌ (v.11) — Quran's maximal transcendence statement; hapax in the entire Quran
شَرَعَ/شَرَعُوا antithetical pair (vv.13/21): God's ordained religion vs. partners' unauthorized legislation; crystallizes as شَرِيعَة at Q.45:18
شُورَى (v.38, title word) appears once as one ethical principle among seven — surah names itself for a representative element, not its theme
Three divine-attribute closings at pivot (vv.27–29): خَبِيرٌ بَصِيرٌ / الْوَلِيُّ الْحَمِيدُ / قَدِيرٌ — only three-verse consecutive divine-attribute closure sequence at a pivot in the corpus
بَغْي thread: jealousy divided religion (v.14) → excess provision = tyranny (v.27, at pivot) → tyranny is defended against (v.39)
الْمَوَدَّة فِي الْقُرْبَى (v.23) — sole payment request in the Quran
يَشَاءُ ×9 — most distributed single divine-will formula in the corpus
v.32 كَالْأَعْلَامِ — most isolated terminal rhyme in the Ḥawāmīm
Closing is revelatory (وَحْي / نُور / صِرَاطِ اللَّهِ), not patience-based — distinct from Q.46 onward
أَهْوَاء thread: Q.42:15 extends thread backward (now Q.42→Q.43→Q.45→Q.47→Q.53)
cross_surah_flags: Q.45:18: شَرَعَ/شَرِيعَة crystallization. Q.42:13 (verb: God ordained) → Q.45:18 (noun: placed on a sharīʿa). Q.42:21 (partners ordained unauthorized) is the anti-form. Three Ḥawāmīm surahs apart.
Q.43:1–2 / Q.44:1–2: Q.42:1–2 (حم عسق) is unique double Muqaṭṭaʿāt. Sets Q.42 apart from Q.43–44 which share حم + oath formula.
Q.43:23 / Q.45:18 / Q.47:14,16 / Q.53: أَهْوَاء thread. Q.42:15 (لَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَاءَهُمْ) extends thread to Q.42. Now five surahs: Q.42→Q.43→Q.45→Q.47→Q.53.
Q.60:7: مَوَدَّة at structurally significant positions. Q.42:23 (payment = kinship-love) ↔ Q.60:7 (at Q.60's pivot). Two surahs deploying مَوَدَّة at structural weight-points.
Q.43:85 / Q.55:78 / Q.67:1: cosmic sovereignty formula. Q.42:49 (لِلَّهِ مُلْكُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ) joins the thread.
Q.51:29/41: عَقِيمًا. Q.42:50 (God makes whom He wills barren) ↔ Q.51:29 (Sarah: عَقِيمٌ) ↔ Q.51:41 (barren wind). Divine sovereignty over fertility/barrenness.

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final dominant (87/89, 97.8%). حم isolated. Single internal exception: v.59 إِسْرَائِيلَ — proper noun at Jesus-as-example verse. [-ūna] at 61% — highest in Ḥawāmīm.

signals.thematic: Universal tawhid question to all prior messengers: did God ever make deities besides الرَّحْمَان to be worshipped? The entire surah revolves around this — idol polemic (first half) and prophetic answers (second half).
signals.lexical: الرَّحْمَنِ — sixth of seven deployments, placed at center. مِنْ دُونِ echoes vv.15/86. أَرْسَلْنَا / رُسُلِنَا links to v.6 and v.46. يُعْبَدُونَ echoes ع-ب-د ×7.
signals.mirror: Single verse at exact center (offset +0.000) of 7-block ring. C (19v) and C′ (20v) flank nearly symmetrically. Three prophets surround it: Abraham before, Moses and Jesus after.
signals.discourse: 2sg Prophet imperative (وَسْئَلْ) — only second imperative to the Prophet in the surah (after فَاسْتَمْسِكْ v.43). Divine We joins (أَرْسَلْنَا / أَجَعَلْنَا).
signals.rhyme: يُعْبَدُونَ [-ūna] — within the dominant [-ūna] zone (61% of surah). Prosodically seamless. Signal is the convergence of non-prosodic signals within an unbroken zone.

pivot.verse_ar: وَسْئَلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِنْ قَبْلِكَ مِنْ رُسُلِنَا أَجَعَلْنَا مِنْ دُونِ الرَّحْمَنِ آلِهَةً يُعْبَدُونَ

block_map.label: حم + Book oath; Arabic Quran; أُمّ الْكِتَاب; prophets ridiculed/destroyed; creation signs (heavens/earth/roads/rain/ships); return to Lord
Idol polemic: daughters/sons attributed; angels female; الرَّحْمَان ×3 (vv.17/19/20); ancestors' religion ×2 (vv.22–23); warner/retribution
Abraham dissociates from idols; truth rejected as magic; why not great man?; silver/gold = mere enjoyment; devil companion; صِرَاطٌ مُسْتَقِيمٌ; remembrance for you and your people
PIVOT — وَسْئَلْ مَنْ أَرْسَلْنَا: Ask former messengers — did We ever make deities besides الرَّحْمَان to be worshipped?
Moses/Pharaoh (vv.46–56): signs laughed at, Pharaoh boasts rivers/gold, drowned; Jesus (vv.57–65): servant/example/sign of Hour; صِرَاطٌ مُسْتَقِيمٌ ×2
Hour suddenly; friends → enemies except righteous; يَا عِبَادِ enter Paradise; gold plates; criminals in Hell; Mālik: you will remain
Devised affair? We are devising; الرَّحْمَان had son?; سُبْحَانَ; الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِيمُ; تَبَارَكَ; who created them? God; turn aside, say peace

inclusios.note: Most powerful inclusio: same question (who created?) at A and A′. Different scope: heavens/earth → themselves. Deniers confess creation and still turn away.
Dominant divine name. Absent from the two prophetic narratives. Only the polemic and tawhid argument invoke it by name.
C: hold to revelation = straight path / C′ ×2: Jesus: follow Me = straight path / God is my Lord and yours = straight path. Three deployments bracketing the pivot.
Quraysh say it → every affluent people before them said it. Universal pattern of ancestral imitation.
Threads every block.

special_features: Longest surah in analyzed corpus with a single-verse exact-center pivot (v.45 of 89, offset +0.000)

Three prophets answer the tawhid question with their lives: Abraham (C, vv.26–28), Moses (C′, vv.46–56), Jesus (C′, vv.57–65) — only surah deploying three named prophetic narratives as structural answers to a single-verse pivot
وَلَئِنْ سَأَلْتَهُمْ مَنْ خَلَقَ EXACT inclusio (vv.9/87): different scope (heavens/earth → themselves), same admission, same refusal to draw the conclusion
الرَّحْمَان ×7 — highest in the Ḥawāmīm; absent from prophetic narrative blocks; only in polemic and tawhid argument
زُخْرُف (title word) tracks gold across three domains: worldly delusion (v.35) → Pharaoh's false standard (v.53) → Paradise reward (v.71)
Pharaoh's first-person speech (vv.51–52: أَلَيْسَ لِي مُلْكُ مِصْرَ) — most sustained enemy first-person voice in the Ḥawāmīm
صِرَاطٌ مُسْتَقِيمٌ ×3 (vv.43/61/64) brackets the pivot — once before (C), twice after (C′)
يَا عِبَادِ (v.68) — sole direct divine address to righteous; يَا أَيُّهَا السَّاحِرُ (v.49) and يَا مَالِكُ (v.77) are the other vocatives
v.59 إِسْرَائِيلَ — sole prosodic exception in the surah, at the Jesus-as-servant verse; controversy encoded in sound
انْتَقَمْنَا root ×3 across three blocks (B→C→C′): past nations, certain against Quraysh, Pharaoh
Q.43:1–2 EXACT with Q.44:1–2 (حم وَالْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ) — tightest identical pair in the Ḥawāmīm series
cross_surah_flags: Q.55:78 / Q.67:1: تَبَارَكَ thread extends to Q.43 (v.85). Thread now Q.43→Q.55→Q.67. Different structural positions: doxological closing / surah-final / surah-opening.
Q.50:23/27: قَرِين thread. Q.43:36/38 (devil appointed as companion / فَبِئْسَ الْقَرِينُ) ↔ Q.50:23/27 (companion testifies at trial). Q.43 appoints; Q.50 adjudicates.
Q.70:42: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا وَيَلْعَبُوا — Q.43:83 and Q.70:42 are EXACT. Strongest cross-surah فَذَرْهُمْ pair.
Q.44:22/88: Prophet's and Moses' consecutive pleas in Ḥawāmīm. Q.43:88 (these are a people who do not believe) ↔ Q.44:22 (these are criminal people).
Q.44:1–2: Q.43:1–2 EXACT with Q.44:1–2 (حم وَالْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ) — tightest identical opening pair in the series.
Q.52:39 / Q.53:21: Gender-attribution polemic shared across three surahs (daughters for God / sons for you).
Q.45:2/37: Ḥawāmīm divine-name variants — الْعَزِيزُ الْعَلِيمُ (v.9) / الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِيمُ (v.84) ↔ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ (Q.45).

surahs.rhyme_type: Nasal-final dominant (58/59, 98.3%). Ḥā Mīm isolated. [-iːn/-iːm] 60% / [-ūn] 40% alternation. Zero internal exceptions. [-iːm] concentration in Hell block B′.

signals.thematic: Israel's salvation from Pharaoh at narrative center. v.30: saved from humiliating torment (الْعَذَابِ الْمُهِينِ). v.31: from Pharaoh, the haughty among transgressors. Narrative shifts from destruction to deliverance — the pivot is salvation, not destruction.
signals.lexical: نَجَّيْنَا (v.30) — sole salvation verb in the surah, placed at center. الْعَذَابِ الْمُهِينِ (v.30) — second of four عَذَاب deployments. عَالِيًا (v.31) echoes back to لَا تَعْلُوا (v.19: Moses' do-not-be-haughty command).
signals.mirror: Center of 7-block ring at offset +0.008. D (vv.30–33) mediates between C (Pharaoh narrative) and C′ (Quraysh denial / Tubbaʿ). Positive core — salvation surrounded by warnings.
signals.discourse: Three consecutive divine-We salvation verbs follow (vv.30/32/33: نَجَّيْنَا / اخْتَرْنَاهُمْ / آتَيْنَاهُمْ). Most sustained We-of-mercy cluster in the surah.
signals.rhyme: الْمُهِينِ [-iːni] / الْمُسْرِفِينَ [-iːna] — both in the [-iːn] sub-family, within the continuous nasal zone. Pivot confirmed by dominant prosodic register.

pivot.verse_ar: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ الْمُهِينِ

block_map.label: حم + oath by the clear Book; sent down on blessed night; every wise matter decided; mercy from your Lord; السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ; Lord of heavens/earth/between; لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ; Lord of your first forefathers

In doubt, playing; watch: smoke covers people, painful torment; they plead → رَسُولٌ مُبِينٌ already came, they turned away (taught, madman); punishment lifted briefly, you return; يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ greatest assault, retribution

Pharaoh narrative: tried Pharaoh's people; كَرِيم messenger (Moses); deliver God's servants; أَمِين; سُلْطَانٌ مُبِينٌ; refuge in my Lord; called them مُجْرِمُونَ; set out by night; sea parted; army drowned; gardens/springs/crops left behind; heavens/earth wept not; Israel saved from humiliating torment; chosen عَلَى عِلْمٍ; signs = clear trial
HINGE — Israel saved + chosen → PIVOT TURN: إِنَّ هَؤُلَاءِ (v.34) Quraysh deny resurrection, bring our fathers; are they better than Tubbaʿ? destroyed, مُجْرِمُونَ
Quraysh deny resurrection; Tubbaʿ destroyed; creation not in play but بِالْحَقِّ; يَوْمُ الْفَصْلِ appointed time; no مَوْلَى avails — except God's mercy; الْعَزِيزُ الرَّحِيمُ
Zaqqūm tree: food for sinful, murky oil, scalding water boils; seize/drag/pour; taste — you are the honored, noble! (sarcasm); this is what you disputed

الْمُتَّقِينَ: secure place, gardens/springs, silk, بِحُورٍ عِينٍ, every fruit safe; no death except first, protected from Hellfire; فَضْلًا مِنْ رَبِّكَ = الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ; eased in your tongue for remembrance; فَارْتَقِبْ — they are watching

inclusios.note: Frames the surah: watch for the Day (opening) → watch, they are watching (closing). Only surah framed by a single repeated imperative to the Prophet.
Clear: Book (v.2), smoke (v.10), messenger (v.13), authority (v.19), trial (v.33). Five deployments across three blocks.

inclusios.pair: رَحْمَةً مِنْ رَبِّكَ / فَضْلًا مِنْ رَبِّكَ
inclusios.note: A → A′: mercy FROM your Lord (opening) → bounty FROM your Lord (closing). Same preposition, same suffix.
C → C′: same criminal label for Pharaoh's people and Tubbaʿ's people.
Same phrase, opposite speakers. Deniers use it to deny resurrection; God uses it to describe paradise. Deniers technically correct — there IS only one death — but drew the wrong conclusion.

special_features: فَارْتَقِبْ imperative bracket (vv.10/59) — only surah in corpus framed by a single repeated imperative to the Prophet
ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْعَزِيزُ الْكَرِيمُ (v.49) — divine-attribute language (العزيز الكريم) repurposed as sarcasm; unique in corpus
الْمَوْتَة الْأُولَى antithetical pair (vv.35/56): same phrase, opposite conclusions
Moses' four-verse speech (vv.18–21) — longest sustained quoted prophetic voice in the Ḥawāmīm
B = B′ perfect 8=8 balance: earthly punishment (smoke/drought) ↔ eschatological punishment (Zaqqūm/scalding water) — only confirmed 8=8 punishment pair in corpus
مُجْرِمُونَ labels both Pharaoh's people (v.22) and Tubbaʿ's people (v.37)
مَجْنُون thread extends back to Q.44 (now earliest: Q.44→Q.51→Q.52→Q.68→Q.81)
Creation بِالْحَقِّ shared with Q.45/Q.46 — only confirmed three-surah run of this formula
Tubbaʿ appears only in Q.44 and Q.50 in the analyzed corpus
إِنَّا كُنَّا / إِنَّهُ كَانَ formula ×6 distributed across all blocks
مُبِين ×5 across three blocks (Book/smoke/messenger/authority/trial)
عَذَاب ×4 threading: smoke punishment → Pharaoh's humiliation → Zaqqūm → Hellfire protection
cross_surah_flags: Q.45:1–2 / Q.46:1–2: Q.44 uses oath by the Book (حم وَالْكِتَابِ الْمُبِينِ); Q.45–46 use declarative. Three consecutive Ḥawāmīm with distinct openings sharing حم.
Q.51:39/52 / Q.52:29 / Q.68:2,51: مَجْنُون thread. Q.44 (v.14: مُعَلَّمٌ مَجْنُونٌ) is now earliest confirmed occurrence. Thread: Q.44→Q.51→Q.52→Q.68→Q.81.
Q.45:22 / Q.46:3: creation بِالْحَقِّ in three consecutive Ḥawāmīm (Q.44:39 / Q.45:22 / Q.46:3). Only confirmed three-surah run.
Q.50:12–14: Tubbaʿ destroyed. Appears only in Q.44 (v.37) and Q.50 (v.14) in the corpus.
Q.52:20 / Q.56:22: بِحُورٍ عِينٍ paradise formula. Q.44:54 is EXACT with Q.52:20.
Q.44:40 / Q.77:13–14/38: يَوْمُ الْفَصْلِ — Q.44 introduces the phrase in the Ḥawāmīm series.
Q.47:15: الْحَمِيم / scalding water. Q.44:46/48 (×2 in Hell scene) ↔ Q.47:15.

pivot.verse_ar: ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَاكَ عَلَىٰ شَرِيعَةٍ مِنَ الْأَمْرِ فَاتَّبِعْهَا وَلَا تَتَّبِعْ أَهْوَاءَ الَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
pivot.axis_type: sharīʿa_command — only Quranic noun-command placing the Prophet on an ordained way
pivot.center_logic_note: v.18 at offset −0.027 within the 5-verse Bani Israel center block (D, vv.16-20). شَرِيعَة — sole Quranic deployment as a noun-command. Turns from Israel's historical failure (given revelation but differed after knowledge, v.17) to the Prophet's present mission (follow this, not desires; بَصَائِرُ for mankind, v.20). أَهْوَاء bridges forward to desire-as-god portrait (v.23). Discourse shift from divine We (جَعَلْنَاكَ) to Prophet imperative (فَاتَّبِعْهَا) marks surah's discourse hinge.
pivot.notes: ring_composition. 37v. Late Meccan. Penultimate Ḥawāmīm (Q.45 of Q.40-46). الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ EXACT bracket (vv.2/37) — tightest in series: Book FROM the Mighty-Wise → HE IS the Mighty-Wise. شَرِيعَة (v.18) sole Quranic noun-command. آيَاتٌ لِقَوْمٍ ×4 four-tier epistemic ladder (believers→certain→reasoning→thinking) — unique in corpus. هُزُوًا return: ridicule in B → envelops ridiculers in B′ — only such sin-becomes-punishment return in corpus. Triple رَبّ doxology (v.36) unique in corpus. كُلُّ أُمَّةٍ جَاثِيَةً (v.28) gives surah its title — title image appears once at Day of Judgment. Five consecutive [-iːm] punishment verses (B). أَهْوَاء bridges pivot to v.23. الظَّنّ thread: v.24 → v.32 confession on the Day. Q.45:1-2 EXACT with Q.46:1-2. No يَا أَيُّهَا.

block_map.label: حم + Book from الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ; آيَات ×3 graded audience (believers/certain/reasoning); recited in truth → what ḥadīth will they believe?
Woe to sinful liar; hears signs, persists arrogant, takes as ridicule → ×4 punishments (painful/humiliating/great/painful); this = guidance
God subjected sea + everything in heavens/earth (signs for thinkers); forgive those who don't expect God's Days; good deed for self, evil against self → returned to Lord

PIVOT — Bani Israel: given Book/judgment/prophethood/provision/preference → differed after knowledge out of بَغْي; شَرِيعَة: follow it, not أَهْوَاء of ignorant → God protects righteous; this = بَصَائِرُ + guidance + mercy
Do evildoers equal believers in life/death? → every soul recompensed, not wronged; desire-as-god, sealed; 'only time destroys' = assumption; قُلْ God gives life/death/assembles for Day
God's dominion; Hour → falsifiers lose; كُلُّ أُمَّةٍ جَاثِيَةً kneeling; record speaks بِالْحَقِّ; فَأَمَّا/وَأَمَّا binary; 'Today We forget you'; took signs as ridicule → never removed
فَلِلَّهِ الْحَمْدُ رَبِّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَرَبِّ الْأَرْضِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ (triple رَبّ); الْكِبْرِيَاءُ in heavens/earth; وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ

aziz_hakim_bracket.note: الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ EXACT bracket: v.2 (تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ) ↔ v.37 (وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ). Book FROM the Mighty-Wise → HE IS the Mighty-Wise. Tightest الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ bracket in the Ḥawāmīm. Shared with Q.46:1-2 opening but Q.45 uniquely closes on the same pair.

sharia_sole_noun_command.note: شَرِيعَةٍ مِنَ الْأَمْرِ فَاتَّبِعْهَا — sole Quranic deployment of شَرِيعَة as a noun-command to the Prophet. The word appears in Q.5:48 (شِرْعَة) and Q.42:13/21 (verb form) but only Q.45:18 places the Prophet ON a sharīʿa and commands him to follow it. The pivot IS the sharīʿa declaration.

ayat_four_tier_ladder.note: آيَاتٌ لِقَوْمٍ formula ×4 across A and C: believers (v.3) → certain (v.4) → reasoning (v.5) → thinking (v.13). Four-tier epistemic ladder — only surah in the analyzed corpus grading its audience across four levels using the same formula.

huzuwan_return.note: هُزُوًا (ridicule) return: v.9 (B: takes signs as ridicule → humiliating punishment) → v.33 (B′: enveloped by what they ridiculed — حَاقَ بِهِمْ) → v.35 (B′: 'you took God's signs as ridicule'). The sin becomes the punishment — only such explicit sin-return in the analyzed corpus.

triple_rabb_doxology.note: فَلِلَّهِ الْحَمْدُ رَبِّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَرَبِّ الْأَرْضِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ — three رَبّ titles in one verse. Only triple رَبّ title-verse in the analyzed corpus. Only Ḥawāmīm surah to close on a pure praise doxology.

title_verse_at_day.note: كُلُّ أُمَّةٍ جَاثِيَةً — 'every nation kneeling' — appears once, in B′, at the Day of Judgment. The surah is named for the posture of final accountability. Title image deployed at its only logical moment.

B_punishment_chord.note: Five consecutive [-iːm] terminal verses: أَثِيمٍ/أَلِيمٍ/مُهِينٌ/عَظِيمٌ/أَلِيمٌ — all naming punishment or sin. Block B sounds like a single sustained chord.

signal_table.prosody_note: تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ — EXACT bracket opens

هَذَا بَصَائِرُ + guidance + mercy for the certain

quoted Day: 'Today We forget you'; no helpers

فَلِلَّهِ الْحَمْدُ رَبِّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَرَبِّ الْأَرْضِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ — triple رَبّ; unique doxology
وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ — EXACT bracket closes; Book→Being

structure_summary.rhyme_type: Nasal-final 36/37 (97.3%) | v.1 حم isolated (zone 0) | [-ūna] ×21 (58%) / [-iːna] ×9 / [-iːm] ×6 | zero internal exceptions
structure_summary.note: 37v. Late Meccan. Penultimate Ḥawāmīm. الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ EXACT bracket. شَرِيعَة sole noun-command. Four-tier audience ladder. هُزُوًا returns as punishment. Triple رَبّ doxology unique. Title verse at Day. B punishment chord ×5 [-iːm]. No يَا أَيُّهَا.

pivot.verse_ar: وَالَّذِي قَالَ لِوَالِدَيْهِ أُفٍّ لَكُمَا … حَقَّ عَلَيْهِمُ الْقَوْلُ فِي أُمَمٍ … وَلِكُلٍّ دَرَجَاتٌ مِمَّا عَمِلُوا
pivot.axis_type: domestic_binary_seam — good child / bad child straddling geometric center, resolved by universal deeds principle
pivot.center_logic_note: Three-verse seam at exact geometric center (v.18 of 35, offset +0.000). v.17 presents the rebellious child (antithesis of C's righteous child, vv.15-16). v.18 declares them losers 'among nations of jinn and men' — naming both species (الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِ) that B′ will address (jinn hear Quran, vv.29-32). v.19 states the universal deeds-principle (degrees for all, fully compensated, not wronged) that governs C (paradise for deeds) and C′ (punishment for crimes). Terminal shift: [-iːna] of diagnosis (vv.17-18) → [-ūna] of principle (v.19).
pivot.notes: ring_composition. 35v. Late Meccan. Final Ḥawāmīm surah (Q.40-46). B↔B′ strongest mirror: humans reject Quran (magic/fabrication/ancient falsehood) ↔ jinn accept Quran (confirm after Moses). مُوسَى+مُصَدِّق EXACT in both blocks (vv.12/30). إِفْك returned to its source (vv.11/28). Parents binary at exact center: grateful child → accepted (C) ↔ rebellious child → losers (D). الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِ (v.18) seeds Q.72 jinn surah. أُولُو الْعَزْمِ (v.35) only Quranic occurrence. فَاصْبِرْ thread: Q.46→Q.50→Q.52→Q.68. Ḥawāmīm bracket with Q.40:1-2 (الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ ↔ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ). No يَا أَيُّهَا of any kind.

block_map.label: حم + Book from God the Wise; creation with truth and term; idol challenge (قُلْ ×3): show what they created, bring a scripture; idols unresponsive until Day — enemies to worshippers
Charges answered: magic/fabrication; Prophet not original; Israelite witness; disbelievers: 'ancient falsehood' (إِفْك); Moses' scripture → this confirming Arabic Book (مُصَدِّق)
Righteous: 'Our Lord is God' + remained upright → no fear, no grief → Paradise for deeds; parents enjoined: 30 months, maturity at 40, gratitude prayer → accepted, forgiven, وَعْدَ الصِّدْقِ

PIVOT — Rebellious child: 'uff' to parents, denies resurrection, parents plead (v.17); losers among nations of jinn and men (v.18); universal principle: degrees for what they did, fully compensated, not wronged (v.19)
Day: pleasures exhausted → punishment of humiliation; ʿĀd at al-Aḥqāf: Hūd warns, they mock, cloud = destructive wind; only dwellings remain — thus We recompense criminals

Given hearing/vision/hearts → availed nothing; destroyed surroundings; false gods (إِفْك returned); jinn hear Quran → confirm after Moses (مُصَدِّق) → call people to respond → manifest error for those who refuse
God created heavens/earth without failing → able to raise dead; Day: taste punishment; فَاصْبِرْ like أُولُو الْعَزْمِ (only Quranic occurrence); only فَاسِقُونَ destroyed

B_B_prime_jinn_human_mirror.note: B (vv.7-12): humans reject Quran — 'magic', 'fabrication', 'ancient falsehood (إِفْك)'. B′ (vv.26-32): jinn accept Quran — confirm after Moses, call their people as warners. مُوسَى+مُصَدِّق formula in both (vv.12/30). إِفْك in both (vv.11/28) — returned to its true owners. The jinn are better listeners than Quraysh. Only such human-rejection / non-human-acceptance mirror in the corpus.

parents_binary_at_center.note: Good child (vv.15-16): grateful at 40, prays for parents, repents → accepted, forgiven, Promise of Truth. Bad child (v.17): 'uff', denies resurrection → declared losers (v.18). Only parent-binary in the corpus functioning as structural pivot. The surah's moral vision begins at the family.

jinn_wanas_pivot_seed.note: الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِ named at pivot (v.18). B′ shows jinn responding (vv.29-32). Q.46:29-32 is the earliest Quranic account of jinn hearing the Quran — four verses that Q.72 expands into 28 verses.

ulu_al_azm_unique.note: أُولُو الْعَزْمِ مِنَ الرُّسُلِ — 'those of determination among the messengers'. Only Quranic occurrence. Q.46's closing patience command uniquely names the quality of the models rather than the reason for patience.

hawamiim_series_closer.note: Q.46 closes the seven-surah Ḥawāmīm series (Q.40-46). Bracket: Q.40:1-2 (حم تَنْزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ) ↔ Q.46:1-2 (الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ). Near-EXACT, only الْعَلِيمِ/الْحَكِيمِ differs. Seven surahs sharing حم and the same opening formula.

fasibr_thread_extends.note: فَاصْبِرْ thread: Q.46:35 → Q.50:39 → Q.52:48 → Q.68:48. Q.46 opens the thread with the only occurrence that names the patience models (أُولُو الْعَزْمِ).

ifk_returned.note: إِفْك ('falsehood'): disbelievers call Quran 'ancient falsehood' (v.11, B) → their idols WERE the falsehood (v.28, B′: ذَلِكَ إِفْكُهُمْ). The word is returned to its true source — a structural irony encoded in the B↔B′ mirror.

False gods = their إِفْك — word returned to source

quoted jinn: 'after Moses, confirming' — B↔B′ mirror formula
quoted jinn: respond to God's Caller; punishment for refusal
quoted jinn: those who don't respond = manifest error; مُبِين third deployment

quoted Day speech: 'is this not truth?' / 'taste punishment'
2sg Prophet (فَاصْبِرْ); أُولُو الْعَزْمِ — only Quranic occurrence; only فَاسِقُونَ destroyed

structure_summary.note: 35v. Late Meccan. Final Ḥawāmīm. B↔B′ human-rejection/jinn-acceptance mirror unique in corpus. Parents binary at exact center. إِفْك returned. الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِ seeds Q.72. أُولُو الْعَزْمِ only Quranic occurrence. فَاصْبِرْ thread opens. No يَا أَيُّهَا.

pivot.verse_ar: فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَاسْتَغْفِرْ لِذَنْبِكَ
pivot.axis_type: tawhid_command — فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ at exact geometric center
pivot.center_logic_note: فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ at exact zero offset (v.19 of 38). The only tawhid-formula pivot in the corpus. Center block D (vv.16-19) moves from hypocrisy diagnosis (sealed hearts, desires) through eschatological warning (Hour's signs) to the theological foundation (tawhid + forgiveness). Pivot's [-kum] terminal breaks the dominant [-hum] pattern — prosodically marks the address shift from describing others to commanding you.
pivot.notes: ring_composition. 38v. Medinan. 100% pronominal terminal [-hum/-kum] — unique in corpus: every verse ends on هُمْ or كُمْ. أَعْمَال at terminal ×9 (24%) — most saturated single word at terminal position in corpus; encodes deeds-binary thesis in prosody. Progressive هُمْ→كُمْ shift: first half about THEM, final block (vv.33-38) six consecutive كُمْ. مُحَمَّد named at v.2 — consecutive with Q.48:29, only Quran pair naming Muhammad in consecutive surahs. الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَصَدُّوا ×3 inclusio (vv.1/32/34). ذَلِكَ بِأَنَّ ×5 causal-diagnostic refrains. يَا أَيُّهَا ×2 at symmetric positions v.7/v.33: support God / obey God. Hearts degradation: sealed → diseased → locked → hiding hatred. الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا ×7 / الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا ×6 densest binary-threading in corpus.

block_map.label: Binary opening: disbelievers' deeds wasted ↔ believers' misdeeds removed; مُحَمَّد named (v.2); battle legislation (v.4); martyrs guided → paradise
يَا أَيُّهَا: support God → He supports you; disbelievers' deeds wasted; nations destroyed; God = believers' مَوْلَى / disbelievers have no مَوْلَى
Gardens/Fire binary; stronger cities destroyed; Paradise description (four rivers: water/milk/wine/honey) ↔ scalding water severs intestines

PIVOT — Hypocrites listen but don't understand; hearts sealed; follow desires; guided increase in guidance (v.17); Hour approaches (v.18); فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ + seek forgiveness (v.19)
Believers ask for a surah; hypocrites' death-look at fighting; obedience better; would you corrupt the earth?; locks on hearts; reflect on the Quran
Apostates: Satan enticed; obey deniers; angels strike faces; deeds worthless; hypocrites think God won't expose them; We could show you their marks; We will test you
Deeds wasted (EXACT echo v.1); يَا أَيُّهَا obey God/Messenger; never forgiven; don't weaken; worldly life = play; spending test; God الْغَنِيُّ / you الْفُقَرَاءُ; if you turn → replaced

100pct_pronominal_terminal.note: 100% pronominal terminal — unique in the analyzed corpus. Every verse ends on هُمْ (them, 27v) or كُمْ (you, 11v). No terminal is a noun, adjective, verb, or divine attribute. The surah's prosody IS its sociology: every sentence ends by identifying WHOSE fate is at stake.

amal_9_terminal.note: أَعْمَال at terminal position ×9 (24% of 38 verses) — most saturated single lexical item at terminal position in the analyzed corpus. أَعْمَالَهُمْ ×6 (disbelievers' deeds wasted) / أَعْمَالَكُمْ ×3 (believers' deeds preserved/tested). The surah's fundamental binary encoded in the prosodic architecture.

tawhid_as_pivot.note: فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ at exact geometric center — the only shahāda-formula structural pivot in the analyzed corpus. The command is فَاعْلَمْ (imperative): tawhid is not declared but commanded to be KNOWN. Flanked by Hour's approach (v.18) and sincerity test (v.20).

hum_kum_progressive_shift.note: Progressive هُمْ→كُمْ prosodic shift: vv.1-19 contain 16× [-hum] / 3× [-kum]; vv.20-38 contain 11× [-hum] / 8× [-kum]; final block vv.32-38: 1× [-hum] + 6 consecutive [-kum]. Surah moves from narrating THEIR fate to demanding action FROM YOU.

binary_threading_densest.note: الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا ×7 / الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا ×6 thread every block. Three verses deploy both in same verse (vv.3/11/12). Densest believer/disbeliever binary-threading in the analyzed corpus.

muhammad_named_consecutive_Q48.note: مُحَمَّد named at v.2 (opening). Q.48:29 names him at the closing verse. Only consecutive-surah pair in the Quran naming Muhammad — Q.47 introduces him at the start; Q.48 celebrates him at the end.

hearts_degradation_sequence.note: Four-stage hearts degradation: sealed/طَبَعَ (v.16, D) → diseased/مَرَضٌ (v.20, C′) → locked/أَقْفَالُهَا (v.24, C′) → hiding hatred/أَضْغَان (v.29, B′). Progressive spiritual deterioration tracked across the second half.

dhaliha_banna_5_causal.note: ذَلِكَ بِأَنَّ ×5 causal-diagnostic refrains — each explains WHY a group is condemned. Five explanations across five structural positions.

يَا أَيُّهَا ②; [-kum] at obedience command; أَطِيعُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا الرَّسُولَ
2pl (فَلَا تَهِنُوا); don't weaken; God is with you
Expose YOUR hatred — from external (v.29) to internal
God is الْغَنِيُّ / you are الْفُقَرَاءُ; if you turn, replaced by another people

structure_summary.rhyme_type: 100% pronominal [-hum/-kum] 38/38 | [-hum] 27v / [-kum] 11v | أَعْمَال at terminal ×9 (24%) | progressive هُمْ→كُمْ shift in closing
structure_summary.note: 38v. Medinan. 100% pronominal terminal unique in corpus. أَعْمَال ×9 most saturated terminal word. Tawhid pivot at exact center — only shahāda-formula pivot in corpus. هُمْ→كُمْ shift encodes rhetorical strategy. Densest believer/disbeliever binary. مُحَمَّد named consecutive with Q.48.

pivot.verse_ar: وَلِلَّهِ مُلْكُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ يَغْفِرُ لِمَنْ يَشَاءُ وَيُعَذِّبُ مَنْ يَشَاءُ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا
pivot.axis_type: sovereignty_center — God forgives whom He wills and punishes whom He wills, dividing past failure from future test
pivot.center_logic_note: Single sovereignty declaration at offset −0.034 within the 7-verse mukhallifūn center block (D, vv.11-17). v.14 concentrates the surah's two governing roots (غ-ف-ر / ع-ذ-ب) and provides the theological principle that divides past failure (vv.11-13: excuses + ظَنّ السَّوْء → سَعِير) from future test (vv.15-17: booty refused + battle). مُلْكُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ echoes جُنُود bracket (vv.4/7). Sole prosodic exception (v.12 بُورًا [-ūr]) falls two verses before, marking the spiritual ruin the sovereignty declaration addresses.
pivot.notes: ring_composition. 29v. Medinan. Negative-center architecture: failure at the core, triumph outside — unique in corpus. وَكَانَ اللَّهُ + attribute ×7 — most sustained divine-attribute formula in corpus. السَّكِينَة ×3 three-stage arc (theological→historical→polemical) — only surah with three deployments. قُلُوب ×5 (five distinct spiritual states: tranquility/falsehood/evil-assumption/divine-knowledge/jāhiliyya). فَتْحًا قَرِيبًا EXACT ×2 (vv.18/27) brackets second half. صِرَاطًا مُسْتَقِيمًا EXACT ×2 (vv.2/20). مُحَمَّد named at closing verse — only such instance in the Quran. ظَنّ السَّوْءِ EXACT ×2 (vv.6/12) B→D. Sole exception (v.12 بُورًا) marks mukhallifūn's ruin. عَظِيمًا/أَلِيمًا phonetically identical reward/punishment — mirrors Q.82 نَعِيمٍ/جَحِيمٍ. No يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا.

block_map.label: فَتْح declared: إِنَّا فَتَحْنَا + forgiveness + straight path + mighty victory
السَّكِينَة in believers' hearts + جُنُودُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ ×2 + paradise/hell binary + عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا
Prophet sent (شَاهِد/مُبَشِّر/نَذِير) + بَيْعَة = pledging God + يَدُ اللَّهِ + أَجْرًا عَظِيمًا
PIVOT — Mukhallifūn: excuses exposed (vv.11-13) + ظَنّ السَّوْء + سَعِير → v.14 cosmic sovereignty → booty refused (v.15) + future battle test (vv.16-17) + gardens/punishment binary
God pleased at بَيْعَة under tree + السَّكِينَة ② + فَتْحًا قَرِيبًا + مَغَانِم + صِرَاطًا مُسْتَقِيمًا + قَدِيرًا
Disbelievers would flee + سُنَّة اللَّهِ unchanged + Mecca truce + hidden believers protected + حَمِيَّة → السَّكِينَة ③ + كَلِمَة التَّقْوَى + عَلِيمًا
Vision fulfilled: فَتْحًا قَرِيبًا + sent with truth to prevail + مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ named + community portrait (Torah/Gospel) + مَغْفِرَةً + أَجْرًا عَظِيمًا

kana_allah_7_most_sustained.note: وَكَانَ اللَّهُ + attribute ×7 across 29 verses — most sustained divine-attribute closing formula in the analyzed corpus. Seven attributes: عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا / عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا / غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا / عَزِيزًا حَكِيمًا / قَدِيرًا / بَصِيرًا / عَلِيمًا. Functions as liturgical punctuation sealing each thematic unit.

sakinah_3_three_stage_arc.note: السَّكِينَة ×3 — only surah in the analyzed corpus with three deployments. Three-stage arc: v.4 theological (sent into hearts as premise) → v.18 historical (sent at the tree, Hudaybiyyah) → v.26 polemical (sent against jāhiliyya pride). Each responds to a different threat.

qulub_5_spiritual_battleground.note: قُلُوب ×5 with five distinct spiritual states: سَكِينَة enters hearts (v.4/B) → lies not in hearts (v.11/D) → evil assumption adorned in hearts (v.12/D) → God knew what was in hearts (v.18/C′) → jāhiliyya pride in hearts (v.26/B′). Only surah where the heart root threads five structurally distributed verses with five distinct spiritual states.

negative_center_architecture.note: The center block D is the surah's only sustained negative section — mukhallifūn exposed and tested. All other blocks celebrate conquest, believers, Prophet, or divine attributes. Failure at architectural center surrounded by triumph. Only such negative-center ring in the analyzed corpus.

muhammad_named_closing_verse.note: مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ in the surah's final verse. Only four surahs in the entire Quran name Muhammad (Q.3:144, Q.33:40, Q.47:2, Q.48:29). Q.48 is the only one where the name appears in the final verse. The surah that began with لَكَ (v.1, 'for you') closes by naming who 'you' is.

bura_exception_v12.note: v.12 بُورًا [-ūran] — sole prosodic exception in 29 verses of [-iːCan] tanwīn. The word names spiritual ruin ('you became a ruined people'). Falls two verses before the sovereignty pivot (v.14): the ruin of the mukhallifūn prosodically marks the approach. Parallels Q.51 and Q.53 sole exceptions at spiritual-failure diagnostics.

aziman_aliman_phonetic_identity.note: عَظِيمًا (great reward, vv.5/10/29) and أَلِيمًا (painful punishment, vv.16/17/25) share the exact same terminal [-iːman]. Reward and punishment are phonetically identical — mirrors Q.82 نَعِيمٍ/جَحِيمٍ and Q.52 السَّمُومِ/الرَّحِيمُ devices.

fathan_qariban_EXACT_bracket.note: فَتْحًا قَرِيبًا EXACT ×2: v.18 (C′: reward at tree) → v.27 (A′: vision confirmed). Brackets the surah's second half.

no_ya_ayyuha.note: No يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا. The Hudaybiyyah narrative addresses through historical event, not summoning address. Q.49 (next surah) opens with يَا أَيُّهَا as its very first word — sharpest possible contrast.

signal_table.prosody_note: divine We (إِنَّا فَتَحْنَا); tanwīn zone opens
divine We (إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ); triple mission: شَاهِد/مُبَشِّر/نَذِير
3p + قُلْ ①; mukhallifūn enter; hearts harbor lies
SOLE EXCEPTION [-ūr]: 'ruined people'; 2pl accusation; evil assumption in hearts; [-ū-] vs all other [-iː-]

signal_table.lexical_signal: leitwort (غ-ف-ر ② + ع-ذ-ب) + refrain (وَكَانَ اللَّهُ ③)
signal_table.prosody_note: PIVOT: وَلِلَّهِ مُلْكُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ; يَغْفِرُ/يُعَذِّبُ binary; cosmic sovereignty
3p + قُلْ ②; second mukhallifūn challenge: booty refused
قُلْ ③; future battle test; obey → reward / turn → punishment
لَقَدْ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ; بَيْعَة recalled; السَّكِينَة ②; God knew what was in hearts
بِبَطْنِ مَكَّةَ — Mecca named; divine restraint
divine We (لَعَذَّبْنَا); hidden believers; counterfactual punishment

signal_table.lexical_signal: refrain (وَكَانَ اللَّهُ ⑦) + leitwort (ق-ل-ب ⑥: حَمِيَّة)
signal_table.prosody_note: السَّكِينَة ③ + كَلِمَة التَّقْوَى; jāhiliyya pride in hearts
A′ opens; vision confirmed: لَتَدْخُلُنَّ الْمَسْجِدَ الْحَرَامَ
هُوَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلَ رَسُولَهُ بِالْهُدَى; unique terminal consonant [-d]
مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ — Prophet named in closing verse; community portrait (Torah/Gospel)

structure_summary.rhyme_type: 100% tanwīn accusative [-iːCan] 29/29 | dominant [-iːman] 15/29 (52%) | single vowel exception v.12 بُورًا [-ūran]
structure_summary.note: 29v. Medinan. Negative-center ring unique in corpus. وَكَانَ اللَّهُ ×7 most sustained divine-attribute formula. السَّكِينَة ×3 three-stage arc. قُلُوب ×5 five spiritual states. مُحَمَّد named at closing verse — only such in Quran. فَتْحًا قَرِيبًا EXACT ×2. Sole exception v.12 marks ruin. No يَا أَيُّهَا.

pivot.verse_ar: وَإِنْ طَائِفَتَانِ … إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الْمُقْسِطِينَ / إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌ
pivot.axis_type: brotherhood_seam — إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌ grounds both prophetic authority (first half) and social ethics (second half)
pivot.center_logic_note: Two-verse seam at exact zero offset. v.9 legislates conflict resolution (فَأَصْلِحُوا ×2, فَقَاتِلُوا, وَأَقْسِطُوا); v.10 declares the brotherhood principle (إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌ) and commands taqwā. The pivot concentrates فَأَصْلِحُوا ×3 (zero elsewhere), the surah's only divine-love declaration (يُحِبُّ الْمُقْسِطِينَ), and the second وَاتَّقُوا. Identified by ABSENCE: the only block without يَا أَيُّهَا in a surah where every other block opens with it.
pivot.notes: ring_composition. 18v. 5 blocks. Medinan. يَا أَيُّهَا ×6 (5× الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا + 1× النَّاسُ) — highest absolute count in corpus. Pivot is ONLY block without يَا أَيُّهَا — structural inversion identifies center. فَأَصْلِحُوا ×3 concentrated entirely at pivot. Divine/human terminal alternation ([-iːm] divine / [-ūna] human) unique in corpus — perfect in Block A (vv.1-5). Sole prosodic exception v.13 (خَبِيرٌ [-iːr]) marks sole addressee expansion (believers→mankind). Only surah deploying both يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا and يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ. First without eschatological content in backfill. Confirms Q.50 as western boundary of 7-surah يَا أَيُّهَا absence block (Q.50-56).

block_map.label: Prophetic etiquette: do not precede God/Messenger, lower voices, those behind chambers lack reason, patience better (يَا أَيُّهَا ×2: vv.1,2)
Verify news from a fāsiq; God endeared faith and made hateful disbelief (يَا أَيُّهَا ×1: v.6)
PIVOT — If two factions fight reconcile; if one oppresses fight it; إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌ; fear God for mercy (NO يَا أَيُّهَا)
Social ethics: no mockery, no insults, no spying, no backbiting; dead-flesh simile; fear God (يَا أَيُّهَا ×2: vv.11,12)
يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ: tribes to know each other, most noble = most righteous; bedouins: submission ≠ faith; true believers defined; God knows all (يَا أَيُّهَا ×1 النَّاسُ: v.13)

ya_ayyuha_6_highest_absolute.note: يَا أَيُّهَا ×6 in 18 verses — highest absolute count in the analyzed corpus (previous: Q.66 ×5 in 12v). Distribution 2+1+0+2+1 across 5 blocks. The pivot (C) is the ONLY block without يَا أَيُّهَا: the brotherhood declaration needs no summons. Q.66 holds the density record (5/12 = 0.417); Q.49 holds the absolute count record (6/18 = 0.333).

pivot_identified_by_absence.note: The pivot is identifiable by what it LACKS: every other block opens with يَا أَيُّهَا; the center does not. Structural inversion as identification device — unique in the analyzed corpus.

faslihu_3_at_pivot.note: فَأَصْلِحُوا ×3 concentrated entirely in two pivot verses (v.9 ×2, v.10 ×1). Zero occurrences elsewhere. Highest single-imperative concentration at a pivot in the analyzed corpus.

divine_human_terminal_alternation.note: Near-perfect alternation between divine-attribute terminals ([-iːm]: عَلِيمٌ/رَحِيمٌ/حَكِيمٌ/عَظِيمٌ ×7) and human-descriptor terminals ([-ūna]: ×7). Perfect in Block A (vv.1-5): [-iːm]/[-ūna]/[-iːm]/[-ūna]/[-iːm]. Surah sounds like call-and-response between divine attributes and human conduct. Unique in the analyzed corpus.

khabir_exception_v13.note: v.13 = sole prosodic exception (خَبِيرٌ [-iːr] vs all other divine terminals in [-iːm]). Marks the sole addressee expansion (believers → mankind: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ). The sound that names God's knowledge of ALL peoples refuses to rhyme with the sound naming God's knowledge of believers. Prosodic exception encodes discourse exception.

ya_ayyuha_alladhina_wa_nnas_dual.note: Only surah in the analyzed corpus deploying both يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا and يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ, with the latter at the outer ring's turn (v.13). Addressee EXPANDS at A→A′: believer etiquette culminates in a universal human principle.

no_eschatology.note: First surah in the backfill with NO eschatological content — no Day of Judgment, Hell, Paradise, resurrection, or cosmic upheaval. Q.49 legislates the earthly community that Q.50-56 will judge on the Day. Structural complement to the Meccan eschatological surahs.

amanna_aslamna_distinction.note: آمَنَّا ('we have believed') vs أَسْلَمْنَا ('we have submitted'): faith has not yet entered your hearts (v.14). Only surah in the analyzed corpus that explicitly distinguishes the two in a full legislative examination. Echoes Q.51:35-36 الْمُؤْمِنِينَ/الْمُسْلِمِينَ.

ya_ayyuha_block_boundary_confirmed.note: Q.49 deploys يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا at v.1 (opening word). Q.50 has zero. Confirms Q.50 as western boundary of the 7-surah absence block (Q.50-56), bounded by Q.49 (western) and Q.57 (eastern).

signal_table.lexical_signal: inclusio_open (اللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ→vv.14-15) + refrain (وَاتَّقُوا ①) + leitwort (ع-ل-م ①)
signal_table.prosody_note: يَا أَيُّهَا ① as opening word; [-iːm] divine-attribute; perfect alternation begins
[-iːm] divine mercy; غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ brackets outer ring (echoes v.14)
PIVOT: conflict resolution; فَأَصْلِحُوا ×2; إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ — sole divine-love in surah; no يَا أَيُّهَا
PIVOT: إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ إِخْوَةٌ — foundational brotherhood; no يَا أَيُّهَا
يَا أَيُّهَا ④; [-ūna] human-identity (negative); فُسُوق B→B′ bridge
يَا أَيُّهَا ⑤; [-iːm] divine mercy; echo of v.5
SOLE EXCEPTION: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ; [-iːr] vs all other divine [-iːm]; خَبِيرٌ encodes: God knows ALL peoples; divine We (إِنَّا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ)

signal_table.lexical_signal: refrain (غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ ②) + inclusio (اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ) + concatenation (قُلُوب←v.7)
signal_table.prosody_note: 3p bedouins + قُلْ ①; غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ brackets outer ring
قُلْ ②; divine knowledge ×3 in one verse; 'would you teach God your religion?'
[-ūna] closing: God sees what you do

structure_summary.rhyme_type: nasal_final_dominant 17/18 (94.4%) | [-iːm] divine-attribute ×7 / [-ūna] human-descriptor ×7 alternating | single exception v.13 [-iːr] at يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ
structure_summary.note: 18v. 5 blocks. Medinan. يَا أَيُّهَا ×6 highest absolute in corpus. Pivot identified by absence of يَا أَيُّهَا. فَأَصْلِحُوا ×3 at pivot only. Divine/human terminal alternation unique in corpus. Single exception encodes addressee expansion. Only surah with both الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا and النَّاسُ. No eschatology. Confirms Q.50-56 block boundary.

pivot.verse_ar: فَكَشَفْنَا عَنْكَ غِطَاءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ الْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ / هَذَا مَا لَدَيَّ عَتِيدٌ
pivot.axis_type: veil_removal_seam — the instant consciousness of the trial begins, sight becomes sharp, and the record is presented
pivot.center_logic_note: Two-verse seam at offset −0.011 within the 15-verse center block (D, vv.15-29). v.22 removes the veil (sight becomes sharp); v.23 presents the record (angel-companion testifies). The pivot is the instant between heedlessness and accountability. The five-voice polyphonic trial follows (vv.22-29). 100% [-iːd] prosodic unity means rhyme cannot mark the pivot — it emerges from the other four signals alone.
pivot.notes: ring_composition. 45v. 100% [-iːd] family prosodic unity (45/45 zero zone breaks) — longest zero-break surah in the corpus. The governing terminal sound IS وَعِيدِ (God's threat) ×4 at terminal position. قَرِينُهُ ×2 (vv.23/27): one word for two beings — angel-companion and devil-companion — only case in corpus. مَزِيد antithetical pair (vv.30/35): Hell insatiable / Paradise inexhaustible. حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ (v.16) — only anatomical divine-proximity metaphor in corpus. Five voices in center block (vv.22-29) — most polyphonic scene in corpus. الْخُرُوجُ concatenation (v.11→v.42): analogy becomes reality. وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ + night glorification near-exact parallel with Q.52:48-49. يَا أَيُّهَا absence: SEVEN consecutive surahs (Q.50-56) — final record, boundary confirmed by Q.49.

block_map.label: Muqaṭṭaʿāt (ق) + Quran oath + deniers amazed at resurrection + confused condition
Creation signs (heaven/earth/rain/gardens/grain/palms) → dead land revived → كَذَلِكَ الْخُرُوجُ
Destroyed nations (eight in three verses: Noah/Rass/Thamūd/ʿĀd/Pharaoh/Lot/thicket/Tubbaʿ) — all denied → وَعِيدِ

PIVOT — First creation challenge (v.15) → حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ (v.16) → recording angels (vv.17-18) → death (v.19) → Horn/Day (vv.20-21) → veil removed/sight sharp (v.22) → angel testifies (v.23) → God commands (vv.24-26) → devil deflects (v.27) → God adjudicates (vv.28-29)
Hell speaks (مَزِيد) + Paradise brought near (مَزِيد with Us) + promise fulfilled + destroyed generations + reminder for those with hearts
Creation in six days without weariness → فَاصْبِرْ + glorification sunrise/sunset/night/prostration
Listen — Caller from near + blast of truth + Day of Emergence (كَذَلِكَ الْخُرُوجُ realized) + We give life/death + earth splits + gathering easy + فَذَكِّرْ بِالْقُرْآنِ مَنْ يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ

100pct_iid_prosodic_unity.note: 100% [-iːd] family prosodic unity across 45 verses — zero zone breaks, zero exceptions. Longest zero-break surah in the analyzed corpus (surpasses Q.72 ×28 exact tanwīn). The governing terminal IS وَعِيدِ (×4 at terminal position, vv.14/20/28/45): every verse echoes the sound of God's threat. Core [-iːd] accounts for 28/45 (62%); seven consonant variants (-d/-b/-n/-ṣ/-ẓ/-j/-r) fill the rest. The prosodic unity means rhyme cannot mark the pivot — structural articulation is carried entirely by non-prosodic signals.

waid_governing_terminal.note: وَعِيدِ ×4 at terminal position — the surah's governing terminal sound is the sound of God's threat. الْوَرِيدِ (v.16, jugular) shares the terminal with وَعِيدِ: divine intimate proximity sounds like divine threat. No other surah in the analyzed corpus has its governing terminal sound directly encode a key theological term at this frequency.

qarinuhu_two_beings.note: قَرِينُهُ ×2: v.23 = angel-companion (presents prepared record) / v.27 = devil-companion (deflects blame). One word designates two distinct supernatural beings in the same courtroom scene. Only case in the analyzed corpus where a single noun identifies two different characters in the same narrative unit.

mazid_antithetical.note: مَزِيد antithetical pair: هَلْ مِنْ مَزِيدٍ (v.30, Hell insatiable) ↔ وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ (v.35, Paradise inexhaustible). Five verses apart. Only antithetical same-word pair in the corpus bridging Hell and Paradise descriptions in consecutive passages.

habl_al_warid.note: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ — only anatomical divine-proximity metaphor in the analyzed corpus. God is closer than the jugular vein. Establishes the theological ground for the trial: God can judge because God is already present inside the person.

five_voice_trial.note: Five distinct speaking voices in eight verses: (a) narrator addresses each soul (v.22), (b) angel-companion testifies (v.23), (c) God commands (vv.24-26), (d) devil-companion deflects (v.27), (e) God adjudicates (vv.28-29). Most polyphonic scene in the analyzed corpus.

khurug_concatenation.note: الْخُرُوجُ concatenation: كَذَلِكَ الْخُرُوجُ (v.11, B: resurrection analogy from dead land) → يَوْمُ الْخُرُوجِ (v.42, A′: Day of Emergence realized). Analogy becomes reality across the surah.

sabih_glorification_Q52_parallel.note: Q.50:39-40: فَاصْبِرْ … وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ الشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ الْغُرُوبِ / وَمِنَ اللَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَارَ السُّجُودِ ↔ Q.52:48-49: وَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ … وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ / وَمِنَ اللَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَارَ النُّجُومِ. Strongest non-consecutive two-verse parallel in the analyzed corpus: patience + glorify + specific times + 'and in part of the night glorify Him and after…'

no_ya_ayyuha.note: No يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا. Final record: SEVEN consecutive surahs (Q.50-56). Boundary confirmed: Q.49 Al-Ḥujurāt (Medinan) deploys يَا أَيُّهَا at vv.1/2/6/11/12.

v45_triple_voice.note: Final verse contains divine We (نَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ), 2sg Prophet address (وَمَا أَنْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِجَبَّارٍ), and divine I (وَعِيدِ). Three grammatical persons in one verse — most compressed multi-voice verse in the analyzed corpus.

nations_catalogue_broadest.note: Eight destroyed nations in three verses (Noah/Rass/Thamūd/ʿĀd/Pharaoh/Lot/thicket/Tubbaʿ) — broadest single-surah nations catalogue in the analyzed corpus. Q.51-54 each share subsets; Q.50 is the most comprehensive.

كَذَلِكَ الْخُرُوجُ — resurrection analogy → Day of Emergence
وَعِيدِ — 'My threat'; divine-I possessive suffix; governing theological terminal
Center opens: first creation → new creation

structure_summary.rhyme_type: [-iːd] family 100% unity 45/45 verses zero zone breaks — longest zero-break surah in corpus
structure_summary.note: 45v. Ring composition 7 blocks. 100% [-iːd] prosodic unity — governing terminal IS وَعِيدِ ×4. قَرِينُهُ ×2 (vv.23/27) one word two beings — unique in corpus. مَزِيد antithetical pair Hell/Paradise. حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ only anatomical proximity metaphor. Five-voice trial — most polyphonic scene in corpus. الْخُرُوجُ analogy→reality concatenation. Q.52:48-49 glorification near-exact parallel. يَا أَيُّهَا final record: seven consecutive surahs Q.50-56.

pivot.verse_ar: قَالَ رَبُّكِ إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِيمُ / فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا الْمُرْسَلُونَ
pivot.axis_type: narrative_mercy_punishment_hinge — same angels deliver life (son) and death (stones) at the exact geometric center
pivot.center_logic_note: Two-verse seam at exact geometric center (offset +0.000) within the 14-verse Abraham narrative (vv.24-37). v.30 closes the mercy half with الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِيمُ — the surah's only divine-name pair; v.31 opens the punishment half with Abraham's question that reveals the angels' destructive mission. Same angels deliver life (son for Sarah) and death (stones for criminals). The عَقِيمٌ concatenation (v.29→v.41) bridges the pivot to the outer ring. The [-iːm] sub-cluster peaks at the pivot.
pivot.notes: ring_composition. 60v. 7-block ring A(1-6)/B(7-14)/C(15-23)/D(24-37)/C′(38-49)/B′(50-55)/A′(56-60). Perfect 23/14/23 outer-ring symmetry — most balanced ring in corpus >40v. Pivot at exact zero offset. الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِيمُ sole divine-name pair at exact center. عَقِيمٌ antithetical bridge (v.29 barren woman→v.41 barren wind): mercy overcomes barrenness at center / judgment weaponizes barrenness in exemplars. وَفِي ×8 mirror device (4+4 across C/C′) — only surah using a single prepositional formula as dedicated mirror-linking device at this density. Divine-I purpose statement (vv.56-57): three consecutive divine-I forms; [-ūnī] terminal cluster prosodically unique. Zone 4 (vv.10-60): 51 consecutive nasal-final verses with ZERO exceptions — longest zero-exception zone in corpus. لَوَاقِعٌ EXACT Q.52:7 — only consecutive-surah shared apodosis in corpus. يَا أَيُّهَا absence block extends to SIX consecutive surahs (Q.51-56).

block_map.label: Four cosmic oaths (winds/clouds/ships/angels) + apodosis: promise true, recompense will occur (لَوَاقِعٌ)
Second oath (heaven) + deniers in differing speech + fire scene: 'taste your trial'
Righteous (gardens, night prayer, dawn forgiveness, charity) + وَفِي signs in earth/selves/heaven (×4) + oath by Lord of heaven and earth

PIVOT — Abraham narrative: honored guests → son announced (vv.24-30) → hinge الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِيمُ / 'what is your mission?' (vv.30-31) → sent to destroy criminals (vv.32-37); divine We rescues believers, leaves sign
Signs in history: Moses/Pharaoh, ʿĀd (barren wind), Thamūd, Noah (وَفِي ×4) + cosmic creation (heaven built, earth spread, pairs)
Flee to God + tawhid + all messengers accused (سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ) + طَاغُونَ verdict + فَتَوَلَّ / وَذَكِّرْ twin commands
Divine-I purpose: لِيَعْبُدُونِ / God the Provider (الرَّزَّاقُ) / punishment / وَيْلٌ closing — وَيْلٌ لِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا مِنْ يَوْمِهِمُ الَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ

aqeem_antithetical_bridge.note: عَقِيمٌ antithetical bridge: Sarah = عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ (v.29, barren woman; God overcomes barrenness with life — son) ↔ الرِّيحَ الْعَقِيمَ (v.41, barren wind; God weaponizes barrenness for death — ʿĀd destroyed). Same word, opposite divine action. Only surah in the analyzed corpus bridging its center and outer ring with the same lexical item carrying antithetical divine actions.

divine_i_purpose_statement.note: Three consecutive divine-I forms: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ (v.56) / مَا أُرِيدُ ×2 (v.57) / يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ suffix (v.59). Shift from divine We (seven نَا verbs vv.35-49) to divine I for creation's purpose. Most sustained divine first-person singular in the analyzed corpus. [-ūnī] terminal cluster (vv.56/57/59) prosodically unique — the divine-I speaks in a sound no other voice in the surah uses.

wafi_mirror_device.note: وَفِي ×8 (4+4 across C/C′): C locates signs in possessions, earth, selves, heaven; C′ locates signs in Lot's ruins, Moses, ʿĀd, Thamūd. The 'and in...' formula is the structural glue of the mirror. No other surah in the analyzed corpus uses a single prepositional formula as a dedicated mirror-linking device with this density (8 instances, 4+4).

zone4_51_zero_exception.note: Zone 4 (vv.10-60): 51 consecutive nasal-final [-ūn/-īn/-īm] verses with ZERO exceptions — longest zero-exception sound-family zone in the analyzed corpus. Surpasses Q.72 ×28 tanwīn and Q.68 ×52 nasal in raw length.

im_sub_cluster_7.note: Seven [-iːm] terminals in 15 verses (vv.28-42) concentrated at and around the pivot: عَلِيمٍ (learned son) / عَقِيمٌ (Sarah's barrenness) / الْعَلِيمُ (exact center) / الْأَلِيمَ (painful punishment) / مُلِيمٌ (blameworthy Pharaoh) / الْعَقِيمَ (barren wind) / كَالرَّمِيمِ (ruins). Full narrative arc from life to death unified by one sound.

23_14_23_symmetry.note: Perfect 23/14/23 outer-ring proportions: first half (A+B+C) = 6+8+9 = 23v / center D = 14v / second half (C′+B′+A′) = 12+6+5 = 23v. Within D: mercy half (vv.24-30) = 7v / punishment half (vv.31-37) = 7v. Most balanced ring structure in the analyzed corpus for a surah over 40 verses.

lawaqi_consecutive_surahs.note: لَوَاقِعٌ (Q.51:6) ↔ لَوَاقِعٌ (Q.52:7). Same apodosis word at the same oath-block position in consecutive surahs. Q.51 swears by winds/clouds/ships/angels; Q.52 swears by the mount/book/house/ceiling/sea. Different cosmic witnesses, same verdict. Only confirmed consecutive-surah shared apodosis in the corpus.

mu2mineen_muslimeen_consecutive.note: الْمُؤْمِنِينَ (v.35) / الْمُسْلِمِينَ (v.36): believer/Muslim distinction in consecutive verses within the Lot narrative — the only such consecutive-verse semantic narrowing in the analyzed corpus. Believers are brought out (plural); the Muslims are a single household (بَيْت = Lot's house).

prophetic_i_divine_i_escalation.note: Prophetic I (إِنِّي لَكُمْ, vv.50-51) → divine I (خَلَقْتُ, vv.56-57): five verses apart. Prophet speaks as 'I'; God speaks as 'I'. Surah escalates from prophetic to divine authority within the same closing movement.

no_ya_ayyuha.note: No يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا. Extends block to SIX consecutive surahs (Q.51-56) — new corpus record. Previous record was five (Q.52-56). Q.50 next to check.

structure_summary.rhyme_type: [-an] tanwīn oath zone vv.1-4 | [-āqiʿ/-ādiq] apodosis vv.5-6 | mixed transitional vv.7-9 | nasal_final [-ūn/-īn/-īm] dominant vv.10-60 (51 verses ZERO exceptions) | [-iːm] sub-cluster vv.28-42 | [-ūnī] divine-I cluster vv.56-57,59
structure_summary.note: 60v. Ring composition 7 blocks. Perfect 23/14/23 outer-ring symmetry — most balanced ring in corpus >40v. Pivot at exact zero offset. الْحَكِيمُ الْعَلِيمُ sole divine-name pair at exact center. عَقِيمٌ antithetical bridge (vv.29/41) — mercy overcomes barrenness at center; judgment weaponizes barrenness in exemplars. وَفِي ×8 mirror device (4+4 C/C′) — unique in corpus. Divine-I purpose statement with [-ūnī] terminal cluster — unique in corpus. Zone 4: 51 consecutive zero-exception nasal verses — corpus record. لَوَاقِعٌ EXACT Q.52:7 — only consecutive-surah shared apodosis in corpus. يَا أَيُّهَا absence block: six consecutive surahs Q.51-56.

pivot.verse_ar: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَاءَلُونَ…إِنَّهُ هُوَ الْبَرُّ الرَّحِيمُ
pivot.axis_type: blessed_testimony_seam — the righteous testify from paradise that earthly fear and supplication led to divine deliverance
pivot.center_logic_note: Four-verse compound seam at the ring's center. The blessed's direct speech (vv.25-28) joins the eschatological promise (vv.1-24: oaths, Hell, Paradise) to the earthly confrontation (vv.29-49: vindication, أَمْ chain, Day, patience). Concentrates: sole divine-name pair (الْبَرُّ الرَّحِيمُ), و-ق-ى root bridge (3rd→1st person), third عَذَاب instance, [-iːm] phonetic convergence of punishment averted and mercy bestowed.
pivot.notes: ring_composition. 49v. Perfect 8+8+8 first-half symmetry (oath/hell/paradise). 4-verse pivot. Compressed second half 6+9+6=21v. أَمْ ×15 (vv.30-43) — longest أَمْ chain in analyzed corpus. بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ EXACT ×2 (vv.16/19) brackets Hell/Paradise with same verdict formula — opposite outcomes. بِأَعْيُنِنَا (v.48) most intimate divine expression — shared only with Q.54:14. الْبَرُّ الرَّحِيمُ sole divine-name pair — appears only at pivot. وَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ (v.48) near-exact at same verse number in Q.68:48. فَذَكِّرْ/فَذَرْهُمْ (vv.29/45) brackets second half. النُّجُومِ (v.49) title-root bridge to Q.53 النَّجْم.

block_map.label: Five cosmic oaths → punishment will occur (لَوَاقِعٌ); no preventer (مَا لَهُ مِنْ دَافِعٍ)
Hell scene — cosmic upheaval; فَوَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ; fire's angels condemn deniers; بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ ①
Paradise furnishings — المُتَّقِينَ; gardens; thrones; houris; divine We ×3 (vv.20-22); بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ ②; لُؤْلُؤٌ مَكْنُونٌ
PIVOT — blessed testify: مُشْفِقِينَ (earthly fear) → وَوَقَانَا (divine protection) → كُنَّا نَدْعُوهُ (past supplication) → الْبَرُّ الرَّحِيمُ (sole divine-name pair)
Prophet vindicated — not soothsayer/madman/poet; فَذَكِّرْ opens; Quran challenge; مَجْنُونٍ defense thread →Q.68
أَمْ chain ×15 — systematic demolition: ad hominem → ontological → epistemological → theological → tawhid climax سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
Day reaffirmed + worldly punishment + فَذَرْهُمْ + كَيْد avails nothing + patience (وَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ) + بِأَعْيُنِنَا + glorification + النُّجُومِ bridge to Q.53

am_chain_x15.note: أَمْ ×15 across 12 verses (vv.30,32×2,33,35×2,36,37×2,38,39,40,41,42,43) — longest أَمْ interrogative chain in analyzed corpus. Systematically exhausts every alternative: ad hominem (vv.30-34) → ontological (vv.35-36) → epistemological (vv.37-38) → theological (vv.39-41) → ultimate (vv.42-43). Two بَلْ diagnostic verdicts: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ (v.33) / لَا يُوقِنُونَ (v.36). Terminates on سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ.

verdict_formula_hell_paradise.note: بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ EXACT ×2: v.16 closes Hell (what you used to do → fire) ↔ v.19 opens Paradise (what you used to do → gardens). Identical syntax, opposite destinations. Only surah in corpus placing the EXACT same recompense formula at both Hell-close and Paradise-open.

biayunina_bridge.note: فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا (v.48) — divine 'Our eyes' protecting the Prophet. Only other occurrence: Q.54:14 (تَجْرِي بِأَعْيُنِنَا, Noah's Ark). Both protect God's agent under duress. Two surahs apart.

al_barr_al_raheem.note: الْبَرُّ الرَّحِيمُ — sole divine-name pair in the surah, appearing only at the pivot. الْبَرُّ (the Righteous/Fulfiller of promises) unique in the analyzed corpus as a standalone divine title.

perfect_8_8_8_symmetry.note: Blocks A, B, C each exactly 8 verses — most perfectly balanced three-block opening in the analyzed corpus. Oath(8) + Hell(8) + Paradise(8) = 24 verses, then 4-verse pivot, then compressed second half 6+9+6=21 verses.

three_nested_speech_layers.note: Three quoted speech units at progressively inward structural positions: fire's angels condemn deniers (vv.14-16, in B) → blessed testify to each other (vv.26-28, in D = pivot) → Prophet responds to accusers (v.31, in C′). Voices move inward: external condemnation → internal testimony → counter-challenge. No other surah in analyzed corpus places three distinct quoted speeches in this progressive inward-nesting arrangement.

fadhakkir_fadarhum_bracket.note: فَذَكِّرْ (v.29, remind) opens the second half / فَذَرْهُمْ (v.45, leave them) closes the argumentative center. Prophet's two modes: proclaim → disengage. Everything between them (vindication, challenge, أَمْ chain, dismissal) contained within remind→leave arc. فَذَرْهُمْ extends the ذ-ر thread backward to Q.52; thread now spans Q.52-74.

wasbirlihukmi_same_verse.note: وَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ (Q.52:48) ↔ فَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ (Q.68:48). Four words identical, differ only in conjunction (وَ/فَ). Same verse number (v.48) in both surahs — strongest same-verse-number near-exact correspondence across non-consecutive surahs in analyzed corpus.

najm_title_bridge.note: وَإِدْبَارَ النُّجُومِ (Q.52:49) — final word of the surah is النُّجُومِ (the stars). Q.53 opens with وَالنَّجْمِ إِذَا هَوَىٰ. The title-root of Q.53 (نجم) is the last content word of Q.52. Surah-boundary lexical bridge.

im_cluster_pivot.note: [-iːm] sub-cluster within nasal zone: وَنَعِيمٍ (pleasure, v.17) / الْجَحِيمِ (Hellfire, v.18) / تَأْثِيمٌ (sin, v.23) / السَّمُومِ (Scorching Fire averted, v.27) / الرَّحِيمُ (the Merciful, v.28). At pivot (vv.27-28), السَّمُومِ/الرَّحِيمُ phonetically indistinguishable — fire averted and divine mercy share one sound.

no_ya_ayyuha.note: No يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا in the surah. Extends the block to FIVE consecutive surahs (Q.52/53/54/55/56) — new corpus record. All five are Meccan declarative/eschatological. Q.51 next to check.
