structure_summary.note: 24v. Pivot vv.12-13 compound seam (5/5, compound_seam). Offset 0.000. Eight-block chiastic ring. PRIMARY FEATURE: EXACT verse-level inclusio vv.1/24 — unique in analyzed sequence. THREE TASBĪḤ FORMS: سَبَّحَ/سُبْحَانَ/يُسَبِّحُ. هُوَ اللَّهُ ×3 consecutive / nine divine names in v.23 — largest theological concentration in sequence. TWO 100% [-uūna] zones (3/5) — human drama negative and positive share terminal class. ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ ×2 consecutive cognitive pair. وَاللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ EXACT cross-surah 63:1. يَا أَيُّهَا v.18/24 — latest in sequence. قَدِيرٌ ×6 consecutive surahs 59-67. الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ ×7 across six surahs. كَمَثَلِ ×2 three-surah exemplar suite 66/60/59. بَرِيء disavowal cross-surah 60:4. الفاسقين/الفاسقون mirror vv.5/19.

verses.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَتَّخِذُوا عَدُوِّي وَعَدُوَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَاءَ تُلْقُونَ إِلَيْهِم بِالْمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا بِمَا جَاءَكُم مِّنَ الْحَقِّ يُخْرِجُونَ الرَّسُولَ وَإِيَّاكُمْ أَن تُؤْمِنُوا بِاللَّهِ رَبِّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ خَرَجْتُمْ جِهَادًا فِي سَبِيلِي وَابْتِغَاءَ مَرْضَاتِي تُسِرُّونَ إِلَيْهِم بِالْمَوَدَّةِ وَأَنَا أَعْلَمُ بِمَا أَخْفَيْتُمْ وَمَا أَعْلَنتُمْ وَمَن يَفْعَلْهُ مِنكُمْ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ سَوَاءَ السَّبِيلِ
إِن يَثْقَفُوكُمْ يَكُونُوا لَكُمْ أَعْدَاءً وَيَبْسُطُوا إِلَيْكُمْ أَيْدِيَهُمْ وَأَلْسِنَتَهُم بِالسُّوءِ وَوَدُّوا لَوْ تَكْفُرُونَ
لَن تَنفَعَكُمْ أَرْحَامُكُمْ وَلَا أَوْلَادُكُمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ يَفْصِلُ بَيْنَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ

قَدْ كَانَتْ لَكُمْ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ فِي إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَالَّذِينَ مَعَهُ إِذْ قَالُوا لِقَوْمِهِمْ إِنَّا بُرَآءُ مِنكُمْ وَمِمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ كَفَرْنَا بِكُمْ وَبَدَا بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكُمُ الْعَدَاوَةُ وَالْبَغْضَاءُ أَبَدًا حَتَّىٰ تُؤْمِنُوا بِاللَّهِ وَحْدَهُ إِلَّا قَوْلَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ لِأَبِيهِ لَأَسْتَغْفِرَنَّ لَكَ وَمَا أَمْلِكُ لَكَ مِنَ اللَّهِ مِن شَيْءٍ رَّبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
لَقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِيهِمْ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِّمَن كَانَ يَرْجُو اللَّهَ وَالْيَوْمَ الْآخِرَ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ الْغَنِيُّ الْحَمِيدُ
عَسَى اللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ الَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةً وَاللَّهُ قَدِيرٌ وَاللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
لَا يَنْهَاكُمُ اللَّهُ عَنِ الَّذِينَ لَمْ يُقَاتِلُوكُمْ فِي الدِّينِ وَلَمْ يُخْرِجُوكُم مِّن دِيَارِكُمْ أَن تَبَرُّوهُمْ وَتُقْسِطُوا إِلَيْهِمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الْمُقْسِطِينَ

إِنَّمَا يَنْهَاكُمُ اللَّهُ عَنِ الَّذِينَ قَاتَلُوكُمْ فِي الدِّينِ وَأَخْرَجُوكُم مِّن دِيَارِكُمْ وَظَاهَرُوا عَلَىٰ إِخْرَاجِكُمْ أَن تَوَلَّوْهُمْ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّهُمْ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الظَّالِمُونَ

يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِذَا جَاءَكُمُ الْمُؤْمِنَاتُ مُهَاجِرَاتٍ فَامْتَحِنُوهُنَّ اللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِإِيمَانِهِنَّ فَإِنْ عَلِمْتُمُوهُنَّ مُؤْمِنَاتٍ فَلَا تَرْجِعُوهُنَّ إِلَى الْكُفَّارِ لَا هُنَّ حِلٌّ لَّهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحِلُّونَ لَهُنَّ وَآتُوهُم مَّا أَنفَقُوا وَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيْكُمْ أَن تَنكِحُوهُنَّ إِذَا آتَيْتُمُوهُنَّ أُجُورَهُنَّ وَلَا تُمْسِكُوا بِعِصَمِ الْكَوَافِرِ وَاسْأَلُوا مَا أَنفَقْتُمْ وَلْيَسْأَلُوا مَا أَنفَقُوا ذَٰلِكُمْ حُكْمُ اللَّهِ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ
وَإِن فَاتَكُمْ شَيْءٌ مِّنْ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ إِلَى الْكُفَّارِ فَعَاقَبْتُمْ فَآتُوا الَّذِينَ ذَهَبَتْ أَزْوَاجُهُم مِّثْلَ مَا أَنفَقُوا وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ الَّذِي أَنتُم بِهِ مُؤْمِنُونَ

يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُؤْمِنَاتُ يُبَايِعْنَكَ عَلَىٰ أَن لَّا يُشْرِكْنَ بِاللَّهِ شَيْئًا وَلَا يَسْرِقْنَ وَلَا يَزْنِينَ وَلَا يَقْتُلْنَ أَوْلَادَهُنَّ وَلَا يَأْتِينَ بِبُهْتَانٍ يَفْتَرِينَهُ بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِنَّ وَأَرْجُلِهِنَّ وَلَا يَعْصِينَكَ فِي مَعْرُوفٍ فَبَايِعْهُنَّ وَاسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُنَّ اللَّهَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَتَوَلَّوْا قَوْمًا غَضِبَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ قَدْ يَئِسُوا مِنَ الْآخِرَةِ كَمَا يَئِسَ الْكُفَّارُ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ الْقُبُورِ

pivot.verse_ar: عَسَى اللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ الَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةً وَاللَّهُ قَدِيرٌ وَاللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
pivot.center_logic_note: 13v seven-block perfect symmetric ring: A(1)↔A'(13) / B(2-3)↔B'(11-12) / C(4-6)↔C'(8-10) / PIVOT(7). Distribution 1+2+3+1+3+2+1 — most exact numerical symmetry in analyzed suite. Five signals at v.7: (1) theme — the surah's only hope-verse amid legislation of enmity; عَسَى (optative mood) — the only divine optative in the analyzed sequence; (2) grammar — مَوَدَّةً at v.7 reverses the root's valence from forbidden (بِالْمَوَدَّةِ ×2, v.1) to hoped-for — root reversal at structural center; (3) prosody — zone 2 closes on v.7 (رَحِيمٌ) — the pivot marks the transition from the divine-attribute zone to the legislative zone; (4) mirror — exact geometric center (v.7 of 13, offset 0.000); five-signal convergence at the one verse that is unmirrored; (5) lexical — قَدِيرٌ ×5 (cross-surah: 67:1/66:8/65:12/64:1/60:7); غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ ×2 in surah (vv.7/12) at mirror positions.
pivot.notes: 13v. Offset 0.000. Seven-block perfect symmetric ring 1+2+3+1+3+2+1. يَا أَيُّهَا as first word of surah — most urgent opening in analyzed suite. Four divine first-person forms in v.1 — unique in sequence. أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ ×2 bracketing Abraham unit (vv.4/6). مَوَدَّةٌ root: forbidden (v.1 ×2) ↔ hoped-for (v.7) — root reversal at center. لَا يَنْهَاكُمُ / إِنَّمَا يَنْهَاكُمُ ×2 consecutive binary formula (vv.8/9). الْقُبُورِ — most eschatologically vivid isolated terminal. يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ (v.3) ↔ الْقُبُورِ (v.13) eschatological arc. قَدِيرٌ ×5 consecutive surahs 60-67. الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ in Abraham's prayer (v.5) cross-surah ×5. غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ ×2 within surah. يَا أَيُّهَا ×4 governing four structural movements. Perfect 1+2+3+1+3+2+1 symmetric distribution.

block_map.label: يَا أَيُّهَا AS FIRST WORD — do not take My enemies as allies — بِالْمَوَدَّةِ ×2 (forbidden) — divine first-person ×4: عَدُوِّي/سَبِيلِي/مَرْضَاتِي/أَنَا أَعْلَمُ — whoever does it has strayed
if they gain dominance — enemies / hands and tongues with evil — they wish your disbelief / never will relatives or children benefit you on the Day — God Seeing: بَصِيرٌ

excellent pattern in Abraham: أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ ×1 — disassociation — enmity forever — prayer: رَبَّنَا ×2 — to You is the destination: الْمَصِيرُ / Our Lord make us not torment: الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ / excellent pattern ×2 close: أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ — whoever turns away: الْغَنِيُّ الْحَمِيدُ
PIVOT: perhaps God will put between you and your enemies affection: مَوَدَّةً (forbidden → hoped-for reversal) — God competent: قَدِيرٌ — God Forgiving Merciful: غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ ×1

God does NOT forbid you from those who did not fight you — be just: يُحِبُّ الْمُقْسِطِينَ / God DOES forbid you from those who fought and expelled you — الظَّالِمُونَ / يَا أَيُّهَا — emigrant believing women — examine them — God Knowing and Wise: عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ
if wives have gone to the disbelievers — give equivalent — fear God / يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ — believing women's pledge — five لَا conditions — accept pledge — seek forgiveness: غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ ×2
يَا أَيُّهَا — do not make allies of those God is angry with — they have despaired of the Hereafter — as the disbelievers have despaired of the companions of: الْقُبُورِ

ya_ayyuha_as_first_word.note: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا as the surah's first word — most urgent opening in analyzed suite (Q.60-114). No tasbīḥ, narrative preamble, cosmic declaration, or Prophet-address precedes. The entire previous suite (61-67) opens on one of those modes. Compare the يَا أَيُّهَا delay pattern (Q.63 v.9 / Q.64 v.14 / Q.62 v.9) — here يَا أَيُّهَا is word 1.

divine_first_person_x4_v1.note: عَدُوِّي / سَبِيلِي / مَرْضَاتِي / أَنَا أَعْلَمُ — four divine first-person forms in one verse. No other verse in the analyzed sequence concentrates divine first-person forms this way. God speaks as 'I' through the legislative rebuke.

uswatan_hasanatan_bracket.note: أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ ×2 bracketing the Abraham unit (vv.4-6). The only exemplar-formula bracket in the analyzed sequence. Compare At-Taḥrīm's ضَرَبَ اللَّهُ مَثَلًا ×2 consecutive — here bracketing three verses.

mawadda_root_reversal.v7: مَوَدَّةً — hoped-for affection placed by God
mawadda_root_reversal.note: Same root و-د-د: condemned at v.1 (×2) ↔ hoped-for at v.7 (pivot). Root reversal at structural center. No other surah in analyzed sequence reverses a root's valence from condemned to hoped-for at the pivot.

la_yanhakum_innama_binary.note: لَا يَنْهَاكُمُ اللَّهُ / إِنَّمَا يَنْهَاكُمُ اللَّهُ ×2 consecutive — the binary legislative formula (permitted ↔ forbidden) announced by the same root with grammatical inversion.

alqubur_isolated_terminal.note: الْقُبُورِ — the surah's final word; isolated terminal. Most eschatologically vivid final word in analyzed sequence. Surah opens on يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ (v.3) and closes on الْقُبُورِ (v.13) — eschatological arc: Resurrection → graves.

perfect_1_2_3_1_3_2_1_symmetry.note: Perfect seven-unit symmetric distribution around pivot (v.7). Most exact numerical symmetry in analyzed suite. Compare Al-Jumuʿah's 4+3+4 prosodic symmetry.

qadir_x5_consecutive_surahs.note: قَدِيرٌ ×5 now in five consecutive surahs Q.60-67 (with Q.61/62/63 not carrying the root, the thread skips — requires verification). At pivot v.7 of Q.60.

aziz_hakim_in_abrahamic_prayer.note: الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ within Abraham's prayer (v.5) — the divine pair that opens cosmic glorification surahs (Q.61:1 / Q.62:1/3 / Q.64:18) appears here in a human supplication. Cross-surah ×5 instances: 61:1 / 62:1 / 62:3 / 64:18 / 60:5.

ghafur_rahim_x2_within_surah.note: غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ ×2 within Q.60 (vv.7/12) — at the hope-pivot and the pledge-acceptance. Most غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ-dense surah in the analyzed sequence. Cross-surah: Q.66:1 / Q.64:14 / Q.60:7/12.

ya_ayyuha_x4_governing_movements.note: يَا أَيُّهَا ×4 governing the surah's four structural movements: v.1 (opening prohibition) / v.10 (emigrant women) / v.12 (Prophet: pledge) / v.13 (closing prohibition). Three address believers directly; one addresses the Prophet.

yawm_al_qiyama_to_alqubur_arc.note: The eschatological arc opens at the Resurrection (v.3) and closes at the graves (v.13). The precondition (graves) closes the surah that invokes the event (Resurrection). Surah legislates alliance in this world and ends by invoking those who have lost all hope in the next.

structure_summary.note: 13v. Pivot v.7 (5/5, single_concentration). Offset 0.000. Perfect 1+2+3+1+3+2+1 symmetric ring. يَا أَيُّهَا as first word. Four divine first-person forms in v.1. أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ ×2 bracket. مَوَدَّةٌ root reversal at center. لَا يَنْهَاكُمُ / إِنَّمَا binary. الْقُبُورِ isolated final word. قَدِيرٌ ×5 consecutive surahs. الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ in human prayer ×5. غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ ×2 within surah.

verses.ar: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لِمَ تَقُولُونَ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
كَبُرَ مَقْتًا عِندَ اللَّهِ أَن تَقُولُوا مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذِينَ يُقَاتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِهِ صَفًّا كَأَنَّهُم بُنْيَانٌ مَرْصُوصٌ

وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِ يَا قَوْمِ لِمَ تُؤْذُونَنِي وَقَد تَّعْلَمُونَ أَنِّي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ إِلَيْكُمْ فَلَمَّا زَاغُوا أَزَاغَ اللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمْ وَاللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِي الْقَوْمَ الْفَاسِقِينَ

وَإِذْ قَالَ عِيسَى ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ يَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ إِنِّي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ إِلَيْكُمْ مُصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيَّ مِنَ التَّوْرَاةِ وَمُبَشِّرًا بِرَسُولٍ يَأْتِي مِن بَعْدِي اسْمُهُ أَحْمَدُ فَلَمَّا جَاءَهُم بِالْبَيِّنَاتِ قَالُوا هَٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ افْتَرَىٰ عَلَى اللَّهِ الْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰ إِلَى الْإِسْلَامِ وَاللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِي الْقَوْمَ الظَّالِمِينَ
يُرِيدُونَ لِيُطْفِئُوا نُورَ اللَّهِ بِأَفْوَاهِهِمْ وَاللَّهُ مُتِمُّ نُورِهِ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ الْكَافِرُونَ
هُوَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلَ رَسُولَهُ بِالْهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ الْحَقِّ لِيُظْهِرَهُ عَلَى الدِّينِ كُلِّهِ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ الْمُشْرِكُونَ
يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ تِجَارَةٍ تُنجِيكُم مِّنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
تُؤْمِنُونَ بِاللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ وَتُجَاهِدُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ بِأَمْوَالِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
يَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ وَيُدْخِلْكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِي مِن تَحْتِهَا الْأَنْهَارُ وَمَسَاكِنَ طَيِّبَةً فِي جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ ذَٰلِكَ الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ
وَأُخْرَىٰ تُحِبُّونَهَا نَصْرٌ مِّنَ اللَّهِ وَفَتْحٌ قَرِيبٌ وَبَشِّرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا كُونُوا أَنصَارَ اللَّهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ لِلْحَوَارِيِّينَ مَنْ أَنصَارِي إِلَى اللَّهِ قَالَ الْحَوَارِيُّونَ نَحْنُ أَنصَارُ اللَّهِ فَآمَنَت طَّائِفَةٌ مِّن بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ وَكَفَرَت طَّائِفَةٌ فَأَيَّدْنَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمْ فَأَصْبَحُوا ظَاهِرِينَ

pivot.verse_ar: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُحِبُّ الَّذِينَ يُقَاتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِهِ صَفًّا كَأَنَّهُم بُنْيَانٌ مَرْصُوصٌ
pivot.center_logic_note: 14v seven-block inverted ring: A(1)↔A'(14) / B(2-3)↔B'(10-13) / C(4)[pivot]↔C'(10-11)[absorbed into B'] / D(5-7)↔D'(8-9) — pivot v.4 is the keystone at structural seam between rebuke (vv.2-3) and prophetic narrative (vv.5-7). Note: large offset -0.250 (v.4 of 14). Justified by five-signal convergence uniquely at v.4: (1) theme — divine hatred (vv.2-3) immediately reversed by divine love (v.4); the only يُحِبُّ declaration in analyzed sequence; (2) grammar — إِنَّ emphatic; الصَّفَّ (surah title concept) named at v.4; (3) prosody — مَرْصُوصٌ is the most architecturally isolated terminal in the analyzed sequence — found nowhere else; the firmly-joined structure stands alone phonologically as it describes itself; (4) mirror — v.4 functions as the C-block keystone of the seven-block ring, with its C' mirror occupying vv.10-11; the seam between the ring's D and D' blocks (vv.7-8) falls at geometric center 7.5; (5) lexical — سَبِيلِهِ ×1 opening the bridge to v.11; بُنْيَانٌ مَرْصُوصٌ cross-surah pair with خُشُبٌ مُسَنَّدَةٌ (Q.63:4) — both surahs use a building simile at structurally equivalent keystone positions.
pivot.notes: 14v. Offset -0.250 — largest negative offset in dataset after Q.96 (-0.211); justified by unique-feature convergence. Seven-block ring 1+2+1+3+2+4+1. مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ ×2 exact consecutive (vv.2/3) — strongest single-zone exact-terminal in sequence. مَرْصُوصٌ isolated terminal. يُحِبُّ only divine love in sequence. أَحْمَدُ — only occurrence in Quran. ظ-ه-ر ×3 threading spine (vv.1/9/14). وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ×2 consecutive (vv.8/9). أَنصَارُ اللَّهِ ×3 within v.14. سَبَّحَ perfect tense vs. يُسَبِّحُ imperfect (Q.62/64). يَا أَيُّهَا ×3 bracketing surah (vv.2/10/14) — earliest (v.2) and latest (v.14) in suite. ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ exact cross-surah 62:9. الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ exact cross-surah 64:9. لِمَ ×2 within surah (vv.2/5) + cross-surah 66:1. لَا يَهْدِي الْقَوْمَ formula ×2 (vv.5/7) + cross-surah 62:5. نُور ×5 consecutive surahs 61-66.

block_map.label: سَبَّحَ: cosmic tasbīḥ (perfect tense) — الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ — cross-surah: 62:1/3 and 64:18
يَا أَيُّهَا — earliest in suite (v.2) — why do you say what you do not do: مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ ×2 exact consecutive / great is the hatred: كَبُرَ مَقْتًا
PIVOT: God loves those who fight in His cause in a row: يُحِبُّ (only divine love in sequence) — صَفًّا (title concept) — بُنْيَانٌ مَرْصُوصٌ (isolated terminal)

Moses narrative: لِمَ / رَسُولُ اللَّهِ / فَلَمَّا / لَا يَهْدِي الْقَوْمَ الْفَاسِقِينَ — Jesus narrative: رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ×2 / أَحْمَدُ unique / مُبِينٌ — rejection verdict: لَا يَهْدِي الْقَوْمَ الظَّالِمِينَ
they want to extinguish God's light — God will perfect His light: نُورُ اللَّهِ / وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ×1 / He sent His Messenger to manifest it over all religion: لِيُظْهِرَهُ / وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ×2 — ظ-ه-ر ×2

يَا أَيُّهَا ×2 — shall I guide you to a trade: تِجَارَةٍ cross-surah 62:11 / believe and strive: سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ ×2 / ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ cross-surah 62:9 / forgiveness and gardens: الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ cross-surah 64:9 / victory and imminent conquest
يَا أَيُّهَا ×3 — be supporters of God: أَنصَارُ اللَّهِ ×3 within verse — عِيسَى ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ ×2 — We supported the believers — they became dominant: ظَاهِرِينَ — ظ-ه-ر ×3 complete

mala_tafaalun_exact_x2_consecutive.note: مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ ×2 in consecutive verses — strongest single-zone exact-terminal concentration in analyzed sequence. No other surah repeats the exact terminal in consecutive verses within the same zone.

marsus_isolated_terminal.note: مَرْصُوصٌ — terminal found nowhere else in analyzed sequence. The firmly-joined structure stands alone phonologically, encoding its own meaning. Title concept الصَّفَّ named at this verse.

yuhib_only_divine_love.note: يُحِبُّ — only divine love declaration in the analyzed sequence (Q.61-114). Divine hatred (مَقْتًا, vv.2-3) immediately reversed by divine love (v.4) — consecutive contrast unique in sequence.

ahmad_unique_quran.note: أَحْمَدُ — the only occurrence of the Prophet's name in this form in the Quran. Jesus' announcement of the Prophet by name within the prophetic chain. Three prophets (Moses/Jesus/Ahmad) in three consecutive verses (vv.5-6-7).

zahara_root_x3_spine.note: ظ-ه-ر threading the surah's structural spine: الْعَزِيزُ (v.1: divine attribute) → لِيُظْهِرَهُ (v.9: divine purpose) → ظَاهِرِينَ (v.14: believers dominant). Divine exaltation descends into concrete human achievement.

wlaw_kariha_x2_consecutive.note: وَلَوْ كَرِهَ exact ×2 consecutive (الْكَافِرُونَ / الْمُشْرِكُونَ). Futile resistance formula governing the light declaration (v.8) and the religion-manifestation declaration (v.9). Compare وَلِلَّهِ ×2 consecutive Q.63:7/8.

ansar_allah_x3_one_verse.note: أَنصَارُ اللَّهِ ×3 within single verse v.14: command (be supporters) / question (who are my supporters) / response (we are supporters). Three distinct speech-acts sharing one word.

ya_ayyuha_bracketing.note: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا ×3 bracketing the surah. Earliest deployment in analyzed suite (v.2). Latest (v.14) is the surah's final verse. Believers are both first and last addressee.

lima_rebuke_formula_cross_surah.note: لِمَ question-rebuke ×2 within Q.61 (vv.2/5) and cross-surah Q.66:1. Three different recipients (believers/Mosaic community/Prophet) receive the same grammatical rebuke structure.

la_yahdi_al_qawm_formula_three_surahs.note: The non-guidance formula ×2 within Q.61 and ×1 in Q.62 — same formula threading three structurally equivalent positions across consecutive surahs.

dhalikum_khayr_exact_cross_surah_62.q61_v11: ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
dhalikum_khayr_exact_cross_surah_62.q62_v9: ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
dhalikum_khayr_exact_cross_surah_62.note: Exact phrase in consecutive surahs at the believers' imperative unit. Q.61: believe and strive. Q.62: leave trade for Friday prayer. Both invoke the same evaluative formula for divine matters over worldly ones.

alfawz_alazim_exact_cross_surah_64.note: Exact phrase in consecutive surahs at the reward declaration. Both with جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِي formula. Four surahs carry the gardens formula: Q.64:9 / Q.65:11 / Q.66:8 / Q.61:12.

nur_x5_consecutive_surahs_61_66.note: نُور threading five consecutive surahs (Q.61-66) at theologically structural positions. Q.61: light that cannot be extinguished. Q.64: We sent a Messenger with the light. Q.65: a light to walk by. Q.66: their light running before them. The light-root is the Musabbiḥāt suite's theological signature.

sabbahat_alladha_perfect_tense.note: Q.61 uses perfect tense for the tasbīḥ — the glorification already accomplished as fact. Q.62/64 use imperfect — ongoing glorification. Three consecutive Musabbiḥāt surahs (61/62/64) share الْحَكِيمُ as the terminal of their opening tasbīḥ unit.

bunyan_marsus_khushub_musannada_cross_su.q61_v4: بُنْيَانٌ مَرْصُوصٌ — firmly joined structure (loved by God)
bunyan_marsus_khushub_musannada_cross_su.note: Both surahs use a building/construction simile at structurally equivalent keystone positions (v.4 in each). The solid structure (beloved) ↔ the propped timber (condemned) — architectural similes encoding the theological binary of the consecutive surah pair.

signal_table.lexical_signal: وَأُخْرَىٰ تُحِبُّونَهَا; نَصْرٌ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَفَتْحٌ قَرِيبٌ; وَبَشِّرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ — only singular imperative to Prophet in surah

signal_table.discourse: singular imperative to Prophet; believers third-person

structure_summary.note: 14v. Pivot v.4 (5/5, single_concentration). Offset -0.250 — largest negative in dataset; justified by unique-feature convergence (only divine love / isolated terminal / title concept). Seven-block ring. مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ ×2 exact consecutive — strongest single-zone. مَرْصُوصٌ isolated. أَحْمَدُ unique in Quran. ظ-ه-ر ×3 spine. وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ×2 consecutive. أَنصَارُ اللَّهِ ×3 one verse. يَا أَيُّهَا ×3 bracketing. ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ exact 62:9. الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ exact 64:9. نُور ×5 consecutive surahs. سَبَّحَ perfect vs. يُسَبِّحُ imperfect.

verses.ar: يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ الْمَلِكِ الْقُدُّوسِ الْعَزِيزِ الْحَكِيمِ
هُوَ الَّذِي بَعَثَ فِي الْأُمِّيِّينَ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ يَتْلُو عَلَيْهِمْ آيَاتِهِ وَيُزَكِّيهِمْ وَيُعَلِّمُهُمُ الْكِتَابَ وَالْحِكْمَةَ وَإِن كَانُوا مِن قَبْلُ لَفِي ضَلَالٍ مُّبِينٍ
وَآخَرِينَ مِنْهُمْ لَمَّا يَلْحَقُوا بِهِمْ وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ اللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَاءُ وَاللَّهُ ذُو الْفَضْلِ الْعَظِيمِ

مَثَلُ الَّذِينَ حُمِّلُوا التَّوْرَاةَ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَحْمِلُوهَا كَمَثَلِ الْحِمَارِ يَحْمِلُ أَسْفَارًا بِئْسَ مَثَلُ الْقَوْمِ الَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا بِآيَاتِ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِي الْقَوْمَ الظَّالِمِينَ
قُلْ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ هَادُوا إِن زَعَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَاءُ لِلَّهِ مِن دُونِ النَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا الْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ
وَلَا يَتَمَنَّوْنَهُ أَبَدًا بِمَا قَدَّمَتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَاللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِالظَّالِمِينَ
قُلْ إِنَّ الْمَوْتَ الَّذِي تَفِرُّونَ مِنْهُ فَإِنَّهُ مُلَاقِيكُمْ ثُمَّ تُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ عَالِمِ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِذَا نُودِيَ لِلصَّلَاةِ مِن يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ فَاسْعَوْا إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ وَذَرُوا الْبَيْعَ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
فَإِذَا قُضِيَتِ الصَّلَاةُ فَانتَشِرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ وَابْتَغُوا مِن فَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَاذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ كَثِيرًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
وَإِذَا رَأَوْا تِجَارَةً أَوْ لَهْوًا انفَضُّوا إِلَيْهَا وَتَرَكُوكَ قَائِمًا قُلْ مَا عِندَ اللَّهِ خَيْرٌ مِّنَ اللَّهْوِ وَمِنَ التِّجَارَةِ وَاللَّهُ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِينَ

pivot.verse_ar: قُلْ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ هَادُوا … فَتَمَنَّوُا الْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ
pivot.center_logic_note: 11v five-block inverted ring: A(1-4)↔A'(9-11) / B(5)↔B'(7-8) / CENTER(6). Offset 0.000 — exact geometric center. Five signals: (1) theme — v.6 is the surah's theological confrontation point: the death-wish test issued to the Jews; the claim to divine exclusivity challenged; the surah's entire second half is the response to v.6; (2) grammar — v.6 contains the only يَا أَيُّهَا addressed to non-believers in the analyzed sequence; the قُلْ-command opens a direct prophetic challenge; the conditional إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ is the surah's most confrontational grammatical form; (3) prosody — v.6 terminal صَادِقِينَ stands between الظَّالِمِينَ ×2 flanking it (vv.5/7) — the test of truthfulness framed by the wrongdoer-verdict on both sides; zone 2 (vv.5-7) is architecturally structured around v.6 as its center; (4) mirror — only unmirrored 1v block; B(5)/B'(7-8) share الظَّالِمِينَ; A/A' share الْفَضْل bridge and يُسَبِّحُ/provision frame; (5) lexical — الْمَوْتَ ×3 in vv.6-8 all triggered by v.6's death-test; قُلْ ×3 distributed across surah's second half each governing a major claim.
pivot.notes: 11v. Offset 0.000 — exact center. Five-block ring 4+1+1+2+3. Only يَا أَيُّهَا to non-believers in analyzed sequence. Perfect 4+3+4 prosodic zone symmetry — most symmetric in sequence. الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ ×2 in opening (vv.1/3) ↔ same pair closing At-Taghabun (64:18) — consecutive-surah boundary pair. الظَّالِمِينَ ×2 flanking pivot. عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ exact cross-surah 64:18. ذِكْرُ اللَّهِ exact cross-surah 63:9 — threat (63) ↔ command (62) consecutive antithesis. يُسَبِّحُ/إِذَا/يُسَبِّحُ sequence: Q.64/Q.63/Q.62 — hypocrite interjection in glorification sequence. الْمَوْتَ ×3 consecutive verses (vv.6/7/8). تَعْمَلُونَ/تَعْلَمُونَ near-identical consecutive terminals (vv.8/9). يَا أَيُّهَا delayed three consecutive surahs Q.64/Q.63/Q.62. لَنْ absolute Q.62:7 extends the Q.63 لَنْ suite to three consecutive surahs. قُلْ ×3 across surah's second half.

block_map.label: يُسَبِّحُ: cosmic tasbīḥ — four divine titles — Messenger sent to the unlettered: reciting/purifying/teaching — extension to others — الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ ×2 — that is the bounty of God: الْفَضْل ×1
Torah-bearers simile: those who did not carry it — like a donkey carrying books — بِئْسَ مَثَلُ — God does not guide the wrongdoing: الظَّالِمِينَ ×1
PIVOT: Say O Jews — if you claim God's allies — wish for death if truthful: فَتَمَنَّوُا الْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ — only non-believer يَا أَيُّهَا in sequence

they will never wish for it — what their hands put forth — God Knowing of the wrongdoers: الظَّالِمِينَ ×2 flanking complete / Say: death you flee will meet you — عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ cross-surah 64:18 — informed of what you did: تَعْمَلُونَ cross-surah 63:11

يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا: Friday call — proceed to ذِكْرُ اللَّهِ cross-surah 63:9 — leave trade / disperse — seek فَضْلُ اللَّهِ ×2 — remember God often — succeed / they rushed and left you standing — Say: God is better — God the best of providers: خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِينَ

perfect_4_3_4_prosodic_symmetry.note: Perfect 4+3+4 arch — most symmetric zone distribution in analyzed sequence. Compare Aṭ-Ṭalāq (11+1: maximum asymmetry). Thematic structure (Messenger mission / confrontation / believers' command) and prosodic structure ([-iīm] / [-iīna] / [-uūna]) both symmetric around the challenge pivot. Architecture and acoustics converge.

aziz_hakim_x2_opening_cross_64_18.v_64_18: الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ as At-Taghabun's final words
aziz_hakim_x2_opening_cross_64_18.note: Consecutive surahs share the exact divine pair at the boundary between them: At-Taghabun closes on it / Al-Jumuʿah opens its structural unit with it ×2. The pair functions as a surah-boundary hinge.

zalimin_flanking_pivot.note: الظَّالِمِينَ ×2 flanking v.6 (the challenge). The test of truthfulness (صَادِقِينَ, v.6) is architecturally framed on both sides by the wrongdoer-verdict. The outcome declared before and after the challenge is issued.

tamalun_talamun_consecutive_terminals.v9: تَعْلَمُونَ — believers should know what is better
tamalun_talamun_consecutive_terminals.note: Consecutive terminals differing by one letter (م/ل), sharing identical morphological form. Phonological near-identity bridges Jewish challenge close (deeds known) and believers' Friday command (knowledge determines deeds). Most phonologically similar consecutive terminal pair in analyzed sequence.

dhikr_allah_consecutive_surahs_antithesi.q62_v9: ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ — commanded: proceed to it
dhikr_allah_consecutive_surahs_antithesi.note: Exact phrase in the يَا أَيُّهَا unit of consecutive surahs. Q.63: the hypocrites distract from divine remembrance. Q.62: the Friday prayer IS divine remembrance. Consecutive-surah antithetical pair: threat ↔ command.

yusabbihu_interjection_sequence.note: Q.63 (إِذَا opening) is the only non-tasbīḥ surah between Q.64 and Q.62, both of which open يُسَبِّحُ. The hypocrites are structurally the one unit that does NOT glorify God, surrounded by surahs that do.

ya_ayyuha_delayed_three_consecutive.q64_v14: يَا أَيُّهَا delayed to v.14 of 18
ya_ayyuha_delayed_three_consecutive.q63_v9: يَا أَيُّهَا delayed to v.9 of 11
ya_ayyuha_delayed_three_consecutive.q62_v9: يَا أَيُّهَا delayed to v.9 of 11
ya_ayyuha_delayed_three_consecutive.note: Three consecutive surahs Q.64/Q.63/Q.62 all delay their only يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا to the final thematic unit. The pattern extends across three surahs. Compare At-Taḥrīm (يَا أَيُّهَا ×5 from v.1) — the inversion underscores the structural deliberateness.

lan_absolute_three_consecutive_surahs.q64_v10_note: no لَنْ (Q.64 not in this suite)
lan_absolute_three_consecutive_surahs.q62_v7: وَلَا يَتَمَنَّوْنَهُ أَبَدًا (semantic لَنْ equivalent with أَبَدًا)
lan_absolute_three_consecutive_surahs.note: Q.63 carries لَنْ ×2 (no forgiveness / no delay). Q.62 v.7 carries the semantic equivalent: they will never wish for it ever (أَبَدًا). Three consecutive surahs Q.64-Q.62 deploy absolute future negation at structurally equivalent positions closing Hell-warning or verdict units.

almawtut_x3_consecutive_verses.note: Root م-و-ت ×3 in three consecutive verses: wish for death (v.6) / they will not wish for it (v.7) / the death you flee will meet you (v.8). Most concentrated single-root distribution in three consecutive verses in analyzed sequence.

fadl_bridge_v4_v10.v4: فَضْلُ اللَّهِ — bounty of the Messenger's mission
fadl_bridge_v4_v10.v10: فَضْلِ اللَّهِ — bounty sought after Friday prayer
fadl_bridge_v4_v10.note: The divine bounty threading the Messenger-mission unit and the Friday-dispersal. The believers are sent into the earth to seek the same فَضْل that the Messenger's sending exemplified.

qul_x3_distributed.v6: قُلْ — challenge to Jews (wish for death)
qul_x3_distributed.v11: قُلْ — declaration (what is with God is better)
qul_x3_distributed.note: قُلْ ×3 distributed across surah's second half, each governing a major confrontational or comparative claim. Compare Al-Mulk's قُلْ ×6 (concentrated in closing unit).

non_believer_ya_ayyuha_only.v6: قُلْ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ هَادُوا — the only يَا أَيُّهَا to non-believers in analyzed sequence
non_believer_ya_ayyuha_only.note: Every other يَا أَيُّهَا in the analyzed sequence addresses الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا or the Prophet. Al-Jumuʿah v.6 is the only instance where يَا أَيُّهَا addresses a non-believing community. The challenge format (issued through قُلْ) distinguishes this from the direct community addresses.

signal_table.lexical_signal: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا — DELAYED ×3 suite Q.64:14/Q.63:9/Q.62:9; ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ ×1 — cross-surah EXACT 63:9; خَيْرٌ ×1↑; تَعْلَمُونَ — near-identical to v.8 terminal

signal_table.verse_ar: وَإِذَا رَأَوْا تِجَارَةً أَوْ لَهْوًا انفَضُّوا إِلَيْهَا وَتَرَكُوكَ قَائِمًا قُلْ مَا عِندَ اللَّهِ خَيْرٌ مِّنَ اللَّهْوِ وَمِنَ التِّجَارَةِ وَاللَّهُ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِينَ

structure_summary.note: 11v. Pivot v.6 (5/5, single_concentration). Offset 0.000. Five-block ring 4+1+1+2+3. Perfect 4+3+4 prosodic symmetry. Only non-believer يَا أَيُّهَا in sequence. الظَّالِمِينَ ×2 flanking pivot. الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ ×2 opening cross-surah boundary 64:18. عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ cross-surah 64:18. ذِكْرُ اللَّهِ antithesis cross-surah 63:9. الْمَوْتَ ×3 consecutive. تَعْمَلُونَ/تَعْلَمُونَ near-identical consecutive. يَا أَيُّهَا delayed three consecutive surahs Q.64/63/62. يُسَبِّحُ/إِذَا/يُسَبِّحُ interjection pattern Q.64/63/62.

verses.ar: إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ قَالُوا نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُهُ وَاللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ لَكَاذِبُونَ
اتَّخَذُوا أَيْمَانَهُمْ جُنَّةً فَصَدُّوا عَن سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ إِنَّهُمْ سَاءَ مَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ آمَنُوا ثُمَّ كَفَرُوا فَطُبِعَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ

وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ تُعْجِبُكَ أَجْسَامُهُمْ وَإِن يَقُولُوا تَسْمَعْ لِقَوْلِهِمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ خُشُبٌ مُّسَنَّدَةٌ يَحْسَبُونَ كُلَّ صَيْحَةٍ عَلَيْهِمْ هُمُ الْعَدُوُّ فَاحْذَرْهُمْ قَاتَلَهُمُ اللَّهُ أَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَعَالَوْا يَسْتَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ لَوَّوْا رُءُوسَهُمْ وَرَأَيْتَهُمْ يَصُدُّونَ وَهُمْ مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
سَوَاءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ أَسْتَغْفَرْتَ لَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ لَن يَغْفِرَ اللَّهُ لَهُمْ إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِي الْقَوْمَ الْفَاسِقِينَ
هُمُ الَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ لَا تُنفِقُوا عَلَىٰ مَنْ عِندَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ حَتَّىٰ يَنفَضُّوا وَلِلَّهِ خَزَائِنُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَلَٰكِنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ
يَقُولُونَ لَئِن رَّجَعْنَا إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ لَيُخْرِجَنَّ الْأَعَزُّ مِنْهَا الْأَذَلَّ وَلِلَّهِ الْعِزَّةُ وَلِرَسُولِهِ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلَٰكِنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تُلْهِكُمْ أَمْوَالُكُمْ وَلَا أَوْلَادُكُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْخَاسِرُونَ
وَأَنفِقُوا مِن مَّا رَزَقْنَاكُم مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَ أَحَدَكُمُ الْمَوْتُ فَيَقُولَ رَبِّ لَوْلَا أَخَّرْتَنِي إِلَىٰ أَجَلٍ قَرِيبٍ فَأَصَّدَّقَ وَأَكُن مِّنَ الصَّالِحِينَ
وَلَن يُؤَخِّرَ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِذَا جَاءَ أَجَلُهَا وَاللَّهُ خَبِيرٌ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

pivot.verse_ar: وَهُمْ مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ … لَن يَغْفِرَ اللَّهُ لَهُمْ … الْفَاسِقِينَ
pivot.center_logic_note: 11v five-block inverted ring: A(1)↔A'(9-11) / B(2-4)↔B'(7-8) / CENTER(5-6). Offset −0.045 (early lean, 5v portrait forces pivot slightly early). Five signals: (1) theme — vv.5-6 is the surah's theological center: the intercession offer (v.5: come, the Messenger will ask forgiveness) and the absolute divine refusal (v.6: God will NEVER forgive them); the portrait (B: vv.2-4) diagnoses the hypocrites as sealed/arrogant ↔ the rebuttal (B': vv.7-8) exposes their speech; the center is the pivot between diagnosis and exposure, declaring the divine verdict that makes the exposure irrelevant; (2) grammar — v.6 contains the surah's only absolute future negation لَنْ يَغْفِرَ — grammatically the most definitive clause in the surah; compare v.11 (لَن يُؤَخِّرَ) — the لَنْ-pair frames the surah's theological and eschatological absolutes; (3) prosody — v.6 is the ONLY verse in the surah not in the [-uūna] terminal class; الْفَاسِقِينَ stands phonetically isolated; the surah's dominant [-uūna] zone breaks once, at the pivot; the pivot is marked by the one terminal that differs; (4) mirror — the only unmirrored 2v block; A/A' share إِذَا جَاءَ framing and divine-knowledge close; B/B' share لَا يَفْقَهُونَ and the hypocrite-characterization ↔ hypocrite-speech structure; (5) lexical — لَنْ يَغْفِرَ (v.6) — the only divine non-forgiveness declaration in the analyzed sequence; the divine invitation to repentance (v.5: the Messenger will intercede) ↔ the divine verdict (v.6: no forgiveness) constitutes the surah's central dramatic irony.
pivot.notes: 11v. Offset −0.045. Three-block inverted ring (A 1v / B 3v / CENTER 2v / B' 2v / A' 3v). Surah title الْمُنَافِقُونَ as first word — unique in analyzed sequence. Three voices in v.1 (false testimony / divine affirmation / divine counter-testimony) — most compressed argumentative opening. لَا يَفْقَهُونَ exact terminal ×2 across zones (vv.3/7) bridging portrait and rebuttal across pivot — most structurally functional exact-terminal repetition in sequence. وَلِلَّهِ ×2 consecutive rebuttal formula (vv.7/8). قَاتَلَهُمُ اللَّهُ — only divine imprecation in analyzed sequence. لَنْ-absolute pair (vv.6/11: no forgiveness / no delay). إِذَا جَاءَ ×2 frame (vv.1/11). أَمْوَالُكُمْ / أَوْلَادُكُمْ exact consecutive surahs Q.64/Q.63. يَا أَيُّهَا delayed to final unit — consecutive surahs Q.64/Q.63 both deploy this pattern. 10/11 terminals in [-uūna] — most acoustically unified after Q.72/Q.87/Q.91/Q.92.

block_map.label: إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ — title as first word — false testimony — God knows/affirms Prophet — God testifies they are liars: three voices in one verse

hypocrite portrait: oaths as cover / averted from God's way (v.2) — believed then disbelieved — hearts sealed — لَا يَفْقَهُونَ ×1 (v.3) — wooden props — enemy — قَاتَلَهُمُ اللَّهُ — how deluded (v.4)
PIVOT: intercession offer made (v.5) → absolute divine non-forgiveness declared — لَنْ يَغْفِرَ — الْفَاسِقِينَ isolated terminal (v.6)

hypocrites' speech ×2 rebutted: do not spend → وَلِلَّهِ خَزَائِنُ السَّمَاوَاتِ — لَا يَفْقَهُونَ ×2 (v.7) / the honored will expel → وَلِلَّهِ الْعِزَّةُ وَلِرَسُولِهِ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ — لَا يَعْلَمُونَ (v.8)

يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا: wealth/children divert from God (v.9) — spend before death — dying man: رَبِّ لَوْلَا أَخَّرْتَنِي (v.10) — لَن يُؤَخِّرَ — إِذَا جَاءَ أَجَلُهَا — خَبِيرٌ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ (v.11)

title_as_first_word.v1: إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ — الْمُنَافِقُونَ is the surah's first named subject after the basmalah
title_as_first_word.note: Unique positioning in analyzed sequence. Compare At-Taghabun (title at v.9 = center) / Al-Ḥāqqah (title ×3 vv.1-3) / Al-Qiyāmah (title at v.1). Al-Munāfiqūn leads with its subject: the surah IS its title and it comes first.

three_voices_in_verse_1.v1: (a) hypocrites: نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ — false testimony | (b) God: وَاللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُهُ — affirmation | (c) God: وَاللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ لَكَاذِبُونَ — counter-testimony
three_voices_in_verse_1.note: Three distinct testimonies in one verse: false / true / verdict. Most compressed argumentative opening in analyzed sequence. Compare At-Taḥrīm v.3 (narrative compression). Here: testimonial compression.

la_yafqahun_exact_terminal_x2_across_zon.v3: لَا يَفْقَهُونَ — zone 1; spiritual diagnosis (sealed hearts)
la_yafqahun_exact_terminal_x2_across_zon.v7: لَا يَفْقَهُونَ — zone 3; rebuttal verdict (spending speech)
la_yafqahun_exact_terminal_x2_across_zon.note: Exact three-word terminal ×2 spanning the pivot (v.6). The diagnosis sounds before the pivot; the confirmation sounds after it. Both instances are verse-final. Most structurally functional exact-terminal repetition in analyzed sequence: same words carry inner verdict and outer rebuttal. Compare يُوعَدُونَ ×2 (Al-Maʿārij vv.42/44) — here the echo crosses a zone break and a pivot.

walillahi_x2_consecutive_rebuttal.v7: وَلِلَّهِ خَزَائِنُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ — rebuts economic leverage
walillahi_x2_consecutive_rebuttal.v8: وَلِلَّهِ الْعِزَّةُ وَلِرَسُولِهِ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ — rebuts political leverage
walillahi_x2_consecutive_rebuttal.note: وَلِلَّهِ at the same structural position in consecutive verses, rebutting two claims with one formula. Economic leverage ↔ political leverage, both answered by divine ownership.

qatalahum_allah_only_imprecation.v4: قَاتَلَهُمُ اللَّهُ — may God destroy them
qatalahum_allah_only_imprecation.note: Only divine imprecation in the analyzed sequence (Q.63-114). Embedded in the hypocrite-portrait verse alongside the wooden-prop simile and the astonishment question أَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ. The divine response to hypocrisy is both a curse and a rhetorical question in the same verse.

lan_absolute_negation_pair.v6: لَن يَغْفِرَ اللَّهُ لَهُمْ — God will NEVER forgive them (pivot)
lan_absolute_negation_pair.v11: وَلَن يُؤَخِّرَ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا — God will NEVER delay a soul (final verse)
lan_absolute_negation_pair.note: لَنْ-absolute future negation ×2 at the surah's pivot (v.6) and final verse (v.11). No forgiveness for the hypocrites / no delay for the dying. The same grammatical form governs both the theological verdict and the eschatological fact.

idha_jaa_frame_x2.v1: إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ — when the hypocrites come (false arrival)
idha_jaa_frame_x2.v11: إِذَا جَاءَ أَجَلُهَا — when its time comes (certain arrival)
idha_jaa_frame_x2.note: Root ج-و-ء ×2 with إِذَا جَاءَ framing the surah. False arrival that cannot be trusted (v.1) ↔ true arrival that cannot be delayed (v.11). The surah opens and closes on arrivals: one deceptive, one absolute.

amwal_awlad_consecutive_surahs.q64_vv14_15: أَزْوَاجِكُمْ وَأَوْلَادِكُمْ عَدُوًّا / أَمْوَالُكُمْ وَأَوْلَادُكُمْ فِتْنَةٌ
amwal_awlad_consecutive_surahs.q63_v9: لَا تُلْهِكُمْ أَمْوَالُكُمْ وَلَا أَوْلَادُكُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ
amwal_awlad_consecutive_surahs.note: Exact pair أَمْوَالُكُمْ / أَوْلَادُكُمْ in the يَا أَيُّهَا unit of consecutive surahs Q.64/Q.63. At-Taghabun: enemies / trial. Al-Munāfiqūn: distraction from God's remembrance. Both surahs deliver this warning to the believers as their only يَا أَيُّهَا address.

ya_ayyuha_delayed_consecutive_surahs_pat.q64_v14: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا — delayed to v.14 of 18 (latest in sequence at time of Q.64 commit)
ya_ayyuha_delayed_consecutive_surahs_pat.q63_v9: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا — delayed to v.9 of 11 (final thematic unit)
ya_ayyuha_delayed_consecutive_surahs_pat.note: Both consecutive surahs Q.64 and Q.63 delay their only يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا to the final thematic unit. The hypocrite/cosmic warning body occupies the surah, and the believers are addressed directly only after the diagnosis is complete. يَا أَيُّهَا is earned by what precedes it.

khabir_bima_tamalun_consecutive_surahs.note: Exact same divine-knowledge formula (word-order variant) in consecutive surahs Q.64/Q.63, both as final-verse closers in their respective sections. Divine acquaintance with deeds threading both surahs at structurally equivalent positions.

prosodic_isolation_at_pivot.v6: الْفَاسِقِينَ — [-iīna]; sole break in 10/11 [-uūna] dominant zone
prosodic_isolation_at_pivot.note: The surah is 10/11 [-uūna] terminals. The single break is at the pivot (v.6: الْفَاسِقِينَ). Phonological isolation of the pivot mirrors its theological isolation — the one verse declaring absolute divine non-forgiveness stands phonetically alone. Compare At-Taḥrīm's isolated v.5 (أَبْكَارًا as zone 2 break) — both surahs use one isolated terminal to mark their structural pivot.

signal_table.verse_ar: إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ قَالُوا نَشْهَدُ…وَاللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ لَكَاذِبُونَ
signal_table.theme: hypocrites come — false testimony — God affirms Prophet — God testifies they are liars
signal_table.lexical_signal: الْمُنَافِقُونَ ×1↑ — title as FIRST WORD; يَعْلَمُ / يَشْهَدُ — divine knowledge ×2; لَكَاذِبُون — first terminal; إِذَا جَاءَ ×1↑ frame open; three simultaneous voices
signal_table.mirror_signal: A↑ إِذَا جَاءَ ×1; divine knowledge opens; FRAME OPEN
signal_table.discourse: three simultaneous voices: hypocrites / divine affirmation / divine verdict; Prophet as recipient

signal_table.verse_ar: اتَّخَذُوا أَيْمَانَهُمْ جُنَّةً…إِنَّهُمْ سَاءَ مَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ
signal_table.theme: oaths as cover — averted from God's way — evil what they did
signal_table.lexical_signal: أَيْمَانَهُمْ جُنَّةً; يَعْمَلُونَ ×1↑ — bridge to v.11

signal_table.verse_ar: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ آمَنُوا ثُمَّ كَفَرُوا فَطُبِعَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ
signal_table.theme: believed then disbelieved — hearts sealed — they do not understand
signal_table.lexical_signal: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ — causal; فَطُبِعَ عَلَى قُلُوبِهِمْ; لَا يَفْقَهُونَ ×1↑ — EXACT ECHO to v.7
signal_table.mirror_signal: B — diagnosis; لَا يَفْقَهُون ×1 zone-echo to v.7 (across pivot)

signal_table.verse_ar: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ تُعْجِبُكَ…قَاتَلَهُمُ اللَّهُ أَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ

structure_summary.note: 11v. Pivot vv.5-6 (5/5, compound_seam). Offset −0.045. Five-block inverted ring 1+3+2+2+3. Title as first word unique. Three voices in v.1 unique. لَا يَفْقَهُونَ ×2 across zones/pivot. وَلِلَّهِ ×2 consecutive rebuttal. قَاتَلَهُمُ اللَّهُ only imprecation in sequence. لَنْ-pair vv.6/11. إِذَا جَاءَ ×2 frame. أَمْوَالُكُمْ/أَوْلَادُكُمْ exact Q.64/Q.63. يَا أَيُّهَا delayed consecutive Q.64/Q.63. خَبِيرٌ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ exact Q.64/Q.63. Prosodic isolation at pivot unique.

verses.ar: يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
هُوَ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ فَمِنكُمْ كَافِرٌ وَمِنكُم مُّؤْمِنٌ وَاللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ بِالْحَقِّ وَصَوَّرَكُمْ فَأَحْسَنَ صُوَرَكُمْ وَإِلَيْهِ الْمَصِيرُ
يَعْلَمُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ وَاللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُورِ
أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَبَأُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا مِن قَبْلُ فَذَاقُوا وَبَالَ أَمْرِهِمْ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُ كَانَت تَّأْتِيهِمْ رُسُلُهُم بِالْبَيِّنَاتِ فَقَالُوا أَبَشَرٌ يَهْدُونَنَا فَكَفَرُوا وَتَوَلَّوا وَّاسْتَغْنَى اللَّهُ وَاللَّهُ غَنِيٌّ حَمِيدٌ
زَعَمَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا أَن لَّن يُبْعَثُوا قُلْ بَلَى وَرَبِّي لَتُبْعَثُنَّ ثُمَّ لَتُنَبَّؤُنَّ بِمَا عَمِلْتُمْ وَذَٰلِكَ عَلَى اللَّهِ يَسِيرٌ
فَآمِنُوا بِاللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ وَالنُّورِ الَّذِي أَنزَلْنَا وَاللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ

يَوْمَ يَجْمَعُكُمْ لِيَوْمِ الْجَمْعِ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ التَّغَابُنِ وَمَن يُؤْمِن بِاللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَالِحًا يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّئَاتِهِ وَيُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِي مِن تَحْتِهَا الْأَنْهَارُ خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا أَبَدًا ذَٰلِكَ الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ
وَالَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَكَذَّبُوا بِآيَاتِنَا أُولَٰئِكَ أَصْحَابُ النَّارِ خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ
مَا أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ اللَّهِ وَمَن يُؤْمِن بِاللَّهِ يَهْدِ قَلْبَهُ وَاللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
وَأَطِيعُوا اللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا الرَّسُولَ فَإِن تَوَلَّيْتُمْ فَإِنَّمَا عَلَى رَسُولِنَا الْبَلَاغُ الْمُبِينُ
اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ وَعَلَى اللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ
يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِنَّ مِنْ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ وَأَوْلَادِكُمْ عَدُوًّا لَّكُمْ فَاحْذَرُوهُمْ وَإِن تَعْفُوا وَتَصْفَحُوا وَتَغْفِرُوا فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
إِنَّمَا أَمْوَالُكُمْ وَأَوْلَادُكُمْ فِتْنَةٌ وَاللَّهُ عِندَهُ أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ
فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُمْ وَاسْمَعُوا وَأَطِيعُوا وَأَنفِقُوا خَيْرًا لِّأَنفُسِكُمْ وَمَن يُوقَ شُحَّ نَفْسِهِ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ
إِن تُقْرِضُوا اللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا يُضَاعِفْهُ لَكُمْ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ شَكُورٌ حَلِيمٌ

pivot.verse_ar: يَوْمُ التَّغَابُنِ … وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ
pivot.center_logic_note: 18v nine-block inverted ring: A(1-4)↔A'(16-18) / B(5-6)↔B'(14-15) / C(7)↔C'(12-13) / D(8)↔D'(11) / CENTER(9-10). Offset 0.000 — geometric center. Five signals: (1) theme — pivot vv.9-10 contains the surah's only binary Day-verdict: believers (misdeeds removed, gardens, great attainment) ↔ disbelievers (Fire, eternal, wretched destination); the surah's entire theological argument converges here; يَوْمُ التَّغَابُنِ — the surah's own title instantiated at the geometric center — unique in analyzed sequence; (2) grammar — vv.9-10 are the only consecutive-verse binary verdict in third-person; the grammatical subject shifts between the two pivot verses (believers conditional / disbelievers definite); the center carries both poles of the creation-binary introduced at v.2 (كَافِرٌ / مُؤْمِنٌ); (3) prosody — zone 3 (vv.9-11): الْعَظِيمُ / الْمَصِيرُ consecutive — the great attainment ↔ wretched destination as a terminal binary; compare At-Taḥrīm's قَدِيرٌ / الْمَصِيرُ consecutive pair (vv.8/9); وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ at v.10 closes the center — cross-surah ×3: 67:6/66:9/64:10; (4) mirror — only unmirrored 2v block; all eight surrounding blocks have symmetric pairs in the ring; the center is structurally isolated; (5) lexical — يَوْمُ التَّغَابُنِ title-at-center; الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا ×4 thread reaches its final verdict here at v.10; وَمَن يُؤْمِن ×2 (vv.9/11) flanks the center; وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ ×3 consecutive-surah phrase closes the center.
pivot.notes: 18v nine-block ring. Surah title يَوْمُ التَّغَابُنِ instantiated at geometric center (v.9 of 18) — unique in sequence. الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا ×4 distributed across all four major thematic units (vv.2/5/7/10) — unique in sequence. قَدِيرٌ ×4 consecutive surahs (67:1/66:8/65:12/64:1). وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ ×3 consecutive surahs (67:6/66:9/64:10). نُور thread ×3 consecutive surahs (66:8/65:11/64:8). يَا أَيُّهَا delayed to v.14 — latest in analyzed sequence. Surah opens and exits with no human addressee (vv.1/18). يُسَبِّحُ opening closes the seven-surah Musabbiḥāt group (Q.57-64). عَظِيمٌ ×2 at mirror positions (vv.9/15). Six zones in 18v, proportion 4+4+3+2+2+3.

block_map.label: يُسَبِّحُ: cosmic tasbīḥ — He created you — binary humanity كَافِرٌ/مُؤْمِنٌ — heavens and earth ×3 — He knows hidden/manifest — قَدِيرٌ×4-suite close
historical exemplars: those who disbelieved before — فَذَاقُوا وَبَالَ أَمْرِهِمْ cross-surah 65:9 — messengers with evidence — rejected — God is Free of need
disbelievers deny resurrection — Say: yes by my Lord — you will be resurrected — that is easy for God: يَسِيرٌ
believe in God and Messenger and the light — النُّورَ الَّذِي أَنزَلْنَا — divine We — نُور×3-suite close — God Acquainted
PIVOT: Day of Assembly — يَوْمُ التَّغَابُنِ TITLE AT CENTER — believers: gardens forever / الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ // disbelievers: Fire eternal / وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ ×3
no disaster except by God's permission — whoever believes God guides his heart — God Knowing of all things
obey God and obey the Messenger — الْبَلَاغُ الْمُبِينُ — God no deity except Him — upon God let believers rely: تَوَكُّل bridge 65:3
O believers — enemies among wives and children — beware — if you pardon: غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ cross-surah 66:1 — wealth and children are a trial — great reward
fear God as able — listen obey spend — successful / loan God a goodly loan — Appreciative Forbearing / Knower of unseen and witnessed — الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ: surah exits human sphere

surah_title_at_geometric_center.v9: يَوْمُ التَّغَابُنِ — Day of Deprivation — surah's name at v.9 of 18 = geometric center
surah_title_at_geometric_center.note: Unique in analyzed sequence. At-Ḥāqqah places title at vv.1-3 (opening); Al-Qiyāmah at vv.1/6; Al-Maʿārij at v.4. At-Taghabun builds through cosmic preamble, exemplar, oath, light-command to arrive at its own name. The surah earns its title at the exact structural center.

alladhina_kafaru_four_thematic_units.note: الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا ×4 distributed across all four major thematic units: binary creation (v.2) / historical exemplar (v.5) / resurrection denial (v.7) / Day verdict (v.10). No other surah in analyzed sequence distributes the disbeliever-phrase across all four of its major units. The disbeliever is the surah's negative leitwort from cosmic opening to final verdict.

qadir_four_consecutive_surahs.q67_v1: وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ — Al-Mulk opening
qadir_four_consecutive_surahs.q66_v8: إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ — believers' prayer
qadir_four_consecutive_surahs.q65_v12: أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ — legislative close
qadir_four_consecutive_surahs.q64_v1: وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ — Musabbiḥāt close / surah open
qadir_four_consecutive_surahs.note: عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ in four consecutive surahs at structurally prominent positions. No other exact phrase threads four consecutive surahs in the analyzed sequence. The divine competence over all things is the phonological and theological spine of the Q.64-67 suite.

nur_quran_three_consecutive_surahs.q66_v8: نُورُهُمْ / نُورَنَا ×2 — believers' light in prayer
nur_quran_three_consecutive_surahs.q65_v11: الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ — Messenger brings from darkness to light
nur_quran_three_consecutive_surahs.q64_v8: النُّورَ الَّذِي أَنزَلْنَا — the light We have sent down
nur_quran_three_consecutive_surahs.note: Root نُور threading three consecutive surahs (66/65/64) at structurally significant positions in each. The Quran as light is the thread connecting the domestic legislative suite and the cosmic tasbīḥ surah.

ya_ayyuha_delayed_latest_in_sequence.v14: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا — the surah's only يَا أَيُّهَا, at v.14 of 18
ya_ayyuha_delayed_latest_in_sequence.note: Latest يَا أَيُّهَا deployment in the analyzed sequence. The surah that opens with cosmic tasbīḥ (no human addressee) delays its only direct community address to the penultimate thematic unit. Compare At-Taḥrīm ×5 (first at v.1) / Aṭ-Ṭalāq (first at v.1). The يَا أَيُّهَا is earned by what precedes it.

surah_opens_exits_no_human_addressee.v1: يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ — cosmos as subject; no human addressee
surah_opens_exits_no_human_addressee.v18: عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ — pure divine titles; no human addressee
surah_opens_exits_no_human_addressee.note: The human sphere is entered at v.2 (خَلَقَكُمْ) and exited at v.18 (pure divine-title declaration). The surah frames its entire human content — binary creation, exemplar, verdict, domestic warning — between two cosmic boundaries with no human addressee.

musabbihat_group_closing_surah.note: At-Taghabun (Q.64) is the final surah of the Musabbiḥāt group (Q.57-64), all of which open with يُسَبِّحُ or سَبَّحَ. At-Taghabun's cosmic preamble (vv.1-4) closes a seven-surah structural pattern. The Musabbiḥāt group ends where the domestic legislative suite (Q.65-66) begins; the cosmic glorification surahs give way to the Prophet-addressed domestic laws. At-Taghabun is the hinge between these two macro-structural groups.

azim_x2_mirror_positions.v9: الْفَوْزُ الْعَظِيمُ — the great attainment (Day verdict center)
azim_x2_mirror_positions.v15: أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ — a great reward (domestic trial close)
azim_x2_mirror_positions.note: Root ع-ظ-م at structurally symmetric mirror positions: the great eschatological attainment at the center (v.9) ↔ the great reward for those tested by family (v.15, B' unit). Compare الْعَظِيمِ ×2 in Al-Ḥāqqah (vv.33/52).

verses.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ إِذَا طَلَّقْتُمُ النِّسَاءَ فَطَلِّقُوهُنَّ لِعِدَّتِهِنَّ وَأَحْصُوا الْعِدَّةَ وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ لَا تُخْرِجُوهُنَّ مِن بُيُوتِهِنَّ وَلَا يَخْرُجْنَ إِلَّا أَن يَأْتِينَ بِفَاحِشَةٍ مُّبَيِّنَةٍ وَتِلْكَ حُدُودُ اللَّهِ وَمَن يَتَعَدَّ حُدُودَ اللَّهِ فَقَدْ ظَلَمَ نَفْسَهُ لَا تَدْرِي لَعَلَّ اللَّهَ يُحْدِثُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ أَمْرًا

فَإِذَا بَلَغْنَ أَجَلَهُنَّ فَأَمْسِكُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍ أَوْ فَارِقُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍ وَأَشْهِدُوا ذَوَيْ عَدْلٍ مِّنكُمْ وَأَقِيمُوا الشَّهَادَةَ لِلَّهِ ذَٰلِكُمْ يُوعَظُ بِهِ مَن كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا
وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ بَالِغُ أَمْرِهِ قَدْ جَعَلَ اللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدَرًا

وَاللَّائِي يَئِسْنَ مِنَ الْمَحِيضِ مِن نِّسَائِكُمْ إِنِ ارْتَبْتُمْ فَعِدَّتُهُنَّ ثَلَاثَةُ أَشْهُرٍ وَاللَّائِي لَمْ يَحِضْنَ وَأُولَاتُ الْأَحْمَالِ أَجَلُهُنَّ أَن يَضَعْنَ حَمْلَهُنَّ وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مِنْ أَمْرِهِ يُسْرًا
ذَٰلِكَ أَمْرُ اللَّهِ أَنزَلَهُ إِلَيْكُمْ وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّئَاتِهِ وَيُعْظِمْ لَهُ أَجْرًا

أَسْكِنُوهُنَّ مِنْ حَيْثُ سَكَنتُم مِّن وُجْدِكُمْ وَلَا تُضَارُّوهُنَّ لِتُضَيِّقُوا عَلَيْهِنَّ وَإِن كُنَّ أُولَاتِ حَمْلٍ فَأَنفِقُوا عَلَيْهِنَّ حَتَّىٰ يَضَعْنَ حَمْلَهُنَّ فَإِنْ أَرْضَعْنَ لَكُمْ فَآتُوهُنَّ أُجُورَهُنَّ وَأْتَمِرُوا بَيْنَكُم بِمَعْرُوفٍ وَإِن تَعَاسَرْتُمْ فَسَتُرْضِعُ لَهُ أُخْرَى
لِيُنفِقْ ذُو سَعَةٍ مِّن سَعَتِهِ وَمَن قُدِرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقُهُ فَلْيُنفِقْ مِمَّا آتَاهُ اللَّهُ لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا مَا آتَاهَا سَيَجْعَلُ اللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍ يُسْرًا
وَكَأَيِّن مِّن قَرْيَةٍ عَتَتْ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهَا وَرُسُلِهِ فَحَاسَبْنَاهَا حِسَابًا شَدِيدًا وَعَذَّبْنَاهَا عَذَابًا نُّكْرًا
فَذَاقَتْ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهَا وَكَانَ عَاقِبَةُ أَمْرِهَا خُسْرًا
أَعَدَّ اللَّهُ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا فَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ يَا أُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا قَدْ أَنزَلَ اللَّهُ إِلَيْكُمْ ذِكْرًا

رَسُولًا يَتْلُو عَلَيْكُمْ آيَاتِ اللَّهِ مُبَيِّنَاتٍ لِيُخْرِجَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ مِنَ الظُّلُمَاتِ إِلَى النُّورِ وَمَن يُؤْمِن بِاللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَالِحًا يُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِي مِن تَحْتِهَا الْأَنْهَارُ خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا أَبَدًا قَدْ أَحْسَنَ اللَّهُ لَهُ رِزْقًا

اللَّهُ الَّذِي خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ وَمِنَ الْأَرْضِ مِثْلَهُنَّ يَتَنَزَّلُ الْأَمْرُ بَيْنَهُنَّ لِتَعْلَمُوا أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ وَأَنَّ اللَّهَ قَدْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عِلْمًا

pivot.verse_ar: أَسْكِنُوهُنَّ … سَيَجْعَلُ اللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍ يُسْرًا
pivot.center_logic_note: 12v perfect inverted ring. A(1)↔A'(12) / B(2-3)↔B'(10-11) / C(4-5)↔C'(8-9) / CENTER(6-7). Offset 0.000 — geometric center. Five signals: (1) theme — pivot vv.6-7 contain the surah's most practical domestic center: housing obligation + breastfeeding + wealth-graded spending + ease-after-hardship seal; the taqwā formula (×3 in vv.2/4/5) has concluded; the historical exemplar (vv.8-9) has not yet begun; the pivot is the legislative hinge between the waiting-period provisions (C: vv.4-5) and the punishment exemplar (C': vv.8-9); (2) grammar — vv.6-7 carry the surah's densest imperative cluster after v.1: أَسْكِنُوهُنَّ / لَا تُضَارُّوهُنَّ / فَأَنفِقُوا / فَآتُوهُنَّ; then transitions to jussive (لِيُنفِقْ) for the wealth-graded rule; the grammatical mode shift (plural imperatives → jussive) is a structural marker; (3) prosody — بِمَعْرُوفٍ ×3 reaches its final instance at v.6 (×1 in v.2 ×2; ×1 in v.6 ×3); يُسْرًا ×2 at vv.4/7 — the ease-promise appears at the C-unit open and the CENTER close, flanking the center; (4) mirror — vv.6-7 is the only block without a thematic mirror; every other block has a paired unit (A/A', B/B', C/C'); (5) lexical — بِمَعْرُوفٍ ×3 complete at v.6; يُسْرًا ×2 second instance seals the center at v.7; سَيَجْعَلُ اللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍ يُسْرًا — the surah's most complete promise formula sealing the housing unit.
pivot.notes: 12v perfect symmetry. وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ ×3 exact formula (vv.2/4/5) — same opening clause, three distinct consequences (makhraj / yusr / expiation). بِمَعْرُوفٍ ×3 (vv.2/2/6) — twice in one verse unique in sequence. يُسْرًا ×2 exact at vv.4/7 — ease at C-unit and CENTER close. رِزْقًا ×2 at mirror positions (vv.3/11). أَمْر root ×6 threading all seven blocks. قَدِيرٌ threading three consecutive surahs (67:1 / 66:8 / 65:12). سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ exact cross-surah (67:3 / 65:12). يَا أُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ (v.10) — unique addressee formula in sequence. Zone architecture 11+1 — most asymmetric in sequence. يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ opening consecutive surahs (66:1 / 65:1).

block_map.label: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ: divorce legislation I — waiting period — حُدُودَ اللَّهِ ×2 — fear God — perhaps God will bring about a matter
divorce legislation II: retain/part بِمَعْرُوف ×2 — witnesses — whoever fears God: مَخْرَجًا / provision from unexpected / whoever relies on God — decreed extent
divorce legislation III: post-menopausal / not menstruated / pregnant — وَمَن يَتَّقِ ×2: يُسْرًا / that is the command God sent down / وَمَن يَتَّقِ ×3: misdeeds removed
PIVOT CENTER: housing obligation — do not harm — if pregnant spend — breastfeeding: pay — confer بِمَعْرُوف ×3 / wealthy man spend / ease-after-hardship seal: يُسْرًا ×2
historical exemplar: insolent cities defy أَمْر — divine We: severe account / terrible punishment — tasted bad consequence — loss
punishment prepared — fear God O يَا أُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ — God sent down a message / Messenger: from darkness to light — gardens forever — رِزْقًا ×2 mirror
cosmic close: God created سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ — His command descends — that you may know God is قَدِيرٌ and encompasses all things in عِلْمًا

waman_yattaqi_x3_formula.v2: وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا — a way out
waman_yattaqi_x3_formula.v4: وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مِنْ أَمْرِهِ يُسْرًا — ease
waman_yattaqi_x3_formula.v5: وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّئَاتِهِ — expiation
waman_yattaqi_x3_formula.note: Exact opening clause ×3 in three consecutive legislative verses with three distinct consequences: makhraj (way out) / yusr (ease) / expiation of misdeeds. Together they constitute the surah's comprehensive statement of taqwā's three-fold benefit. The most sustained exact-formula sequence in the analyzed sequence.

bimarouf_x3_double_in_one_verse.v2a: فَأَمْسِكُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍ — retain in good manner
bimarouf_x3_double_in_one_verse.v2b: أَوْ فَارِقُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍ — part in good manner
bimarouf_x3_double_in_one_verse.v6: وَأْتَمِرُوا بَيْنَكُم بِمَعْرُوفٍ — confer in good manner
bimarouf_x3_double_in_one_verse.note: بِمَعْرُوفٍ ×3 total — twice within one verse (v.2) then once at the pivot (v.6). Double occurrence within one verse unique in analyzed sequence. Governs the binary retention/separation decision and the childcare conference — the three most adversarial moments in divorce.

yusr_x2_flanking_center.v4: يُسْرًا — ease at waiting-period special cases (C-unit open)
yusr_x2_flanking_center.v7: يُسْرًا — ease at maintenance hardship close (CENTER close)
yusr_x2_flanking_center.note: Exact terminal ×2 at symmetric positions: C-unit open (v.4) and CENTER close (v.7). The ease-promise flanks the center from outside (C) and seals it from inside (CENTER). The surah's legislative promise is sounded at both positions.

rizq_x2_mirror.v3: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ — material provision from unexpected sources (B-unit)
rizq_x2_mirror.v11: قَدْ أَحْسَنَ اللَّهُ لَهُ رِزْقًا — God has perfected his provision (B'-unit)
rizq_x2_mirror.note: Root ر-ز-ق at structurally symmetric mirror positions (B and B'). Material provision (v.3: the divorced man's unexpected sustenance) ↔ perfected spiritual provision (v.11: the believer's eschatological reward). Same root, material ↔ eschatological dimension, at the ring's matching positions.

amir_root_x6_all_blocks.note: Root أ-م-ر ×6 threading all seven structural blocks without exception. Specific human matter (v.1) / God accomplishes His purpose (v.3) / the command God sent down (v.5) / insolent toward the command (v.8) / bad consequence of the matter (v.9) / His command descends through the heavens (v.12). The surah's narrative spine: specific law → divine sufficiency → declared command → defied command → consequence → cosmic command.

qadir_three_consecutive_surahs.q67_v1: وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ — Al-Mulk opening
qadir_three_consecutive_surahs.q66_v8: إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ — believers' prayer close
qadir_three_consecutive_surahs.q65_v12: أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ — legislative cosmic close
qadir_three_consecutive_surahs.note: Near-identical formula عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ in three consecutive surahs at structurally prominent positions. No other exact phrase threads three consecutive surahs in the analyzed sequence.

sabaa_samawat_bracketing_domestic_pair.q67_v3: الَّذِي خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ — Al-Mulk cosmic opening unit
sabaa_samawat_bracketing_domestic_pair.q65_v12: اللَّهُ الَّذِي خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ — At-Talaq cosmic close
sabaa_samawat_bracketing_domestic_pair.note: Exact phrase سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ in surahs 67 and 65. The two domestic surahs (At-Taḥrīm Q.66 / Aṭ-Ṭalāq Q.65) are bracketed by the same cosmic creation phrase at both ends: Al-Mulk (preceding Q.67) opens with it and Aṭ-Ṭalāq (Q.65) closes with it. The cosmic creation argument is the outer frame of the domestic legislative corpus.

ya_ayyuha_al_nabi_consecutive_surah_open.q66_v1: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ — At-Taḥrīm opening rebuke
ya_ayyuha_al_nabi_consecutive_surah_open.q65_v1: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ — Aṭ-Ṭalāq opening legislation
ya_ayyuha_al_nabi_consecutive_surah_open.note: Both surahs 66 and 65 open their first substantive verse with يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ addressing the Prophet's domestic sphere. Identifies At-Taḥrīm/Aṭ-Ṭalāq as a domestic legislative pair, analogous to Al-Muzzammil/Al-Muddaththir as commission pairs.

ya_uli_al_albab_unique_addressee.note: Unique addressee formula in analyzed sequence — combines faith (الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا) and intellect (أُولُو الْأَلْبَابِ). The surah legislating for the most intimate human relations (divorce / childcare / breastfeeding) requires understanding as the faculty for receiving its closing warning. Not يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ or يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا.

zone_11_plus_1_max_asymmetry.note: Most asymmetric zone distribution in analyzed sequence: vv.1-11 in tanwīn-rā'/khā' zone (×11) / v.12 in mīm-knowledge close (×1). Entire legislative and narrative content in one zone; the cosmic declaration steps outside it. Compare At-Taḥrīm's five zones in 12 verses (maximum density) ↔ Aṭ-Ṭalāq's two zones in 12 verses (maximum asymmetry). The human law occupies the surah's acoustic space; the cosmic ground stands apart.

structure_summary.note: 12v. Pivot vv.6-7 (5/5, compound_seam). Offset 0.000 — geometric center. A(1)↔A'(12) / B(2-3)↔B'(10-11) / C(4-5)↔C'(8-9) / CENTER(6-7). وَمَن يَتَّقِ ×3 exact formula consecutive. بِمَعْرُوف ×3 (double in one verse unique). يُسْرًا ×2 flanking center. رِزْق ×2 mirror positions. أَمْر ×6 threading all blocks. قَدِيرٌ ×3 consecutive surahs. سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ exact cross-surah Q.67/Q.65 brackets domestic pair. يَا أُولِي الْأَلْبَابِ unique. Zone 11+1 max asymmetry.

verses.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ لِمَ تُحَرِّمُ مَا أَحَلَّ اللَّهُ لَكَ تَبْتَغِي مَرْضَاتَ أَزْوَاجِكَ وَاللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ
قَدْ فَرَضَ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ تَحِلَّةَ أَيْمَانِكُمْ وَاللَّهُ مَوْلَاكُمْ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيمُ الْحَكِيمُ

وَإِذْ أَسَرَّ النَّبِيُّ إِلَىٰ بَعْضِ أَزْوَاجِهِ حَدِيثًا فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَتْ بِهِ وَأَظْهَرَهُ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ عَرَّفَ بَعْضَهُ وَأَعْرَضَ عَن بَعْضٍ فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَهَا بِهِ قَالَتْ مَنْ أَنبَأَكَ هَٰذَا قَالَ نَبَّأَنِيَ الْعَلِيمُ الْخَبِيرُ
إِن تَتُوبَا إِلَى اللَّهِ فَقَدْ صَغَتْ قُلُوبُكُمَا وَإِن تَظَاهَرَا عَلَيْهِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ هُوَ مَوْلَاهُ وَجِبْرِيلُ وَصَالِحُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ ظَهِيرٌ
عَسَىٰ رَبُّهُ إِن طَلَّقَكُنَّ أَن يُبْدِلَهُ أَزْوَاجًا خَيْرًا مِّنكُنَّ مُسْلِمَاتٍ مُّؤْمِنَاتٍ قَانِتَاتٍ تَائِبَاتٍ عَابِدَاتٍ سَائِحَاتٍ ثَيِّبَاتٍ وَأَبْكَارًا

يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا قُوا أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَهْلِيكُمْ نَارًا وَقُودُهَا النَّاسُ وَالْحِجَارَةُ عَلَيْهَا مَلَائِكَةٌ غِلَاظٌ شِدَادٌ لَّا يَعْصُونَ اللَّهَ مَا أَمَرَهُمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لَا تَعْتَذِرُوا الْيَوْمَ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا تُوبُوا إِلَى اللَّهِ تَوْبَةً نَّصُوحًا عَسَىٰ رَبُّكُمْ أَن يُكَفِّرَ عَنكُمْ سَيِّئَاتِكُمْ وَيُدْخِلَكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِي مِن تَحْتِهَا الْأَنْهَارُ يَوْمَ لَا يُخْزِي اللَّهُ النَّبِيَّ وَالَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مَعَهُ نُورُهُمْ يَسْعَىٰ بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَانِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا أَتْمِمْ لَنَا نُورَنَا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ جَاهِدِ الْكُفَّارَ وَالْمُنَافِقِينَ وَاغْلُظْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَمَأْوَاهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ

ضَرَبَ اللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا امْرَأَتَ نُوحٍ وَامْرَأَتَ لُوطٍ كَانَتَا تَحْتَ عَبْدَيْنِ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا صَالِحَيْنِ فَخَانَتَاهُمَا فَلَمْ يُغْنِيَا عَنْهُمَا مِنَ اللَّهِ شَيْئًا وَقِيلَ ادْخُلَا النَّارَ مَعَ الدَّاخِلِينَ

وَضَرَبَ اللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا امْرَأَتَ فِرْعَوْنَ إِذْ قَالَتْ رَبِّ ابْنِ لِي عِندَكَ بَيْتًا فِي الْجَنَّةِ وَنَجِّنِي مِن فِرْعَوْنَ وَعَمَلِهِ وَنَجِّنِي مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
وَمَرْيَمَ ابْنَتَ عِمْرَانَ الَّتِي أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِنَا وَصَدَّقَتْ بِكَلِمَاتِ رَبِّهَا وَكُتُبِهِ وَكَانَتْ مِنَ الْقَانِتِينَ

pivot.verse_ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا … إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
pivot.center_logic_note: 12v inverted ring. A(1-2)↔A'(9-12) / B(3-5)↔B'(6-8 as mirror of B, CENTER). Pivot vv.6-8: community fire-warning (believers) / disbelievers silenced / sincere repentance + Day of light + believers' prayer. Offset +0.042. Five signals: (1) theme — the surah shifts from private domestic rebuke (vv.1-5) to universal community address (vv.6-8); the private two-wives repentance (v.4) scaled to community repentance (v.8); the ideal-wives catalogue (v.5) answered by the believers' prayer (v.8); (2) grammar — three consecutive يَا أَيُّهَا in vv.6/7/8 (believers / disbelievers / believers) — only such triple consecutive يَا أَيُّهَا in the sequence; the binary addressee switch (believers ↔ disbelievers) and return is the pivot's structural signature; (3) prosody — zone 3 ([-uūna] ×2, vv.6-7) and zone 4 ([-iīr] ×2, vv.8-9) mark the center; the zone transition within the pivot signals the unit boundary; (4) mirror — vv.6-8 is the unmirrored center; the two-wives unit (B: vv.3-5) mirrors the exemplar close (A': vv.9-12) and the opening rebuke (A: vv.1-2) mirrors the striving command (A': v.9); (5) lexical — تَوْبَة ×3 in v.8 (peak of the repentance thread vv.4/5/8); قَدِيرٌ (v.8) cross-surah bridge to Q.67 v.1; نُور ×2 within v.8 unique in the surah.
pivot.notes: 12v. يَا أَيُّهَا ×5 in 12 verses — highest density in sequence. يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ ×2 (vv.1/9) frame. Dual address (تَتُوبَا/تَظَاهَرَا v.4) — unique in sequence. ضَرَبَ اللَّهُ مَثَلًا ×2 exact consecutive (vv.10/11) — surah labels its own binary. عَسَى رَبُّ + يُبْدِل + خَيْرًا مِن exact construction cross-surah: Q.68 v.32 ↔ Q.66 v.5. وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ exact ×2 consecutive surahs: Q.67 v.6 / Q.66 v.9. قَدِيرٌ / الْمَصِيرُ consecutive in vv.8-9 — same two words appear in Q.67 vv.1/6 (six verses apart). الْقَانِتِينَ (v.12) bridges قَانِتَاتٍ (v.5). الْعَلِيمُ ×2 consecutive (vv.2/3). الْعَلِيمُ الْخَبِيرُ cross-surah: Q.67 v.14. Five prosodic zones in 12 verses — highest zone-density in sequence. Four women as closing theological argument — unique in sequence. نَجِّنِي ×2 within v.11.

block_map.label: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ ×1: rebuke — why prohibit; God ordained dissolution of oaths; Knowing/Wise
narrative disclosure (v.3); dual address to two wives — if you two repent (v.4); substitution warning — seven ideal-wife attributes (v.5)
PIVOT CENTER: O believers — Fire warning / O disbelievers — no excuses / O believers — sincere repentance — Day of light — believers' prayer (قَدِيرٌ)
يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ ×2: strive (v.9); ضَرَبَ ×2: condemned wives Noah/Lot (v.10); saved wife Pharaoh — prayer (v.11); Mary — devoutly obedient (v.12)

ya_ayyuha_five_density.note: يَا أَيُّهَا ×5 across 12 verses — one per 2.4 verses; highest density in sequence. Sequence: O Prophet (v.1) / O believers (v.6) / O disbelievers (v.7) / O believers (v.8) / O Prophet (v.9). The surah IS constructed through addressee sequence. Consecutive يَا أَيُّهَا addressing opposite groups (vv.6/7) — believers ↔ disbelievers — unique in sequence.

dual_address_unique.note: إِن تَتُوبَا / وَإِن تَظَاهَرَا — dual grammatical address. Only dual address in the analyzed sequence. The entire analyzed corpus (Q.66-114) rarely addresses exactly two named individuals in the dual; Al-Taḥrīm does so at the surah's most intimate domestic moment.

daraba_mathal_x2_consecutive.v10: ضَرَبَ اللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا — example for disbelievers
daraba_mathal_x2_consecutive.v11: ضَرَبَ اللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا — example for believers
daraba_mathal_x2_consecutive.note: Exact 4-word phrase ×2 consecutive. The surah explicitly labels its own binary exemplar structure. Unlike all other binary devices in sequence (فَأَمَّا/وَأَمَّا, وُجُوهٌ ×2, نَعِيمٍ/جَحِيمٍ), here the formula announces the binary before the exemplar. No other surah in the sequence makes its structural device this visible.

four_women_closing_argument.note: The surah that opens on a rebuke about the Prophet's wives closes on four women as theological types: condemned (Noah's wife / Lot's wife: betrayed righteous husbands; proximity to prophets did not save them) ↔ saved (Pharaoh's wife: believed despite wicked husband; Mary: guarded chastity / believed / devoutly obedient). Argument: spousal proximity is theologically irrelevant; individual faith determines outcome. No other surah in the sequence closes on a female exemplar catalogue.

aasa_rabbi_yubdil_cross_surah.v_tahrim: v.5: عَسَى رَبُّهُ أَن يُبْدِلَهُ خَيْرًا مِّنكُنَّ
aasa_rabbi_yubdil_cross_surah.v_qalam: Q.68 v.32: عَسَى رَبُّنَا أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنهَا
aasa_rabbi_yubdil_cross_surah.note: Exact construction (عَسَى + رَبّ + يُبْدِل + خَيْرًا مِن) across two consecutive surahs at structurally significant positions. Garden owners' hope for a better garden (Q.68) ↔ divine warning of better wives (Q.66). Same words, opposite emotional registers: repentant hope ↔ marital threat.

wabisa_almasir_exact_consecutive_surahs.q67_v6: وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ — wretched destination (Hell for disbelievers)
wabisa_almasir_exact_consecutive_surahs.q66_v9: وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ — wretched destiny (after striving command)
wabisa_almasir_exact_consecutive_surahs.note: Exact 3-word phrase in consecutive surahs at structurally parallel positions (both closing a Hell-warning unit). Most exact consecutive-surah phrase in analyzed sequence.

qadir_masir_consecutive_cross_surah.note: Q.67 vv.1/6: قَدِيرٌ (opening verse) / الْمَصِيرُ (Hell verse) — six verses apart. Q.66 vv.8/9: قَدِيرٌ (believers' prayer) / الْمَصِيرُ (striving command) — consecutive. The same two terminals bridging both surahs, compressed from six verses apart (Q.67) to consecutive verses (Q.66).

five_zones_12v_density.note: Five prosodic zones in 12 verses: [-iīm/-iīr] ×4 / [-āran] ×1 / [-uūna] ×2 / [-iīr] ×2 / [-iīna] ×3. Highest zone-density in sequence (one zone per 2.4 verses). Each thematic unit has its own terminal register. Compare Al-Qiyāmah's eight zones in 40 verses.

qanitin_bridge_v5_v12.v12: الْقَانِتِينَ — devoutly obedient (Mary's final description, surah's last word)
qanitin_bridge_v5_v12.note: Root ق-ن-ت ×2 bridges the ideal-wives catalogue and the surah's closing word. The surah's ideal woman type (v.5) and Mary's description (v.12) share the same root as the surah's final word. The surah closes on the attribute it catalogued.
