structure_summary.note: 12v. Pivot vv.6-8 (5/5, distributed_convergence). Offset +0.042. A(1-2)↔A'(9-12) / B(3-5) mirrors A'/center / CENTER(6-8). يَا أَيُّهَا ×5 — highest density. يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ ×2 frame. Dual address v.4 — unique in sequence. ضَرَبَ اللَّهُ مَثَلًا ×2 exact consecutive (vv.10/11). عَسَى رَبُّ + يُبْدِل cross-surah Q.68 v.32. وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ exact Q.67/Q.66. قَدِيرٌ/الْمَصِيرُ consecutive vv.8-9 ↔ Q.67 vv.1/6. الْقَانِتِينَ bridge vv.5/12. Five zones in 12v. Four women closing argument.

verses.ar: تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ الْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
الَّذِي خَلَقَ الْمَوْتَ وَالْحَيَاةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْغَفُورُ
الَّذِي خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ طِبَاقًا مَّا تَرَى فِي خَلْقِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ مِن تَفَاوُتٍ فَارْجِعِ الْبَصَرَ هَلْ تَرَى مِن فُطُورٍ
ثُمَّ ارْجِعِ الْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ يَنقَلِبْ إِلَيْكَ الْبَصَرُ خَاسِئًا وَهُوَ حَسِيرٌ
وَلَقَدْ زَيَّنَّا السَّمَاءَ الدُّنْيَا بِمَصَابِيحَ وَجَعَلْنَاهَا رُجُومًا لِّلشَّيَاطِينِ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لَهُمْ عَذَابَ السَّعِيرِ
وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِرَبِّهِمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَبِئْسَ الْمَصِيرُ
إِذَا أُلْقُوا فِيهَا سَمِعُوا لَهَا شَهِيقًا وَهِيَ تَفُورُ
تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ الْغَيْظِ كُلَّمَا أُلْقِيَ فِيهَا فَوْجٌ سَأَلَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَذِيرٌ
قَالُوا بَلَىٰ قَدْ جَاءَنَا نَذِيرٌ فَكَذَّبْنَا وَقُلْنَا مَا نَزَّلَ اللَّهُ مِن شَيْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِي ضَلَالٍ كَبِيرٍ
وَقَالُوا لَوْ كُنَّا نَسْمَعُ أَوْ نَعْقِلُ مَا كُنَّا فِي أَصْحَابِ السَّعِيرِ
إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِالْغَيْبِ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌ وَأَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ
وَأَسِرُّوا قَوْلَكُمْ أَوِ اجْهَرُوا بِهِ إِنَّهُ عَلِيمٌ بِذَاتِ الصُّدُورِ
أَلَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ اللَّطِيفُ الْخَبِيرُ
هُوَ الَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًا فَامْشُوا فِي مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا مِن رِّزْقِهِ وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
أَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِي السَّمَاءِ أَن يَخْسِفَ بِكُمُ الْأَرْضَ فَإِذَا هِيَ تَمُورُ
أَمْ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِي السَّمَاءِ أَن يُرْسِلَ عَلَيْكُمْ حَاصِبًا فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ كَيْفَ نَذِيرِ
وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا إِلَى الطَّيْرِ فَوْقَهُمْ صَافَّاتٍ وَيَقْبِضْنَ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا الرَّحْمَٰنُ إِنَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ بَصِيرٌ
أَمَّنْ هَٰذَا الَّذِي هُوَ جُندٌ لَّكُمْ يَنصُرُكُم مِّن دُونِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ إِنِ الْكَافِرُونَ إِلَّا فِي غُرُورٍ
أَمَّنْ هَٰذَا الَّذِي يَرْزُقُكُمْ إِنْ أَمْسَكَ رِزْقَهُ بَلْ لَّجُّوا فِي عُتُوٍّ وَنُفُورٍ
أَفَمَن يَمْشِي مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجْهِهِ أَهْدَىٰ أَمَّنْ يَمْشِي سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَاطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
قُلْ هُوَ الَّذِي أَنشَأَكُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ السَّمْعَ وَالْأَبْصَارَ وَالْأَفْئِدَةَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
قُلْ هُوَ الَّذِي ذَرَأَكُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا الْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ
قُلْ إِنَّمَا الْعِلْمُ عِندَ اللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَا أَنَا نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهُ زُلْفَةً سِيئَتْ وُجُوهُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا وَقِيلَ هَٰذَا الَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِ تَدَّعُونَ
قُلْ أَرَأَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَهْلَكَنِيَ اللَّهُ وَمَن مَّعِيَ أَوْ رَحِمَنَا فَمَن يُجِيرُ الْكَافِرِينَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
قُلْ هُوَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ آمَنَّا بِهِ وَعَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ فِي ضَلَالٍ مُّبِينٍ
قُلْ أَرَأَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَصْبَحَ مَاؤُكُمْ غَوْرًا فَمَن يَأْتِيكُم بِمَاءٍ مَعِينٍ

pivot.verse_ar: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِالْغَيْبِ … وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
pivot.center_logic_note: 30v full inverted ring. A(1-2)↔A'(28-30) / B(3-5)↔B'(23-27) / C(6-11)↔C'(16-22) / CENTER(12-15). Pivot vv.12-15: binary verdict (righteous rewarded) + divine omniscience (الْخَبِيرُ) + earth as provision + إِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ. Offset −0.067. Five signals: (1) theme — the surah's theological center: those who fear God unseen (the binary counter-type to the criminals) + divine knowledge that makes reward/punishment possible + the provision of the earth that grounds the security challenges; (2) grammar — إِنَّ opens v.12 (binary verdict); أَلَا يَعْلَمُ (v.14) — the knowledge argument culminates in the Subtle/Acquainted; هُوَ الَّذِي (v.15) transitions to the earth-invitation; (3) prosody — vv.12-15 are in zone 1's [-uūr/-iīr] class throughout; the pivot is prosodically undifferentiated from the surrounding zone — the content IS the signal, not a prosodic marker; (4) mirror — the only 4v unmirrored block; each surrounding pair mirrors it: criminals' confession (C) ↔ security challenges (C'); cosmic/Blaze (B) ↔ creation/promise (B'); sovereignty/test (A) ↔ closing قُلْ (A'); (5) lexical — إِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ (v.15) bridges to إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ (v.24) — the resurrection and gathering flanking the center at symmetric positions; الْخَبِيرُ (v.14) closes the knowledge argument.
pivot.notes: 30v. نَذِيرٌ ×5 (vv.8/9/17/18/26) — highest single-root distribution in surah; traces full arc of warning. الرَّحْمَٰنُ ×4 (vv.3/19/20/29) threading cosmic/natural/social/theological. Zone 1 [-uūr/-iīr] ×21 consecutive — longest single zone in analyzed sequence. تَبَارَكَ opening ↔ مَاءٍ مَعِينٍ close (blessing ↔ withheld provision). الْمُلْك as surah title in v.1. إِلَيْهِ ×2 (vv.15/24) flanking center. أَأَمِنتُمْ ×2 consecutive (vv.16/17) + أَمَّنْ ×2 consecutive (vv.20/21) = four consecutive challenge constructions. مُبِينٌ/مُبِينٍ ×2 (vv.26/29): Prophet's clarity ↔ disbelievers' clear error. السَّعِيرِ ×3 (vv.5/10/11) within zone 1. خَاشِعَةً cross-surah: Q.68 v.43 / Q.70 v.44 extends to Q.67 v.27. قُلْ ×6 (vv.23/24/26/28/29/30) surah second half. Death before life in v.2 (الْمَوْتَ قَبْلَ الْحَيَاةَ).

block_map.label: تَبَارَكَ opening; sovereignty (الْمُلْك); created death/life to test; Exalted/Forgiving
seven heavens; الرَّحْمَٰن ×1; return vision ×2 — vision humbled; stars as missiles; Blaze prepared
Hell for disbelievers; thrown in — boiling; keepers: did warner come; criminals confess ×2: denied / if only we listened; السَّعِير ×3
PIVOT CENTER: binary verdict (righteous fear unseen → forgiveness); divine omniscience (الْخَبِيرُ); earth as provision; إِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
security challenges: أَأَمِنتُمْ ×2 (swallow/stones); past deniers; birds (الرَّحْمَٰن ×3); أَمَّنْ ×2 (army/provision); walking simile
قُلْ ×2: He produced you / He multiplied you; إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ; promise challenge; clear warner (نَذِيرٌ مُبِينٌ); Day arrives — faces distressed
قُلْ ×3: whether death/mercy — who protects; He is الرَّحْمَٰن — we believed; if water sank — who brings مَاءٍ مَعِينٍ (unanswered)

tabarak_opening_maain_close.note: Root ب-ر-ك and flowing water are semantically linked in Arabic (barakah = blessing/abundance/water). The surah frames itself between the blessing-declaration (v.1) and the unanswerable question: who restores the blessed provision if God withholds it (v.30)? The architectural answer to the closing question is the surah's opening word.

nadhir_five_thread.note: Root ن-ذ-ر ×5 across the surah. Keepers' question (v.8) / criminals' confession (v.9: yes a warner came) / My warning (v.17: نَذِيرِ, first-person divine) / My reproach (v.18: نَكِيرِ) / Prophet's self-identification (v.26: نَذِيرٌ مُبِينٌ). Full arc: the warning's existence confirmed by criminals → its severity declared by God → its current embodiment in the Prophet.

rahman_four_domains.note: الرَّحْمَٰنُ ×4 threading four domains: cosmic creation (v.3) / natural world — holds the birds (v.19) / human defense — who could be your army (v.20) / theological — He IS الرَّحْمَٰن, we believed (v.29). The Creator of the perfect heavens (v.3) is the object of the Prophet's faith declaration (v.29).

zone1_21v_longest_single_zone.note: [-uūr/-iīr] rā'-final zone ×21 consecutive terminals — longest single unbroken prosodic zone in analyzed sequence (surpassing Q.69's [-iyyah] ×18 zones 1-3 combined). All of vv.1-21: sovereignty / creation / Blaze / criminals' confession / divine knowledge / earth provision / security challenges / birds — in one rā' terminal zone.

aamintum_amman_four_challenge_cluster.note: أَأَمِنتُمْ ×2 consecutive (vv.16/17: earth-swallowing / storm-stones) + أَمَّنْ ×2 consecutive (vv.20/21: army / provision). Four challenge constructions across six verses using two different interrogative roots. Most concentrated rhetorical pressure unit in surah.

mubiin_x2_clarity_device.v26: نَذِيرٌ مُبِينٌ — I am a clear warner
mubiin_x2_clarity_device.note: مُبِينٌ/مُبِينٍ ×2 in closing zone. The Prophet's clarity (clear warner) ↔ the disbelievers' clear error — same modifier, opposite valence. Compare Q.69's الْعَظِيمِ ×2 (vv.33/52: condemned's failure ↔ commanded glorification).

ilayhi_x2_flanking_center.v15: إِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ — to Him is the resurrection (center close)
ilayhi_x2_flanking_center.v24: إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ — to Him you will be gathered (B' unit)
ilayhi_x2_flanking_center.note: إِلَيْهِ ×2 at structurally symmetric positions flanking the center. The resurrection (v.15, end of pivot) ↔ the gathering (v.24, B' unit) share the same prepositional phrase. The surah's two return-to-God declarations are placed at mirror positions.

khashia_cross_surah_extends_to_67.note: Facial humiliation at the Day threads Q.67-70. Q.68 v.43: خَاشِعَةً أَبْصَارُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ (exact). Q.70 v.44: exact same phrase. Q.67 v.27: سِيئَتْ وُجُوهُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا (parallel). Cross-surah pattern 'khashia_face_humiliation_four_surahs' now covers surahs 67-70. The Day's disbeliever humiliation is the most persistent exact cross-surah image in the analyzed sequence.

structure_summary.note: 30v full inverted ring. Pivot vv.12-15 (5/5, distributed_convergence). Offset −0.067. A(1-2)↔A'(28-30) / B(3-5)↔B'(23-27) / C(6-11)↔C'(16-22) / CENTER(12-15). تَبَارَكَ opening ↔ مَاءٍ مَعِينٍ close. Zone 1 [-uūr/-iīr] ×21 — longest single zone in sequence. نَذِيرٌ ×5 full arc. الرَّحْمَٰنُ ×4 four domains. إِلَيْهِ ×2 flanking center. أَأَمِنتُمْ ×2 + أَمَّنْ ×2 four-challenge cluster. مُبِينٌ ×2 closing zone. قُلْ ×6 second half. الرَّحْمَٰن declared at creation (v.3) ↔ confessed as belief object (v.29). Face-humiliation cross-surah extends Q.67-70.

verses.ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِالْمُهْتَدِينَ
إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ آيَاتُنَا قَالَ أَسَاطِيرُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
إِنَّا بَلَوْنَاهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَا أَصْحَابَ الْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَائِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَائِمُونَ
أَنِ اغْدُوا عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَارِمِينَ
أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا الْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌ
قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
قَالُوا سُبْحَانَ رَبِّنَا إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَالِمِينَ
قَالُوا يَا وَيْلَنَا إِنَّا كُنَّا طَاغِينَ
عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَا أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهَا إِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَاغِبُونَ
كَذَٰلِكَ الْعَذَابُ وَلَعَذَابُ الْآخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ لَوْ كَانُوا يَعْلَمُونَ
إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّاتِ النَّعِيمِ
أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَانٌ عَلَيْنَا بَالِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ
أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَاءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا بِشُرَكَائِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا صَادِقِينَ
يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى السُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
خَاشِعَةً أَبْصَارُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ وَقَدْ كَانُوا يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى السُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَالِمُونَ
فَذَرْنِي وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَٰذَا الْحَدِيثِ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُمْ مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
أَمْ تَسْأَلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
فَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ الْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌ
لَّوْلَا أَن تَدَارَكَهُ نِعْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّهِ لَنُبِذَ بِالْعَرَاءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌ
وَإِن يَكَادُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَارِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا الذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُ لَمَجْنُونٌ

pivot.verse_ar: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَاهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَا أَصْحَابَ الْجَنَّةِ … إِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَاغِبُونَ
pivot.center_logic_note: 52v full inverted ring. A(1-4)↔A'(48-52) / B(5-7)↔B'(35-43) / C(8-16)↔C'(33-34) / CENTER(17-32). First Muqattat surah in dataset (ن). Pivot vv.17-32: the garden parable — surah's geometric center; 16v narrative zone matching zone 1's 16v prosodic weight. Offset −0.038. Five signals: (1) theme — the garden parable is the only fully narrated story in the surah and answers the condemned man's portrait (excluded the poor → garden destroyed); (2) grammar — إِنَّا introduces the parable; internal قَالُوا ×4 speech chain is unique in the surah; the owners' moral awakening (سُبْحَانَ رَبِّنَا v.29) structurally resolves the entire first half; (3) prosody — zone 2 (vv.17-32) is 16 terminals in the same nasal class as zone 1 — the only surah in sequence where two consecutive 16-verse zones share identical prosodic class, encoding the parable and the portrait as structurally equivalent; (4) mirror — the center block is the only unmirrored 16v unit; (5) lexical — مُصْبِحِينَ ×2 exact (vv.17/21) / رَبُّنَا ×3 within parable speech / يُبْدِل bridge to Q.70 v.41.
pivot.notes: 52v. First Muqattat surah in dataset; ن opens the surah before Pen oath — letter IS the first inscribed object in a surah about writing. مَجْنُونٍ ×2 frame (vv.2/51). نِعْمَة ×2 bridge (vv.2/49): Prophet ↔ Jonah both defined by divine favor. يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى السُّجُودِ ×2 exact consecutive (vv.42/43): present impossibility ↔ past ability. Seven consecutive genitival epithets (vv.10-13) — most sustained condemnation portrait in sequence. فَلَا تُطِعِ ×2 (vv.8/10). فَذَرْنِي (v.44) — ذ-ر cross-surah ×6 surahs. فَاصْبِرْ (v.48) cross-surah: 70:5/73:10. 52v nasal-final unity ([-uūn/-iīn/-iīm/-uūm]): second 100% terminal unity in sequence after Q.72. أَمْ ×6 challenge series (vv.37-47). خَاشِعَةً أَبْصَارُهُمْ cross-surah: Q.70 v.44 / Q.68 v.43. ذِكْرٌ لِلْعَالَمِينَ (v.52) ↔ Q.69 v.48 تَذْكِرَةٌ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ. عَظِيمٍ (v.4) cross-surah: Q.69 vv.33/52 الْعَظِيمِ.

nun_muqattaah_first_in_dataset.note: ن (Nūn) is the first and only Muqattat letter in the analyzed sequence (Q.68–114). The letter stands before the oath by the Pen with no grammatical connection. The surah is named Al-Qalam (The Pen) and opens with a letter that is itself an act of inscription — the ن IS the first inscribed object in a surah that swears by the act of inscribing. The letter and the surah's subject are architecturally identical.

majnun_frame.v2: مَجْنُونٍ — you are not a madman (Prophet vindicated)
majnun_frame.v51: لَمَجْنُونٌ — they say he is mad (disbelievers repeat charge)
majnun_frame.note: Root ج-ن-ن ×2 frames the surah at its second verse and second-to-last verse. The opening refutation ↔ closing repetition of the same charge. Between them: the full case (character / divine knowledge / garden parable / Day's humiliation / Jonah). The madness charge is the architectural frame; the Quran's declaration (v.52: reminder to the worlds) is the frame's answer.

nimah_prophet_jonah_bridge.v2: نِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ — by the favor of your Lord (Prophet vindicated)
nimah_prophet_jonah_bridge.v49: نِعْمَةٌ مِّن رَبِّهِ — a favor from his Lord (Jonah rescued)
nimah_prophet_jonah_bridge.note: Root ن-ع-م ×2 in the same construction 47 verses apart. Both the Prophet and Jonah are defined by divine favor at structurally paired positions. The Jonah narrative is the bridge to the closing declaration because Jonah models what happens when patience fails — and divine favor rescues anyway.

yudawna_sujud_exact_x2_consecutive.v42: يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى السُّجُودِ — invited to prostrate but cannot (Day)
yudawna_sujud_exact_x2_consecutive.v43: يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى السُّجُودِ — used to be invited to prostrate while sound (past)
yudawna_sujud_exact_x2_consecutive.note: Exact full phrase ×2 consecutive. Present inability ↔ past ability. The Day's prostration-impossibility and the world's prostration-refusal share one phrase. Compare Al-Ḥāqqah's وَاحِدَةٌ/وَاحِدَةً ×2 and Al-Ma'ārij's يُوعَدُونَ ×2 — here a full 4-word phrase is exact ×2 consecutive. Unique in sequence.

seven_genitival_epithets.note: حَلَّافٍ / مَهِينٍ / هَمَّازٍ / مَشَّاءٍ بِنَمِيمٍ / مَنَّاعٍ لِلْخَيْرِ / مُعْتَدٍ / أَثِيمٍ / عُتُلٍّ / زَنِيمٍ — seven-to-nine genitival epithets across four verses. Most sustained character-condemnation portrait in sequence. Compare Al-Ma'ārij's الَّذِينَ هُمْ ×7 (righteous in relative participial clauses) — the condemned defined by stacked genitival nouns ↔ the righteous defined by relative participial clauses.

nasal_final_52v_unity.note: Every terminal in Al-Qalam belongs to the nasal-final long-vowel class ([-uūna/-iīna/-iīm/-uūm/-uūn]). No exception across all 52 verses. Second instance of 100% terminal unity in sequence after Q.72 Al-Jinn ([-adan] ×28). Al-Qalam achieves the same unity across a surah 85% longer. Zone architecture: 16 + 16 + 20 — the only surah in sequence where the first two zones are prosodically identical in length.

zone_double_16v_symmetry.note: Zone 1 (vv.1-16) and Zone 2 (vv.17-32) are both exactly 16 terminals in the same [-uūna/-iīna] nasal class. No other surah in sequence produces two consecutive equal-length zones with identical phonetic class. The condemned man's portrait and the garden parable are prosodically equivalent — their thematic relationship (greed → exclusion of poor → divine punishment) encoded in symmetric zone architecture.

musbihin_exact_x2.v17: مُصْبِحِينَ — they swore to harvest at morning
musbihin_exact_x2.v21: مُصْبِحِينَ — they called one another at morning
musbihin_exact_x2.note: Exact terminal ×2 within the garden parable. The oath made at morning ↔ the discovery made at morning. Crime and consequence share the same temporal word.

khashia_absar_cross_surah.note: خَاشِعَةً أَبْصَارُهُمْ — humbled eyes — appears in Q.68 v.43 (the Day's humiliation) and Q.70 v.44 (the Day's humiliation). Exact phrase at the Day-humiliation unit in two consecutive surahs. Cross-reference also Q.79 v.9.

dhara_cross_surah_six_surahs.note: Root ذ-ر (leave/abandon) now threads six surahs: Q.73 v.11 / Q.74 v.11 / Q.71 vv.26-27 / Q.70 v.42 / Q.68 v.44 (فَذَرْنِي — divine leave-Me with the deniers of this hadith). The divine 'leave Me' with the wicked as a cross-surah theological statement spanning Q.68–74.

Seven genitival epithets. فَذَرْنِي (v.44) extends ذ-ر ×6 cross-surah thread. فَاصْبِرْ cross-surah. ذِكْرٌ لِلْعَالَمِينَ (v.52) ↔ Q.69 v.48.

verses.ar: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَانِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى الْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَى كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
وَجَاءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُ وَالْمُؤْتَفِكَاتُ بِالْخَاطِئَةِ
فَعَصَوْا رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا الْمَاءُ حَمَلْنَاكُمْ فِي الْجَارِيَةِ
لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَا أُذُنٌ وَاعِيَةٌ
فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ
وَحُمِلَتِ الْأَرْضُ وَالْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَاحِدَةً
وَالْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰ أَرْجَائِهَا وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَانِيَةٌ
يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَى مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ بِيَمِينِهِ فَيَقُولُ هَاؤُمُ اقْرَءُوا كِتَابِيَهْ
كُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا هَنِيئًا بِمَا أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِي الْأَيَّامِ الْخَالِيَةِ
وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ بِشِمَالِهِ فَيَقُولُ يَا لَيْتَنِي لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَابِيَهْ
ثُمَّ فِي سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَاسْلُكُوهُ
إِنَّهُ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَاجِزِينَ

pivot.verse_ar: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ بِيَمِينِهِ … هَلَكَ عَنِّي سُلْطَانِيَهْ
pivot.center_logic_note: 52v full inverted ring. A(1-3)↔A'(48-52) / B(4-10)↔B'(38-47) / C(11-12)↔C'(35-37) / D(13-18)↔D'(30-34) / CENTER(19-29). Pivot vv.19-29: binary direct speech of right-hand and left-hand account-holders. Geometric center 26.5; pivot midpoint 24; offset -0.048. Five signals: theme (the surah's entire eschatological binary enacted in direct personal speech — right-hand jubilation ↔ left-hand lament — at the structural center), grammar (فَأَمَّا/وَأَمَّا distributes the binary; the same syntax used for historical nations in vv.5-6 recurs at center to distribute the eschatological binary), prosody (ه pausal terminal zone — unique in sequence — marks both receivers' direct speech; the joy and anguish share the same terminal), mirror (the only unmirrored block in the chiasm; the right-hand and left-hand units are parallel rather than sequential inversions), lexical (كِتَابِيَهْ ×2 exact / حِسَابِيَهْ ×2 exact bridging both speeches; الْعَظِيمِ ×2 at vv.33/52 frames the whole second half from here).
pivot.notes: 52v full inverted ring. يُوعَدُونَ→الْحَاقَّةُ: surah title ×3 in opening vv.1-3 (unique in sequence). [-iyyah] ×18 (vv.1-18) — longest feminine participial zone in sequence. ه pausal terminal ×6 (vv.19/20/25/26/28/29) — unique in sequence. فَأَمَّا/وَأَمَّا ×4 governing both historical and eschatological binary distributions. وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ at v.3 — earliest deployment in sequence. الْعَظِيمِ ×2 (vv.33/52) — condemnation cause ↔ surah final word. تُبْصِرُونَ ×2 exact consecutive (vv.38/39) — seen ↔ unseen sworn in same terminal. تَذْكِرَةً ×2 (vv.12/48) — flood purpose ↔ Quran purpose. وَاحِدَةٌ/وَاحِدَةً ×2 (vv.13/14). أَخَذَ cross-surah: Q.73 v.16 / Q.69 v.10 / Q.69 v.45. خُذُوهُ/غُلُّوهُ/صَلُّوهُ/اسْلُكُوهُ command chain ×4. الْعَظِيمِ final word = فَسَبِّحْ formula = Al-A'lā v.1 cross-surah.

block_map.label: triple title: الْحَاقَّةُ ×3 consecutive — unanswered question; وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ earliest in sequence
historical exemplars: Thamūd / ʿAad / Pharaoh / seizure; فَأَمَّا ×2; رَسُولَ v.10
flood — We carried you; تَذْكِرَةً ×1 (bridge to v.48)
cosmic rupture: وَاحِدَةٌ ×2 / يَوْمَئِذٍ ×4 consecutive / Throne / presentation
PIVOT CENTER: binary direct speech — right-hand jubilation (vv.19-24) ↔ left-hand lament (vv.25-29); ه terminal ×6
divine command chain: خُذُوهُ/غُلُّوهُ/صَلُّوهُ/اسْلُكُوهُ ×4; causes: الْعَظِيمِ ×1 (v.33)
deprivation: no friend / wound discharge / sinners only
Quran authentication: فَلَا أُقْسِمُ oath; تُبْصِرُونَ ×2; رَسُولٍ v.40; أَخَذَ hypothetical v.45
closing: تَذْكِرَةٌ ×2 (v.48); وَإِنَّهُ ×3; الْحَقُّ الْيَقِينِ; الْعَظِيمِ ×2 final word

haqqah_title_triple_consecutive.note: الْحَاقَّةُ ×3 at terminal position of three consecutive opening verses. No other surah in sequence opens on its own title ×3. The surah names itself before describing itself. Compare Al-Muddaththir's سَقَرُ ×3 (vv.26/27/42) — non-consecutive, interior; and Al-Qāri'ah (الْقَارِعَةُ ×3 at vv.1/2/3 — same architecture). The triple opening names the Reality without defining it; the unanswered question is the surah's structural premise.

ma_adraka_earliest_deployment.note: وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا الْحَاقَّةُ at v.3 — the third verse of the surah. In every other deployment in the sequence the device appears deep in the text. Here it is the surah's structural opening move — the unanswerable question raised before any narrative begins. The Prophet's ignorance of the Reality is declared in the third verse.

iyyah_zone_18v.note: [-iyyah] feminine participial/adjective zone ×18 consecutive (vv.1-18), unifying: surah title ×3 / historical exemplars (Thamūd/ʿAad/Pharaoh/flood) / cosmic rupture. The feminine active-participle class encodes the Reality itself and all its evidence. Longest sustained [-iyyah] zone in analyzed sequence. The title الْحَاقَّةُ and the calamity بِالْقَارِعَةِ and the Resurrection وَقَعَتِ الْوَاقِعَةُ all sound alike.

ha_pausal_terminal_zone.note: ه voiced pausal extension ×6 at terminals of both receivers' direct speech: كِتَابِيَهْ / حِسَابِيَهْ (right-hand vv.19/20) / كِتَابِيَهْ / حِسَابِيَهْ / مَالِيَهْ / سُلْطَانِيَهْ (left-hand vv.25/26/28/29). Unique in sequence: the pausal ه marks urgent personal direct speech. Both blessed and condemned share the ه zone — joy and anguish encoded in the same terminal. The Day's accounting is equally personal and urgent for both account-holders.

amma_governs_historical_and_eschatologic.note: فَأَمَّا/وَأَمَّا ×4 distributes both the historical exemplar pair (Thamūd v.5 / ʿAad v.6) and the eschatological binary (right-hand v.19 / left-hand v.25). The same syntax governs historical punishment and eschatological accounting. No other surah in sequence uses the device at both levels in the same text.

azim_condemnation_to_final_word.v33: إِنَّهُ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ — condemnation cause
azim_condemnation_to_final_word.v52: فَسَبِّحْ بِاسْمِ رَبِّكَ الْعَظِيمِ — surah final word
azim_condemnation_to_final_word.note: الْعَظِيمِ ×2 exact, 19 verses apart. The divine title the condemned did not acknowledge (v.33) is the title commanded to be glorified by the Prophet (v.52). The surah's theological argument: not-acknowledging-the-Most-Great → punishment / acknowledging-the-Most-Great → glorification. The surah's final word answers its condemnation cause.

tubsirun_exact_consecutive.v38: فَلَا أُقْسِمُ بِمَا تُبْصِرُونَ — what you see
tubsirun_exact_consecutive.v39: وَمَا لَا تُبْصِرُونَ — what you do not see
tubsirun_exact_consecutive.note: تُبْصِرُونَ ×2 exact consecutive. The visible and the invisible sworn by in the same terminal word. The oath encompasses all of reality — seen and unseen — in one repeated terminal. The scope of the oath (everything that exists) encoded in the identity of the terminal across two semantically antithetical verses.

tadhkirah_bridge.v12: تَذْكِرَةً — the flood as reminder (historical exemplar section)
tadhkirah_bridge.v48: تَذْكِرَةٌ — the Quran as reminder (closing declaration)
tadhkirah_bridge.note: Root ذ-ك-ر ×2 at structurally symmetric positions flanking the center. The flood's purpose and the Quran's purpose share the same word. Cross-surah: Al-Muzzammil v.19 / Al-Muddaththir v.54 / the تَذْكِرَةٌ root threads the 69-74 sequence; here it bridges the two 'proof' sections of the surah.

akhidha_cross_surah_seizure.note: Root أ-خ-ذ threads Q.73 v.16 (فَأَخَذْنَاهُ أَخْذًا وَبِيلًا — Pharaoh's seizure) / Q.69 v.10 (فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَابِيَةً — historical nations' seizure) / Q.69 v.45 (لَأَخَذْنَا مِنْهُ بِالْيَمِينِ — hypothetical Prophet's seizure). The divine seizure of deniers (Q.73/Q.69 v.10) and the hypothetical seizure of the fabricating messenger (Q.69 v.45) use the same root: even the messenger would not be exempt from the seizure that destroyed the nations.

wahida_exact_consecutive.note: وَاحِدَةٌ/وَاحِدَةً ×2 exact consecutive. The Day's initiation is singular ×2: one blast for the Horn / one blow for the earth. The singularity of the Day's beginning encoded in the same word in consecutive verses.

verses.ar: تَعْرُجُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ وَالرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِي يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ
يُبَصَّرُونَهُمْ يَوَدُّ الْمُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدِي مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمِئِذٍ بِبَنِيهِ
وَمَن فِي الْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
وَالَّذِينَ هُمْ مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
إِلَّا عَلَىٰ أَزْوَاجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
فَمَنِ ابْتَغَىٰ وَرَاءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْعَادُونَ
أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ امْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ
فَلَا أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ الْمَشَارِقِ وَالْمَغَارِبِ إِنَّا لَقَادِرُونَ
عَلَىٰ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا وَيَلْعَبُوا حَتَّىٰ يُلَاقُوا يَوْمَهُمُ الَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
يَوْمَ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ الْأَجْدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٍ يُوفِضُونَ
خَاشِعَةً أَبْصَارُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ذَٰلِكَ الْيَوْمُ الَّذِي كَانُوا يُوعَدُونَ

pivot.verse_ar: إِلَّا الْمُصَلِّينَ
pivot.center_logic_note: 44v full inverted ring. A(1-4)↔A'(42-44) / B(5-7)↔B'(39-41) / C(8-14)↔C'(36-38) / D(15-18)↔D'(19-21) / CENTER(22-35). Pivot v.22: إِلَّا الْمُصَلِّينَ. Geometric center 22.5; offset -0.011. Five signals: theme (إِلَّا pivots from condemned humanity to righteous exception — the surah's entire moral argument turns here), grammar (إِلَّا exception particle performs the structural pivot; the human diagnosis at vv.19-21 is negated in three words), lexical (s-ʔ-l bridge: سَائِلٌ v.1 → لِلسَّائِلِ v.25 — the questioner's identity inverted through the pivot; صَلَاتِهِمْ ×2 exact at vv.23/34 frames the entire 14v catalogue from this opening), mirror (opens the only unmirrored center block in the chiasm), prosody (Zone 8 [-uːna] opens; the longest zone in the surah; 14 active participial terminals begin here).
pivot.notes: 44v surah. Full inverted ring. يُوعَدُونَ ×2 exact closing frame (vv.42/44) ↔ وَاقِعٍ open (v.1). سَائِلٌ/لِلسَّائِلِ (vv.1/25) — questioner double-identity. صَلَاتِهِمْ ×2 (vv.23/34) frames 14v believers' catalogue. كَلَّا ×2 (vv.15/39) at symmetric flanking positions. فَعُولٌ ×3 consecutive (vv.19-21) — triple morphological excess (unique in dataset). [-iːhi] ×4 ransom bonds (vv.11-14). الْمَعَارِجِ/تَعْرُجُ (vv.3/4) — title instantiated in next verse. يَوْمَ ×7 distributed thread. Nine prosodic zones. فَذَرْهُمْ (v.42) extends ذ-ر cross-surah thread (Q.73/74/71/70). 14v active participial zone ↔ At-Takwīr 14v passive perfect zone: grammar of volition ↔ grammar of compulsion.

patience command; they see distant / We see near — binary antithetical

كَلَّا ×1; Flame named; Flame targets: denier + miser ([-a] ×4)
human diagnosis: إِنَّ الْإِنسَانَ; فَعُولٌ ×3 consecutive (هَلُوعًا/جَزُوعًا/مَنُوعًا)
PIVOT CENTER: إِلَّا — believers' catalogue ×14 active participials; صَلَاتِهِمْ ×2 frames
rhetorical challenge: disbelievers hastening; false garden aspiration

فَذَرْهُمْ; يُوعَدُونَ ×2 exact close; Day of emergence; eyes humbled

faul_morphological_triple_consecutive.note: فَعُولٌ ×3 consecutive — the grammar of excess IS the rhyme. Each terminal encodes hyperbolic habitual action in the same morphological pattern. The human character is over-diagnosed in the most emphatic adjective class Arabic possesses. Compare Nūḥ vv.10-11 (غَفَّارًا/مِدْرَارًا, two consecutive intensifying forms) — Al-Ma'ārij triples it. Unique in dataset.

yuadun_exact_closing_frame.v42: يُوعَدُونَ — until they meet their Day which they are promised
yuadun_exact_closing_frame.v44: يُوعَدُونَ — that is the Day which they had been promised
yuadun_exact_closing_frame.note: Exact terminal ×2 in final 3 verses. The surah opened on وَاقِعٍ (bound to happen, v.1) and closes on يُوعَدُونَ ×2 (promised). Inevitability (active) ↔ promise (passive): the same theological certainty from two grammatical angles. Compare عَدَدًا ×2 closing pair in Q.72 and تَبَارًا final word in Q.71.

saail_questioner_double_identity.v1: سَأَلَ سَائِلٌ — a supplicant asked about punishment (denier's challenge)
saail_questioner_double_identity.v25: لِّلسَّائِلِ — for the petitioner (believer's charity recipient)
saail_questioner_double_identity.note: Root س-ا-ل ×2 at structurally paired positions. The denier who asks about punishment (v.1) ↔ the poor person who asks for provision (v.25). The surah's opening root returns as a believer's virtue. The same act of asking carries opposite theological valence depending on which side of the pivot it falls.

salat_frames_believers_catalogue.v23: عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ دَائِمُونَ — constant in their prayer (opens catalogue)
salat_frames_believers_catalogue.v34: عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ — maintain their prayer (closes catalogue)
salat_frames_believers_catalogue.note: صَلَاتِهِمْ ×2 exact frames the 14-verse believers' catalogue at both ends. Everything between — charity, belief in the Day, fear of the Lord, chastity, trustworthiness, testimony — is held within the prayer frame. The believers are constituted by prayer; prayer is their first and last defining act.

maarij_title_instantiated_next_verse.v3: الْمَعَارِجِ — owner of the ways of ascent (surah title-name)
maarij_title_instantiated_next_verse.v4: تَعْرُجُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ وَالرُّوحُ — the angels and Spirit ascend
maarij_title_instantiated_next_verse.note: Root ع-ر-ج ×2 in consecutive verses. The surah's title-concept appears at v.3 (divine title) and is enacted at v.4 (cosmic ascent). Instantiation latency: one verse — the fastest title-enactment in analyzed sequence. Compare Al-Qiyāmah (يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ ×2 at vv.1/6) and Al-Jinn (سَمِعْنَا repeated across the surah).

ihi_ransom_bond_zone.note: [-iːhi] third-person possessive suffix ×4 consecutive: children / brother / kindred / to save him (بِبَنِيهِ / وَأَخِيهِ / تُؤْوِيهِ / يُنجِيهِ). The criminal's offered ransom list all share the possessive suffix — the bonds and their purpose (to save HIM) carry the same terminal. Compare 'Abasa zone 4 ([-ihi] ×4 for severed bonds at the Day): same suffix, same semantic field, inverted meaning: ransom offered ↔ bonds severed.

active_participial_zone_14v.note: Believers' catalogue (vv.22-35) dominated by active participles and active adjectives in [-uːna/-iːna]: دَائِمُونَ / مُشْفِقُونَ / حَافِظُونَ / رَاعُونَ / قَائِمُونَ / يُحَافِظُونَ / مُكْرَمُونَ. The righteous are grammatically active. Compare At-Takwīr's 14-verse إِذَا chain using passive perfects for cosmic dissolution. Both zones are 14 verses; At-Takwīr's passives describe cosmic things compelled ↔ Al-Ma'ārij's actives describe humans who choose. The grammar of compulsion ↔ the grammar of volition in mirror zones of identical length.

dhara_cross_surah_five_surahs.note: Root ذ-ر (leave/abandon) threads five surahs: Q.73 v.11 (وَذَرْنِي — divine leave-Me with deniers) / Q.74 v.11 (ذَرْنِي — divine leave-Me with ingrate) / Q.71 vv.26-27 (لَا تَذَرْ / إِن تَذَرْهُمْ — Noah's petition) / Q.70 v.42 (فَذَرْهُمْ — divine to Prophet: leave them). The thread now spans Q.70–74: divine sovereignty claimed (Q.73/74) / Noah's petition (Q.71) / divine command (Q.70). Five consecutive surahs in one cross-surah root thread.

kalla_flanking_positions.v15: كَلَّا — opens Flame unit at v.15 (near-center)
kalla_flanking_positions.v39: كَلَّا — opens divine oath unit at v.39 (near-close)
kalla_flanking_positions.note: كَلَّا ×2 at structurally symmetric flanking positions around the believers' centre (vv.22-35). v.15 rebukes the criminal's wish to ransom / v.39 rebukes the disbelievers' false garden aspiration. Both instances confirm كَلَّا as a structural boundary marker: the dataset's consistent heuristic (n=9+) holds here. Distance from center: v.15 is 7 verses before pivot (v.22); v.39 is 17 verses after close of centre (v.35).

structure_summary.note: 44v full inverted ring. Pivot v.22 (5/5, single_concentration), offset -0.011. A(1-4)↔A'(42-44) / B(5-7)↔B'(39-41) / C(8-14)↔C'(36-38) / D(15-18)↔D'(19-21) / CENTER(22-35). يُوعَدُونَ ×2 close; سَائِلٌ/لِلسَّائِلِ bridge; صَلَاتِهِمْ ×2 frames 14v catalogue; كَلَّا ×2 flanking; فَعُولٌ ×3 consecutive (unique); [-iːhi] ×4 ransom zone; مَعَارِجِ/تَعْرُجُ title-instantiation (1v latency); يَوْمَ ×7; ذ-ر cross-surah ×5 surahs; 9 prosodic zones; 14v active participial ↔ At-Takwīr 14v passive. 46 surahs / 162 patterns.

verses.ar: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ إِنِّي لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى إِنَّ أَجَلَ اللَّهِ إِذَا جَاءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِي لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
وَإِنِّي كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوا أَصَابِعَهُمْ فِي آذَانِهِمْ وَاسْتَغْشَوْا ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا وَاسْتَكْبَرُوا اسْتِكْبَارًا
ثُمَّ إِنِّي أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا
فَقُلْتُ اسْتَغْفِرُوا رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَالٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّاتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَارًا
مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
أَلَمْ تَرَوْا كَيْفَ خَلَقَ اللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ طِبَاقًا
وَجَعَلَ الْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ الشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِي وَاتَّبَعُوا مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُ وَوَلَدُهُ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
وَقَالُوا لَا تَذَرُنَّ آلِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا كَثِيرًا وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَالًا
مِمَّا خَطِيئَاتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا فَأُدْخِلُوا نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا لَهُم مِّن دُونِ اللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوا إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
رَّبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًا

pivot.verse_ar: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا كَيْفَ خَلَقَ اللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَاوَاتٍ طِبَاقًا ۞ وَجَعَلَ الْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ الشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
pivot.center_logic_note: 28v chiasm. Block map: A(1-4)↔A'(25-28) / B(5-9)↔B'(21-24) / C(10-12)↔C'(19-20) / D(13-15)↔D'(16-18). Inner chiasm seam vv.15-16 separates cosmological creation (D) from celestial-biological creation (D'). Seam midpoint 15.5; geometric center 14.5; offset +0.036. Five converging signals: theme (cosmological↔celestial-biological shift), lexical ([-āran] Zone 3 ends v.14; Zone 4 opens v.15 طِبَاقًا), mirror (innermost D/D' seam), discourse (أَلَمْ interrogative enters v.15), prosody (zone break [-āran]→[-āqan]).
pivot.notes: 28v full inverted ring. A(1-4)↔A'(25-28) / B(5-9)↔B'(21-24) / C(10-12)↔C'(19-20) / D(13-15)↔D'(16-18) / hinge v.25. رَبِّ ×4 vocative (vv.5/21/26/28). وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا exact ×2 vv.24/28 with escalating terminal nouns (ضَلَالًا→تَبَارًا). نُوحٌ ×3 at boundaries (vv.1/21/26) — structural marker. ز-ي-د ×4 perverse inversions (vv.6/21/24/28). غ-ف-ر ×4 threading motive→title→prayer (vv.7/10/28). 5-zone rhyme: [-iːm/-iːn](1-2)/[-uːna](3-4)/[-āran]×10(5-14)/[-ājan/-ātan]×6(15-20)/[-āran]×8(21-28). [-āran] ×18 dominant (64%). تَبَارًا final word — surah closes on destruction. Three-layer discourse v.23. ذ-ر cross-surah thread Q.73/74/71.

wala_tazid_zalimin_exact_x2.v24: وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَالًا — first curse: error
wala_tazid_zalimin_exact_x2.v28: وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًا — second curse: destruction
wala_tazid_zalimin_exact_x2.note: Exact 7-word frame ×2 at closing structural positions. Escalating terminal nouns: ضَلَالًا (error) → تَبَارًا (destruction). Same device as Q.74 فَقُتِلَ ×2 / Q.75 أَوْلَى لَكَ ×2 — woe-with-escalation. Here the frame is the longest exact cross-verse phrase in any single surah in the dataset.

nuh_named_three_discourse_boundaries.v1: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا — divine commission opens
nuh_named_three_discourse_boundaries.v21: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ — second prayer opens
nuh_named_three_discourse_boundaries.v26: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ — third prayer opens
nuh_named_three_discourse_boundaries.note: نُوحٌ named at every major discourse boundary. Naming marks: divine narration (v.1) / second complaint (v.21) / closing prayer (v.26). No other prophet narrative in analyzed sequence uses the protagonist's name as a structural delimiter with this regularity.

zayd_perverse_inversion_thread_x4.v21: لَمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُ وَوَلَدُهُ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
zayd_perverse_inversion_thread_x4.note: Root ز-ي-د ×4 all describing negative/inverted increase. Invitation backfires (v.6) / wealth inverts to loss (v.21) / Noah invokes inverted increase as double curse (vv.24/28). The surah's moral logic — wrongdoing amplifies its own consequence — encoded in one root across four positions.

cognate_accusative_x2_consecutive_creati.note: Two cognate accusatives in consecutive creation verses. v.17 encodes origin; v.18 encodes return and extraction. Death and resurrection embedded in the creation argument without explicit naming. Compare Q.79 vv.2–4 and Q.73 v.8 تَبْتِيلًا.

ghaffaran_midraran_intensified_consecuti.note: Both hyperbolic divine-attribute patterns in consecutive terminals. Both carry [-āran]. Grammar of divine abundance encoded in consecutive sound: Perpetual Forgiver ↔ continuous rain share morphological intensification class.

three_nested_discourse_v23.note: v.23: وَقَالُوا — people's speech in Noah's prayer in divine text. Three simultaneous layers. Compare Q.72 v.1 (three-layer opening) and Q.79 vv.16–19 (four-verse spread).

dharar_cross_surah_leave_thread.Q71v26: لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ مِنَ الْكَافِرِينَ
dharar_cross_surah_leave_thread.note: Root ذ-ر (leave) threads three consecutive surahs in reverse canonical order: divine leave-Me ×2 (Q.73/Q.74) ↔ Noah's do-not-leave ×2 (Q.71). Same root carries divine sovereignty across the triplet: God claims exclusive authority / Noah echoes it as prayer.

structure_summary.note: 28v full inverted ring. Seam vv.15-16 (5/5, compound_seam), offset +0.036. A(1-4)↔A'(25-28) / B(5-9)↔B'(21-24) / C(10-12)↔C'(19-20) / D(13-15)↔D'(16-18) / hinge v.25. رَبِّ ×4; وَلَا تَزِدِ exact ×2 (vv.24/28); نُوحٌ ×3 boundary marker; ز-ي-د ×4; غ-ف-ر ×4; [-āran] ×18 dominant; تَبَارًا final word. 45 surahs / 153 patterns.

verses.ar: قُلْ أُوحِيَ إِلَيَّ أَنَّهُ اسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌ مِّنَ الْجِنِّ فَقَالُوا إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْآنًا عَجَبًا
يَهْدِي إِلَى الرُّشْدِ فَآمَنَّا بِهِ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَا أَحَدًا
وَأَنَّهُ تَعَالَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا اتَّخَذَ صَاحِبَةً وَلَا وَلَدًا
وَأَنَّهُ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى اللَّهِ شَطَطًا
وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّا أَن لَّن تَقُولَ الْإِنسُ وَالْجِنُّ عَلَى اللَّهِ كَذِبًا
وَأَنَّهُ كَانَ رِجَالٌ مِّنَ الْإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٍ مِّنَ الْجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًا
وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ اللَّهُ أَحَدًا
وَأَنَّا لَمَسْنَا السَّمَاءَ فَوَجَدْنَاهَا مُلِئَتْ حَرَسًا شَدِيدًا وَشُهُبًا
وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقَاعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ الْآنَ يَجِدْ لَهُ شِهَابًا رَّصَدًا
وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِي أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِي الْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًا
وَأَنَّا مِنَّا الصَّالِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ كُنَّا طَرَائِقَ قِدَدًا
وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّا أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ اللَّهَ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُ هَرَبًا
وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا الْهُدَىٰ آمَنَّا بِهِ فَمَن يُؤْمِنْ بِرَبِّهِ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا
وَأَنَّا مِنَّا الْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا الْقَاسِطُونَ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُولَٰئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا رَشَدًا
وَأَلَّوِ اسْتَقَامُوا عَلَى الطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنَاهُم مَّاءً غَدَقًا
لِنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ وَمَن يُعْرِضْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِ يَسْلُكْهُ عَذَابًا صَعَدًا
وَأَنَّ الْمَسَاجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا مَعَ اللَّهِ أَحَدًا
وَأَنَّهُ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ يَدْعُوهُ كَادُوا يَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِ لِبَدًا
قُلْ إِنَّمَا أَدْعُو رَبِّي وَلَا أُشْرِكُ بِهِ أَحَدًا
قُل إِنِّي لَا أَمْلِكُ لَكُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا رَشَدًا
قُلْ إِنِّي لَن يُجِيرَنِي مِنَ اللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِ مُلْتَحَدًا
إِلَّا بَلَاغًا مِّنَ اللَّهِ وَرِسَالَاتِهِ وَمَن يَعْصِ اللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ فَإِنَّ لَهُ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا أَبَدًا
حَتَّىٰ إِذَا رَأَوْا مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَضْعَفُ نَاصِرًا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدًا
قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِي أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُ رَبِّي أَمَدًا
عَالِمُ الْغَيْبِ فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِ أَحَدًا
إِلَّا مَنِ ارْتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٍ فَإِنَّهُ يَسْلُكُ مِن بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِ رَصَدًا
لِيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا رِسَالَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَى كُلَّ شَيْءٍ عَدَدًا

pivot.verse_ar: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا الْهُدَىٰ آمَنَّا بِهِ فَمَن يُؤْمِنْ بِرَبِّهِ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا
pivot.center_logic_note: Geometric center of 28v surah = 14.5. Central block vv.11-15 (midpoint v.13), offset -0.054. All five signals converge at vv.11-15: theme (jinn's binary self-division + belief declaration = structural pivot), lexical (رَشَدًا ×2 at vv.13-14 / رَهَقًا ×2 at vv.6/13 / سَمِعْنَا ×2 bridge from v.1), mirror (unmirrored D center between C/C' and B/B'), discourse (universal فَمَنْ declaration within jinn's speech at v.13), prosody (رَشَدًا ×2 consecutive at vv.13-14 in the [-adan] macro-zone).
pivot.notes: 28v surah. Block map: A(1-2)↔A'(26-28) / B(3-7)↔B'(18-25) / C(8-10)↔C'(16-19) / center D(11-15). قُلْ ×5 (vv.1/20/21/22/25) framing device. وَأَنَّ chain ×14 (longest syntactic chain in sequence). أَحَدًا ×5 distributed tawhid marker. 100% tanwīn terminal unity (28/28 — unique in sequence). رَصَدًا exact bridge vv.9/27 (19 verses). رَهَقًا antithetical exact vv.6/13. عَدَدًا ×2 closing pair vv.24/28. Three-layer discourse opening (divine→Prophet→jinn) in v.1. رَشَدًا ×4 distributed. لَا نَدْرِي/لَا أَدْرِي jinn-Prophet ignorance echo vv.10/25.

full_surah_tanwin_100pct.note: 28/28 terminals carry tanwīn accusative [-adan/-idan/-udan] — 100% terminal unity; unique in analyzed sequence. Surpasses Q.73 (18/19) and Q.74 [-ar] zone. The jinn's speech (vv.1-19) and the Prophet's declarations (vv.20-28) are prosodically indistinguishable. The surah's theological claim (jinn and Prophet speak in the same terminal register) is encoded in the prosody.

waw_anna_chain_x14.note: وَأَنَّ/وَأَنَّا/وَأَنَّهُ connective ×14 — longest syntactic connective chain in analyzed sequence. Each clause opens with the same conjunction signaling a further revelation or discovery. Creates continuous revelatory disclosure effect. Fourteen clauses across seventeen verses.

ahadan_x5_tawhid_distributed.v2: لَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَا أَحَدًا — jinn's tawhid
ahadan_x5_tawhid_distributed.v7: أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ اللَّهُ أَحَدًا — corrected error
ahadan_x5_tawhid_distributed.v18: فَلَا تَدْعُوا مَعَ اللَّهِ أَحَدًا — divine command
ahadan_x5_tawhid_distributed.v20: وَلَا أُشْرِكُ بِهِ أَحَدًا — Prophet's declaration
ahadan_x5_tawhid_distributed.v26: فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِ أَحَدًا — divine monopoly
ahadan_x5_tawhid_distributed.note: أَحَدًا ×5 at every major discourse boundary: jinn belief (v.2) / corrected error (v.7) / divine command transmitted (v.18) / Prophet's own tawhid (v.20) / divine omniscience (v.26). Most distributed exact terminal tawhid signal in sequence within one surah.

rasad_exact_bridge_19v.v9: شِهَابًا رَّصَدًا — flame lying in wait at heaven
rasad_exact_bridge_19v.v27: رَصَدًا — divine observers sent with messenger
rasad_exact_bridge_19v.note: رَصَدًا ×2 exact, 19 verses apart — surah's longest exact terminal bridge. Both describe divine surveillance at cosmic boundaries: heaven guarded from jinn (v.9) ↔ messenger guarded by divine observers (v.27). Same word, antithetical directions: blocking outward ↔ protecting inward.

rahaq_antithetical_exact.v6: فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًا — men seeking jinn refuge; increased burden
rahaq_antithetical_exact.v13: فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا — believer free from burden
rahaq_antithetical_exact.note: رَهَقًا ×2 exact antithetical: false refuge → increased burden (v.6) ↔ true belief → freedom from burden (v.13). The error and its cure carry identical terminal. Compare sequence's other antithetical exact terminals.

adad_human_divine_closing_pair.v24: أَقَلُّ عَدَدًا — disbelievers fewer in number
adad_human_divine_closing_pair.v28: أَحْصَى كُلَّ شَيْءٍ عَدَدًا — God enumerated all things
adad_human_divine_closing_pair.note: عَدَدًا ×2 in final four verses. Human numerical weakness (v.24) ↔ divine absolute enumeration (v.28). The surah that opened with an unspecified group (نَفَرٌ) closes on God counting everything. Partial human count → total divine count.

three_layer_discourse_v1.note: v.1 activates three discourse layers simultaneously: divine → Prophet (قُلْ) → jinn speech (إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا). Most compressed discourse nesting in sequence; compare Q.79 vv.16-19 which spreads three layers across four verses.

la_nadri_la_adri_cross_unit_ignorance.v10: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِي — jinn's ignorance about human fate
la_nadri_la_adri_cross_unit_ignorance.v25: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِي — Prophet's ignorance about timing
la_nadri_la_adri_cross_unit_ignorance.note: Both jinn (v.10) and Prophet (v.25) use the same root د-ر-ي to acknowledge withheld knowledge. Jinn's لَا نَدْرِي ↔ Prophet's لَا أَدْرِي — the same epistemic formula bridges the surah's two major speech units. Divine monopoly on knowledge confirmed by both parties.

rashad_x4_thread.note: ر-ش-د root ×4: it guides to right course (v.2, الرُّشْدِ) / whether right course intended for humans (v.10) / Muslims sought right course (v.14) / Prophet disclaims right direction (v.21). The guidance concept threads jinn's belief / their uncertainty / their attainment / the Prophet's disclaimer. The surah's central concept across four structural positions.

qul_x5_frame_and_close.note: قُلْ ×5: v.1 opens (report the jinn's speech) then ×4 closes (vv.20-22/25 — Prophet's own declarations). The surah is framed by Prophet's commanded speech: report others' testimony → declare own limitations. قُلْ opens reporting register ↔ closes declaring register.

signal_table.theme: it guides — we believed — associate no one

signal_table.verse_ar: وَأَنَّهُ تَعَالَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا اتَّخَذَ صَاحِبَةً وَلَا وَلَدًا

signal_table.mirror_signal: B↓ direct human address — unique in jinn speech

used to listen — now a flame lies in wait

signal_table.theme: we do not know evil or right course intended
signal_table.lexical_signal: وَأَنَّا ×4; لَا نَدْرِي ×1 — echo v.25; رَشَدًا ×1

verses.ar: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ الْقُرْآنَ تَرْتِيلًا
إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ اللَّيْلِ هِيَ أَشَدُّ وَطْءًا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
إِنَّ لَكَ فِي النَّهَارِ سَبْحًا طَوِيلًا
وَاذْكُرِ اسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
رَبُّ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَاتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
وَاصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَاهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
وَذَرْنِي وَالْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُولِي النَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ الْأَرْضُ وَالْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ الْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًا مَّهِيلًا
إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شَاهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَا أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ الرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنَاهُ أَخْذًا وَبِيلًا
فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ الْوِلْدَانَ شِيبًا
السَّمَاءُ مُنفَطِرٌ بِهِ كَانَ وَعْدُهُ مَفْعُولًا
إِنَّ هَٰذِهِ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَاءَ اتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ سَبِيلًا

إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَيِ اللَّيْلِ وَنِصْفَهُ وَثُلُثَهُ وَطَائِفَةٌ مِّنَ الَّذِينَ مَعَكَ وَاللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ اللَّيْلَ وَالنَّهَارَ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحْصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ فَاقْرَؤُوا مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرْضَىٰ وَآخَرُونَ يَضْرِبُونَ فِي الْأَرْضِ يَبْتَغُونَ مِن فَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَآخَرُونَ يُقَاتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ فَاقْرَؤُوا مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنْهُ وَأَقِيمُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَآتُوا الزَّكَاةَ وَأَقْرِضُوا اللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ اللَّهِ هُوَ خَيْرًا وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْرًا وَاسْتَغْفِرُوا اللَّهَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ

pivot.verse_ar: وَاصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَاهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا / وَذَرْنِي وَالْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُولِي النَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
pivot.center_logic_note: Seam vv.10-11, midpoint 10.5 = geometric center of 20v surah (offset 0.000). All five signals converge: theme (patience command / divine leave Me = conduct hinge), lexical (وَذَرْنِي at v.11 — exact parallel to Q.74:11 + قَلِيلًا ×3 distributed), mirror (unmirrored D center between C/C' and B/B' units), discourse (shift imperative → divine 1st-person at v.11), prosody (قَلِيلًا ×3 — vv.2/3/11 — architectural connector).
pivot.notes: 20v surah. Block map: A(1-4)↔A'(17-19) / B(5-7)↔B'(14-16) / C(8-9)↔C'(12-13) / center D(10-11) / [v.20 Medinan addendum outside mirror]. يَا أَيُّهَا twin with Q.74. وَذَرْنِي exact at v.11 in both Q.73 and Q.74. [-iːl-]×18/19 — most proportionally unified zone. قَلِيلًا ×3 distributed. رَسُولًا ×2 within one verse. تَذْكِرَةٌ + فَمَن شَاءَ closing pair with Q.74. Meccan (vv.1-19) + Medinan (v.20) two-part structure. v.20 closes on غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ — twin Q.74:56 الْمَغْفِرَةِ.

ya_ayyuha_twin_opening_q73_q74.note: Both consecutive surahs open with يَا أَيُّهَا addressing the Prophet by physical state. Both have قُمِ/قُمْ at v.2. Both contain صَبَرَ root, هَجَرَ root, وَذَرْنِي at v.11. No other consecutive pair in sequence shares this structural-lexical parallelism across opening units.

dharna_exact_v11_both_surahs.note: وَذَرْنِي divine leave-Me command at verse 11 of both consecutive surahs. Strongest same-verse exact phrase correspondence in analyzed sequence. Divine sovereignty over deniers (Q.73) and over individual ingrate (Q.74) expressed through identical verb at identical position.

il_zone_x18_of_19_proportional_max.note: 18 of 19 content verses share [-iːl-/-iːm-/-uːl-] long-vowel family — highest proportional terminal unity in analyzed sequence. The only exception שִׁיבָא (v.17) maintains the long vowel while varying the consonant. The surah's entire argument (command / theology / conduct / punishment / Pharaoh / invitation) is prosodically unified.

qalilan_x3_arithmetic_distributed.v3: قَلِيلًا — subtract from it a little
qalilan_x3_arithmetic_distributed.note: Same word measures the Prophet's prayer reduction (vv.2-3) and the deniers' remaining lifespan (v.11). Word for smallness is the surah's architectural connector between commission and warning. Also: ×2 consecutive at vv.2-3 before distributing to pivot verse.

rasul_x2_within_single_verse.v15: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا… كَمَا أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
rasul_x2_within_single_verse.note: Terminal word رَسُولًا appears twice within v.15 itself at structurally mirrored positions (messenger to this community ↔ messenger to Pharaoh). No other verse in analyzed sequence contains its own terminal word twice within a single verse at mirrored positions.

meccan_medinan_two_part_structure.note: Only surah in analyzed mufassal sequence with confirmed two-part chronological structure. Prosodic evidence: vv.2-19 [-iːl-] tanwīn accusative; v.20 closes on رَحِيمٌ [-iːmun] indefinite nominative. Quran recitation command (v.4) answered and relaxed in v.20. Surah's beginning and end connected by same object (the Quran) with obligation eased between.

tadhkira_fa_man_sha_a_consecutive_close.q73_v19: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَاءَ اتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ سَبِيلًا
tadhkira_fa_man_sha_a_consecutive_close.q74_v54_55: كَلَّا إِنَّهُ تَذْكِرَةٌ / فَمَن شَاءَ ذَكَرَهُ
tadhkira_fa_man_sha_a_consecutive_close.note: Both consecutive surahs close their Meccan argument with the exact sequence: تَذْكِرَةٌ declared → فَمَن شَاءَ invitation. No other consecutive surah pair in sequence shares both reminder declaration and invitation formula at the same structural position.

ghafur_rahim_consecutive_close_echo.note: Both consecutive surahs close on divine forgiveness. Q.73 uses غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ as final words; Q.74 uses أَهْلُ الْمَغْفِرَةِ. The forgiveness close threads two surahs in sequence.

verses.ar: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَٰذَا إِلَّا سِحْرٌ يُؤْثَرُ

وَمَا جَعَلْنَا أَصْحَابَ النَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَائِكَةً وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لِيَسْتَيْقِنَ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْكِتَابَ وَيَزْدَادَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِيمَانًا وَلَا يَرْتَابَ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْكِتَابَ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَلِيَقُولَ الَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ وَالْكَافِرُونَ مَاذَا أَرَادَ اللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلًا كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ اللَّهُ مَن يَشَاءُ وَيَهْدِي مَن يَشَاءُ وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ وَمَا هِيَ إِلَّا ذِكْرَى لِلْبَشَرِ
لِمَن شَاءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ
بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ امْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً
وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّا أَن يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ هُوَ أَهْلُ التَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ الْمَغْفِرَةِ

pivot.verse_ar: وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا سَقَرُ
pivot.center_logic_note: v.27 وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا سَقَرُ sits at geometric center (28.5) of 56-verse surah (offset -0.027). All five signals converge: theme (Saqar interrogated = structural center), lexical (ma_adraka device + سَقَرُ ×2 consecutive), mirror (unmirrored E center block vv.26-31), discourse (shift divine 1st-person v.26 → 2nd-person Prophet v.27 → impersonal v.28), prosody (سَقَرَ/سَقَرُ exact consecutive terminals). The broader Saqar unit vv.26-31 straddles the center with midpoint 28.5 = geometric center exactly.
pivot.notes: 56-verse surah. Block map: A(1-7)↔A'(49-56) / B(8-10)↔B'(38-48) / C(11-17)↔C'(32-37) / D(18-25)↔D'(49-53) / center E(26-31). يَا أَيُّهَا vocative opening — unique in sequence. [-ur]×7 imperative zone. قَدَّرَ ×3 consecutive exact (vv.18-20) — dataset max. [-ar]×19 zone (vv.18-36) — surah-length proportional maximum. لِلْبَشَرِ ×3 within zone. سَقَرُ 3-stage naming arc. Criminals' confession ×4 causes. At-Takwir shared oath objects (moon/night/dawn). ثُمَّ ×5 sustained chain. كَلَّا ×4 distributed. ش-و-ء ×5 arc.

ya_ayyuha_prophetic_opening.note: Only surah in sequence opening with يَا أَيُّهَا addressed to the Prophet directly. In all other uses of يَا أَيُّهَا in the sequence (Q.84 v.6, Q.82 v.6), it addresses al-Insan after a cosmic chain. Here the Prophet is addressed before any cosmic event or oath — the surah's argument opens with the person, not the cosmos.

imperative_ur_zone_x7.note: Seven consecutive [-ur] terminals all are imperative verb forms or imperfect with imperative voweling. The grammatical mood IS the rhyme. No other zone in sequence uses a single grammatical mood (imperative) as the terminal class across 7 consecutive verses. The command sounds like a command.

qaddara_x3_consecutive_terminal.note: قَدَّرَ exact terminal word ×3 consecutive — highest consecutive exact terminal repetition in analyzed sequence. Previous max was ×2 (multiple instances: Q.82, Q.75, Q.78). The deliberation condemned through its own name repeated three times. The ثُمَّ escalation at v.20 means each verse adds weight while the terminal stays identical.

ar_zone_x19_proportional_maximum.note: [-ar] zone spans 19 consecutive verses crossing: deliberation narrative / divine curse ×2 / ثُمَّ chain / opponent's speech / Saqar named+interrogated+described / nineteen angels / oath unit / apodosis. Proportionally the most dominant single zone in the sequence for a surah of this length. The surah's most complex argument — from human deliberation to divine punishment to cosmic oath — all in one terminal sound.

saqar_three_stage_naming_arc.v27: وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا سَقَرُ — divine interrogation of Prophet
saqar_three_stage_naming_arc.v42: مَا سَلَكَكُمْ فِي سَقَرَ — righteous asking the condemned
saqar_three_stage_naming_arc.note: Three-stage arc: punishment named → interrogated → re-named by criminals. Three distinct discourse modes (divine 1st-person / divine interrogation of Prophet / righteous asking condemned) spanning 16 verses. No other punishment name in the sequence follows this three-stage arc. The same word crosses three relational contexts.

lilbashari_x3_within_zone.v25: الْبَشَرِ — denier's accusation (the word of a human)
lilbashari_x3_within_zone.note: الْبَشَرِ root ×4 at terminal; ×3 exact within the [-ar] zone (vv.29/31/36). The البَشَر who called the Quran human speech (v.25) is addressed three times as the Quran's intended recipient within the same terminal zone. The accusation ↔ the address.

causes: v43: لَمْ نَكُ مِنَ الْمُصَلِّينَ — we did not pray
v44: وَلَمْ نَكُ نُطْعِمُ الْمِسْكِينَ — did not feed the poor
v45: وَكُنَّا نَخُوضُ مَعَ الْخَائِضِينَ — engaged in vain discourse
v46: وَكُنَّا نُكَذِّبُ بِيَوْمِ الدِّينِ — denied the Day of Recompense
criminals_four_cause_confession.note: Most sustained self-confessional direct speech in analyzed sequence. No other condemned group speaks for four consecutive cause-verses in their own voice. The criminals testify against themselves; the fourth cause (denying the Day) bridges to the surah's opening declaration of the difficult Day (v.9).

thumma_x5_sustained_chain.note: ثُمَّ ×5 within a single narrative unit (vv.15-23), tracking the opponent's step-by-step rejection: desires more / then may he be destroyed / then considered / then frowned / then turned back. Most sustained ثُمَّ accumulation in a single narrative unit in the sequence.

at_takwir_shared_oath_objects.q74: vv.32-34: moon / night as it departs / morning as it brightens
at_takwir_shared_oath_objects.q81: vv.15-18: retreating stars / night closing in / dawn breathing
at_takwir_shared_oath_objects.note: Q.74 and Q.81 share three celestial-temporal oath objects in the same sequence (moon/night/dawn), the only two surahs in the sequence with this shared oath architecture. Q.81 adds stellar prefix; Q.74 is more compressed. The two surahs may represent the same original oath unit in different configurations.

kalla_x4_distributed.note: كَلَّا ×4 at structurally distributed positions: single condemnation / oath pivot / double closing. كَلَّا ×2 consecutive at vv.53-54 with بَلْ + كَلَّا pattern matching Q.75 v.20, Q.96 pattern. Confirms كَلَّا as structural separator across the surah's four major transitions.

sha_waw_hamza_x5_arc.note: ش-و-ء root ×5 distributed: Allah guides whom He wills ×2 (v.31) / whoever wills to proceed (v.37) / whoever wills will remember (v.55) / they will not remember except that Allah wills (v.56). Human will → divine will contrast arcs from the center (Saqar unit) to the surah's final verse. Compare Q.81 vv.28-29 exact construction فَمَنْ شَاءَ / وَمَا تَشَاءُونَ.

longest_verse_in_sequence.note: v.31 is the longest single verse in the analyzed sequence. It addresses four simultaneous audiences (disbelievers / People of Scripture / believers / hypocrites) within one verse. The divine We speaks through one verse to the entire spectrum of responses to the Quran.

[-ar]×19 proportional zone max. سَقَرُ 3-stage arc. لِلْبَشَرِ ×3 within zone. Criminals' 4-cause confession. At-Takwir shared oath objects. ثُمَّ ×5 chain. كَلَّا ×4 distributed. ش-و-ء ×5. Longest verse (v.31). 42 surahs / 125→135 patterns.

pivot.verse_ar: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا بَيَانَهُ / كَلَّا بَلْ تُحِبُّونَ الْعَاجِلَةَ
pivot.center_logic_note: v.19 closes the Quran recitation inset (vv.16-19) with divine guarantee بَيَانَهُ — zone 4 [-ahu] closes. v.20 opens with كَلَّا ×2 + بَلْ double correction, discourse shift from divine We → second-person plural, zone 5 [-ah] opens, moral diagnosis delivered. Seam midpoint 19.5; geometric center 20.5; norm offset -0.025. The Quran's preservation (vv.16-19) ↔ the human preference for the immediate world (vv.20-21) constitute the surah's structural hinge.

secondary_convergence.note: كَلَّا ×2 + بَلْ double correction + discourse shift to second-person plural — all five signals concentrate at v.20 specifically; v.19 closes with عَلَيْنَا ×2 divine guarantee. The seam is confirmed as vv.19-20.

pivot.notes: Compound seam vv.19-20. Mirror: A(1-6)↔A'(36-40) / B(3-6)↔B'(31-35) / C(7-10)↔H(26-30) / D(11-15)↔G(22-25) / E(16-19) Quran inset + F(20-21) kalla. أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنسَانُ exact frame (vv.3/36). إِلَى رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ exact ×2 (vv.12/30). الْقِيَامَةِ exact terminal frame (vv.1/6). نَاضِرَةٌ/نَاظِرَةٌ phonetically proximate pair (vv.22/23). [-āq] death zone ×5 (vv.26-30). 8 distinct terminal zones — most in sequence. أَوْلَى لَكَ فَأَوْلَى ×2 with ثُمَّ (vv.34/35). فَسَوَّى bridge (vv.4/38).

eight_zone_prosodic_architecture.note: 8 distinct terminal zones in 40 verses — highest zone count in analyzed sequence. Previous max: Abasa 5 zones/42 verses. One new zone approximately every 5 verses. The prosodic architecture is maximally varied while the closing block (vv.31-40) provides a 10-verse sustained alif maqsura zone.

qiyamah_exact_terminal_frame.v1: لَا أُقْسِمُ بِيَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ — oath swears by the Day
qiyamah_exact_terminal_frame.v6: يَسْأَلُ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ الْقِيَامَةِ — denier asks about the Day
qiyamah_exact_terminal_frame.note: الْقِيَامَةِ exact terminal ×2 frames the oath and the denier's question in the same word. The surah's title-word is its own terminal frame. Divine oath ↔ human denial bounded by the same terminal. No other surah in sequence frames an oath and a denial with the exact same terminal word.

la_uqsimu_doubled_consecutive.note: Oath formula لَا أُقْسِمُ repeated in consecutive verses with different oath objects (Day of Resurrection / reproaching soul). Only case in sequence where the oath formula itself repeats across consecutive verses. Compare Q.90 (single), Q.84 (single فَلَا أُقْسِمُ), Q.81 (single فَلَا أُقْسِمُ).

ayhsabu_linsan_exact_frame.v3: أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنسَانُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُ — does man think We will not assemble his bones
ayhsabu_linsan_exact_frame.v36: أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنسَانُ أَن يُتْرَكَ سُدًى — does man think he will be left neglected
ayhsabu_linsan_exact_frame.note: Exact interrogative phrase أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنسَانُ ×2 frames the surah's entire argument. Both challenge man's false assumption about his fate. The surah's argument is bounded by the same interrogative directed at the same subject — the space between them is the demonstration of the answer.

ila_rabbika_structural_bridge.v12: إِلَى رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ الْمُسْتَقَرُّ — permanence (accountability unit close)
ila_rabbika_structural_bridge.v30: إِلَى رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ الْمَسَاقُ — procession (death scene close)
ila_rabbika_structural_bridge.note: Near-verbatim phrase ×2 at the close of two structurally symmetric units (accountability vv.11-15 ↔ death scene vv.26-30). Same opening phrase; different closing noun. The divine destination declared at both structural close positions. Confirmed cross-surah bridge.

nadhira_nadhira_proximate_terminal_pair.note: Most phonetically proximate consecutive terminal pair in analyzed sequence. Differ only in ض/ظ — a single phoneme contrast often neutralized in recitation. The state of the blessed face (radiant) and its action (looking at the Lord) are phonetically fused. The visual quality of the blessed and the object of their gaze share one sound.

aq_death_zone_unified.note: Five-verse death scene unified by [-āq] terminal: collar bones (body anatomy) / who will cure (helplessness) / the separation (soul's departure) / leg wound about leg (body extremity) / procession to Lord (destination). Medical, relational, physical, eschatological — all in one terminal sound. No other zone in sequence spans such disparate registers in one terminal class.

ar_semantic_arc_three_verses.note: Three consecutive [-ar] terminals encoding the complete accountability argument: escape instinct / its denial / the only destination. The logical movement of the argument is prosodically indistinguishable. Flight → no refuge → permanence all share one sound.

quran_inset_at_geometric_center.note: Quran recitation unit (vv.16-19) with قُرْآنَهُ ×2 exact consecutive (vv.17/18) sits at the surah's geometric center. All four terminals carry the pronominal suffix referring to the Quran. The surah's argument about man and the Day is interrupted at its center by the divine guarantee of the Quran's preservation.

insan_x6_most_sustained_thread.note: الْإِنسَانُ ×6 across the surah — most sustained الْإِنسَانُ thread in analyzed sequence. Compare Abasa (×2), Al-Inshiqaq (×1). The subject of the surah is man himself named repeatedly as subject of challenge, desire, panic, accountability, self-witnessing, and final interrogation.

structure_summary.note: 40-verse surah. Pivot vv.19-20 (compound_seam, 5/5), norm -0.025. 8 distinct terminal zones — most in sequence. الْقِيَامَةِ exact terminal frame (vv.1/6). أَيَحْسَبُ الْإِنسَانُ exact frame (vv.3/36). إِلَى رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ×2 (vv.12/30). لَا أُقْسِمُ doubled consecutive. نَاضِرَةٌ/نَاظِرَةٌ proximate pair. الْمَفَرُّ/وَزَرَ/الْمُسْتَقَرُّ semantic arc. [-āq] death zone. فَسَوَّى bridge (vv.4/38). الْإِنسَانُ ×6. 41 surahs / 116→126 patterns.

verses.ar: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى الْإِنسَانِ حِينٌ مِّنَ الدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْئًا مَّذْكُورًا
إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَاهُ سَمِيعًا بَصِيرًا
إِنَّا هَدَيْنَاهُ السَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
إِنَّا أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَافِرِينَ سَلَاسِلَ وَأَغْلَالًا وَسَعِيرًا
إِنَّ الْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ اللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
يُوفُونَ بِالنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُ مُسْتَطِيرًا
وَيُطْعِمُونَ الطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَاءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
فَوَقَاهُمُ اللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ الْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّاهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
مُتَّكِئِينَ فِيهَا عَلَى الْأَرَائِكِ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَالُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِآنِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا
وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَانٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
عَالِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوا أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَاهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَاءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُمْ مَشْكُورًا
إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ تَنزِيلًا
فَاصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ آثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
وَمِنَ اللَّيْلِ فَاسْجُدْ لَهُ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ يُحِبُّونَ الْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَاءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَاهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَا أَسْرَهُمْ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَا أَمْثَالَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
إِنَّ هَٰذِهِ تَذْكِرَةٌ فَمَن شَاءَ اتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ سَبِيلًا
وَمَا تَشَاءُونَ إِلَّا أَن يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَاءُ فِي رَحْمَتِهِ وَالظَّالِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا

pivot.verse_ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَاءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُمْ مَشْكُورًا / إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ تَنزِيلًا
pivot.center_logic_note: v.22 closes the Paradise unit on three simultaneous seals: جَزَاءً ×2↓ (vv.9→22), ش-ك-ر ×3↓ (vv.3→9→22), and Zone 1 [-rā] close. v.23 opens the prophetic command unit with emphatic doubled إِنَّا نَحْنُ, Zone 2 [-īlā] open, and discourse shift from third-person Paradise description → second-person Prophet address. Seam midpoint 22.5; geometric center 16.0; norm offset +0.210. This is the surah's largest positive offset — reflecting the extreme structural asymmetry (22 Paradise verses vs. 9 command verses).

secondary_convergence.note: قَوَارِيرَا ×2 enjambment (vv.15-16): same word at terminal of v.15 and opening of v.16 — geometric center verse; minor convergence

pivot.notes: v.22/v.23 compound seam. Confirmed by: (1) جَزَاءً ×2 closes v.22 (antithetical: righteous refused it at v.9, God gives it at v.22); (2) ش-ك-ر ×3 arc seals at v.22 (شاكرًا v.3 → شُكورًا v.9 → مَشكورًا v.22); (3) Zone 1 [-rā] → Zone 2 [-īlā] prosodic break; (4) discourse shift third-person → Prophet direct address at v.23; (5) إِنَّا نَحْنُ emphatic doubled We = strongest divine self-identification in surah.

longest_paradise_unit_sequence.note: 18-verse continuous Paradise description — longest Paradise unit in analyzed sequence. Previous max: Q.83 vv.22-28 (7 verses), Q.88 vv.8-16 (9 verses). Q.76 dedicates 58% of its verses to Paradise. Contains the most structurally layered Paradise architecture: twin-cup device (kأس ×2) / twin-spring device (عَيْن ×2) / crystal-cup enjambment (قَوَارِيرَا ×2 vv.15-16) / righteous quoted speech (vv.9-10) / silver ×3 (vv.15/16/21).

qawariira_cross_verse_enjambment.v16: قَوَارِيرَا مِن فِضَّةٍ — opening of v.16 (crystal from silver)
qawariira_cross_verse_enjambment.note: Only case in analyzed sequence where the same word serves as both the terminal of one verse and the opening of the next. The crystal cups' visual/material quality (transparent as glass, made of silver) is encoded structurally in the enjambment. v.16 is the geometric center verse of the surah (center = 16.0). The crystal cups are both the surah's visual centerpiece and its geometric centerpiece.

twin_cup_twin_spring_architecture.cup1: كَأْسًا كَافُورًا (v.5) + عَيْنًا كافور (v.6) — first cup/spring pair
twin_cup_twin_spring_architecture.cup2: كَأْسًا زَنجَبِيلًا (v.17) + عَيْنًا سَلسَبِيلًا (v.18) — second cup/spring pair
twin_cup_twin_spring_architecture.note: Paradise unit contains two perfectly symmetrical cup/spring pairs: v.5-6 (Kafur cup → Kafur spring) and v.17-18 (ginger cup → Salsabeel spring). Both springs named; both cups identified by their mixture. The architectural symmetry of the Paradise drinks is unique in the sequence — no other Paradise unit duplicates a paired cup+spring device.

shkr_three_stage_arc.v3: شَاكِرًا — human choice (grateful or ungrateful at creation)
shkr_three_stage_arc.v9: شُكُورًا — righteous explicitly refuse it from others
shkr_three_stage_arc.v22: مَشكورًا — God declares their effort appreciated
shkr_three_stage_arc.note: ش-ك-ر root threads the surah in a three-stage arc: (1) gratitude as the human binary at creation; (2) gratitude refused from creation by the righteous in their quoted speech; (3) gratitude given to the righteous by God as their reward. The root moves from human choice → human self-denial → divine declaration. Unique three-stage arc in the sequence.

jazaan_antithetical_exact_terminal.v9: لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَاءً — righteous explicitly refuse reward from others
jazaan_antithetical_exact_terminal.v22: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَاءً — God declares this is their reward
jazaan_antithetical_exact_terminal.note: جَزَاءً ×2 exact terminal word at antithetical positions: the righteous say they want no جَزَاءً from humans (v.9) / God gives them جَزَاءً (v.22). The refusal of reward ↔ the divine bestowal of reward. Same device as مَآبًا ×2 (Q.78), الْمَأْوَى ×2 (Q.79), كُلُوا ×2 (Q.77) — antithetical exact-word device now confirmed in four consecutive surahs (Q.76-Q.79).

kafuran_exact_cross_zone_echo.v3: كَفُورًا — ungrateful named at creation binary (Zone 1 close)
kafuran_exact_cross_zone_echo.v24: كَفُورًا — ungrateful named at prophetic command (Zone 2 interior)
kafuran_exact_cross_zone_echo.note: كَفُورًا exact terminal ×2 bridging Zone 1 (vv.1-22) and Zone 2 (vv.23-29). The only exact terminal word echo across the zone boundary. The ungrateful is named at the establishment of the human binary (v.3) and again at the command to the Prophet not to obey them (v.24). The zone break that separates Paradise from prophethood is bridged by the exact word for ingratitude.

righteous_quoted_speech.v9: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَاءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
righteous_quoted_speech.v10: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
righteous_quoted_speech.note: The righteous speak in first-person plural — the only extended quoted speech by the righteous (not the condemned, not the divine) in any Paradise unit in the analyzed sequence. Their speech is self-abnegating (we want no reward; we fear God). The most intimate register in any Paradise unit. Both structural signals concentrated here: جَزَاءً ×1↑ (v.9) + شُكُورًا ×2↑ (v.9) + يَوْمًا ×2 (v.10).

wama_tashaauna_cross_surah_exact.v30: وَمَا تَشَاءُونَ إِلَّا أَن يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
wama_tashaauna_cross_surah_exact.Q81v29: وَمَا تَشَاءُونَ إِلَّا أَن يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ
wama_tashaauna_cross_surah_exact.note: وَمَا تَشَاءُونَ إِلَّا أَن يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ verbatim in Q.76:30 and Q.81:29 — only the closing divine attribute differs (عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا vs. رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ). The most exact cross-surah phrase match in the analyzed sequence (9 words verbatim). Both appear at the surah's sovereignty close — the divine will framing both surahs.

inna_nahnu_emphatic_doubled_we.v23: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ تَنزِيلًا
inna_nahnu_emphatic_doubled_we.note: The pivot verse opens with إِنَّا نَحْنُ — both the prefixed إِنَّا and the independent نَحْنُ — a doubled divine self-identification unique to Quran revelation announcements. The strongest divine assertion in the surah. The pivot opens not just with a discourse shift but with the most emphatic possible divine self-declaration.

hell_one_verse_paradise_eighteen.note: The surah's eschatological binary is structurally maximally asymmetric: 1 verse for Hell (v.4: chains, shackles, blaze) vs. 18 verses for Paradise (vv.5-22). The disbeliever's fate is dispatched in a single verse; the righteous reward is the surah's entire body. Contrast with Q.88 (6 Hell / 9 Paradise) and Q.83 (12 Hell-warning / 7 Paradise).

signal_table.verse_ar: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى الْإِنسَانِ حِينٌ مِّنَ الدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْئًا مَّذْكُورًا

signal_table.lexical_signal: إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا — binary established; شَاكِرًا ×1↑; كَفُورًا ×1↑
signal_table.discourse: إِنَّا divine We; third-person man as object

عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ اللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا

وَيُطْعِمُونَ الطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا

وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَالُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِآنِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا
signal_table.mirror_signal: C· crystal cups at GEOMETRIC CENTER (v.16)

عَالِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ وَحُلُّوا أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَاهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا

signal_table.lexical_signal: جَزَاءً ×2↓ antithetical close; مَشكورًا — ش-ك-ر ×3↓ arc seals; Zone 1 [-rā] CLOSES

إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ يُحِبُّونَ الْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَاءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا

Paradise ×18v (58%) + 1 Hell verse + 3-verse frame + 9-verse prophetic command. Zone 1 [-rā]×22 / Zone 2 [-īlā]×7 / Zone 3 [-īmā]×2. قَوَارِيرَا enjambment (vv.15-16 = geometric center). Twin cup/spring architecture. ش-ك-ر three-stage arc. جَزَاءً antithetical ×2. كَفُورًا cross-zone echo. وَمَا تَشَاءُونَ = Q.81:29 exact. 40 surahs / 110→117 patterns.
