pivot.verse_ar: أَحْيَاءً وَأَمْوَاتًا
pivot.center_logic_note: وَيْلٌ refrain ×10 is the primary structural spine governing the surah from v.15 onwards. The refrain divides the surah into units of varying length. The geometric center (25.5) falls within the earth evidence unit (vv.25-27), confirmed as the structural pivot between the paired creation/destruction blocks: human origin (vv.20-23) ↔ Hell fire (vv.29-33). v.26 (أَحْيَاءً وَأَمْوَاتًا — the living and the dead) sits at the surah's midpoint and encodes the earth's dual function as container of both life and death. Offset = (26-25.5)/50 = +0.010.
pivot.notes: Refrain-governed architecture. وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِلْمُكَذِّبِينَ verbatim ×10 at vv.15/19/24/28/34/37/40/45/47/49. Mirror: A(1-7)↔A'(48-50) / B(8-14)↔B'(35-39) / D(16-18)↔D'(41-44) / E(20-23)↔G(29-33) / F(25-27) earth center. كَذَٰلِكَ + divine We closing device ×2 (vv.18/44). Three parallel أَلَمْ evidence units (vv.16/20/25). كُلُوا imperative antithetical ×2 (vv.43/46). يَوْمُ الْفَصْلِ exact terminal ×2 consecutive (vv.13-14). Most compressed oath apodosis in sequence (1 verse). Cognate accusative oath zone ×3 (vv.2-4).

wayl_refrain_x10.note: Most sustained exact refrain in analyzed sequence. 10 verbatim repetitions. Governs macro-structure from v.15. Refrain is a complete sentence (not just a rhyme word) inserted as structural separator. Divides surah into units of 3/4/3/5/2/2/4/1/1 verses. Refrain's [-iːna] terminal shared by adjacent evidence units (vv.16-18 and v.44) — deniers/former peoples/criminals/righteous prosodically indistinguishable.

alamu_triple_evidence_structure.v16: أَلَمْ نُهْلِكِ الْأَوَّلِينَ — destruction of former peoples
alamu_triple_evidence_structure.v25: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ الْأَرْضَ — earth as container
alamu_triple_evidence_structure.note: أَلَمْ divine first-person plural interrogative ×3 as structural organizer — three consecutive evidence units each opened by the same challenge. Each followed by the refrain. Only case in sequence where أَلَمْ is used three consecutive times as structural separator. Compare An-Naba' أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ (single use at v.6).

kuluu_antithetical_imperative.v43: كُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا هَنِيئًا — righteous commanded to eat and drink in satisfaction
kuluu_antithetical_imperative.v46: كُلُوا وَتَمَتَّعُوا قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُمْ مُجْرِمُونَ — condemned given brief licence
kuluu_antithetical_imperative.note: Same imperative كُلُوا addresses both the righteous and the condemned in consecutive units. Command identical; register opposite. Compare الْمَأْوَى ×2 (Q.79) and مَآبًا ×2 (Q.78) — same-word antithetical device; here the antithesis is in the imperative verb form itself.

kadhalika_divine_we_closing.v18: كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِالْمُجْرِمِينَ — thus We deal with criminals (destruction close)
kadhalika_divine_we_closing.v44: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِي الْمُحْسِنِينَ — thus We reward the righteous (Paradise close)
kadhalika_divine_we_closing.note: كَذَٰلِكَ + divine We action verb closes both the destruction evidence unit and the Paradise unit. Only the verb (نَفْعَلُ/نَجْزِي) and human category (الْمُجْرِمِينَ/الْمُحْسِنِينَ) change. Device pairs destruction ↔ reward symmetrically.

fasli_exact_consecutive_terminal.v13: لِيَوْمِ الْفَصْلِ — for the Day of Judgement
fasli_exact_consecutive_terminal.v14: وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا يَوْمُ الْفَصْلِ — what is the Day of Judgement
fasli_exact_consecutive_terminal.note: يَوْمُ الْفَصْلِ exact terminal phrase ×2 consecutive (vv.13-14): Day named and then interrogated carry the same terminal. Compare يَوْمَ الدِّينِ ×3 in Q.82 (vv.15/17/18). Here ×2 consecutive with وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ interrogation between them. يَوْمُ الْفَصْلِ appears a third time at v.38 (هَٰذَا يَوْمُ الْفَصْلِ) bridging the cosmic chain to the central declaration.

most_compressed_oath_apodosis.note: Apodosis delivered in a single verse after 6 oath objects — most compressed oath→apodosis resolution in the sequence. Compare Q.81 (apodosis at v.14 after 13 verses), Q.79 (apodosis at v.6 after 5 verses), Q.85 (apodosis at v.10 after 8 verses).

refrain_terminal_shared_by_adjacent_unit.shared_vv16_18: الْأَوَّلِينَ / الْآخِرِينَ / بِالْمُجْرِمِينَ — 3 consecutive [-iːna] following v.15 refrain
refrain_terminal_shared_by_adjacent_unit.shared_v44: الْمُحْسِنِينَ — [-iːna] closes Paradise unit before v.45 refrain
refrain_terminal_shared_by_adjacent_unit.note: Refrain's [-iːna] terminal shared by adjacent evidence units. vv.15-19 = five consecutive [-iːna] terminals; the refrain and the destruction evidence unit are prosodically indistinguishable. v.44 (الْمُحْسِنِينَ) ↔ v.45 (لِلْمُكَذِّبِينَ): the righteous doers of good and the deniers are phonetically identical at the terminal in consecutive verses.

hell_description_most_varied_prosody.vv29_33: تُكَذِّبُونَ / شُعَبٍ / اللَّهَبِ / كَالْقَصْرِ / صُفْرٌ — 5 distinct terminals
hell_description_most_varied_prosody.note: Hell description (vv.29-33) is the most prosodically varied unit in the surah — five consecutive verses with five distinct non-repeating terminals. Opposite of the refrain's prosodic unity. Hell is phonetically fragmented.

open_close_unanswered_questions.v7: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَوَاقِعٌ — compressed declaration (not an answer)
open_close_unanswered_questions.v50: فَبِأَيِّ حَدِيثٍ بَعْدَهُ يُؤْمِنُونَ — rhetorical question with no answer
open_close_unanswered_questions.note: Surah opens with a compressed declaration (v.7) and closes with an unanswered rhetorical question (v.50). The only resolved verdicts are the refrain ×10. Structural parallel to Q.79 (withheld disclosure frame) and Q.78 (communal question → individual despair).

mursal_rusal_bridge.v11: وَإِذَا الرُّسُلُ أُقِّتَتْ — when the messengers' time comes
mursal_rusal_bridge.note: ر-س-ل root bridges oath open (v.1) to cosmic chain interior (v.11). The oath's first agent ↔ the cosmic chain's most charged element. The sent forces (anonymous, natural/angelic) ↔ the messengers (named, historical).

structure_summary.note: 50-verse surah. Pivot v.26 (refrain_governed_earth_center, 5/5), norm +0.010. وَيْلٌ ×10 is the structural spine. Earth unit (vv.25-27) at geometric center. Interior mirror: D↔D' / E↔G / B↔H. Three parallel أَلَمْ units. كَذَٰلِكَ closing device ×2. كُلُوا antithetical ×2. Most compressed oath apodosis. Cognate accusative oath zone ×3. New center_logic type: refrain_governed. 39 surahs / 105→112 patterns.

pivot.verse_ar: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًا
pivot.center_logic_note: Hell unit (vv.21-30) is the central block of the inverted ring. v.21 opens it at the geometric center (center=20.5, offset=+0.013). Mirror: A(1-5)↔A'(39-40) / B(6-16)↔B'(31-36) / C(17-20)↔C'(37-38) / X(21-30). Distribution 5+11+4+10+6+2+2. Pivot confirmed by مَآبًا ×2 (vv.22/39), جَزَاءً ×2 (vv.26/36), كِذَّابًا ×2 (vv.28/35), حِسَابًا ×2 (vv.27/36).
pivot.notes: كَلَّا double warning (vv.4-5) functions as structural hinge before evidence unit — escalating challenge not a center pivot. Primary axis: Hell unit (vv.21-30) as central block. Tanwīn [-an]×35 (vv.6-40) = longest terminal zone in sequence. Four internal exact terminal pairs within zone. سَيَعْلَمُونَ verbatim ×2 consecutive. مَآبًا ×2 antithetical (vv.22/39). Longest Hell unit (10v).

longest_terminal_zone_sequence.note: Longest terminal zone in analyzed sequence. Previous max: Q.81 [-at]×14. Spans creation / eschatological transition / Hell / Paradise / divine sovereignty / closing — 6 thematic units without prosodic break.

four_internal_exact_terminal_pairs.note: Highest count of internal exact terminal pairs within a single zone in sequence. All four antithetical/symmetric in meaning, phonetically identical.

sayalamuna_verbatim_consecutive.note: Only full-verb verbatim consecutive terminal pair in sequence. Escalation in ثُمَّ framing; terminal phonetically unchanged.

binary_prosodic_architecture.note: Strictest binary terminal architecture in sequence. Questioners prosodically separated from the content they questioned.

athim_isolate.note: The great news (v.2) is the only [-iːm] terminal in the surah, set between two [-uːna] questioner verses. Subject of surah prosodically isolated from the debaters.

maaaban_antithetical_terminal.v39: اتَّخَذَ إِلَى رَبِّهِ مَآبًا — Lord (voluntary return)
maaaban_antithetical_terminal.note: Same device as Q.79 الْمَأْوَى ×2: single word as terminal for both eschatological destinations. Pattern confirmed in consecutive surahs Q.79/Q.78.

communal_to_individual_speech_arc.note: Communal question (v.1) → individual wish for non-existence (v.40). Arc: debate → regret.

longest_hell_unit.note: 10-verse sustained condemnation block — longest Hell unit in analyzed sequence.

rahman_basmala_frame.note: الرَّحْمَٰن of Basmala frames surah's penultimate unit (vv.37-38) where it appears ×2 consecutive.

thematic_seam_without_prosodic_break.note: Creation evidence (أَلْفَافًا) → Day declared (مِيقَاتًا) with no terminal class change. Provision and Judgment sound identical.

structure_summary.note: 40-verse surah. Pivot v.21 (5/5, hell_unit_center_block), norm +0.013. Distribution 5+11+4+10+6+2+2. tanwīn [-an]×35 = longest terminal zone in sequence. Four internal exact terminal pairs. سَيَعْلَمُونَ verbatim ×2. مَآبًا ×2 antithetical. Longest Hell unit (10v). Binary prosodic architecture. Communal→individual speech arc.

verses.ar: إِذْ نَادَاهُ رَبُّهُ بِالْوَادِ الْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَى أَن تَزَكَّى
إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَى
أَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ السَّمَاءُ بَنَاهَا
وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِ وَنَهَى النَّفْسَ عَنِ الْهَوَى
كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَهَا لَمْ يَلْبَثُوا إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوْ ضُحَاهَا

pivot.verse_ar: إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَى / أَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ السَّمَاءُ بَنَاهَا
pivot.center_logic_note: Compound seam at vv.26-27: v.26 closes Moses narrative (lesson marker; يَخْشَى ×2 closes zone 3; إِنَّ emphatic; ذَٰلِكَ distal demonstrative); v.27 opens creation challenge (second-person plural; new rhetorical register; zone 4 opens). Geometric center 23.5; seam midpoint 26.5; offset +0.065. Mirror structure 5+9+12+7+8+5 with Moses narrative (vv.15-26) and creation unit (vv.27-33) as central paired blocks.

secondary_convergence.note: Creation unit close: exact verbatim phrase = Q.80 v.32 at identical structural position; prosodic break [-um] isolated; discourse shift to second-person plural لَكُمْ; immediately precedes فَإِذَا جَاءَتِ at v.34; creation → eschatological transition. Five independent signals.

pivot.notes: Inverted ring structure. Pivot seam vv.26-27 confirmed by: (a) يَخْشَى ×2 closes zone 3 at v.26; (b) zone 3 [-a]×12 → zone 4 [-aha]×6 prosodic break at v.27; (c) discourse shift from third-person lesson declaration (v.26) to second-person rhetorical challenge (v.27); (d) thematic shift narrative→creation; (e) structural seam of the mirror's central paired blocks. طَغَى ×2 (vv.17/37) bridges narrative↔verdict. الْكُبْرَى ×2 (vv.20/34) bridges narrative climax↔calamity opening. ضُحَاهَا ×2 (vv.29/46) longest exact terminal bridge in sequence (17 verses). الْمَأْوَى ×2 exact antithetical terminal (vv.39/41) — more extreme than نَعِيمٍ/جَحِيمٍ. Third nested discourse layers vv.16-19 deepest in sequence. مَتَاعًا لَكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَامِكُمْ exact cross-surah phrase = Q.80 v.32.

cognate_accusative_oath_zone.vv1_5: النَّاشِطَاتِ نَشْطًا / السَّابِحَاتِ سَبْحًا / السَّابِقَاتِ سَبْقًا — cognate ×3 consecutive
cognate_accusative_oath_zone.note: Densest مَفْعُول مُطْلَق (cognate accusative) concentration in sequence. Three consecutive oath objects (vv.2-4) pair their participle with its own root as masdar terminal. The oath objects echo their own roots at the terminal. Zone 1 tanwīn masdar zone (vv.1-5) [-an]×5.

dual_alif_maqsura_zones.zone3: vv.15-26: [-a]×12 — Moses narrative; longest alif maqsura zone for a narrative unit in sequence
dual_alif_maqsura_zones.note: Two alif maqsura zones of near-equal length (12+13) within the same surah, separated by creation unit (zone 4 [-aha]×6 + break). Moses narrative and eschatological close prosodically twinned. No other surah in sequence produces two alif maqsura zones of comparable length.

duha_cross_zone_bridge.v29: ضُحَاهَا — the sky's extracted brightness (zone 4, creation)
duha_cross_zone_bridge.v46: ضُحَاهَا — the morning of the Day they see the Hour (zone 5, close)
duha_cross_zone_bridge.note: Exact terminal word ×2 separated by 17 verses and two thematic zones. Longest-span exact terminal bridge in the sequence. Sky's daytime light ↔ final morning of human reckoning.

mawa_exact_antithetical_terminal.v39: فَإِنَّ الْجَحِيمَ هِيَ الْمَأْوَى — Hell is the refuge
mawa_exact_antithetical_terminal.v41: فَإِنَّ الْجَنَّةَ هِيَ الْمَأْوَى — Paradise is the refuge
mawa_exact_antithetical_terminal.note: Both binary verdict outcomes close with the exact same word الْمَأْوَى. More extreme than Q.82 نَعِيمٍ/جَحِيمٍ (which share terminal pattern not the same word): here a single lexeme serves as terminal for both destinations. The two outcomes are phonetically identical and differ only in what precedes.

kubra_cross_zone_bridge.v20: الْكُبْرَى — the greatest sign shown to Pharaoh (zone 3, Moses narrative climax)
kubra_cross_zone_bridge.v34: الطَّامَّةُ الْكُبْرَى — the greatest Overwhelming Calamity (zone 5, eschatological opening)
kubra_cross_zone_bridge.note: الْكُبْرَى ×2 bridges the narrative's climax (v.20) and the eschatological unit's opening (v.34) across 14 verses. The superlative marks both the historical exemplar's peak and the eschatological consequence. Also functions as cross-zone signal bridging zones 3 and 5.

three_nested_discourse_layers.v17: God commands Moses: go to Pharaoh (God → Moses → Pharaoh, layer 2)
three_nested_discourse_layers.v18_19: God commands Moses to speak to Pharaoh (layer 3: فَقُلْ)
three_nested_discourse_layers.note: Three simultaneous discourse layers: (1) divine narrator reporting; (2) God to Moses directly; (3) Moses commanded to speak to Pharaoh. Deepest discourse nesting confirmed in sequence.

withheld_disclosure_frame.opening: vv.1-5: oath chain; apodosis withheld across 5 verses; delivered only at v.6
withheld_disclosure_frame.closing: vv.42-46: Hour asked; knowledge withheld from Prophet; finality with Lord alone (v.44)
withheld_disclosure_frame.note: Surah opens and closes on withheld disclosure. Both the oath's apodosis and the Hour's timing are structurally withheld. The surah's frame is organized around the suspension of knowledge.

mataan_lakum_exact_phrase.v33: مَتَاعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَامِكُمْ — exact verbatim phrase = Q.80 v.32
mataan_lakum_exact_phrase.position: creation unit close, immediately preceding فَإِذَا جَاءَتِ الطَّامَّةُ الْكُبْرَى
mataan_lakum_exact_phrase.note: Exact word-for-word phrase at identical structural position in Q.79 and Q.80: both close the creation/provision enumeration unit and are immediately followed by the eschatological rupture verse (فَإِذَا جَاءَتِ). Longest confirmed verbatim cross-surah phrase in sequence and only confirmed case of a full phrase as architectural position marker across two surahs.

taha_taha_structural_seam.v17: طَغَى — Pharaoh has transgressed (narrative open, zone 3)
taha_taha_structural_seam.v37: فَأَمَّا مَن طَغَى — the one who transgressed (verdict open, zone 5)
taha_taha_structural_seam.note: طَغَى ×2 at structurally symmetric positions: opens the Moses narrative's mission and opens the eschatological binary verdict. The historical transgressor (Pharaoh) ↔ the eschatological category (all transgressors). Root bridges zones 3 and 5.

yaksha_triple_thread.v19: فَتَخْشَى — Pharaoh invited to fear his Lord (zone 3, narrative open)
yaksha_triple_thread.v26: لِّمَن يَخْشَى — warning for whoever fears (zone 3, narrative close)
yaksha_triple_thread.v45: مَن يَخْشَاهَا — warner for those who fear the Hour (zone 5, surah close)
yaksha_triple_thread.note: خ-ش-ي ×3 at distributed positions. Root frames the Moses narrative internally (vv.19/26) and then recurs at the surah's closing verse. Fear-of-God vocabulary threads narrative → surah close. Exact terminal word ×2 within zone 3 (vv.19/26) = intra-zone internal frame (compare يَزَّكَّى ×2 in Q.80).

structure_summary.note: 46-verse surah. Pivot seam vv.26-27 (compound_seam_narrative_to_creation), 5/5, norm +0.065. Distribution 5+9+12+7+8+5. Dominant feature: dual alif maqsura zones (12+13v) prosodically twin the Moses narrative and eschatological close. ضُحَاهَا ×2 (vv.29/46) longest-span exact terminal bridge (17v). الْمَأْوَى ×2 exact antithetical terminal at vv.39/41. مَتَاعًا لَكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَامِكُمْ exact cross-surah phrase = Q.80 v.32. Deepest discourse nesting (3 layers vv.16-19). Withheld disclosure frame (oath + Hour). الْكُبْرَى ×2 bridges narrative↔calamity.

verses.ar: لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ شَأْنٌ يُغْنِيهِ

pivot.verse_ar: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقْضِ مَا أَمَرَهُ
pivot.center_logic_note: Single primary 5/5 at v.23. كَلَّا ×2 in surah (vv.11/23): v.11 pivots rebuke→Quran authentication; v.23 is the geometric/structural center (geometric center 21.5; offset +0.036). الْإِنسَانُ ×2 (vv.17/24) flanks v.23 symmetrically. Two grammar-generated rhyme zones of equal length ([-ahu]×7 vv.17–23 / [-an]×7 vv.25–31) flank the pivot. شَاءَ ×2 (vv.12/22) at symmetric positions. Distribution: 10+6+6+1+9+5+5.
pivot.notes: كَلَّا lَمَّا يَقْضِ مَا أَمَرَهُ — sole corrective verse; man's failure declared at geometric center. Pivot confirmed by: (a) [-ahu] zone closes on أَمَرَهُ at v.23; (b) الْإِنسَانُ ×2 symmetrically flanks (vv.17/24); (c) theme shift from creation chain to food contemplation; (d) فَلْيَنظُرِ jussive consequence at v.24; (e) كَلَّا heuristic — 7th confirmed case. Third-person Prophet opening unique in sequence.

third_person_prophet_opening.note: Surah opens in third-person narration about the Prophet's action before the Prophet is addressed. No other surah in sequence opens this way. Pivot to direct second-person rebuke at v.3 (وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ).

dual_seven_verse_grammar_zones.zone3: vv.17–23: [-ahu]×7 — masculine object suffix; divine action on man (He created him / He destined him / He will resurrect him)
dual_seven_verse_grammar_zones.zone4: vv.25–31: [-an]×7 — indefinite tanwīn; food produce enumeration
dual_seven_verse_grammar_zones.note: Two adjacent grammar-generated rhyme zones of identical length (7v each) flank the كَلَّا pivot at v.23. Zone 3 grammar: 'He acted on him.' Zone 4 grammar: the unnamed produce items. Only case in sequence where two grammar-generated zones of equal length bracket the structural pivot.

yazzakka_internal_zone_frame.v3: يَزَّكَّى — perhaps he would purify (binary partition opens)
yazzakka_internal_zone_frame.v7: يَزَّكَّى — not your blame if he will not purify (binary partition closes)
yazzakka_internal_zone_frame.note: Exact terminal word ×2 within a single prosodic zone ([-a] zone 1, vv.1–10). Opens and closes the أَمَّا/وَأَمَّا binary partition. Prior exact terminal repetitions in dataset (مَسْرُورًا Q.84, يَضْحَكُونَ Q.83, يَنظُرُونَ Q.83, مَرْقُومٌ Q.83) all cross unit boundaries; this is the first case confined within a single zone as an internal frame.

saakha_isolated_terminal.v33: الصَّاخَّةُ [-ah] — isolated terminal between zone 4 ([-an]) and [-ihi] family unit
saakha_isolated_terminal.note: The Deafening Blast stands as a phonetically isolated terminal — the only [-ah] form not connected to zone 2 or zone 5. The event triggering eschatological rupture belongs to neither the provision world nor the judgment world prosodically.

ihi_possessive_severance_zone.note: Four-verse family severance unit unified by third-person masculine possessive suffix. The grammar of possessive belonging marks the very relationships that will be severed on the Day. Compare zone 3 ([-ahu]×7) where the object suffix tracked divine action on man — here the possessive suffix tracks man's severance from kin.

wujuh_yawmaidhin_binary_verdict.v40: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌ — dusty faces
wujuh_yawmaidhin_binary_verdict.note: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ ×2 at consecutive binary verdict positions. Exact construction as Q.88 vv.2/8. Both the condemned and the saved are placed in the same terminal zone ([-ah]×5). The surah closes with الْفَجَرَةُ in the same morphological form as مُسْفِرَةٌ.

sha_waw_hamza_structural_thread.v22: شَاءَ — when He wills He will resurrect
sha_waw_hamza_structural_thread.note: ش-و-ء ×2 at structurally symmetric positions flanking v.23. Human will (v.12) ↔ divine will (v.22). Identical structural device as Q.81 vv.28–29 where the root closes the surah; here it marks the two positions flanking the pivot.

kalla_double_pivot.v11: كَلَّا إِنَّهَا تَذْكِرَةٌ — pivots rebuke→Quran authentication
kalla_double_pivot.v23: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقْضِ مَا أَمَرَهُ — pivots ingratitude→food contemplation; geometric center
kalla_double_pivot.note: Two كَلَّا instances at two distinct structural pivots. v.11: zone 1 [-a] ends, zone 2 [-ah] opens. v.23: zone 3 [-ahu] closes on pivot, zone 4 [-an] opens at v.25 via [-ihi] bridge. Each كَلَّا marks both a thematic and prosodic transition.

five_prosodic_zones.note: Five distinct zones with three isolated/bridge terminals. All zone transitions coincide with confirmed thematic and discourse shifts. Highest zone density for a surah of this length.

structure_summary.note: 42-verse surah. Pivot v.23 (كَلَّا lَمَّا يَقْضِ مَا أَمَرَهُ), 5/5, norm +0.036. Distribution 10+6+6+1+9+5+5. Unique: third-person Prophet opening; dual seven-verse grammar zones flanking pivot; يَزَّكَّى exact terminal ×2 within single zone; الصَّاخَّةُ phonetically isolated; [-ihi] possessive zone for severance. الْإِنسَانُ ×2 flanks pivot symmetrically. شَاءَ ×2 at symmetric positions (vv.12/22). وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ ×2 mirrors Q.88.

verses.ar: ذِي قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِي الْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
وَمَا تَشَاءُونَ إِلَّا أَن يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ

pivot.verse_ar: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّا أَحْضَرَت ۞ فَلَا أُقْسِمُ بِالْخُنَّسِ
pivot.center_logic_note: Compound seam primary (vv.14–15, 5/5): v.14 closes the 13-verse إِذَا chain with نَفْسٌ apodosis (ن-ف-س bridge seals from v.7); v.15 opens the oath with فَلَا أُقْسِمُ AND [-at] zone breaks after 14 consecutive verses. Geometric center 15; seam midpoint 14.5; offset −0.017. Secondary 5/5 at v.26 (isolated challenge — فَأَيْنَ تَذْهَبُونَ, most direct address, [-uːna] isolated break). Novel: apodosis remains within [-at] zone (unique in sequence — Q.82 and Q.84 break the zone at apodosis).

secondary_convergence.note: Isolated challenge verse 5/5. فَأَيْنَ تَذْهَبُونَ — sole interrogative in surah; most direct address; فَ consequence of defense unit. Theme (defense→challenge)+Mirror (structural pivot single-verse)+Discourse (فَ consequence; تَذْهَبُونَ 2nd-person plural — most direct address in surah)+Lexical (فَأَيْنَ sole interrogative construction)+Prosodic ([-uːna] isolated; breaks from [-iːn] zone 4; sounds unlike all preceding terminals).

Central defense unit stated as structural center in Pass 3 (distribution 13+1+4+3+4+1+3). وَمَا ×3 + وَلَقَدْ ×1 alternating negation-affirmation pattern; صَاحِبُكُمْ — first direct 2nd-person plural address; [-uːn] at v.22 as sole /uː/ intrusion in zone 4 (madness sounds different from noble attributes). 4/5 only — no rhyme zone break across the unit.

pivot.notes: Compound seam vv.14–15: v.14 = عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَا أَحْضَرَت — apodosis resolves 13-verse إِذَا chain; ن-ف-س bridge closes (v.7 نُفُوس↑ → v.14 نَفْسٌ↓); apodosis stays within [-at] zone (unique — in Q.82 and Q.84 the apodosis breaks the zone). v.15 = فَلَا أُقْسِمُ بِالْخُنَّسِ — divine first-person enters; [-at] zone ends after 14 consecutive verses (longest in sequence); oath opens on [-is]. Cross-surah: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ ×2 (Q.81/Q.82); فَلَا أُقْسِمُ ×3 (Q.81/Q.84/Q.90).

longest_idha_chain.note: Thirteen consecutive إِذَا conditional verses before apodosis at v.14. Previous maximum in sequence: five verses (Q.84 vv.1–5, Q.82 vv.1–4). More than double the next longest instance. Spans cosmic/animal/human/judicial/eschatological domains in a single unbroken suspension.

longest_at_zone.note: Fourteen consecutive passive perfect feminine [-at] terminals (vv.1–14). All previous [-at] zones in sequence are 5 verses or fewer (Q.84, Q.82). The apodosis (أَحْضَرَت v.14) continues the zone — unique in sequence: Q.82 and Q.84 break the [-at] zone at the apodosis. The rupture and its consequence are phonetically indistinguishable.

apodosis_within_at_zone.note: In Q.84 (v.6) and Q.82 (v.5), the apodosis breaks the [-at] zone — a new terminal opens when the cosmic chain resolves. In Q.81 uniquely, the apodosis verse (v.14: أَحْضَرَت) continues the [-at] terminal without break. The cosmic rupture and the individual soul's knowledge are placed in the same phonetic zone.

binary_oath_prosodic_architecture.note: Four oath objects divide into two phonetically distinct pairs: stellar [-is]×2 ↔ temporal [-as]×2. The oath unit has its own internal binary prosodic structure. Only oath unit in sequence where objects are organized into two phonetically separated pairs.

alamin_terminal_inclusio.v29: وَمَا تَشَاءُونَ إِلَّا أَن يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ
alamin_terminal_inclusio.note: الْعَالَمِينَ exact terminal ×2 at vv.27/29 frames the closing unit as terminal inclusio. v.28 يَسْتَقِيمَ [-iːma] is near-exact medial term. Three-verse closing terminal frame unique in sequence. Reminder to the worlds (v.27) ↔ Lord of the worlds (v.29): scope and sovereignty share the same terminal.

karim_rajim_antithetical_zone_frame.note: Zone 4 (vv.19–25) opens with كَرِيمٍ and closes with رَجِيمٍ — maximally opposed in meaning, near-identical in sound ([-iːm]). Most semantically opposed terminal pair within a single zone in sequence. Compare نَعِيمٍ/جَحِيمٍ (Q.82 vv.13–14) which are consecutive rather than zone-framing.

mawuuda_judicial_center.v8: وَإِذَا الْمَوْءُودَةُ سُئِلَت — buried girl questioned
mawuuda_judicial_center.v9: بِأَيِّ ذَنبٍ قُتِلَت — for what sin was she killed
mawuuda_judicial_center.note: Two-verse judicial scene (vv.8–9) within the 13-verse cosmic chain. Only instance in sequence where a specific human victim is named and interrogated within a cosmic dissolution chain. Vv.8–9 sit at the midpoint of the 13-verse chain. قُتِلَت (v.9): the passive 'she was killed' carries the same grammar (passive — something was done to her) as the cosmic events; she was killed sounds like the sea was set aflame.

three_tier_decreasing_architecture.note: Three tiers of decreasing length (14→11→4). Surah weight is front-loaded in 14-verse opening block. No other surah in sequence produces this decreasing-tier architecture.

alima_nafsu_cross_surah.note: Exact phrase عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ in both Q.81 and Q.82 marks the transition from cosmic dissolution chain to individual accountability. Most consistent cross-surah structural signal for this device in sequence. Q.84 uses يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ as the equivalent pivot after its [-at] zone.

sha_waw_hamza_closing.v29: تَشَاءُونَ / يَشَاءَ — you do not will / except Allah wills
sha_waw_hamza_closing.note: ش-و-ء root ×3 within two closing verses (vv.28–29). Human will ↔ divine will threaded simultaneously with الْعَالَمِينَ terminal inclusio. The surah closes on both a lexical thread (ش-و-ء) and a terminal frame (الْعَالَمِينَ ×2) simultaneously.

structure_summary.note: 29-verse surah. Pivot vv.14–15 (5/5, compound_seam_apodosis_to_oath), norm −0.017. Unique: apodosis within [-at] zone (unlike Q.82/Q.84). Longest إِذَا chain (13v) and [-at] zone (14v) in sequence. Secondary 5/5 at v.26 (isolated challenge). Binary oath prosodic architecture ([-is]×2/[-as]×2). كَرِيمٍ↔رَجِيمٍ antithetical zone frame (vv.19/25). الْعَالَمِينَ three-verse closing terminal inclusio. عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ cross-surah signal (Q.81/Q.82). Three-tier decreasing architecture (14+11+4). مَوْءُودَة judicial scene at chain midpoint (vv.8–9).

pivot.verse_ar: كَلَّا بَلْ تُكَذِّبُونَ بِالدِّينِ
pivot.notes: Geometric and functional center; كَلَّا sole adversative; بِالدِّين axis term linking to يَوْمُ الدِّين chain at close; singular Insan → plural تُكَذِّبُونَ; rhyme break [-iːn]; كَلَّا phonetic stop
pivot.center_logic_note: three independent 5/5 zones confirmed: v.6 (reversal pivot — إِذَا), v.9 (center of three pivots, كَلَّا), v.19 (eschatological declaration, يَوْمَ). Primary is v.9 by convergence score and widest inclusio span. Only surah in dataset where the structural logic is genuinely tripartite rather than resolved at a single center.

secondary_convergence.note: Frame A close, 5/5. يَوْمَ الدِّينِ exact ×3 (vv.15/17/18) — phrase named in condemnation then interrogated ×2 consecutively. ثُمَّ وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ (v.18): sole consecutive double وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ with ثُمَّ escalation in sequence — escalation encodes incomprehensibility of the answer. v.19: نَفْسٌ inclusio closes (vv.5/19), لِلَّهِ [-ah] unique terminal, absolute divine sovereignty declared. Theme (condemnation close→Day interrogated→sovereignty)+Mirror (frame A close; day argued throughout)+Discourse (وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ 2nd-person vv.17–18→impersonal divine v.19)+Lexical (يَوْمَ الدِّينِ ×3; نَفْسٌ ×2 bridge seals)+Prosodic (الدِّينِ [-iːn]×2 consecutive v.17–18; لِلَّهِ [-ah] unique close phonetically marks divine sovereignty).

Binary verdict couplet 3/5. إِنَّ الْأَبْرَارَ / وَإِنَّ الْفُجَّارَ symmetric. نَعِيمٍ/جَحِيمٍ [-iːm] exact terminal ×2 consecutive antithetical pair — most phonetically compressed binary verdict in sequence; pleasure/Hellfire phonetically indistinguishable. [-iːm] echoes الْكَرِيمِ (v.6): divine Generous sounds like both outcomes. Lexical+Mirror+Prosodic only.

three_pivot_architecture.note: First surah in dataset long enough to produce multiple high-confidence pivot points. Three verses independently register 5-signal convergence.

pivots.label: Protasis/apodosis seam
pivots.notes: إِذَا chain resolves; نَفْسٌ inclusio opens; soul confronts record; [-arat] zone closes; discourse suspension resolves

pivots.label: Center pivot — كَلَّا
pivots.notes: Geometric and functional center; كَلَّا sole adversative; بِالدِّين first occurrence — axis term; singular→plural discourse shift; rhyme break

pivots.label: Terminal resolution
pivots.notes: نَفْسٌ inclusio closes; يَوْمُ الدِّين chain resolves; لِلَّهِ sole divine name in terminal position; [-aːh] unique close; absolute sovereignty declared

lexical_axis.progression: بِالدِّين denied v.9 → يَوْمُ الدِّين approaching vv.15–18 → يَوْمَئِذٍ لِلَّهِ declared v.19

nafs_frame.note: Soul confronts its record (v.5) ↔ soul cannot aid another (v.19). Frames the surah's entire consequence structure.

boundaries.label: إِذَا cosmic unit
boundaries.notes: Four consecutive إِذَا clauses; four passive verb terminals; [-arat/-irat] sustained; absent after v.4

boundaries.label: Apodosis
boundaries.notes: Resolves إِذَا chain; نَفْسٌ inclusio opens; [-arat] closes; 5-signal pivot

boundaries.label: Human address unit
boundaries.notes: يَا أَيُّهَا الإِنسَان direct vocative; creation triad خَلَق/عَدَل/سَوَّى; most prosodically disrupted zone (three distinct terminals)

boundaries.label: Recording angels unit
boundaries.notes: وَإِنَّ assertion; حَافِظِين / كَاتِبِين angel pair; مَا تَفْعَلُون concatenation to v.5

boundaries.label: Binary verdict
boundaries.notes: إِنَّ ×2; أَبْرَار / فُجَّار antithesis; نَعِيم / جَحِيم phonetic pair

boundaries.label: يَوْمُ الدِّين terminal chain
boundaries.notes: يَوْمُ الدِّين ×4; verbatim duplication vv.17–18; نَفْسٌ closes; [-aːh] isolated terminal

verbatim_repetition_vv17_18.note: Exact verbatim repetition of full verse — second instance of verbatim verse-duplication in dataset (first: Q.109 vv.3/5). Both are self-confirming across lexical and prosodic passes. Q.82 duplication is consecutive (vv.17–18); Q.109 duplication was non-adjacent (vv.3/5).

nafs_inclusio.note: Widest inclusio span in dataset. Every previous inclusio operated across full surah length (3–7 verses). Q.82 نَفْسٌ spans 14 verses — soul accountability is the structural envelope of the entire consequence section.

din_lexical_axis.note: الدِّين root connects center pivot to terminal cluster. Denied at v.9 → named as approaching at vv.15–18 → resolved as Allah's alone at v.19. First dataset instance of a lexical axis spanning three structural zones.

kalla_pivot.note: Sole adversative in surah; geminated لّ; abrupt phonetic stop quality. Marks the structural seam between the human-address unit (vv.6–8) and the oversight unit (vv.10–12). No equivalent pivot-marking particle in any other surah in dataset.

idha_fourfold_chain.note: Four consecutive إِذَا clauses — longer fourfold suspension than Q.106 (which used a single لِ across 2 verses). The إِذَا chain is the most sustained syntactic suspension in dataset.

lam_terminal_close.note: Surah closes on divine name alone; [-aːh] terminal is unique in surah; breaks the [-iːn] chain of vv.15–18. Parallel to Q.108 where الأَبْتَرُ/الكَوْثَرَ closed an envelope — here لِلَّهِ closes the entire 19-verse structure with a name, not a description.

naim_jahim_antithetical_terminal.v13: إِنَّ الْأَبْرَارَ لَفِي نَعِيمٍ — righteous in pleasure
naim_jahim_antithetical_terminal.v14: وَإِنَّ الْفُجَّارَ لَفِي جَحِيمٍ — wicked in Hellfire
naim_jahim_antithetical_terminal.note: Most phonetically compressed binary verdict in sequence. نَعِيمٍ and جَحِيمٍ share exact terminal [-iːm] and morphological form (indefinite tanwīn). Pleasure and Hellfire are phonetically indistinguishable at the terminal — the moral difference is encoded entirely in semantics. [-iːm] also at v.6 الْكَرِيمِ: the divine Generous sounds like both outcomes, framing the stakes of the challenge.

yawm_al_din_triple_close.v15: يَصْلَوْنَهَا يَوْمَ الدِّينِ — first use: condemnation
yawm_al_din_triple_close.v17: وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا يَوْمُ الدِّينِ — second use: interrogated
yawm_al_din_triple_close.v18: ثُمَّ مَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا يَوْمُ الدِّينِ — third use: re-interrogated with ثُمَّ
yawm_al_din_triple_close.note: يَوْمَ الدِّينِ exact phrase ×3 in surah's final five verses. Introduced in condemnation then subjected to consecutive double وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ interrogation. ثُمَّ escalation unique in sequence: first interrogative is insufficient; the ثُمَّ repeats because the question cannot be answered by the first asking.

consecutive_wama_adraka_thumma.v18: ثُمَّ مَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا يَوْمُ الدِّينِ
consecutive_wama_adraka_thumma.note: Sole consecutive double وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ in the sequence — vv.17–18 are back-to-back with no intervening verse. All other double deployments (Q.83 vv.8/19, Q.101 vv.3/10) are separated by intervening verses. ثُمَّ escalation marks not a new topic but a deepening of the same unanswerable question.

parallels: إِذَا السَّمَاءُ + passive perfect opening verb (Q.82: انفَطَرَت; Q.84: انشَقَّت)
نَفْسٌ as apodosis subject (Q.82 v.5: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ; Q.84 v.6: implied through يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ)
يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ as direct address immediately following [-at] zone (both v.6)
فَ creation chain in challenge unit (Q.82 v.7: خَلَقَكَ فَسَوَّاكَ فَعَدَلَكَ; Q.84 vv.7–8: فَأَمَّا مَنْ / وَأَمَّا مَنْ)
al_infitar_inshiqaq_twin_architecture.note: Five confirmed structural parallels — highest cross-surah correspondence in sequence. Both surahs share cosmic rupture device, individual soul resolution, universal human address, and divine creation challenge. Differences encode distinct arguments: Q.82 challenges through divine generosity (الْكَرِيمِ); Q.84 challenges through labor toward the Lord (كَادِحٌ إِلَى رَبِّكَ). Shared architecture frames distinct theological emphases.

sawwa_fa_creation_chain.Q.82_v7: الَّذِي خَلَقَكَ فَسَوَّاكَ فَعَدَلَكَ — second-person direct creation address
sawwa_fa_creation_chain.Q.87_v2: الَّذِي خَلَقَ فَسَوَّى — third-person creation description
sawwa_fa_creation_chain.Q.91_v7: وَنَفْسٍ وَمَا سَوَّاهَا — creation oath in cosmic series
sawwa_fa_creation_chain.note: Root س-و-ي in فَ creation chain across three surahs (Q.82/Q.87/Q.91). In Q.82 and Q.87 it appears in the divine creation enumeration addressed to/describing mankind. In Q.91 it appears at the structural pivot position (v.7) bridging creation and destruction mirror. The root threads the creation-challenge vocabulary across Q.91–Q.82 window.

structure_summary.note: First surah in dataset producing three independent 5-signal pivots. Ring structure: cosmic frame (vv.1–4) ↔ Day defined (vv.17–19); soul record (v.5) ↔ souls sorted (vv.13–16); creation known (vv.6–8) ↔ deeds recorded (vv.10–12); كَلَّا at center (v.9). الدِّين axis: denied at pivot → approaching at vv.15–18 → sovereign at v.19.

verses.ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ الْكَرِيمِ
فِي أَيِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَاءَ رَكَّبَكَ
ثُمَّ مَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا يَوْمُ الدِّينِ
يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْئًا وَالْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِلَّهِ
الَّذِينَ إِذَا اكْتَالُوا عَلَى النَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ الْفُجَّارِ لَفِي سِجِّينٍ
وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
إِذَا تُتْلَى عَلَيْهِ آيَاتُنَا قَالَ أَسَاطِيرُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
كَلَّا بَلْ رَانَ عَلَى قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ
كَلَّا إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَذَا الَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِ تُكَذِّبُونَ
كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ الْأَبْرَارِ لَفِي عِلِّيِّينَ
خِتَامُهُ مِسْكٌ وَفِي ذَلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ الْمُتَنَافِسُونَ
إِنَّ الَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا كَانُوا مِنَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا يَضْحَكُونَ
وَإِذَا انقَلَبُوا إِلَى أَهْلِهِمُ انقَلَبُوا فَكِهِينَ

فَالْيَوْمَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مِنَ الْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
هَلْ ثُوِّبَ الْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا يَفْعَلُونَ

pivot.verse_ar: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَذَا الَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِ تُكَذِّبُونَ ۞ كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ الْأَبْرَارِ لَفِي عِلِّيِّينَ
pivot.center_logic_note: Compound seam primary (vv.17–18, 5/5): denial closes / righteous record opens. Competing 5/5 at vv.34–35 (eschatological reversal with يَضْحَكُونَ and يَنظُرُونَ exact terminal bridges). Additionally vv.7–9/18–21 score 5/5 as distal block pair (most explicitly mirrored unit pair in sequence). Primary confirmed by geometric center (36v center = 18.5; seam midpoint 17.5 is nearest).

secondary_convergence.note: Competing 5/5. Eschatological reversal: فَالْيَوْمَ temporal pivot (v.34) + يَضْحَكُونَ exact ×2 antithetical (vv.29/34) + عَلَى الْأَرَائِكِ يَنظُرُونَ exact ×2 (vv.23/35). Theme (past mockery → reversal declared)+Mirror (frame A close; opening crime answered)+Discourse (فَالْيَوْمَ consequence; الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا as new laughing subject — precise inversion of v.29)+Lexical (يَضْحَكُونَ exact antithetical; يَنظُرُونَ exact phrase bridge)+Prosodic (يَضْحَكُونَ [-uːna] exact ×2; يَنظُرُونَ [-uːna] exact ×2; reversal phonetically invisible — same terminal, different subject). Secondary: vv.17–18 hold geometric center and كَلَّا ×4 heuristic.

Distal block pair 5/5 (not pivot candidate). Most explicitly mirrored unit pair in sequence — three independent verbatim bridges: (i) كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ opens both (vv.7/18) exact syntactic form; (ii) وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ exact ×2 (vv.8/19); (iii) كِتَابٌ مَرْقُومٌ exact ×2 (vv.9/20). 'Illiyyūn unit asymmetrically extends by v.21 (brought-near witnesses): condemned record merely filed ↔ righteous record has a privileged audience. Structural boundary pair, not competing pivot.
Distal phrase bridge 3/5. عَلَى الْأَرَائِكِ يَنظُرُونَ exact ×2: righteous in paradise (v.23) ↔ believers at eschatological triumph (v.35) share identical posture. Lexical+Mirror+Prosodic only.

pivot.notes: Compound seam vv.17–18: v.17 closes condemnation unit with هَذَا الَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِ تُكَذِّبُونَ (the condemned's denial as their final word); v.18 opens righteous record with كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ الْأَبْرَارِ — the most structurally loaded كَلَّا in the surah (×4, compared to كَلَّا ×1 at v.7 / ×2–3 at vv.14–15). كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ at v.18 is exact syntactic mirror of كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ at v.7. ك-ذ-ب root ×4 terminals across the condemnation unit (vv.10–17) — the unit opened and closed by the denial root. Geometric center 18.5v; seam midpoint 17.5; offset −1; norm −0.028.

four_exact_terminal_repetitions.a: سِجِّينٍ/سِجِّينٌ (vv.7/8) — interrogated name ×2 consecutive; exact root terminal
four_exact_terminal_repetitions.b: كِتَابٌ مَرْقُومٌ (vv.9/20) — exact phrase ×2 at symmetric positions; both records equated
four_exact_terminal_repetitions.c: عَلَى الْأَرَائِكِ يَنظُرُونَ (vv.23/35) — exact phrase ×2; observing posture frozen across reward and reversal
four_exact_terminal_repetitions.d: يَضْحَكُونَ (vv.29/34) — exact word ×2 antithetical; laughter transferred between subjects in identical sound
four_exact_terminal_repetitions.note: Highest count of exact terminal word/phrase repetitions in sequence. Previous high: two (Q.84: وَحُقَّت ×2 and مَسْرُورًا ×2; Q.88: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ ×2). Binary oscillation rhyme system makes zone-based separation impossible, so exact terminal repetition at strategic positions becomes the primary structural device.

binary_record_architecture.sijjin_unit: vv.7–9: كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ الْفُجَّارِ / وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا سِجِّينٌ / كِتَابٌ مَرْقُومٌ
binary_record_architecture.illiyyun_unit: vv.18–21: كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ الْأَبْرَارِ / وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ / كِتَابٌ مَرْقُومٌ / يَشْهَدُهُ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ
binary_record_architecture.note: Most explicitly mirrored block pair in sequence: three independent verbatim bridges confirm the mirror (syntactic opener / وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ / كِتَابٌ مَرْقُومٌ). Asymmetric extension: 'illiyyūn unit adds v.21 (the brought-near witnesses). مَرْقُومٌ equation: records are of the same type. Asymmetric extension: righteous record has an audience the condemned's lacks.

laughter_inversion.v29: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا كَانُوا مِنَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا يَضْحَكُونَ — criminals laughed AT believers
laughter_inversion.v34: فَالْيَوْمَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مِنَ الْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ — believers laugh AT disbelievers
laughter_inversion.note: Near-identical syntactic structure with subjects and objects precisely inverted. يَضْحَكُونَ terminal unchanged — laughter sounds identical; only direction reverses. Surah's central moral argument delivered in a syntactic mirror at the terminal position. عَلَى الْأَرَائِكِ يَنظُرُونَ (vv.23/35) extends the reversal into posture: the paradise observing posture becomes the eschatological triumph posture.

wayl_double_verdict_frame.v1: وَيْلٌ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ — present undated verdict; commercial fraud
wayl_double_verdict_frame.v10: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ — eschatological dated verdict; theological denial
wayl_double_verdict_frame.note: Only surah in sequence to open with وَيْلٌ. The verdict returns eschatologically at v.10. Structural argument: the cheater who defrauds others is the same person who denies the Day of Recompense — commercial fraud and theological denial diagnosed as a single failure of moral accountability. وَيْلٌ v.1 is undated (present); وَيْلٌ v.10 is يَوْمَئِذٍ (that Day). Present condemnation → eschatological condemnation using identical word.

binary_oscillation_rhyme_system.note: Al-Muṭaffifīn is the first surah in sequence to operate on persistent binary terminal oscillation rather than zone-based architecture. [-iːna/-uːna] (plural suffix) and [-iːm/-iːn/-uːm] (singular noun) alternate throughout without producing sustained zones of more than two consecutive verses in the same terminal. Structural argument carried entirely by exact terminal-word repetitions at strategic positions rather than terminal zone separation. Densest structural repetition system in sequence.

muqarrabun_internal_inclusio.v21: يَشْهَدُهُ الْمُقَرَّبُونَ — the brought-near witness the righteous record
muqarrabun_internal_inclusio.v28: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا الْمُقَرَّبُونَ — the brought-near drink from Tasneem
muqarrabun_internal_inclusio.note: الْمُقَرَّبُونَ exact ×2 frames the entire reward unit (vv.22–27) as internal inclusio. Compare Q.84's وَحُقَّت internal inclusio (vv.2/5) and Q.83's الْمُقَرَّبُونَ — both use terminal-position exact repetition within a single unit as a bracketing device.

PIVOT SEAM — v.17 denial closes / v.18 كَلَّا ×4 opens righteous record; exact syntactic mirror of v.7

structure_summary.note: 36-verse inverted (6+3+8+4+7+8). Pivot vv.17–18 (5/5, compound_seam_denial_to_righteous_record), norm −0.028. Competing 5/5 at vv.34–35 (لaughter inversion). Distal block pair vv.7–9/18–21 (5/5): most explicitly mirrored unit pair in sequence (three verbatim bridges: كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ / وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ / كِتَابٌ مَرْقُومٌ). Binary oscillation rhyme system: no zone-based architecture; structural argument in exact terminal repetitions (four — highest in sequence). وَيْلٌ double verdict frame (present v.1 ↔ eschatological v.10): sole surah opening on societal crime verdict. الْمُقَرَّبُونَ internal inclusio frames reward unit (vv.21/28). ك-ذ-ب ×4 frames condemnation unit (vv.10/17). كَلَّا ×4 at v.18 — most structurally loaded instance of كَلَّا in dataset.

pivot.center_logic_note: Three-verse diagnostic unit primary (vv.13–15, 5/5) + competing 5/5 at v.6 (يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ universal address, cosmic-to-human pivot); primary confirmed by geometric center (v.13 = center of 25) and رَبّ four-unit thread closing at v.15. Additionally vv.1–5/16–19 score 5/5 as a distal structural frame pair, but function as boundary rather than pivot.

secondary_convergence.note: Competing 5/5 candidate. Theme (cosmic events → direct universal human address) + Mirror (structural hinge: cosmic events of vv.1–5 resolve into human consequence; rabb thread vv.2/5→v.6) + Discourse (يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ sole vocative in surah; إِنَّكَ second-person; most direct register) + Lexical (رَبِّكَ — رَبّ thread; كَادِحٌ/كَدْحًا intra-verse root doubling; فَمُلَاقِيهِ declares the destination) + Prosodic ([-iːhi] break; [-at] passive zone ends; pronoun suffix opens; cosmic→human shift audible). Secondary: vv.13–15 hold geometric center and contain the only interiority unit plus رَبّ thread terminus.

Frame pair: cosmic submission unit (vv.1–5) ↔ oath unit (vv.16–19) both scoring 5/5 as distal structural pair. Theme+Mirror (both cosmic phenomenon units flanking human record and diagnosis)+Discourse ([-at] passive impersonal ↔ فَلَا أُقْسِمُ divine first-person; oath upgrades the impersonal cosmic)+Lexical (إِذَا ×3: vv.1/3 in cosmic ↔ v.18 in oath; same temporal construction links both cosmic zones)+Prosodic ([-at] passive perfect zone vv.1–5 ↔ [-aq] oath zone vv.16–19; both grammar-generated rhyme zones). Structural boundary pair, not a pivot candidate.

Indictment zone. Lexical ([-uːna] ×4; four verbs of persistent disbelief in imperfect plural — grammar of ongoing action = rhyme)+Discourse (فَمَا interrogative v.20 → بَلِ declarative v.22 → وَاللَّهُ omniscience v.23; three consecutive modes across four verses)+Prosodic (most sustained single-terminal zone in surah's second half). 3/5.

pivot.notes: Three-verse diagnostic unit vv.13–15: v.13 diagnoses past happiness (إِنَّهُ كَانَ فِي أَهْلِهِ مَسْرُورًا — antithetical bridge from v.9 مَسْرُورًا seals here), v.14 enters the condemned's cognitive state (إِنَّهُ ظَنَّ أَنْ لَنْ يَحُورَ — sole verse in surah entering a character's belief state), v.15 delivers بَلَى correction + رَبّ thread closure (بَلَى إِنَّ رَبَّهُ كَانَ بِهِ بَصِيرًا — yes, his Lord was ever Seeing). بَلَى is the surah's theological hinge. رَبّ root ×4 thread (vv.2/5/6/15): longest single-root structural spine in dataset, surpassing ش-ه-د ×3 (Q.85) and ذ-ك-ر ×3 (Q.87). Geometric center v.13, unit midpoint v.14, offset +1, norm +0.040.

huqqat_internal_inclusio.v2: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّت — sky responds to its Lord
huqqat_internal_inclusio.v5: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّت — earth responds to its Lord
huqqat_internal_inclusio.note: Verbatim phrase ×2 at terminal positions of vv.2 and 5. Only case in sequence where a full phrase is repeated verbatim as a terminal within a single unit, functioning as an internal inclusio bracketing the two cosmic objects. Terminal repetition simultaneously marks the unit boundary AND confirms the structural parallel between sky and earth.

masrura_antithetical_bridge.v9: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَى أَهْلِهِ مَسْرُورًا — righteous returns to his people in happiness (future)
masrura_antithetical_bridge.v13: إِنَّهُ كَانَ فِي أَهْلِهِ مَسْرُورًا — condemned had been among his people in happiness (past)
masrura_antithetical_bridge.note: Only case in sequence where an identical lexical word (not merely a root or morphological form) appears at the terminal position of two structurally opposed verses deployed antithetically. Righteous man's future happiness ↔ condemned man's past happiness are phonetically and lexically indistinguishable. The surah encodes its moral argument in sound identity: same word, opposite meanings across the structural boundary. فِي أَهْلِهِ near-verbatim phrase extends the bridge: household context shared, only tense (future↔past) and trajectory differ.

rabb_four_unit_thread.v2_v5: رَبِّهَا — sky and earth responding to their Lord (cosmic obedience)
rabb_four_unit_thread.v6: رَبِّكَ — mankind laboring toward their Lord (human accountability)
rabb_four_unit_thread.v15: رَبَّهُ — his Lord was Seeing him (divine omniscience/correction)
rabb_four_unit_thread.note: Root ر-ب-ب across four structural positions spanning three distinct units: cosmic obedience → human accountability → divine surveillance. Theological spine: the رَبّ who commands sky and earth to submit is the same رَبّ who has always been Seeing the one who thought he would escape. Longest single-root structural spine in dataset (four positions), surpassing ش-ه-د ×3 (Q.85) and ذ-ك-ر ×3 (Q.87). بَلَى at v.15 is the correction that seals the thread.

grammar_as_rhyme_three_zones.note: Most concentrated grammar-as-rhyme system in sequence — three zones where terminal morphology encodes the thematic argument. Zone 1: passive = compelled submission. Zone 3: imperfect = ongoing refusal. Both morphological rhyme zones are thematically opposed: cosmic entities passively submit ↔ humans actively and persistently refuse.

fa_amma_wa_amma_partition.v7: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ بِيَمِينِهِ — right-hand record (positive)
fa_amma_wa_amma_partition.v10: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِيَ كِتَابَهُ وَرَاءَ ظَهْرِهِ — left-hand record (negative)

Compare Al-Qari'ah vv.6–9 which uses the same device in the wider corpus.

structure_summary.note: 25-verse inverted structure (5+1+6+3+4+2+3+1). Pivot vv.13–15 (5/5, diagnostic_center_bala_correction), norm +0.040. Competing 5/5 at v.6 (يَا أَيُّهَا الْإِنسَانُ — third distributed_convergence case where primary and secondary are co-equal on signals). رَبّ root ×4 four-unit thread: longest structural spine in dataset. مَسْرُورًا exact full-word terminal antithesis (vv.9/13): unique in sequence. وَحُقَّت verbatim internal inclusio (vv.2/5): unique in sequence. Grammar-as-rhyme across three zones ([-at] passive / [-aq] oath / [-uːna] imperfect plural): most concentrated in sequence. فَأَمَّا/وَأَمَّا binary partition. بَلَى/بَلِ correction arc spans oath unit (v.15→v.22). وَاللَّهُ closes both disbelief-adjacent units (v.23 أَعْلَمُ). Isolated punishment/reward terminals share nasal /-n/ at close.

secondary_convergence.note: Competing 5/5 candidate. Theme (believers' crime → divine sovereignty declared) + Mirror (narrative capstone; ش-ه-د three-unit thread closes at شَهِيدٌ; وَاللَّهُ شَهِيدٌ structurally echoes وَاللَّهُ مُحِيطٌ v.20) + Discourse (وَاللَّهُ + divine attribute — divine name as subject; most authoritative declaration in narrative block) + Lexical (ش-ه-د ×3 thread closes; الَّذِي مُلْكُ السَّمَاوَاتِ) + Prosodic ([-iːd] ×2 closes; /uː/→/iː/ shift from v.8 consolidated; شَهِيدٌ shares terminal with الْحَمِيدِ making divine Witness and Praise phonetically fused). 5/5 — secondary because vv.10–11 occupy the geometric center and carry the surah's complete moral partition.

مَجِيد ×2 — confirmed cross-unit bridge. Lexical (sole verbatim root pair spanning divine attribute and Quranic close; الْمَجِيدُ divine Throne v.15 ↔ قُرْآنٌ مَجِيدٌ v.21) + Mirror (inner mirror C close ↔ frame A close; Quran inherits divine attribute) + Discourse (v.21 بَلْ + هُوَ; Quran as subject; authentication mode) + Prosodic (same terminal [-iːd], different grammatical state: definite divine title ↔ indefinite Quranic predicate). 4/5.

ش-ه-د three-terminal thread. Lexical (root at three distinct terminal positions: مَشْهُودٍ v.3 / شُهُودٌ v.7 / شَهِيدٌ v.9 — only root spanning three terminal positions in one surah in dataset) + Mirror (oath frame → narrative moral inversion → narrative capstone; complete witnessing arc) + Prosodic (vowel within root shifts /uː/→/iː/ exactly as the surah's dominant /d/ system shifts; the root encodes the surah's structural vowel alternation). 3/5.

pivot.notes: Compound seam vv.10–11: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ ×2 exact consecutive phrase (sole verbatim consecutive phrase pair in surah); v.10 condemns torturers to Hell and Burning Fire, v.11 rewards believers with gardens — the surah's complete eschatological partition in two verses. Each carries a phonetically isolated terminal ([-iːq] / [-iːr]): Hell and Paradise individualized at the verdict. Geometric center = v.11.5, seam midpoint = 10.5, offset −1, norm −0.045 (slight early lean). Two competing 5/5 candidates: vv.10–11 confirmed primary (geometric center + complete moral partition); v.9 secondary (narrative capstone, ش-ه-د thread closes).
pivot.center_logic_note: compound_seam primary (vv.10–11) + competing 5/5 at v.9 (narrative capstone, ش-ه-د closes); primary confirmed by geometric center.

d_consonant_vowel_alternation_system.note: Only surah in sequence where a single terminal consonant dominates more than half the text (18/22 verses) while its vowel alternates as structural device. /uː/ consistently carries human/historical/narrative content; /iː/ consistently carries divine attribute and Quranic authority content. The /d/ consonant functions as the surah's sonic spine; its vowel encodes the thematic register. Structurally distinct from uniform-terminal surahs (Q.87/Q.91/Q.92) and distinct-zone surahs (Q.88/Q.90/Q.86).

shad_three_terminal_thread.v3: مَشْهُودٍ — the oath's third object; what is witnessed; embedded in oath
shad_three_terminal_thread.v7: شُهُودٌ — persecutors as witnesses to their own atrocity; moral inversion
shad_three_terminal_thread.v9: شَهِيدٌ — Allah as Witness over all things; divine capstone
shad_three_terminal_thread.vowel_arc: /uː/ (vv.3/7) → /iː/ (v.9): the root's internal vowel shift tracks the surah's dominant /uː/→/iː/ alternation
shad_three_terminal_thread.note: Complete witnessing arc: cosmic oath object (what is witnessed) → human moral inversion (oppressors as witnesses) → divine sovereignty (Allah the Witness). Most semantically complete three-position root thread in sequence — each occurrence advances the argument rather than echoing prior use. Only root appearing at three distinct terminal positions in a single surah in this sequence.

majid_divine_quran_bridge.v15: ذُو الْعَرْشِ الْمَجِيدُ — Owner of the Throne, the Majestic (definite divine title)
majid_divine_quran_bridge.v21: بَلْ هُوَ قُرْآنٌ مَجِيدٌ — but this is an honored Quran (indefinite predicate)
majid_divine_quran_bridge.grammatical_shift: الْمَجِيدُ (definite — the attribute belongs to God) → مَجِيدٌ (indefinite — the Quran participates in it)
majid_divine_quran_bridge.note: Only case in sequence where a divine attribute root reappears as a descriptor of the Quran within the same surah. The Quran is made مَجِيد by the same attribute that makes the Throne مَجِيد. Grammatical shift (definite→indefinite) marks the transfer: the root passes from the divine realm to the Quranic realm. Cross-unit bridge: divine attribute unit (v.15) ↔ Quranic authentication close (v.21).

hal_ataka_cross_surah.v17: هَلْ أَتَاكَ حَدِيثُ الْجُنُودِ — has the story of the armies reached you
hal_ataka_cross_surah.q88_v1: هَلْ أَتَاكَ حَدِيثُ الْغَاشِيَةِ — has the story of the Overwhelming reached you (Al-Ghashiyah v.1)
hal_ataka_cross_surah.placement_q85: v.17 — opens second historical reference block after divine attribute unit
hal_ataka_cross_surah.note: Identical construction هَلْ أَتَاكَ حَدِيثُ at structurally significant positions in both surahs. In both cases introduces a report of historical punishment. Third confirmed cross-surah syntactic construction in sequence after وَلَسَوْفَ يَرْضَى (Q.92/Q.93) and بَلْ + plural indictment (Q.87/Q.89).

inna_alladhina_binary_verdict.v10: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا — torturers condemned to Hell and Burning Fire
inna_alladhina_binary_verdict.v11: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا — believers rewarded with gardens
inna_alladhina_binary_verdict.note: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ ×2 exact consecutive — sole verbatim consecutive phrase pair in surah. The binary eschatological verdict delivered in maximum syntactic symmetry: identical opening phrase, antithetical content. The torturers and the believers enter eschatology through the same grammatical door.

dual_bal_close.v19: بَلِ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا فِي تَكْذِيبٍ — but those who disbelieve are in denial
dual_bal_close.v21: بَلْ هُوَ قُرْآنٌ مَجِيدٌ — but this is an honored Quran
dual_bal_close.note: Two consecutive بَلْ adversatives closing the surah across four verses (vv.19–22). Disbelief declared (v.19) → divine encompassing (v.20) → Quranic authentication (v.21) → Preserved Slate (v.22). The first بَلْ pivots from historical evidence to present denial; the second pivots from denial to the Quran's indestructible authority. Unique dual-adversative closing device in dataset.

verses.ar: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌ
فَمَا لَهُ مِن قُوَّةٍ وَلَا نَاصِرٍ

pivot.verse_ar: يَوْمَ تُبْلَى السَّرَائِرُ ۞ فَمَا لَهُ مِن قُوَّةٍ وَلَا نَاصِرٍ

secondary_convergence.note: وَالسَّمَاءِ exact verbatim at oath-opening of both units (v.1 / v.11). Strongest frame signal in surah. Lexical (verbatim inclusio at oath positions) + mirror (frame A open/close, two oath units anchored by identical noun at identical grammatical position) + discourse (waw al-qasam returns at v.11; same impersonal oath register) + prosodic (الرَّجْعِ at v.11 carries ر-ج-ع bridge from v.8 resurrection declaration; /-ʕ/ zone opens at v.11). 4/5.

كَيْد ×3 across vv.15–16 (densest root concentration in dataset: 3 occurrences in 2 verses); م-ه-ل intra-verse doubling at v.17. Lexical (masdar doubling يَكِيدُونَ كَيْدًا / أَكِيدُ كَيْدًا; الْكَافِرِين named) + discourse (three consecutive discourse states: إِنَّهُمْ third-person opponents → وَأَكِيدُ divine singular first-person → فَمَهِّلِ Prophet imperative) + prosodic ([-ayda] ×3 exact-then-near-exact spanning vv.15–17; human/divine plan phonetically indistinguishable at terminal). 4/5.

ر-ج-ع confirmed cross-unit root bridge: رَجْعِهِ (v.8, human resurrection) ↔ الرَّجْعِ (v.11, sky returns rain). Only case in sequence where oath object carries same root as preceding unit's doctrinal pivot. Lexical + mirror (resurrection/Day unit flanked by two oath units; bridge confirms structural relationship) + prosodic ([-ir] zone ends at v.10; [-ajʕ] opens at v.11; root straddles exact terminal-zone boundary). 3/5.

pivot.notes: Compound seam vv.9–10: v.9 declares Day of secrets tried (يَوْمَ تُبْلَى السَّرَائِرُ — temporal yawm clause, passive, impersonal eschatological), v.10 declares negated human resources on that Day (فَمَا لَهُ مِن قُوَّةٍ وَلَا نَاصِرٍ — sole negated human resource pair in surah). السَّرَائِرُ sole occurrence in surah. فَمَا negation at v.10 is surah's only negated consequence declaration. [-ir] ×3 zone (vv.8–10) seals resurrection assertion and Day consequence in single terminal zone. Geometric center = v.9 (=(17+1)/2). Seam midpoint 9.5, offset +0.029 (slight late lean). Sole unmirrored central unit: no other unit narrates the Day of secrets. Bridges creation/resurrection argument (vv.5–8) to second oath's Quranic authority (vv.11–14).
pivot.center_logic_note: compound_seam primary (vv.9–10, 5/5); max secondary 4/5 (وَالسَّمَاءِ inclusio at vv.1/11). Single resolved compound center.

dual_oath_architecture.oath_1: vv.1–3 — sky and night comer sworn; وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ interrogative within oath unit before apodosis; resolves to universal guardian (v.4)
dual_oath_architecture.oath_2: vv.11–12 — sky that returns rain + earth that cracks; resolves to Quranic authority (v.13)
dual_oath_architecture.lexical_anchor: وَالسَّمَاءِ exact repeat at both oath openings (v.1 / v.11) — only confirmed verbatim cross-unit inclusio at oath-opening positions in dataset
dual_oath_architecture.note: First surah in sequence with two distinct oath units separated by a central argument block. The sky is sworn by twice, each time in service of a different declaration: cosmic guardianship (v.4) → Quranic authority (v.13). The ر-ج-ع root bridge (vv.8/11) creates an analogical link: divine ability to resurrect humans (v.8) is grounded in the sky's observable return of rain (v.11) — the oath object of unit 2 echoes the doctrinal pivot of unit 1.

rajac_cross_unit_bridge.v8: إِنَّهُ عَلَى رَجْعِهِ لَقَادِرٌ — He is able to return him [to life]
rajac_cross_unit_bridge.v11: وَالسَّمَاءِ ذَاتِ الرَّجْعِ — the sky that returns [rain]
rajac_cross_unit_bridge.note: Root ر-ج-ع bridges the creation/resurrection unit and the second oath unit. Human resurrection (v.8) ↔ sky's cyclical return of rain (v.11): same root, analogical argument. Only case in sequence where an oath object carries the same root as the preceding unit's doctrinal pivot. Bridge straddles exact terminal-zone boundary: [-ir] ends at v.10, [-ajʕ] opens at v.11.

ma_adraka_within_oath_unit.v2: وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ مَا الطَّارِقُ — and what will make you know what the night comer is
ma_adraka_within_oath_unit.placement: within oath unit before apodosis — oath object immediately interrogated after introduction, before resolution delivered
ma_adraka_within_oath_unit.contrast: In Q.101 vv.3/10 and Q.82 vv.17–18 the construction appears as post-pivot interrogative or at structural boundary. In Q.86 v.2 it interrupts the oath chain itself — only case in sequence where وَمَا أَدْرَاكَ precedes rather than follows the structural pivot.

kayd_masdar_doubling_close.v15: إِنَّهُمْ يَكِيدُونَ كَيْدًا — they plan a plan
kayd_masdar_doubling_close.v16: وَأَكِيدُ كَيْدًا — and I plan a plan
kayd_masdar_doubling_close.root_count: ك-ي-د ×3 across two verses — densest root concentration in fewest verses of any surah in dataset
kayd_masdar_doubling_close.terminal_identity: كَيْدًا / كَيْدًا / رُوَيْدًا — human plan / divine plan / closing command share [-ayda] terminal zone; human and divine plan phonetically indistinguishable at terminal level, distinguished only by subject pronoun هُمْ→أَنَا
kayd_masdar_doubling_close.note: Compare Q.99 زُلْزِلَتِ/زِلْزَالَهَا and Q.100 العَادِيَات/ضَبْحًا: both use root concentration at structural peaks. Q.86's كَيْد ×3 is the densest concentration per verse in dataset.

zones.note: oath object pair; exact verbatim consecutive terminal
definition + apodosis + origin unit; phonetically diverse central section; no sustained zone
resurrection assertion + Day consequence; sole 3-verse zone post-center
second oath objects; pharyngeal consonant marks both cosmic phenomena
Quran declaration pair; فَصْل↔هَزْل antithetical near-rhyme
counter-plan couplet + closing command; م-ه-ل intra-verse doubling at v.17

rhyme_architecture.note: Most fragmented rhyme architecture in dataset: 5 zones of 2–3 verses with phonetically diverse central section (vv.3–7). Each zone corresponds precisely to a thematic unit. Sole surah in sequence where the central section (5 verses) is phonetically diverse with no sustained terminal pattern.

verses.ar: إِلَّا مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ إِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ الْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَى
ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَى

pivot.verse_ar: فَذَكِّرْ إِن نَّفَعَتِ الذِّكْرَى ۞ سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخْشَى

secondary_convergence.note: اسْمَ رَبِّكَ/اسْمَ رَبِّهِ near-verbatim inclusio: command (v.1) ↔ fulfillment (v.15). Possessive shift -كَ→-هِ. Only command-fulfillment inclusio in dataset. Lexical+mirror+discourse+prosodic.

Scriptural authentication close. Theme: indictment→authentication. Mirror: frame A close. Discourse: إِنَّ impersonal. Lexical: صُحُفِ ×2 consecutive. Prosodic: الْأُولَى↔الْأَعْلَى near-consonant echo; مُوسَى sole proper-name terminal.

pivot.notes: Compound seam vv.9–10: v.9 reminder commanded (فَذَكِّرْ + ذ-ك-ر intra-verse doubling + conditional إِنْ), v.10 reception declared (سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخْشَى third-person indefinite). Central unit opens: both reminder audiences named (fearing one v.10, wretched one v.11). ذ-ك-ر root thread spans three units (vv.9/10/15) — most distributed single-root signal in dataset. Center 10, seam midpoint 9.5, offset -0.5, norm -0.026 — slight early lean, near-exact.
pivot.center_logic_note: compound_seam primary (vv.9–10) + 5/5 secondary at vv.18–19 (scriptural authentication close); primary confirmed by position.

ism_rabb_command_fulfillment_inclusio.v1: سَبِّحِ اسْمَ رَبِّكَ الْأَعْلَى — exalt the name of your Lord
ism_rabb_command_fulfillment_inclusio.v15: وَذَكَرَ اسْمَ رَبِّهِ فَصَلَّى — mentions the name of his Lord and prays
ism_rabb_command_fulfillment_inclusio.note: Only inclusio in dataset where the framing phrase is fulfilled rather than merely repeated. The opening imperative (v.1) finds its semantic completion at the mirror center (v.15). Possessive shift: -كَ (Prophet commanded) → -هِ (righteous one described) — command addressed to Prophet becomes universal description of the successful one. Compare Q.112 أَحَدٌ frame (purely lexical) — this is syntactic and semantic. First command-fulfillment inclusio in sequence.

dhikr_three_unit_root_thread.v9: فَذَكِّرْ — imperative: Prophet commanded to remind
dhikr_three_unit_root_thread.v10: سَيَذَّكَّرُ — passive future: the fearing one will be reminded
dhikr_three_unit_root_thread.v15: وَذَكَرَ — active perfect: the righteous one mentions the Lord's name
dhikr_three_unit_root_thread.note: Root ذ-ك-ر spans three distinct thematic units tracking the reminder's complete arc: command → reception → practice. Only root in dataset confirmed to span three distinct units with a narrative progression. Compare: Q.93 يَتِيم (two units), Q.92 مَالَهُ (two units), Q.88 عَيْن (two units). The ذ-ك-ر thread is longer and carries a developmental logic: imperative → passive future → active perfect.

bal_indictment_pattern.q89_echo: Q.89 v.17: كَلَّا بَلْ لَا تُكْرِمُونَ الْيَتِيمَ
bal_indictment_pattern.note: Both surahs use بَلْ + second-person plural imperfect to pivot from positive declaration to collective indictment. Q.87 v.16: بَلْ opens directly after success statement (v.14). Q.89 v.17: كَلَّا precedes بَلْ. Both mark structural pivot from surah's positive arc to corrective charge. Second confirmed cross-surah syntactic pivot pattern in sequence, after وَلَسَوْفَ يَرْضَى (Q.92/Q.93).

full_surah_alif_maqsura_zero_preterminal.note: All 19 verses carry alif maqsura [-a] terminal — third full-surah uniform terminal in dataset (after Q.92 [-a] ×21, Q.91 [-aha] ×15). Distinctive feature: zero pre-terminal consonant repetition across any two consecutive verses (الْأَعْلَى[-ʕl]/فَسَوَّى[-ww]/فَهَدَى[-d]/الْمَرْعَى[-ʕ]/أَحْوَى[-w]/تَنسَى[-s]/يَخْفَى[-f]/الْيُسْرَى[-r]/الذِّكْرَى[-r]... Only near-repeat: الْيُسْرَى/الذِّكْرَى vv.8/9 both /-r/). Complete vowel uniformity + near-maximum consonant variety. Full structural detection from passes 1–4 only.

ala_ula_frame_echo.note: الْأَعْلَى (v.1) and الْأُولَى (v.18) share near-identical pre-terminal consonant environment [-ʕla]. Within the sustained [-a] zone where all terminals sound alike, these two are the most phonetically proximate — the divine superlative of the opening command resonates with the authentication closing. Observable sonic frame within full-surah monorhyme.

suba7i_imperative_opening.note: سَبِّحِ — sole imperative opening in dataset. Q.90 opens with لَا أُقْسِمُ (first-person oath). Every other surah analyzed opens with oath (waw al-qasam or لَا أُقْسِمُ), creation/declaration, or interrogative. Q.87 opens with a direct command. Surah begins on the Prophet's obligation, not on divine testimony or oath. The frame then closes on the scriptural ground for that obligation (vv.18–19).

signal_table.prosody_note: الْأَعْلَى [-a]×1; sole imperative opening; الْأَعْلَى↔الْأُولَى echo opens

signal_table.verse_ar: إِلَّا مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ إِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ الْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَى

signal_table.lexical_signal: فَذَكِّرْ ذ-ك-ر ×1; الذِّكْرَى ×2 intra-verse; إِنْ conditional
signal_table.prosody_note: الذِّكْرَى [-a]×9; ذ-ك-ر intra-verse doubling; فَ rhythm break; imperative returns
الْأَشْقَى — geminated qāf; antithesis v.14 opens

signal_table.verse_ar: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَى
signal_table.lexical_signal: ثُمَّ; لَا/لَا double negation; يَمُوتُ/يَحْيَى pair
signal_table.prosody_note: يَحْيَى double-لَا intra-verse; most phonetically balanced verse
تَزَكَّى — geminated kāf ↔ الْأَشْقَى geminated qāf; antithetical phonetic pair sealed

signal_table.lexical_signal: اسْمَ رَبِّهِ ×2↓ inclusio sealed; ذ-ك-ر ×3; فَصَلَّى
signal_table.prosody_note: فَصَلَّى [-a]×15; اسْمَ رَبِّ v.1↔v.15 sealed; ذ-ك-ر thread complete
بَلْ rhythm break; second-person PLURAL; compare Q.89 v.17 بَلْ pattern
مُوسَى — sole proper-name terminal in sequence; surah closes on Moses

block_map.label: Imperative opening — سَبِّحِ; اسْمَ رَبِّكَ; الْأَعْلَى; sole imperative opening in dataset
Divine action — الَّذِي ×4; creation/provision/decay; فَ chain
Divine promise — سَنُقْرِئُكَ; ease promised; We+Prophet
PIVOT+CENTER — reminder commanded; two audiences; الْأَشْقَى fate
Success declared — قَدْ أَفْلَحَ; اسْمَ رَبِّهِ inclusio closes; ذ-ك-ر thread ends
Indictment — بَلْ تُؤْثِرُونَ; Hereafter better/more enduring
Frame close — scriptural authentication; صُحُفِ ×2; Abraham+Moses

structure_summary.note: 19-verse inverted structure with compound seam at vv.9–10 (5/5). Third full-surah uniform terminal in dataset (after Q.92/Q.91). Near-exact center: seam 9.5, center 10, offset −0.5, norm −0.026. اسْمَ رَبِّ command-fulfillment inclusio (vv.1/15): only inclusio in dataset where frame phrase is fulfilled rather than merely repeated. ذ-ك-ر three-unit root thread (vv.9/10/15): most distributed single-root signal in dataset. بَلْ + plural imperfect indictment pattern (v.16): cross-surah signal with Q.89. سَبِّحِ sole imperative opening in dataset. الْأَعْلَى/الْأُولَى near-consonant frame echo within full-surah monorhyme. Closes on مُوسَى — sole proper-name terminal.

verses.ar: لَّيْسَ لَهُمْ طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِن ضَرِيعٍ
لَّا يُسْمِنُ وَلَا يُغْنِي مِن جُوعٍ
أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى الْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَت

pivot.verse_ar: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى الْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَت

secondary_convergence.note: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ exact bridge: sole verbatim cross-unit phrase in surah. Theme: condemned→rewarded. Mirror: inner C opens. Prosodic: [-ah] resumes after /-ʕ/ interlude — the restart is audible. عَيْنٌ v.12↔عَيْنٍ v.5 antithesis opens.

Divine sovereignty close. Theme: punishment→reckoning owned. Mirror: frame A close. Discourse: إِنَّ إِلَيْنَا divine first-person plural. Lexical: إِلَيْنَا/عَلَيْنَا paired. Prosodic: إِيَابَهُمْ/حِسَابَهُمْ exact [-aːbahum] terminal ×2 — most phonetically complex pair in surah; pronoun sealed in final sound.

pivot.notes: Five signals at v.17: (1) Theme — garden furnishings → creation contemplation. (2) Mirror — inner C closes, creation evidence opens; رُفِعَت echoes مَرْفُوعَةٌ v.13 root ر-ف-ع cross-unit bridge. (3) Discourse — أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ third-person plural challenge; unnamed audience; present-tense evidence mode. (4) Lexical — كَيْفَ ×4 chain opens (×1 here, ×3 across vv.18–20). (5) Prosodic — rhyme break [-at]; [-ah] zone ends; passive perfect verb zone opens. Geometric center 13.5, v.17 offset +3.5, norm 0.135.
pivot.center_logic_note: single-verse primary v.17 (5/5) + 5/5 secondary at vv.25–26 (divine sovereignty close); primary confirmed by surah midpoint.

zones.note: Condemned faces — feminine active participle. الْغَاشِيَةِ/خَاشِعَةٌ/نَاصِبَةٌ/حَامِيَةً/آنِيَةٍ.
Food of condemned: ضَرِيعٍ [-iːʕ]/جُوعٍ [-uːʕ]. Pharyngeal fricative marks the most phonetically harsh unit. [-ah] interrupted.
Rewarded faces + garden. Active ptcp vv.8–12 → passive ptcp (مَفْعُولَة) vv.13–16. Morphological shift within sustained terminal zone.
Creation unit. خُلِقَت/رُفِعَت/نُصِبَت/سُطِحَت — passive perfect feminine. Grammar of divine creation IS the rhyme.
Prophet's duty couplet. مُذَكِّرٌ/بِمُصَيْطِرٍ. 2-verse zone.
Rejecter + punishment. وَكَفَرَ/الْأَكْبَرَ. 2-verse zone.
إِيَابَهُمْ/حِسَابَهُمْ — exact [-aːbahum] ×2. Pronoun 'their' encoded in surah's final sound. 2-verse zone.

seven_zone_rhyme_architecture.closing_acceleration: Zones 4/5/6 each exactly 2 verses — 2+2+2 accelerating cadence at surah close. Highest zone density in dataset (7 zones in 26 verses vs Q.89's 6 zones in 30 verses).
seven_zone_rhyme_architecture.two_ah_zones: Zones 1 and 2 both use feminine [-ah] terminals — same morphological class separates condemned (active ptcp) and rewarded (active then passive ptcp). The same phonetic form sounds both groups; only content distinguishes them.

maf3ulah_zone.note: Garden furnishings all grammatically passive — divinely arranged objects. The passive participle form IS the rhyme sound. Compare Q.90 مَفْعَلَةٍ triple (vv.14–16): same principle. Both surahs: grammatical pattern generates rhyme zone that encodes semantic content.

passive_perfect_zone.note: Four created things all described in passive perfect: 'how it was created/raised/set/levelled.' The passive perfect feminine ending [-at] IS the rhyme. The grammar of divine creation (passive — He created/raised/set/levelled) becomes the terminal sound. Clearest case in dataset of a verb morphology generating a complete rhyme zone.

ayn_antithetical_bridge.note: Root ع-ي-ن ×2 across the two faces units. Same noun (spring/water source) deployed antithetically: آنِيَةٍ (boiling, agonizing) ↔ جَارِيَةٌ (flowing, abundant). Water is the medium of both punishment and reward — its quality determines its function. Structurally equivalent to: Q.93 يَتِيم bridge (vv.6/9), Q.92 مَالَهُ bridge (vv.11/18). Single content noun crossing the central thematic boundary to encode binary logic.

hal_ataka_opening.note: Most intimate/conversational opening in dataset. Presupposes ongoing dialogue: 'Has the report reached you?' No other surah in dataset opens with direct second-person address to the Prophet as its first word. Prophet re-addressed at v.21 (فَذَكِّرْ imperative). The two direct addresses (v.1 / v.21) frame the eschatological and creation units (vv.2–20) as content delivered between two moments of prophetic address. Structure: [address v.1] + [content vv.2–20] + [address v.21] + [consequence vv.22–26].

rafa_cross_unit_root_bridge.v18: كَيْفَ رُفِعَت — how it was raised (root ر-ف-ع)
rafa_cross_unit_root_bridge.note: Root ر-ف-ع ×2 across unit boundary: passive ptcp in garden (v.13) ↔ passive perfect in creation (v.18). The raised couches of Paradise echo the raised sky of creation. Root bridge fuses the reward unit and creation evidence unit — what was divinely raised for the righteous corresponds to what was divinely raised as cosmic evidence. Fourth confirmed cross-unit root bridge pairing in this sequence (after Q.91 سَوَّاهَا, Q.92 مَالَهُ, Q.93 يَتِيم).
